#### 3.2.4 Extended Text Interaction<a href="#h.omuxci3o5dmg" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.omuxci3o5dmg" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

If an extended written response is required from the candidate then the
Extended Text Interaction (qti-extended-text-interaction) is
appropriate. An extended text interaction is a block Interaction that
allows the candidate to enter an extended amount of text.

**ExtendedTextInteraction Attributes (element:
qti-extended-text-interaction)**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th><strong>Name</strong></th>
<th><strong>Usage</strong></th>
<th><strong>Value(s)</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>base</td>
<td>optional</td>
<td>xs:int</td>
<td>10</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>string-identifier</td>
<td>optional</td>
<td>Identifier of a response variable with base-type=string</td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>expected-length</td>
<td>optional</td>
<td>Non-negative integer</td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>pattern-mask</td>
<td>optional</td>
<td>xs:string</td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>placeholder-text</td>
<td>optional</td>
<td>xs:string</td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>max-strings</td>
<td>optional</td>
<td>Non-negative integer</td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>min-strings</td>
<td>optional</td>
<td>Non-negative integer</td>
<td>0 (unlimited)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>expected-lines</td>
<td>optional</td>
<td>Non-negative integer</td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>format</td>
<td>optional</td>
<td>Vocabulary:<br />
 * plain<br />
 * preformatted<br />
 * xhtml</td>
<td>plain</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

The qti-extended-text-interaction must be bound to a response variable
of single, multiple, ordered or record cardinality. If the response
variable has record cardinality the fields in the record must be
'stringValue', 'floatValue', etc. Otherwise it must have a base-type of
string, integer or float. When bound to response variable with single
cardinality a single string of text is required from the candidate. When
bound to a response variable with multiple or ordered cardinality
several separate text strings may be required.

The extended text interaction allows a candidate to supply a text string
for a response. A basic example of the markup is shown below.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span>xmlns=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/qti/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot; </span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> xmlns:xsi=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> xsi:schemaLocation=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0 </span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_itemv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> identifier=&quot;bpig009&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> title=&quot;Extended Text example&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> time-dependent=&quot;false&quot; </span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> xml:lang=&quot;en-US&quot;&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span><span class="er"> </span>base-type=&quot;float&quot; cardinality=&quot;single&quot; identifier=&quot;SCORE&quot; /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Read this postcard from your English pen-friend, Sam.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt; </span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">blockquote</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;postcard&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Here is a postcard of my town. Please send me&lt;<span class="kw">br</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       A postcard from your town. What size is your Town?&lt;<span class="kw">br</span>/&gt;What is the nicest part of your town?&lt;<span class="kw">br</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       Where do you go in the evenings?&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Sam&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">blockquote</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;/<span class="kw">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">qti-extended-text-interaction</span><span class="er"> </span>response-identifier=&quot;RESPONSE&quot;&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;Write Sam a postcard. Answer the questions. Write 23-30 words&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-extended-text-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<figure
id="fig-a-sample-item-as-it-might-be-presented-during-an-assessment">
<img
src="/sites/default/files/specs/images/qti/3p0/impl3_extendedText.png"
width="600" alt="Writing a Postcard Illustration" />
<figcaption>Figure 9 <span class="fig-title"> A sample item as it might
be presented during an assessment. </span></figcaption>
</figure>

The cardinality of "single" in the qti-response-processing element means
that a single string of text is used in the response, though it may
include multiple words or paragraphs within that string.

The example does not include a response processing node, as automated
scoring of extended text responses is beyond the scope of the QTI
specification.

The shared interaction vocabulary for the extended text interaction is
intended to provide more precision when describing:

1.  Interaction height
2.  Character counter behavior
3.  Plain or Rich Text options
4.  A custom pattern-mask message
5.  Placeholder text

Responsive design implies that delivery systems should display an input
area (typically, this will be a \<textarea\> or \<div\> html element)
that has a width equal to 100% of the interaction's encapsulating
container. Consequently, there is no shared interaction vocabulary for
overriding the *width* of this interaction.

Go to the [1EdTech QTI 3 Standardized Shared Vocabulary and CSS
document](https://www.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/vocab#extended-text-interaction)
for details related to the Extended Text Interaction.

</div>

<div id="gap-match-interaction" class="section">

#### 3.2.5 Gap Match Interaction<a href="#h.7sroqk3xl8e1" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.7sroqk3xl8e1" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

A gap match interaction is a block Interaction that contains a number of
gaps that the candidate can fill from an associated set of choices. The
candidate must be able to review the content with the gaps filled in
context, as indicated by their choices.

The GapMatchInteraction.Type (qti-gap-match-interaction)  is similar to
Match Interaction (qti-match-interaction) except that the choices in the
second set are gaps (qti-gap) in a given passage of text and the task
involves selecting choices from the first set and using them to fill the
gaps. The same attributes are involved in controlling which, and how
many, pairings are allowed, though there is no match-max attribute for
the gaps because they can only ever have one associated choice. The
scoring is again done with a mapping.

**GapMatchInteration Attributes (element: qti-gap-match-interaction)**

| **Name**         | **Usage** | **Value(s)**        | **Default** |
|------------------|-----------|---------------------|-------------|
| max-associations | optional  | Non-negative number | 1           |
| min-associations | optional  | Non-negative number |             |
| shuffle          | optional  | boolean             | false       |

Sub-elements include qti-gap-text (GapText.Type) and qti-gap-img
(GapImg.Type).

**GapText Attributes (element: qti-gap-text)**

| **Name** | **Usage** | **Value(s)** | **Default** |
|----|----|----|----|
| identifier | required | Identifier |  |
| template-identifier | optional | Identifier of a template variable used to control the visibility of the qti-gap-text |  |
| show-hide | optional | Vocabulary:* show* hide | show |
| match-group | optional | IdentifierList |  |
| match-max | required | Non-negative integer |  |
| match-min | optional | Non-negative integer | 0 (unlimited) |

The qti-gap-img contains a single HTML object element.

**GapImg Attributes (element: qti-gap-img)**

| **Name** | **Usage** | **Value(s)** | **Default** |
|----|----|----|----|
| identifier | required | Identifier |  |
| template-identifier | optional | Identifier of a template variable used to control the visibility of the qti-gap-img |  |
| show-hide | optional | Vocabulary:* show* hide | show |
| match-group | optional | IdentifierList |  |
| match-max | required | Non-negative integer, 0 means unlimited |  |
| match-min | optional | Non-negative integer \<= match-max | 0 |
| object-label | optional | string |  |
| top | optional | *empty* |  |
| left | optional | *empty* |  |

Additional formatting may be applied within the qti-gap-text element
allowing for a greater variation.' Allowed formats include:

'br', 'img', 'xi:include', 'm:math', 'object', 'qti-printed-variable',
'a', 'abbr', 'acronym', 'b', 'big', 'cite', 'code', 'dfn', 'em',
'qti-feedback-inline', 'i', 'kbd', 'q', 'samp', 'small', 'span',
'strong', 'sub', 'sup', 'tt', 'var', 'qti-template-inline', 'bdi',
'bdo', 'label', 'ruby', 'ssml11:\*'.

The qti-gap-match-interaction must be bound to a response variable with
base-type directedPair and either single or multiple cardinality,
depending on the number of gaps. The choices represent the source of the
pairing and gaps the targets. Each gap can have at most one choice
associated with it. The maximum occurrence of the choices is controlled
by the match-max attribute of qti-gap-text or qti-gap-img.

The following is an example of a gap match interaction:

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 50%" />
<col style="width: 50%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> <span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> <span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0</span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st"> https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;gap-match-example-1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Gap Match Example 1&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> <span class="ot">time-dependent=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en-US&quot;</span> &gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;multiple&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;directedPair&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;W G1&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;Su G2&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-mapping</span> <span class="ot">default-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;-1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">lower-bound=</span><span class="st">&quot;0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-map-entry</span> <span class="ot">map-key=</span><span class="st">&quot;W G1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">mapped-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-map-entry</span> <span class="ot">map-key=</span><span class="st">&quot;Su G2&quot;</span> <span class="ot">mapped-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;2&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-mapping</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-gap-match-interaction</span> <span class="ot">max-associations=</span><span class="st">&quot;0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-choices-top&quot;</span> &gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;Identify the missing words in this famous quote from Shakespeare&#39;s Richard III.&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-gap-text</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;W&quot;</span> <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>&gt;winter&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-gap-text</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-gap-text</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;Sp&quot;</span> <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>&gt;spring&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-gap-text</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-gap-text</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;Su&quot;</span> <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>&gt;summer&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-gap-text</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-gap-text</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;A&quot;</span> <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>&gt;autumn&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-gap-text</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">blockquote</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          Now is the &lt;<span class="kw">qti-gap</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;G1&quot;</span>/&gt; of our discontent&lt;<span class="kw">br</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          Made glorious &lt;<span class="kw">qti-gap</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;G2&quot;</span>/&gt; by this sun of York;&lt;<span class="kw">br</span>/&gt; </span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          And all the clouds that lour&#39;d upon our house&lt;<span class="kw">br</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          In the deep bosom of the ocean buried.</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">blockquote</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-gap-match-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span></span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   <span class="ot">template=</span><span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/rptemplates/map_response.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="2"><figure
id="fig-expected-rendering-the-gap-choices-are-displayed-above-the-passage-text">
<img src="/sites/default/files/specs/images/qti/3p0/impl3image6.png"
width="400"
alt="There are 4 words within scored rectangles set side-by-side with each other. Below these boxed words are 4 lines of text including 2 inline rectangles (drop targets)." />
<figcaption>Figure 10 <span class="fig-title">Expected Rendering: The
gap choices are displayed above the passage text. </span></figcaption>
</figure></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

The shared interaction vocabulary for the Gap Match Interaction is
intended to provide more precision when describing:

1.  Positioning of the Gap Choices container with respect to the passage
    of text containing the Gaps.
2.  Gap Choices container width.
3.  Gap element widths.
4.  Custom max\|min-associations message overrides.

The full list of the Gap Match Interaction shared interaction vocabulary
is enumerated in the [1EdTech QTI 3 Standardized Shared Vocabulary and
CSS
document](https://www.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/vocab#gap-match-interaction).

</div>

<div id="hotspot" class="section">

#### 3.2.6 Hotspot Interaction<a href="#h.y2th8rh73267" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.y2th8rh73267" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

A HotspotInteraction.Type (qti-hotspot-interaction) is a graphical
interaction with a corresponding set of choices that are defined as
areas of the graphic image. The candidate's task is to select one or
more of the areas (hotspots).

The hotspot interaction should only be used when the spatial
relationship of the choices with respect to each other (as represented
by the graphic image) is important to the needs of the item. Otherwise,
Choice Interaction should be used instead with separate material for
each option.

The delivery engine must clearly indicate selected hotspots when such
hotspots are selected. If the shared interaction vocabulary class
*qti-unselected-hidden* is present, the delivery engine must hide the
hotspots in their unselected and unfocused state.  If the
qti-unselected-hidden is not present, indicating hotspots in their
unselected and unfocused state is left to the delivery engine.

**HotspotInteraction Attributes (element: qti-hotspot-interaction)**

| **Name**    | **Usage** | **Value(s)**        | **Default**   |
|-------------|-----------|---------------------|---------------|
| max-choices | optional  | Non-negative number | 1             |
| min-choices | optional  | Non-negative number | 0 (unlimited) |

The sub-element sequence for the qti-hotspot-interaction:

1.  either img, picture, or object (must have only 1, note that the use
    of object is deprecated in QTI 3)
2.  qti-hotspot-choice (at least 1)

**HotspotChoice Attributes (element: qti-hotspot-choice)**

| **Name** | **Usage** | **Value(s)** | **Default** |
|----|----|----|----|
| identifier | required | Identifier |  |
| template-identifier | optional | Identifier of a template variable used to control the visibility of the qti-hotspot-choice |  |
| show-hide | optional | Vocabulary:* show* hide | show |
| shape | required | Vocabulary:* circle* default* ellipse* poly* rect |  |
| coords | required | Coords.Type |  |
| hotspot-label | optional | string |  |

The hotspot interaction must be bound to a response variable with a
base-type of identifier and single or multiple cardinality.

The shared interaction vocabulary for the Hotspot Interaction is
intended to provide more precision when describing:

1.  Hotspot Selections theming.
2.  Custom max\|min-choices message overrides.

All information related to the Hotspot Interaction shared interaction
vocabulary is enumerated in the [1EdTech QTI 3 Standardized Shared
Vocabulary and CSS
document](https://www.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/vocab#hotspot-interaction).

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0</span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">  https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;QTI3-hotspot&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;hotspot&quot;</span> <span class="ot">time-dependent=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en-US&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;H&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;The picture illustrates four of the most popular lighthouses on outer Cape Cod, Massachusetts: </span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   Chatham Lighthouse, Highland Lighthouse, Nauset Lighthouse, and Race Point Lighthouse.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-hotspot-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">max-choices=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;Which one is Highland Lighthouse?&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/map_cape_cod.svg&quot;</span>  <span class="ot">width=</span><span class="st">&quot;700&quot;</span>  <span class="ot">height=</span><span class="st">&quot;550&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       <span class="ot">alt=</span><span class="st">&quot;a map of Cape Cod Massachusetts with 4 lighthouse icons distributed on the outer Cape&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-hotspot-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;R&quot;</span> <span class="ot">shape=</span><span class="st">&quot;circle&quot;</span> <span class="ot">coords=</span><span class="st">&quot;418,29,40&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-hotspot-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;H&quot;</span> <span class="ot">shape=</span><span class="st">&quot;circle&quot;</span> <span class="ot">coords=</span><span class="st">&quot;546,56,40&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-hotspot-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;N&quot;</span> <span class="ot">shape=</span><span class="st">&quot;circle&quot;</span> <span class="ot">coords=</span><span class="st">&quot;596,182,40&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-hotspot-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;C&quot;</span> <span class="ot">shape=</span><span class="st">&quot;circle&quot;</span> <span class="ot">coords=</span><span class="st">&quot;598,316,40&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-hotspot-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   <span class="ot">template=</span><span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/rptemplates/match_correct.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><figure
id="fig-example-of-a-hotspot-interaction-from-the-above-code">
<img src="/sites/default/files/specs/images/qti/3p0/impl3hotspot.png"
width="600"
alt="A map of Cape Cod with 4 lighthouse symbols distributed across the outer Cape." />
<figcaption>Figure 11 <span class="fig-title">Example of a Hotspot
Interaction from the above code.</span></figcaption>
</figure></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

<div id="hot-text" class="section">

#### 3.2.7 Hot Text Interaction<a href="#h.sbnpx830yzqu" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.sbnpx830yzqu" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

The HotTextInteraction.Type (qti-hottext-interaction) presents a set of
choices to the candidate represented as selectable runs of text embedded
within a surrounding context, such as a simple passage of text. Like
Choice Interaction, the candidate's task is to select one or more of the
choices, up to a maximum of max-choices.

The interaction is initialized from the qti-default-value of the
associated response variable, a NULL value indicating that no choices
are selected (the usual case).

**HotTextInteraction Attributes (element: qti-hottext-interaction)**

| **Name**    | **Usage** | **Value(s)**         | **Default**   |
|-------------|-----------|----------------------|---------------|
| min-choices | optional  | Non-negative integer | 0 (unlimited) |
| max-choices | optional  | Non-negative integer | 1             |

The qti-hottext-interaction must be bound to a response variable with a
base-type of identifier and single or multiple cardinality.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>   <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0 </span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">  https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;hot-text-example-1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Q12 Hot-text Interaction - Single Cardinality&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">adaptive=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">time-dependent=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en-US&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;B&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;0&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      Select the error in the following passage of text (or &lt;<span class="kw">em</span>&gt;No Error&lt;/<span class="kw">em</span>&gt; if there is none).</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-hottext-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">max-choices=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Sponsors of the Olympic Games &lt;<span class="kw">qti-hottext</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;A&quot;</span>&gt;who bought&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-hottext</span>&gt; </span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        advertising time on United States television</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-hottext</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;B&quot;</span>&gt;includes&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-hottext</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-hottext</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;C&quot;</span>&gt;at least&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-hottext</span>&gt; a dozen international firms</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-hottext</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;D&quot;</span>&gt;whose&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-hottext</span>&gt; names are familiar to American consumers.</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-hottext</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;E&quot;</span>&gt;No error.&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-hottext</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-hottext-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">template=</span><span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/rptemplates/match_correct.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><figure
id="fig-example-of-a-hot-text-interaction-from-the-above-code">
<img src="/sites/default/files/specs/images/qti/3p0/impl3hotText.png"
width="600"
alt="A map of Cape Cod with 4 lighthouse symbols distributed across the outer Cape." />
<figcaption>Figure 12 <span class="fig-title">Example of a Hot Text
Interaction from the above code.</span></figcaption>
</figure></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

The above example demonstrates an interaction with a single selection.
For multiple selections, the response processing cardinality would be
"multiple" and you may choose to limit the number of selections using
the max-choices attribute in the qti-hottext-interaction element (or set
to "0" for unlimited/all selections).

The shared interaction vocabulary for the Hot Text Interaction is
intended to provide more precision when describing:

1.  Hiding the input control of the Hot Text choices.
2.  Custom max\|min-choices message overrides.

All information related to the Hot Text Interaction shared interaction
vocabulary is enumerated in the [1EdTech QTI 3 Standardized Shared
Vocabulary and CSS
document](https://www.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/vocab#hot-text-interaction).

</div>

<div id="inline-choice" class="section">

#### 3.2.8 Inline Choice<a href="#h.8zaq47h31112" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.8zaq47h31112" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

The InlineChoiceInteraction.Type (qti-inline-choice-interaction) is an
inline interaction to display a set of simple text choices in context in
a surrounding text, which may be subject to variable value substitution
with qti-printed-variable.

**InlineChoiceInteraction Attributes (element:
qti-inline-choice-interaction)**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th><strong>Name</strong></th>
<th><strong>Usage</strong></th>
<th><strong>Value(s)</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>identifier</td>
<td>required</td>
<td>Identifier</td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>required</td>
<td>optional</td>
<td>boolean</td>
<td><p>false</p>
<p>If <em>true</em> then a choice must be selected by the candidate in
order to form a valid response to the interaction.</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>shuffle</td>
<td>optional</td>
<td>boolean</td>
<td>false</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

The sub-element seCoolquence of qti-inline-choice-interaction is:

1.  qti-label (maximum of 1)
2.  qti-inline-choice (at least 1)

**InlineChoice Attributes (element: qti-inline-choice)**

| **Name** | **Usage** | **Value(s)** | **Default** |
|----|----|----|----|
| identifier | required | Identifier |  |
| template-identifier | optional | Identifier of a template variable used to control the visibility of the choice |  |
| show-hide | optional | Vocabulary:* show* hide | show |
| fixed | optional | boolean | false |

When rendering an inline choice interaction, the common implementation
is an embodiment of a \<select\> html form element or a combo box form
control.

Below is an example of an inline choice interaction that allows the
candidate to select one answer option to respond to the prompt.

**Example: qti-inline-choice-interaction**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 50%" />
<col style="width: 50%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0</span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">  https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;QTI3-inline-choice&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Inline Choice Interaction&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">time-dependent=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en-US&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;Y&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Identify the missing word in this famous quote from Shakespeare&#39;s Richard III.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">blockquote</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Now is the winter of our discontent</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">br</span>/&gt;Made glorious summer by this sun of</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">shuffle=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;G&quot;</span>&gt;Gloucester&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;L&quot;</span>&gt;Lancaster&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;Y&quot;</span>&gt;York&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice-interaction</span>&gt;;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">br</span>/&gt;And all the clouds that lour&#39;d upon our house</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">br</span>/&gt;In the deep bosom of the ocean buried.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">blockquote</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span></span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   <span class="ot">template=</span><span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/rptemplates/match_correct.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="2"><figure
id="fig-expected-rendering-the-inline-choice-interaction-rendered-inline-not-block-with-the-surrounding-inline-markup">
<img src="/sites/default/files/specs/images/qti/3p0/impl3image81.png"
style="width: 443.50px; height: 160.68px; margin-left: 0.00px; margin-top: 0.00px; transform: rotate(0.00rad) translateZ(0px); -webkit-transform: rotate(0.00rad) translateZ(0px);"
alt="A sentence of text is shown, with 4 lines of a poem below. The second line of the poem ends with a drop down box, with 3 choices displayed." />
<figcaption>Figure 13 <span class="fig-title"> Expected Rendering: The
inline choice interaction rendered inline (not block) with the
surrounding inline markup. </span></figcaption>
</figure></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

The bulk of the shared interaction vocabulary for this interaction adds
further definition to the presentation width of the selection element by
utilizing the class attribute.

Go to the [QTI 3 Standardized Shared Vocabulary and
CSS](https://www.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/vocab#inline-choice-interaction)
section on Inline Choice for full details.

</div>

<div id="match" class="section">

#### 3.2.9 Match Interaction<a href="#h.be4ll1tm4t99" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.be4ll1tm4t99" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

A MatchInteraction.Type (qti-match-interaction) is a blockInteraction
that presents candidates with two sets of choices and allows them to
create associations between pairs of choices in the two sets, but not
between pairs of choices in the same set. Further restrictions can still
be placed on the allowable associations using the match-max
characteristic of the choices.

The sub-element within qti-match-interaction is qti-simple-match-set.
**MatchInteration Attributes (element: qti-match-interaction)**

| **Name**         | **Usage** | **Value(s)**        | **Default** |
|------------------|-----------|---------------------|-------------|
| max-associations | optional  | Non-negative number | 1           |
| min-associations | optional  | Non-negative number |             |
| shuffle          | optional  | boolean             | false       |

The sub-element of qti-match-interaction is qti-simple-match-set
(SimpleMatchSet.Type). The qti-simple-match-set has an optional "id"
attribute which contains a UniqueIdentifier.Type. The
qti-simple-match-set contains an ordered set of choices using
qti-simple-associable-choice (SimpleAssociableChoice.Type) elements.

**SimpleAssociableChoice Attributes (element:
qti-simple-associable-choice)**

| **Name**            | **Usage** | **Value(s)**            | **Default**   |
|---------------------|-----------|-------------------------|---------------|
| identifier          | required  | Identifier              |               |
| template-identifier | optional  | Identifier              |               |
| show-hide           | optional  | Vocabulary:* show* hide | show          |
| match-group         | optional  | IdentifierList          |               |
| match-max           | required  | Non-negative integer    |               |
| match-min           | optional  | Non-negative integer    | 0 (unlimited) |
| fixed               | optional  | boolean                 | false         |

The match interaction must be bound to a response variable with
base-type directedPair and either single or multiple cardinality.

In the match interaction example below, the candidate's response is
declared to have directedPair because the task involves pairing up
choices from a source set into a target set. In this case characters
from plays with the names of the plays from which they are drawn. Notice
that match-max on the characters (the first set of associable choices)
is "1" because each character can be in only one play but it is "4" on
the plays (the second set of associable choices) because each play could
contain all the characters. For example, Demetrius and Lysander were
both in A Midsummer-Night's Dream, so in the correct response that play
has two associations. In the mapping used for response processing these
two associations have been awarded only a half a mark each.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0</span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;QTI3-match&quot;</span>  <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Match Example&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">time-dependent=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en-US&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;multiple&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;directedPair&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;C R&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;D M&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;L M&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;P T&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-mapping</span> <span class="ot">default-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-map-entry</span> <span class="ot">map-key=</span><span class="st">&quot;C R&quot;</span> <span class="ot">mapped-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-map-entry</span> <span class="ot">map-key=</span><span class="st">&quot;D M&quot;</span> <span class="ot">mapped-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;0.5&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-map-entry</span> <span class="ot">map-key=</span><span class="st">&quot;L M&quot;</span> <span class="ot">mapped-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;0.5&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-map-entry</span> <span class="ot">map-key=</span><span class="st">&quot;P T&quot;</span> <span class="ot">mapped-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-mapping</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-match-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">max-associations=</span><span class="st">&quot;4&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;Match the following characters to the Shakespeare play they appeared in:&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-match-set</span>&gt; </span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-associable-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;C&quot;</span> <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>&gt;Capulet&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-associable-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-associable-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;D&quot;</span> <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>&gt;Demetrius&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-associable-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-associable-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;L&quot;</span> <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>&gt;Lysander&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-associable-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-associable-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;P&quot;</span> <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>&gt;Prospero&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-associable-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-match-set</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-match-set</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-associable-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;M&quot;</span> <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;4&quot;</span>&gt;A Midsummer-Night&#39;s Dream&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-associable-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-associable-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;R&quot;</span> <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;4&quot;</span>&gt;Romeo and Juliet&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-associable-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-associable-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;T&quot;</span> <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;4&quot;</span>&gt;The Tempest&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-associable-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-match-set</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-match-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span> <span class="ot">template=</span><span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/rptemplates/map_response.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><figure id="fig-example-of-a-match-interaction-from-the-above-code">
<img src="/sites/default/files/specs/images/qti/3p0/impl3image57.png"
width="800"
alt="There are 4 words within scored rectangles set side-by-side with each other. Below these boxed words are 4 lines of text including 2 inline rectangles (drop targets)." />
<figcaption>Figure 14 <span class="fig-title">Example of a Match
Interaction from the above code. </span></figcaption>
</figure></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

The shared interaction vocabulary for the Match Interaction is intended
to provide more precision when describing:

1.  Non-tabular Match Interaction positioning of the first Simple Match
    Set choices with respect to the second Simple Match Set choices.
2.  Tabular Match Interaction styling.
3.  Custom max\|min-associations message overrides.

Go to the [QTI 3 Standardized Shared Vocabulary and
CSS](https://www.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/vocab#match-interaction)
section on Match Interaction for full details.

</div>

<div id="order" class="section">

#### 3.2.10 Order<a href="#h.4n8gips6tlv4" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.4n8gips6tlv4" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

In an OrderInteraction.Type (qti-order-interaction) the candidate's task
is to reorder the choices, the order in which the choices are displayed
initially is significant. By default the candidate's task is to order
all of the choices but a subset of the choices can be requested using
the max-choices and min-choices attributes. When specified the candidate
must first select a (sub)set of the choices and then impose an ordering
on them.

**OrderInteraction Attributes (element: qti-order-interaction)**

| **Name**    | **Usage** | **Value(s)**                      | **Default** |
|-------------|-----------|-----------------------------------|-------------|
| min-choices | optional  | Non-negative number               |             |
| max-choices | optional  | Non-negative number               |             |
| orientation | optional  | Vocabulary:* horizontal* vertical |             |
| shuffle     | optional  | false                             |             |

The sub-element of qti-order-interaction is qti-simple-choice
(SimpleChoice.Type) where there must be at least one qti-simple-choice
in the interaction to be valid, and at least 2 choices to be useful as
an order interaction.

**SimpleChoice (element: qti-simple-choice) Attributes**

| **Name**            | **Usage** | **Value(s)**            | **Default** |
|---------------------|-----------|-------------------------|-------------|
| identifier          | required  | Identifier              |             |
| template-identifier | optional  | Identifier              |             |
| show-hide           | optional  | Vocabulary:* show* hide | show        |
| fixed               | optional  | boolean                 | false       |

This example below illustrates the Order Interaction. The candidate's
response is declared to have ordered and the correct value is therefore
composed of an ordered list of value. The question uses the standard
response processing template Match Correct to score 1 for a completely
correct answer and 0 otherwise.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0</span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;QTI3-order&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Order Interaction Example&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">time-dependent=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en-US&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;ordered&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;DriverC&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;DriverA&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;DriverB&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;The following F1 drivers finished on the podium in the first ever </span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        Grand Prix of Bahrain.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-order-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">orientation=</span><span class="st">&quot;horizontal&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Rearrange them into the correct finishing order.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;DriverA&quot;</span>&gt;Rubens Barrichello&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;DriverB&quot;</span>&gt;Jenson Button&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;DriverC&quot;</span>&gt;Michael Schumacher&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-order-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span></span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   <span class="ot">template=</span><span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/rptemplates/match_correct.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><figure
id="fig-expected-rendering-order-choices-above-the-targets-with-no-target-labels-displayed">
<img
src="/sites/default/files/specs/images/qti/3p0/impl3_orderInteraction.png"
width="600"
alt="3 blue boxes with names in them are displayed side-by-side in a single row." />
<figcaption>Figure 15 <span class="fig-title">Example of an Order
Interaction</span></figcaption>
</figure></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

The shared interaction vocabulary for the Order Interaction is intended
to provide more precision when describing:

1.  Target Labels
2.  Target Label Suffixes
3.  Choices \| Targets Container Positioning
4.  Choices Container Widths
5.  Custom max\|min -associations Messages

Go to the [QTI 3 Standardized Shared Vocabulary and
CSS](https://www.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/vocab#order-interaction)
section on Order Interaction for full details.

</div>

<div id="graphic-order" class="section">

#### 3.2.11 Graphic Order Interaction<a href="#h.973pocg92wxf" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.973pocg92wxf" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

A GraphicOrderInteraction.Type (qti-associate-interaction) is a graphic
interaction with a corresponding set of choices that are defined as
areas of the graphic image. The candidate's task is to impose an
ordering on the areas (hotspots). The order hotspot interaction should
only be used when the spatial relationship of the choices with respect
to each other (as represented by the graphic image) is important to the
needs of the item.

Otherwise, Order interaction should be used instead with separate
material for each option. The delivery engine must clearly indicate all
defined area(s) of the image.

**Graphic Order Interaction Attributes (element:
qti-graphic-order-interaction)**

| **Name** | **Usage** | **Value(s)** | **Default** |
|----|----|----|----|
| max-choices | optional | Non-negative number | If unspecified, all of the choices may be ordered. |
| min-choices | optional | Non-negative number | If unspecified, all of the choices *must* be ordered and max-choices is ignored. |

The sub-element sequence for the qti-graphic-order-interaction:

1.  either img, picture, or object (must have only 1, object is
    deprecated)
2.  qti-hotspot-choice (at least 1)

**HotspotChoice Attributes (element: qti-hotspot-choice)**

| **Name** | **Usage** | **Value(s)** | **Default** |
|----|----|----|----|
| identifier | required | Identifier |  |
| template-identifier | optional | Identifier of a template variable used to control the visibility of the qti-hotspot-choice |  |
| show-hide | optional | Vocabulary:* show* hide | show |
| shape | required | Vocabulary:* circle* default* ellipse* poly* rect |  |
| coords | required | Coords.Type |  |
| hotspot-label | optional | string |  |

The graphic order interaction must be bound to a response variable with
a base-type of identifier and ordered cardinality.

**Example: Demonstrates qti-graphic-order-interaction**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 50%" />
<col style="width: 50%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0</span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;QTI3-graphic-order&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Graphic Order Interaction Example&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">time-dependent=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en-US&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;ordered&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;A&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;D&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;C&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;B&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
