<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Lorna is flying back home to the UK. Ideally, she would like to fly in directly to her </span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    home town of Glasgow. Edinburgh is her second choice and, if necessary, she could fly into </span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    London and pick up an internal connecting flight. Although she has been offered a cheap flight </span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    to Manchester it remains her least favourite option as connecting flights to Glasgow are not </span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    very reliable from there.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-graphic-order-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;Mark the airports shown on the map according to Lorna&#39;s preferences.&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/ukair.png&quot;</span> <span class="ot">width=</span><span class="st">&quot;206&quot;</span> <span class="ot">height=</span><span class="st">&quot;280&quot;</span> <span class="ot">alt=</span><span class="st">&quot;map of airports of the United Kingdom&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-hotspot-choice</span> <span class="ot">shape=</span><span class="st">&quot;circle&quot;</span> <span class="ot">coords=</span><span class="st">&quot;78,102,8&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;A&quot;</span> <span class="ot">aria-label=</span><span class="st">&quot;Airport A&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-hotspot-choice</span> <span class="ot">shape=</span><span class="st">&quot;circle&quot;</span> <span class="ot">coords=</span><span class="st">&quot;117,171,8&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;B&quot;</span> <span class="ot">aria-label=</span><span class="st">&quot;Airport B&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-hotspot-choice</span> <span class="ot">shape=</span><span class="st">&quot;circle&quot;</span> <span class="ot">coords=</span><span class="st">&quot;166,227,8&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;C&quot;</span> <span class="ot">aria-label=</span><span class="st">&quot;Airport C&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-hotspot-choice</span> <span class="ot">shape=</span><span class="st">&quot;circle&quot;</span> <span class="ot">coords=</span><span class="st">&quot;100,102,8&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;D&quot;</span> <span class="ot">aria-label=</span><span class="st">&quot;Airport D&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-graphic-order-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="ot">template=</span><span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/rptemplates/match_correct.xml&quot;</span> /&gt;  </span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="2"><figure id="fig-graphic-order-interaction-example">
<img
src="/sites/default/files/specs/images/qti/3p0/impl3_graphicOrder.png"
width="600"
alt="2 paragraphs of text are shown above an image. The image is a line drawing of the United Kingdom. There are 4 places that have icons of airplanes placed on the drawing. Over 2 of the icons are large blue numbers. 2 large numbers are placed off to the side of the drawing." />
<figcaption>Figure 16 <span class="fig-title">Graphic Order Interaction
example, partial response shown.</span></figcaption>
</figure></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

<div id="associate" class="section">

#### 3.2.12 Associate Interaction<a href="#h.7cs7637r54vv" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.7cs7637r54vv" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

An AssociateInteraction.Type (qti-associate-interaction) is a block
interaction that presents candidates with a number of  choices and
allows them to create associations between them.

**AssociateInteraction Attributes (element: qti-associate-interaction)**

| **Name**         | **Usage** | **Value(s)**        | **Default**   |
|------------------|-----------|---------------------|---------------|
| max-associations | optional  | Non-negative number | 1             |
| min-associations | optional  | Non-negative number | 0 (unlimited) |
| shuffle          | optional  | boolean             | false         |

The sub-element of qti-associate-interaction is
qti-simple-associable-choice, where there must be at least one
qti-simple-associable-choice.

**SimpleAssociableChoice Attributes (element:
qti-simple-associable-choice)**

| **Name**            | **Usage** | **Value(s)**            | **Default**   |
|---------------------|-----------|-------------------------|---------------|
| identifier          | required  | Identifier              |               |
| template-identifier | optional  | Identifier              |               |
| show-hide           | optional  | Vocabulary:* show* hide | show          |
| match-max           | required  | Non-negative integer    |               |
| match-min           | optional  | Non-negative integer    | 0 (unlimited) |
| fixed               | optional  | boolean                 |               |

The qti-associate-interaction must be bound to a response variable with
base-type pair and either single or multiple cardinality.

Example: Demonstrates qti-associate-interaction allowing for 3 pairings

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0</span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;QTI3-associate&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Classic Associate Interaction Example&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">time-dependent=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en-US&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;multiple&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;pair&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;A P&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;C M&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;D L&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-mapping</span> <span class="ot">default-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-map-entry</span> <span class="ot">map-key=</span><span class="st">&quot;A P&quot;</span> <span class="ot">mapped-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;2&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-map-entry</span> <span class="ot">map-key=</span><span class="st">&quot;C M&quot;</span> <span class="ot">mapped-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-map-entry</span> <span class="ot">map-key=</span><span class="st">&quot;D L&quot;</span> <span class="ot">mapped-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-mapping</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-associate-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">max-associations=</span><span class="st">&quot;3&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        Hidden in this list of characters from famous</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        Shakespeare plays are three pairs of rivals. Can you match</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        each character to his adversary?</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-associable-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;A&quot;</span> <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        Antonio</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-associable-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-associable-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;C&quot;</span> <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        Capulet</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-associable-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-associable-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;D&quot;</span> <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        Demetrius</span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-associable-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-associable-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;L&quot;</span> <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        Lysander</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-associable-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-associable-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;M&quot;</span> <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        Montague</span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-associable-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-associable-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;P&quot;</span> <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-44"><a href="#cb1-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        Prospero</span>
<span id="cb1-45"><a href="#cb1-45" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-associable-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-46"><a href="#cb1-46" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-associate-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-47"><a href="#cb1-47" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-48"><a href="#cb1-48" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-49"><a href="#cb1-49" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="ot">template=</span><span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/rptemplates/map_response.xml&quot;</span> /&gt;  </span>
<span id="cb1-50"><a href="#cb1-50" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><figure id="fig-graphic-associate-interaction-example">
<img src="/sites/default/files/specs/images/qti/3p0/impl3_associate.png"
style="padding-top: 1em;" width="600"
alt="3 lines of text are shown above an image. The image contains 3 long rectangular boxes labeled with text. Below that are six smaller boxes, 3 containing text labels and 3 unlabled. The two boxes can be moved to the emplty boxes." />
<figcaption>Figure 17 <span class="fig-title">Associate Interaction
example with a partial response. </span></figcaption>
</figure></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

<div id="graphic-associate" class="section">

#### 3.2.13 Graphic Associate Interaction<a href="#h.acwq9g2z1cwt" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.acwq9g2z1cwt" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

A GraphicAssociateInteraction.Type (qti-graphic-associate-interaction)
is a graphic interaction with a corresponding set of choices that are
defined as areas of the graphic image. The candidate's task is to
associate the areas (hotspots) with each other. The graphic associate
interaction should only be used when the graphical relationship of the
choices with respect to each other (as represented by the graphic image)
is important to the needs of the item. Otherwise, an Associate
Interaction should be used instead with separate material for each
option. The delivery engine must clearly indicate all defined area(s) of
the image.

**AssociateInteraction Attributes (element: qti-associate-interaction)**

| **Name**         | **Usage** | **Value(s)**        | **Default** |
|------------------|-----------|---------------------|-------------|
| max-associations | optional  | Non-negative number | 1           |
| min-associations | optional  | Non-negative number |             |

The sub-element sequence:

1.  img, picture, or object (limited to a single occurrence, object is
    deprecated)
2.  qti-associable-hotspot (at least 1)

**AssociableHotspot Attributes (element: qti-associable-hotspot)**

| **Name** | **Usage** | **Value(s)** | **Default** |
|----|----|----|----|
| identifier | required | Identifier |  |
| template-identifier | optional | Identifier |  |
| show-hide | optional | Vocabulary:* show* hide | show |
| match-group | optional | IdentifierList |  |
| shape | required | Vocabulary:* circle* default* ellipse* poly* rect |  |
| coords | required | Coords.Type |  |
| hotspot-label | optional | string |  |
| match-max | required | Non-negative integer |  |
| match-min | optional | Non-negative integer | 0 (unlimited) |

The qti-graphic-associate-interaction must be bound to a response
variable with base-type pair and either single or multiple cardinality.

**Example: Demonstrates qti-graphic-associate-interaction**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 50%" />
<col style="width: 50%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0</span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_itemv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;example-graphic-assoc-1&quot;</span>  <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Graphic Associate Example 1&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">time-dependent=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en-US&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;multiple&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;pair&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;C B&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;C D&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-mapping</span> <span class="ot">lower-bound=</span><span class="st">&quot;0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">default-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-map-entry</span> <span class="ot">map-key=</span><span class="st">&quot;A B&quot;</span> <span class="ot">mapped-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;-1&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-map-entry</span> <span class="ot">map-key=</span><span class="st">&quot;A C&quot;</span> <span class="ot">mapped-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;-1&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-map-entry</span> <span class="ot">map-key=</span><span class="st">&quot;A D&quot;</span> <span class="ot">mapped-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;-1&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-map-entry</span> <span class="ot">map-key=</span><span class="st">&quot;B D&quot;</span> <span class="ot">mapped-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;-1&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-map-entry</span> <span class="ot">map-key=</span><span class="st">&quot;B C&quot;</span> <span class="ot">mapped-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-map-entry</span> <span class="ot">map-key=</span><span class="st">&quot;C D&quot;</span> <span class="ot">mapped-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-mapping</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      Frizz, a new low cost airline, already operates a service</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      connecting Manchester and Edinburgh but has recently opened two</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      new routes: a service between London and Edinburgh and one</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      between London and Manchester.</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-graphic-associate-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">max-associations=</span><span class="st">&quot;3&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;Mark the airline&#39;s new routes on the airport map.&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/ukair.svg&quot;</span> <span class="ot">alt=</span><span class="st">&quot;Map of United Kingdom airports&quot;</span> <span class="ot">width=</span><span class="st">&quot;206&quot;</span> <span class="ot">height=</span><span class="st">&quot;280&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-associable-hotspot</span> <span class="ot">shape=</span><span class="st">&quot;circle&quot;</span> <span class="ot">coords=</span><span class="st">&quot;78,102,10&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;A&quot;</span> <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;3&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-associable-hotspot</span> <span class="ot">shape=</span><span class="st">&quot;circle&quot;</span> <span class="ot">coords=</span><span class="st">&quot;117,171,10&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;B&quot;</span> <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;3&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-associable-hotspot</span> <span class="ot">shape=</span><span class="st">&quot;circle&quot;</span> <span class="ot">coords=</span><span class="st">&quot;166,227,10&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;C&quot;</span> <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;3&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-associable-hotspot</span> <span class="ot">shape=</span><span class="st">&quot;circle&quot;</span> <span class="ot">coords=</span><span class="st">&quot;100,102,10&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;D&quot;</span>  <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;3&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-graphic-associate-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">p</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;interaction-instruction&quot;</span> &gt;Drag the route markers by their ends to connect </span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   the airports.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-44"><a href="#cb1-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-45"><a href="#cb1-45" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   <span class="ot">template=</span><span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/rptemplates/map_response.xml&quot;</span> /&gt;  </span>
<span id="cb1-46"><a href="#cb1-46" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
<td></td>
</tr>

</figure></td>

<figcaption>Figure 19 <span class="fig-title">Graphic Associate
Interaction example's correct response. </span></figcaption>

Alternatively, you may wish to use the picture element to reference the
source for the more highly compressed WebP version and with a PNG
alternative within the img element for browsers that do not support
WebP.

**Example: Demonstrates qti-graphic-associate-interaction with picture
element**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0</span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">  https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_itemv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;example-graphic-assoc-1alt&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Alternative Graphic Associate Example&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en-US&quot;</span> <span class="ot">time-dependent=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;multiple&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;pair&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;C B&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;C D&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-mapping</span> <span class="ot">lower-bound=</span><span class="st">&quot;0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">default-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-map-entry</span> <span class="ot">map-key=</span><span class="st">&quot;A B&quot;</span> <span class="ot">mapped-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;-1&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-map-entry</span> <span class="ot">map-key=</span><span class="st">&quot;A C&quot;</span> <span class="ot">mapped-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;-1&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-map-entry</span> <span class="ot">map-key=</span><span class="st">&quot;A D&quot;</span> <span class="ot">mapped-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;-1&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-map-entry</span> <span class="ot">map-key=</span><span class="st">&quot;B D&quot;</span> <span class="ot">mapped-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;-1&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-map-entry</span> <span class="ot">map-key=</span><span class="st">&quot;B C&quot;</span> <span class="ot">mapped-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-map-entry</span> <span class="ot">map-key=</span><span class="st">&quot;C D&quot;</span> <span class="ot">mapped-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-mapping</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        Frizz, a new low cost airline, already operates a service</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        connecting Manchester and Edinburgh but has recently opened two</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        new routes: a service between London and Edinburgh and one</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        between London and Manchester.</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-graphic-associate-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">max-associations=</span><span class="st">&quot;3&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          Mark the airline&#39;s new routes on the airport map:</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">picture</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &lt;<span class="kw">source</span> <span class="ot">srcset=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/ukair.webp&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;image/webp&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/ukair.png&quot;</span> <span class="ot">alt=</span><span class="st">&quot;Map of United Kingdom airports&quot;</span> <span class="ot">width=</span><span class="st">&quot;206&quot;</span> <span class="ot">height=</span><span class="st">&quot;280&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">picture</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-associable-hotspot</span> <span class="ot">shape=</span><span class="st">&quot;circle&quot;</span> <span class="ot">coords=</span><span class="st">&quot;78,102,10&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;A&quot;</span> <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;3&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-associable-hotspot</span> <span class="ot">shape=</span><span class="st">&quot;circle&quot;</span> <span class="ot">coords=</span><span class="st">&quot;117,171,10&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;B&quot;</span> <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;3&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-associable-hotspot</span> <span class="ot">shape=</span><span class="st">&quot;circle&quot;</span> <span class="ot">coords=</span><span class="st">&quot;166,227,10&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;C&quot;</span> <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;3&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-associable-hotspot</span> <span class="ot">shape=</span><span class="st">&quot;circle&quot;</span> <span class="ot">coords=</span><span class="st">&quot;100,102,10&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;D&quot;</span>  <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;3&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-44"><a href="#cb1-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-graphic-associate-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-45"><a href="#cb1-45" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Drag the route markers by their ends to connect the airports. &lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-46"><a href="#cb1-46" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-47"><a href="#cb1-47" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-48"><a href="#cb1-48" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   <span class="ot">template=</span><span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/rptemplates/map_response.xml&quot;</span> /&gt;  </span>
<span id="cb1-49"><a href="#cb1-49" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

<div id="graphic-gap-match" class="section">

#### 3.2.14 Graphic Gap Match Interaction<a href="#h.ous502odpreo" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.ous502odpreo" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

A GraphicGapMatchInteraction.Type (qti-graphic-gap-match-interaction) is
a graphical interaction with a set of gaps that are defined as areas
(hotspots) of the graphic image and an additional set of gap choices
that are defined outside the image. The candidate must associate the gap
choices with the gaps in the image and be able to review the image with
the gaps filled in context, as indicated by their choices.

Care should be taken when designing these interactions to ensure that
the gaps in the image are a suitable size to receive the required gap
choices. It must be clear to the candidate which hotspot each choice has
been associated with. When associated, choices must appear wholly inside
the gaps if at all possible and, where overlaps are required, should not
hide each other completely. If the candidate indicates the association
by positioning the choice over the gap (e.g. drag and drop) the system
should 'snap' it to the nearest position that satisfies these
requirements.

**GraphicGapMatchInteraction Attributes (element:
qti-graphic-gap-match-interaction)**

| **Name**         | **Usage** | **Value(s)**        | **Default** |
|------------------|-----------|---------------------|-------------|
| max-associations | optional  | Non-negative number | 1           |
| min-associations | optional  | Non-negative number |             |

The sequence of elements within the qti-graphic-gap-match-interaction
is:

- qti-prompt
- either img, picture, or object (deprecated)
- qti-gap-text
- qti-gap-img
- qti-associable-hotspot

**GapText Attributes (element: qti-gap-text)**

| **Name**            | **Usage** | **Value(s)**            | **Default**   |
|---------------------|-----------|-------------------------|---------------|
| identifier          | required  | Identifier              |               |
| template-identifier | optional  | Identifier              |               |
| show-hide           | optional  | Vocabulary:* show* hide | show          |
| match-group         | optional  | IdentifierList          |               |
| match-max           | required  | Non-negative integer    |               |
| match-min           | optional  | Non-negative integer    | 0 (unlimited) |

**GapImg Attributes (element: qti-gap-img)**

| **Name**            | **Usage** | **Value(s)**            | **Default**   |
|---------------------|-----------|-------------------------|---------------|
| identifier          | required  | Identifier              |               |
| template-identifier | optional  | Identifier              |               |
| show-hide           | optional  | Vocabulary:* show* hide | show          |
| match-group         | optional  | IdentifierList          |               |
| match-max           | required  | Non-negative integer    |               |
| match-min           | optional  | Non-negative integer    | 0 (unlimited) |
| object-label        | optional  | string                  |               |
| top                 | optional  | *empty*                 |               |
| left                | optional  | *empty*                 |               |

**AssociableHotspot Attributes (element: qti-associable-hotspot)**

| **Name** | **Usage** | **Value(s)** | **Default** |
|----|----|----|----|
| identifier | required | Identifier |  |
| template-identifier | optional | Identifier |  |
| show-hide | optional | Vocabulary:* show* hide | show |
| match-group | optional | IdentifierList |  |
| shape | required | Vocabulary:* circle* default* ellipse* poly* rect |  |
| coords | required | Coords.Type |  |
| hotspot-label | optional | string |  |
| match-max | required | Non-negative integer |  |
| match-min | optional | Non-negative integer | 0 (unlimited) |

The graphic-gap-match-interaction must be bound to a response variable
with base-type directedPair and multiple cardinality. The choices
represent the source of the pairing and the gaps in the image (the
hotspots) the targets. Unlike the simple GapMatchInteraction, each gap
can have several choices associated with it if desired, furthermore, the
same choice may be associated with an qti-associable-hotspot multiple
times, in which case the corresponding directed pair appears multiple
times in the value of the response variable.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0 </span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">  https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;graphic-gap-match-item1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Q8 GGM Images - Airport Tags&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">adaptive=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">time-dependent=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en-US&quot;</span> &gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;multiple&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;directedPair&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;GLA A&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;EDI B&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;MAN C&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-mapping</span> <span class="ot">default-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;-1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">lower-bound=</span><span class="st">&quot;0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-map-entry</span> <span class="ot">map-key=</span><span class="st">&quot;GLA A&quot;</span> <span class="ot">mapped-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-map-entry</span> <span class="ot">map-key=</span><span class="st">&quot;EDI B&quot;</span> <span class="ot">mapped-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-map-entry</span> <span class="ot">map-key=</span><span class="st">&quot;MAN C&quot;</span> <span class="ot">mapped-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-mapping</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;The International Air Transport Association assigns three-letter codes </span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        to identify airports worldwide. For example, London Heathrow has code LHR.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-graphic-gap-match-interaction</span> <span class="ot">max-associations=</span><span class="st">&quot;0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-choices-left&quot;</span> &gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Some of the labels on the following diagram are missing: can you identify the correct </span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             three-letter codes for the unlabelled airports?&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/ukairtags2024.png&quot;</span> <span class="ot">width=</span><span class="st">&quot;305&quot;</span> <span class="ot">height=</span><span class="st">&quot;390&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          <span class="ot">alt=</span><span class="st">&quot;Outline map of the United Kingdom&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-gap-img</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;CBG&quot;</span> <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/cbg.png&quot;</span> <span class="ot">width=</span><span class="st">&quot;53&quot;</span> <span class="ot">height=</span><span class="st">&quot;29&quot;</span> <span class="ot">alt=</span><span class="st">&quot;The initials CBG&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-gap-img</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-gap-img</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;EBG&quot;</span> <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/ebg.png&quot;</span> <span class="ot">width=</span><span class="st">&quot;53&quot;</span> <span class="ot">height=</span><span class="st">&quot;29&quot;</span> <span class="ot">alt=</span><span class="st">&quot;The initials EBG&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-gap-img</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-gap-img</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;EDI&quot;</span> <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/edi.png&quot;</span> <span class="ot">width=</span><span class="st">&quot;53&quot;</span> <span class="ot">height=</span><span class="st">&quot;29&quot;</span> <span class="ot">alt=</span><span class="st">&quot;The initials EDI&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-gap-img</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-gap-img</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;GLA&quot;</span> <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/gla.png&quot;</span> <span class="ot">width=</span><span class="st">&quot;53&quot;</span> <span class="ot">height=</span><span class="st">&quot;29&quot;</span> <span class="ot">alt=</span><span class="st">&quot;The initials GLA&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-44"><a href="#cb1-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-gap-img</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-45"><a href="#cb1-45" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-gap-img</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;MAN&quot;</span> <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-46"><a href="#cb1-46" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/man.png&quot;</span> <span class="ot">width=</span><span class="st">&quot;53&quot;</span> <span class="ot">height=</span><span class="st">&quot;29&quot;</span> <span class="ot">alt=</span><span class="st">&quot;The initials MAN&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-47"><a href="#cb1-47" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-gap-img</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-48"><a href="#cb1-48" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-gap-img</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;MCH&quot;</span> <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-49"><a href="#cb1-49" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/mch.png&quot;</span> <span class="ot">width=</span><span class="st">&quot;53&quot;</span> <span class="ot">height=</span><span class="st">&quot;29&quot;</span> <span class="ot">alt=</span><span class="st">&quot;The initials MCH&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-50"><a href="#cb1-50" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-gap-img</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-51"><a href="#cb1-51" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-associable-hotspot</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;A&quot;</span> <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">shape=</span><span class="st">&quot;rect&quot;</span> <span class="ot">coords=</span><span class="st">&quot;11,122,64,151&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-52"><a href="#cb1-52" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-associable-hotspot</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;B&quot;</span> <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">shape=</span><span class="st">&quot;rect&quot;</span> <span class="ot">coords=</span><span class="st">&quot;187,105,240,134&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-53"><a href="#cb1-53" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-associable-hotspot</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;C&quot;</span> <span class="ot">match-max=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">shape=</span><span class="st">&quot;rect&quot;</span> <span class="ot">coords=</span><span class="st">&quot;91,206,144,235&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-54"><a href="#cb1-54" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-graphic-gap-match-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-55"><a href="#cb1-55" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-56"><a href="#cb1-56" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-57"><a href="#cb1-57" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="ot">template=</span><span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/rptemplates/map_response.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-58"><a href="#cb1-58" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><figure id="fig-example-gap-match-interaction">
<img
src="/sites/default/files/specs/images/qti/3p0/impl3graphicGapMatch_2.png"
width="700" alt="example of graphic gap match interaction" />
<figcaption>Figure 20 <span class="fig-title">Example: Graphic Gap Match
Interaction</span></figcaption>
</figure></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

The shared interaction vocabulary for the Graphic Gap Match Interaction
is intended to provide more precision when describing:

1.  Positioning of the Gap Choices container with respect to the image
    containing the hotspots.
2.  Gap Choices container width.
3.  Associable Hotspot Selections theming.
4.  Custom max\|min-associations message overrides.

Go to the [QTI 3 Standardized Shared Vocabulary and
CSS](https://www.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/vocab#graphic-gap-match-interaction)
section on Graphic Gap Match Interaction for full details.

</div>

<div id="media" class="section">

#### 3.2.15 Media<a href="#h.u9utgghwf8ck" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.u9utgghwf8ck" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

The MediaInteraction.Type (qti-media-interaction) enables measurement of
the number of times the media object was experienced.  This quantity is
reported in the value of the interaction's response variable.

**MediaInteraction Attributes (element: qti-media-interaction)**

| **Name** | **Usage** | **Value(s)** | **Default** |
|----|----|----|----|
| autostart | required | boolean | Note: Accessibility guidelines suggest that candidates should initiate any media instead of automatically playing the media, therefore the value should be "false". |
| min-plays | optional | Non-negative integer | 0 (unlimited) |
| max-plays | optional | Non-negative integer | 0 (unlimited) |
| loop | optional | boolean | false |
| coords | optional | Coords.Type |  |

The sub-elements include:

- audio
- video
- object (deprecated)

The qti-media-interaction must be bound to a response variable of
base-type integer and single cardinality.

Note that for the audio and video elements in QTI 3 markup, the
"controls" attribute *MUST* include a value for the attribute to be
valid XML. As per the HTML 5 specification, the way to exclude controls
is to explicitly not include the attribute in the audio or video
element. In QTI 3, valid values to include controls are "controls" (as
per the HTML specification) or "true" (the more traditional boolean
value for XML). So `<video>` would mean the controls are not provided to
the candidate (as in the example below), and
`<video controls="controls">` would indicate the candidate should be
provided with media controls.

**Example: Demonstrates qti-media-interaction**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 50%" />
<col style="width: 50%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0 </span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;media-example-1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Media Interaction Example&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">adaptive=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">time-dependent=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en-US&quot;</span> &gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE_1&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-media-interaction</span> <span class="ot">autostart=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">loop=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE_1&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="ot">max-plays=</span><span class="st">&quot;3&quot;</span> &gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;Play this video.&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">video</span> <span class="ot">width=</span><span class="st">&quot;320&quot;</span> <span class="ot">height=</span><span class="st">&quot;240&quot;</span>  &gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">source</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/bubble.mp4&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;video/mp4&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">source</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/bubble.ogv&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;video/ogv&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">video</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-media-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="2"><figure id="fig-media-interaction-example">
<img src="/sites/default/files/specs/images/qti/3p0/impl3media.png"
width="416"
alt="A video preview (a still image) is shown. Text above the video area says &#39;Play this video.&#39; There is a larger play button in the middle of the video area." />
<figcaption>Figure 21 <span class="fig-title">Media Interaction example
(not interactive).</span></figcaption>
</figure></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

<div id="position-object" class="section">

#### 3.2.16 Position Object Interaction<a href="#h.4jhs37jil26s" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.4jhs37jil26s" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

The PositionObjectInteraction.Type (qti-position-object-interaction)
consists of a single image which must be positioned on another graphic
image (the stage) by the candidate. Like Select Point Interaction, the
associated response may have a qti-area-mapping that scores the response
on the basis of comparing it against predefined areas but the delivery
engine must not indicate these areas of the stage. Only the actual
position(s) selected by the candidate shall be indicated.

**PositionObjectInteraction Attributes (element:
qti-position-object-interaction)**

| **Name**     | **Usage** | **Value(s)**        | **Default** |
|--------------|-----------|---------------------|-------------|
| center-point | optional  | IntegerList         |             |
| min-choices  | optional  | Non-negative number |             |
| max-choices  | optional  | Non-negative number | 1           |

The sub-element for the qti-position-object-interaction is either the
HTML "img" or "picture" element. The object element is deprecated in QTI
3.

The qti-position-object-interaction must be bound to a response variable
with a base-type of point and single or multiple cardinality. The point
records the coordinates, with respect to the stage, of the centre point
of the image being positioned.

Position Object Interaction, has a required parent, the
qti-position-object-stage, which is a graphic image (represented as an
"object"), on top of which the Position Object Interaction image is to
be positioned. A single qti-position-object-stage may have several
Position Object Interactions as child elements, representing several
objects to be positioned on the same "stage".

**Example: Demonstrates qti-position-object-interaction**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 50%" />
<col style="width: 50%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0 </span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;position-object-1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Position Object, those UK airports again!&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">adaptive=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">time-dependent=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en-US&quot;</span> &gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;multiple&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;point&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co">&lt;!-- Manchester (MAN) --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;118 184&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co">&lt;!-- London Heathrow (LHR) --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;150 235&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="co">&lt;!-- Edinburgh (EDI) --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;96 114&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-area-mapping</span> <span class="ot">default-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-area-map-entry</span> <span class="ot">shape=</span><span class="st">&quot;circle&quot;</span> <span class="ot">coords=</span><span class="st">&quot;118,184,12&quot;</span> <span class="ot">mapped-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-area-map-entry</span> <span class="ot">shape=</span><span class="st">&quot;circle&quot;</span> <span class="ot">coords=</span><span class="st">&quot;150,235,12&quot;</span> <span class="ot">mapped-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-area-map-entry</span> <span class="ot">shape=</span><span class="st">&quot;circle&quot;</span> <span class="ot">coords=</span><span class="st">&quot;96,114,12&quot;</span> <span class="ot">mapped-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-area-mapping</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;When flying into the UK, you may well find yourself landing at</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      Edinburgh, Manchester or London Heathrow; but where are these</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      airports actually located?</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-position-object-stage</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/uk.svg&quot;</span> <span class="ot">alt=</span><span class="st">&quot;Map of airports of the United Kingdom&quot;</span> <span class="ot">width=</span><span class="st">&quot;206&quot;</span> <span class="ot">height=</span><span class="st">&quot;280&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-position-object-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">max-choices=</span><span class="st">&quot;3&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/airplane.png&quot;</span> <span class="ot">alt=</span><span class="st">&quot;Icon of an airplane&quot;</span> <span class="ot">width=</span><span class="st">&quot;30&quot;</span> <span class="ot">height=</span><span class="st">&quot;30&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-position-object-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-position-object-stage</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Drag the airport marker to the city locations on the map.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">template=</span><span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/rptemplates/map_response_point.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="2"><figure id="fig-position-object-interaction-example">
<img
src="/sites/default/files/specs/images/qti/3p0/impl3_positionObject.png"
width="600"
