alt="A paragraph of text is shown above an image. The image is a line drawing of the United Kingdom. To the left of the line drawing is an airplane icon." />
<figcaption>Figure 22 <span class="fig-title">Position Object
Interaction example, partial response.</span></figcaption>
</figure></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

<div id="select-point" class="section">

#### 3.2.17 Select Point Interaction<a href="#h.ev30y6ze263d" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.ev30y6ze263d" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

The SelectPointInteraction.Type (qti-select-point-interaction) is a
graphic interaction. The candidate's task is to select one or more
points. The associated response may have an qti-area-mapping  that
scores the response on the basis of comparing it against predefined
areas but the delivery engine must not indicate these areas of the
image. Only the actual point(s) selected by the candidate shall be
indicated.

**SelectPointInteraction Attributes (element:
qti-select-point-interaction)**

| **Name**    | **Usage** | **Value(s)**        | **Default**   |
|-------------|-----------|---------------------|---------------|
| min-choices | optional  | Non-negative number | 0             |
| max-choices | optional  | Non-negative number | 0 (unlimited) |

The sub-element for the qti-select-point-interaction is either the HTML
"img" or "picture" element. The object element is deprecated in QTI 3.

The select point interaction must be bound to a response variable with a
base-type of point and single or multiple cardinality.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0 </span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">  https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;select-point-item_1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Classic Where is Edinburgh Example&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">adaptive=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">time-dependent=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en-US&quot;</span> &gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;point&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;93 111&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-area-mapping</span> <span class="ot">default-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;0&quot;</span> &gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-area-map-entry</span> <span class="ot">shape=</span><span class="st">&quot;circle&quot;</span> <span class="ot">coords=</span><span class="st">&quot;93,111,16&quot;</span> <span class="ot">mapped-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-area-mapping</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-select-point-interaction</span> <span class="ot">max-choices=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span>  &gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Mark Edinburgh on this map of the United Kingdom.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">width=</span><span class="st">&quot;196&quot;</span> <span class="ot">height=</span><span class="st">&quot;280&quot;</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/uk_green.png&quot;</span> <span class="ot">alt=</span><span class="st">&quot;A map of the United Kingdom&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-select-point-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="ot">template=</span><span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/rptemplates/map_response_point.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><figure
id="fig-example-select-point-interaction-shown-with-correct-response">
<img
src="/sites/default/files/specs/images/qti/3p0/impl3_selectPoint.png"
width="500"
alt="example of Select Point Interaction showing a simple map of the United Kingdom" />
<figcaption>Figure 23 <span class="fig-title">Example: Select Point
Interaction (shown with correct response)</span></figcaption>
</figure></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

<div id="slider" class="section">

#### 3.2.18 Slider Interaction<a href="#h.s61xcrj4qcyj" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.s61xcrj4qcyj" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

The SliderInteraction.Type (qti-slider-interaction) presents the
candidate with a control for selecting a numerical value between a lower
and upper bound. It must be bound to a response variable with single
cardinality with a base-type of either integer or float.

Note that a slider interaction does not have a default or initial
position except where specified by a default value for  the associated
response variable. The currently selected value, if any, must be clearly
indicated to the candidate.

Because a slider interaction does not have a default or initial
position, except where specified by a default value for the associated
response variable, it is difficult to distinguish between an intentional
response that corresponds to the slider's initial position and a NULL
response. As a workaround, slider interaction items have to either a)
not count NULL responses (i.e. count all responses as intentional) or b)
include a 'skip' button and count its activation combined with a
response variable that is equal to the slider's initial position as a
NULL response.

There are six attributes for the qti-slider-interaction where the
lower-bound and upper-bound are required attributes:

**Slider Interaction Attributes (element: qti-slider-interaction)**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th><strong>Name</strong></th>
<th><strong>Usage</strong></th>
<th><strong>Value(s)</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>lower-bound</td>
<td>required</td>
<td>NonNegativeDouble</td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>upper-bound</td>
<td>required</td>
<td>NonNegativeDouble</td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>step</td>
<td>optional</td>
<td>NonNegativeDouble</td>
<td>1.0</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>step-label</td>
<td>optional</td>
<td>boolean</td>
<td>false</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>orientation</td>
<td>optional</td>
<td><p>Vocabulary;</p>
<ul>
<li>horizontal</li>
<li>vertical</li>
</ul></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>reverse</td>
<td>optional</td>
<td></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

**Example: Demonstrates qti-slider-interaction**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0 </span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;slider-1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Slider Interaction - Water&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">adaptive=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">time-dependent=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en-US&quot;</span> &gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;70&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-slider-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="ot">lower-bound=</span><span class="st">&quot;0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">upper-bound=</span><span class="st">&quot;100&quot;</span> <span class="ot">step=</span><span class="st">&quot;10&quot;</span> <span class="ot">orientation=</span><span class="st">&quot;horizontal&quot;</span> &gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      Roughly (to the nearest 10%) what percentage of the Earth&#39;s surface </span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      is covered in water?</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-slider-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">template=</span><span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/rptemplates/map_response.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><figure id="fig-slider-track">
<img
src="/sites/default/files/specs/images/qti/3p0/impl3_sliderEarth.png"
width="600"
alt="A question appears above a line. There are tick marks at regular intervals above the line. In the middle of the line is a grey rectangle. Below the grey rectangle is a dark rectangle that displays the number &#39;50&#39;." />
<figcaption>Figure 24 <span class="fig-title">Expected Rendering: A
slider "track" with horizontal orientation, with a single handle that
may be moved by dragging, or with arrow keys. Tick marks are left
entirely to the delivery platform. In the example, the interaction
increases the accessibility by also allowing the candidate to input a
number to move the slider and to indicate the response chosen by the
candidate..</span></figcaption>
</figure></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

<div id="upload" class="section">

#### 3.2.19 Upload<a href="#h.qtnex0r52anx" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.qtnex0r52anx" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

The UploadInteraction.Type (qti-upload-interaction) allows the candidate
to upload a pre-prepared file representing their response.

The qti-upload-interaction must be bound to a response variable with
base-type * file* and *single* cardinality.

**UploadInteraction Attributes (element: qti-upload-interaction)**

| **Name**            | **Usage** | **Value(s)** | **Default** |
|---------------------|-----------|--------------|-------------|
| class               | optional  | xs:string    |             |
| response-identifier | mandatory | identifier   |             |

**Example: Demonstrates qti-upload-interaction**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0 </span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;upload-interaction&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Upload Chocolate Spreadsheet&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">adaptive=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">time-dependent=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en-US&quot;</span> &gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;file&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;A chocolate factory produces several types of chocolate, some of which have nut centres.</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      The chocolates are mixed together and are randomly packed into cartons of ten.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-upload-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> &gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Build a spreadsheet to simulate 50 cartons of chocolates when each carton contains </span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          10 chocolates, and when one-seventh of the chocolates have nut centres. Your spreadsheet </span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          should include 50 rows representing the 50 cartons, each row containing 10 columns to </span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          represent the chocolates.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-upload-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><figure
id="fig-expected-rendering-rendering-and-behaviors-of-the-upload-interaction-are-left-entirely-to-the-delivery-platform">
<p>A chocolate factory produces several types of chocolate, some of
which have nut centres. The chocolates are mixed together and are
randomly packed into cartons of ten.</p>
<p>Build a spreadsheet to simulate 50 cartons of chocolates when each
carton contains 10 chocolates, and when one-seventh of the chocolates
have nut centres. Your spreadsheet should include 50 rows representing
the 50 cartons, each row containing 10 columns to represent the
chocolates.</p>
<img src="/sites/default/files/specs/images/qti/3p0/impl3image62.png"
alt="An empty rectangle is shown to the left of another rectangular button with the words &#39;Select file&#39; within the button." />
<figcaption>Figure 25 <span class="fig-title"> Expected Rendering:
Rendering and behaviors of the Upload Interaction are left entirely to
the delivery platform. </span></figcaption>
</figure></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

<div id="drawing-interaction" class="section">

#### 3.2.20 Drawing Interaction<a href="#h.8yrkpwgsrs4b" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.8yrkpwgsrs4b" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

The DrawingInteraction.Type (qti-drawing-interaction) allows the
candidate to use a set of drawing tools to modify a given graphical
image (the canvas).  It must be bound to a response variable with base
type *file* and *single* cardinality.

**DrawingInteraction Attributes (element: qti-drawing-interaction)**

| **Name**            | **Usage** | **Value(s)** | **Default** |
|---------------------|-----------|--------------|-------------|
| class               | optional  | xs:string    |             |
| response-identifier | mandatory | identifier   |             |

The sub-element of the qti-drawing-interaction are the HTML elements
*img, picture,* or *object*. The image specified within one of the
aforementioned elements acts as the canvas on which the drawing takes
place. It is best practice to use the *img* or *picture* elements for
this interaction. If using the deprecated object element it *MUST* be of
an *image* type, as specified by the type attribute.

**Example: Demonstrates qti-drawing-interaction**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0 </span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;drawing-interaction-1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Draw an Angle&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">adaptive=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">time-dependent=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en-US&quot;</span> &gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;file&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-drawing-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Use the compass provided to bisect the angle &lt;<span class="kw">em</span>&gt;PQR&lt;/<span class="kw">em</span>&gt; in the figure below.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">picture</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">source</span> <span class="ot">srcset=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/anglePQR.svg&quot;</span> <span class="ot">media=</span><span class="st">&quot;(min-width: 600px)&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;image/svg&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/anglePQR_HiRes.jpg&quot;</span> <span class="ot">alt=</span><span class="st">&quot;drawing of angle PQR where point P connects with </span></span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">        point Q and point Q connects to point R and length of PQ equals the length of QR&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="ot">width=</span><span class="st">&quot;322&quot;</span> <span class="ot">height=</span><span class="st">&quot;260&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">picture</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-drawing-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><figure
id="fig-expected-rendering-a-background-canvas-containing-the-image-upon-which-a-candidate-may-draw-using-provided-delivery-platform-drawing-tools-such-delivery-platform-drawing-tools-are-left-entirely-to-the-delivery-platform">
<img src="/sites/default/files/specs/images/qti/3p0/impl3image20.png"
alt="An instructional sentence of text appears above a large rectangle. Within the rectangle are two connected lines with 3 points labelled by letters. To the left of the large rectangle is a stack of buttons with icons representing drawing tools and functions." />
<figcaption>Figure 26 <span class="fig-title"> Expected Rendering: A
background canvas containing the image, upon which a candidate may draw
using provided delivery platform drawing tools. Such delivery platform
drawing tools are left entirely to the delivery platform.
</span></figcaption>
</figure></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

<div id="end-attempt" class="section">

#### 3.2.21 End Attempt Interaction<a href="#h.b3g8rgbtuwqp" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.b3g8rgbtuwqp" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

End Attempt Interaction is a special interaction which immediately ends
the current attempt on an assessment item.  It may be used, for example,
to allow the candidate to request a hint or model solution, or in an
adaptive item to let the candidate display feedback or to move to the
next in a series of interactions in the item.

**EndAttemptInteraction Attributes (element:
qti-end-attempt-interaction)**

| **Name**      | **Usage** | **Value(s)** | **Default** |
|---------------|-----------|--------------|-------------|
| title         | mandatory | xs:string    |             |
| count-attempt | optional  | xs:boolean   |             |

**Example: Demonstrates qti-end-attempt-interaction with a Hint**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 50%" />
<col style="width: 50%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0 </span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;end-attempt-example-1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;End Attempt Example&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">adaptive=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">time-dependent=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en-US&quot;</span> &gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;C&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;HINTREQUEST&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;boolean&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-choice-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">shuffle=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">max-choices=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;Who was the President of Mexico from 2000 to 2006?&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;A&quot;</span>&gt;George W Bush&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;B&quot;</span>&gt;Tony Blair&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;C&quot;</span>&gt;Vicente Fox&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;D&quot;</span>&gt;Ariel Sharon&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-choice-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-end-attempt-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;HINTREQUEST&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Show Hint&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-feedback-block</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;HINT&quot;</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        Tony lived in the United Kingdom and George lived in Washington, DC.</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-feedback-block</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;NOHINT&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;HINTREQUEST&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;HINT&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-44"><a href="#cb1-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-else</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-45"><a href="#cb1-45" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-46"><a href="#cb1-46" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-47"><a href="#cb1-47" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-match</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-48"><a href="#cb1-48" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-49"><a href="#cb1-49" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-50"><a href="#cb1-50" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-match</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-51"><a href="#cb1-51" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-52"><a href="#cb1-52" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>&gt;1&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-53"><a href="#cb1-53" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-54"><a href="#cb1-54" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-55"><a href="#cb1-55" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-else</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-56"><a href="#cb1-56" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-57"><a href="#cb1-57" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>&gt;0&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-58"><a href="#cb1-58" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-59"><a href="#cb1-59" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-else</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-60"><a href="#cb1-60" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-61"><a href="#cb1-61" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-else</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-62"><a href="#cb1-62" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-63"><a href="#cb1-63" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-64"><a href="#cb1-64" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="2"><figure
id="fig-expected-rendering-the-end-attempt-interaction-is-rendered-as-a-button-however-rendering-embodiments-of-end-attempt-interactions-are-left-to-the-delivery-platform">
<img
src="/sites/default/files/specs/images/qti/3p0/impl3_endAttempt.png"
width="600"
alt="A question is shown with 4 response options. Below the response options is a button with the words "Show Hint" within it. Below the button is a sentence of text (the hint)." />
<figcaption>Figure 27 <span class="fig-title">Expected Rendering: the
End Attempt interaction is rendered as a button. However, rendering
embodiments of End Attempt interactions are left to the delivery
platform. </span></figcaption>
</figure></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

<div id="custom-interaction" class="section">

#### 3.2.22 Custom Interaction<a href="#h.ml3l73qfo5e3" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.ml3l73qfo5e3" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

The CustomInteraction.Type (qti-custom-interaction) is a **deprecated**
feature in QTI 3. It is recommended to use Portable Custom Interaction
(next section) in place of the custom interaction. The Custom
Interaction provides an opportunity for delivery platform-specific
extensibility of this specification to include support for interactions
not currently built into the QTI specification.  This can be used, for
example, to develop technology-enhanced items.

As the user interface and behavior of a qti-custom-interaction are
custom, there is no predefined shared interaction vocabulary for
qti-custom-interaction.  However if a qti-custom-interaction implements
a feature or behavior in a way which is consistent with how that has
been defined for the pre-defined interaction types then it may use qti-
prefixed class names to indicate it supports a behaviour consistent with
the use of that shared interaction vocabulary elsewhere in this
specification; e.g., a qti-custom-interaction which supports text entry
by the candidate may support the qti-input-width set of classes to
control the visible width allocated to display of the candidate's input.

**CustomInteraction Attributes (element: qti-custom-interaction)**

| **Name**            | **Usage** | **Value(s)** | **Default** |
|---------------------|-----------|--------------|-------------|
| class               | optional  | xs:string    |             |
| response-identifier | mandatory | identifier   |             |

**Example: Demonstrates qti-custom-interaction**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 50%" />
<col style="width: 50%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0 </span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;custom-deprecated-example-1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Custom Interaction Example&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">adaptive=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">time-dependent=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en-US&quot;</span> &gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;3/8&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      A pie is divided into quarters. Each slice is then divided in half. One half of the</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      pie is eaten at lunch. One slice is eaten at snack time.</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      Use the Fraction Tool below to shade the portion of the pie that is left. The Fraction Tool</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      buttons divide the circle into fewer or more pieces. Pieces of the circle can be</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      shaded by selecting them.</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co">&lt;!-- docking div for the custom interaction --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">div</span> <span class="ot">id=</span><span class="st">&quot;myfractionmodel&quot;</span>&gt;&lt;/<span class="kw">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-custom-interaction</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;tei-fractionmodel&quot;</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="co">&lt;!-- Not required to kebab-case or use qti- as this custom-option is completely</span></span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">           custom element.  However, best practice in QTI 3 is to kebab-case it for</span></span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">           webcomponent-friendliness.</span></span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">      --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">custom-option</span>&gt;<span class="bn">&lt;![CDATA[</span></span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        {</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          dockingDivId: &#39;myfractionmodel&#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          alignment: &#39;center&#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          models: [{  </span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            active: true,</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            startSegments: 2,</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            minSegments: 1,</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            maxSegments: 12,</span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  selectedSegments: [],</span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            text: &#39;The Fraction Tool&#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            style: {</span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              radius: 150,</span>
<span id="cb1-44"><a href="#cb1-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              fillColor: &#39;#FF0000&#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-45"><a href="#cb1-45" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              strokeColor: &#39;#000000&#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-46"><a href="#cb1-46" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              strokeWeight: 2</span>
<span id="cb1-47"><a href="#cb1-47" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            }</span>
<span id="cb1-48"><a href="#cb1-48" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          }]</span>
<span id="cb1-49"><a href="#cb1-49" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        }</span>
<span id="cb1-50"><a href="#cb1-50" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="bn">]]&gt;</span>&lt;/<span class="kw">custom-option</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-51"><a href="#cb1-51" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-custom-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-52"><a href="#cb1-52" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-53"><a href="#cb1-53" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="2"><figure
id="fig-expected-rendering-because-custom-interactions-are-by-definition-custom-there-are-no-expectations-for-delivery-platform-rendering-the-example-rendering-below-is-provided-as-an-example-of-how-a-delivery-platform-might-render-the-above-so-called-fraction-model-custom-interaction">
<img src="/sites/default/files/specs/images/qti/3p0/impl3image12.png"
width="560"
alt="Two paragraphs of text are presented above a rectangle with the title &#39;The Fraction Tool&#39;. The rectangle contains a circle divided into 8 equal sized sectors where 3 sectors are colored red. There are 3 buttons below the circle: Fewer, More, Reset." />
<figcaption>Figure 28 <span class="fig-title"> Expected Rendering:
Because custom interactions are by definition, "custom", there are no
expectations for delivery platform rendering. The example rendering
below is provided as an example of how a delivery platform
<em>might</em> render the above, so-called "Fraction Model" custom
interaction. </span></figcaption>
</figure></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

<div id="portable-custom-interaction-pci" class="section">

#### 3.2.23 Portable Custom Interaction (PCI)<a href="#h.98xaka8g51za" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.98xaka8g51za" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

The PortableCustomInteraction.Type (qti-portable-custom-interaction)
allows an item author with the support of a PCI module developer the
ability to render an interaction with a custom user interface and
behaviors by providing custom Javascript code supporting the
interaction. This can be used, for example, to develop
technology-enhanced items.

The Javascript code which implements a PCI may be included with the item
in the content package or may reside elsewhere on the network. It will
be loaded dynamically by the delivery engine when the item containing
the PCI is presented.  These Javascript modules must be AMD
(Asynchronous Module Definition) modules, and must conform to the PCI
API, detailed later in this document.   The markup of a PCI may include
any HTML5, MathML, and SSML elements supported elsewhere in QTI.  In
addition, a PCI may contain feedback, template, and printed variable
elements.  Finally, a special *template*element may be included. This
may be used only in a PCI and is a container for any valid XML markup.

As the user interface and behavior of a PCI are custom, there is no
predefined shared interaction vocabulary for PCIs. However if a PCI
implements a feature or behavior in a way which is consistent with how
that has been defined for the pre-defined interaction types then it
*MAY* use *qti-* prefixed CSS class names to indicate it supports a
behaviour consistent with the use of that shared interaction vocabulary
elsewhere in this specification; e.g. a PCI which supports text entry by
the candidate may support the qti-input-width set of classes to control
the visible width allocated to display of the candidate's input.

PCI allows for referencing a stylesheet using the qti-stylesheet
element, where the stylesheet is specific to the code referenced within
the PCI. PCI also allows for the inclusion of [catalog
information](#h.m3ftkzwqnzhm) that is specific to the PCI. PCI is the
only interaction that allows for these elements within the interaction.
All other interactions would use the item level stylesheet reference and
the item level catalog node.

There is a detailed [example of a PCI in Section
3.7.12](#h.jsncxx6a57ao) .  Consequently, example definitions and
expected renderings are not provided here.

</div>

</div>

<div id="composite-items" class="section">

### 3.3 Composite Items<a href="#h.fzolwwxsh7ga" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.fzolwwxsh7ga" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

Composite items are items that contain more than one interaction.
Composite items may contain multiple instances of the same type of
interaction or have a mixture of interaction types.

While a QTI item may contain multiple interactions, an interaction *MUST
NOT* be nested or contained within any other interaction. Items with
nested interactions are not considered compliant to the QTI standard
regardless of whether they pass validation or not.

**Example: Demonstrates composite item with two Inline Choice
interactions and oneText Entry interaction, Response Processing with
partial scoring**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 50%" />
<col style="width: 50%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0</span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">  https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_itemv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="er"> </span>xml:lang=&quot;en-US&quot; identifier=&quot;shakespeare_biography&quot; title=&quot;Shakespeare Biography&quot; time-dependent=&quot;false&quot;&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;response_1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;choice_1&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;response_2&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;choice_4&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;response_3&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;poet&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-mapping</span> <span class="ot">default-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-map-entry</span> <span class="ot">map-key=</span><span class="st">&quot;poet&quot;</span> <span class="ot">mapped-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-map-entry</span> <span class="ot">map-key=</span><span class="st">&quot;playwright&quot;</span> <span class="ot">mapped-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-map-entry</span> <span class="ot">map-key=</span><span class="st">&quot;writer&quot;</span> <span class="ot">mapped-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;0.5&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-mapping</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE_1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE_2&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE_3&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">strong</span>&gt;About William Shakespeare&lt;/<span class="kw">strong</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        Date of birth:</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;response_1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;choice_1&quot;</span>&gt;26 April 1564&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;choice_2&quot;</span>&gt;29 February 1664&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;choice_3&quot;</span>&gt;2 March 2010&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-44"><a href="#cb1-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        Date of death:</span>
<span id="cb1-45"><a href="#cb1-45" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;response_2&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-46"><a href="#cb1-46" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;choice_4&quot;</span>&gt;23 April 1616&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-47"><a href="#cb1-47" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;choice_5&quot;</span>&gt;24 April 1616&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-48"><a href="#cb1-48" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;choice_6&quot;</span>&gt;25 April 1616&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-49"><a href="#cb1-49" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-50"><a href="#cb1-50" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-51"><a href="#cb1-51" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">hr</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-52"><a href="#cb1-52" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-53"><a href="#cb1-53" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">em</span>&gt;Shakespeare&lt;/<span class="kw">em</span>&gt; was an English</span>
<span id="cb1-54"><a href="#cb1-54" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-text-entry-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;response_3&quot;</span> <span class="ot">expected-length=</span><span class="st">&quot;15&quot;</span>/&gt;,</span>
<span id="cb1-55"><a href="#cb1-55" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        widely regarded as the greatest writer in the English language and the</span>
<span id="cb1-56"><a href="#cb1-56" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        world&#39;s pre-eminent dramatist.  His surviving works, including some</span>
<span id="cb1-57"><a href="#cb1-57" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        collaborations, consist of about &lt;<span class="kw">strong</span>&gt;38&lt;/<span class="kw">strong</span>&gt; plays, &lt;<span class="kw">strong</span>&gt;154&lt;/<span class="kw">strong</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-58"><a href="#cb1-58" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        sonnets, &lt;<span class="kw">strong</span>&gt;2&lt;/<span class="kw">strong</span>&gt; long poems, and several other poems.  His plays have</span>
<span id="cb1-59"><a href="#cb1-59" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        been translated into every major living language and are performed more often than</span>
<span id="cb1-60"><a href="#cb1-60" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        those of any other playwright.</span>
<span id="cb1-61"><a href="#cb1-61" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-62"><a href="#cb1-62" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-63"><a href="#cb1-63" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-64"><a href="#cb1-64" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-65"><a href="#cb1-65" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-66"><a href="#cb1-66" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-match</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-67"><a href="#cb1-67" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;response_1&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-68"><a href="#cb1-68" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                 &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;response_1&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-69"><a href="#cb1-69" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-match</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-70"><a href="#cb1-70" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-71"><a href="#cb1-71" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-sum</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-72"><a href="#cb1-72" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-73"><a href="#cb1-73" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>&gt;1&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-74"><a href="#cb1-74" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-sum</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-75"><a href="#cb1-75" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-76"><a href="#cb1-76" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE_1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-77"><a href="#cb1-77" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>&gt;1&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-78"><a href="#cb1-78" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-79"><a href="#cb1-79" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-80"><a href="#cb1-80" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-81"><a href="#cb1-81" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-82"><a href="#cb1-82" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-83"><a href="#cb1-83" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-match</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-84"><a href="#cb1-84" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;response_2&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-85"><a href="#cb1-85" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;response_2&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-86"><a href="#cb1-86" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-match</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-87"><a href="#cb1-87" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-88"><a href="#cb1-88" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-sum</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-89"><a href="#cb1-89" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-90"><a href="#cb1-90" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>&gt;1&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-91"><a href="#cb1-91" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-sum</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-92"><a href="#cb1-92" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-93"><a href="#cb1-93" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE_2&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-94"><a href="#cb1-94" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>&gt;1&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-95"><a href="#cb1-95" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
