<span id="cb1-152"><a href="#cb1-152" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="co">&lt;!-- The solution button is removed by setting the ASKSOLUTION outcome variable to null--&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-153"><a href="#cb1-153" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;ASKSOLUTION&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-154"><a href="#cb1-154" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;null&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-155"><a href="#cb1-155" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-156"><a href="#cb1-156" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-157"><a href="#cb1-157" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-else</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-158"><a href="#cb1-158" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-159"><a href="#cb1-159" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-160"><a href="#cb1-160" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-is-null</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-161"><a href="#cb1-161" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-162"><a href="#cb1-162" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-is-null</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-163"><a href="#cb1-163" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-164"><a href="#cb1-164" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>&gt;0&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-165"><a href="#cb1-165" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-166"><a href="#cb1-166" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-167"><a href="#cb1-167" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-else</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-168"><a href="#cb1-168" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-169"><a href="#cb1-169" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-170"><a href="#cb1-170" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-equal-rounded</span> <span class="ot">figures=</span><span class="st">&quot;3&quot;</span> <span class="ot">rounding-mode=</span><span class="st">&quot;decimalPlaces&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-171"><a href="#cb1-171" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-172"><a href="#cb1-172" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-173"><a href="#cb1-173" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-equal-rounded</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-174"><a href="#cb1-174" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-175"><a href="#cb1-175" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-multiple</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-176"><a href="#cb1-176" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;CORRECT&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-177"><a href="#cb1-177" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-multiple</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-178"><a href="#cb1-178" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-179"><a href="#cb1-179" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-180"><a href="#cb1-180" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>&gt;2&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-181"><a href="#cb1-181" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-182"><a href="#cb1-182" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-183"><a href="#cb1-183" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-else</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-184"><a href="#cb1-184" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-185"><a href="#cb1-185" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-multiple</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-186"><a href="#cb1-186" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;INCORRECT&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-187"><a href="#cb1-187" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-multiple</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-188"><a href="#cb1-188" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-189"><a href="#cb1-189" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-190"><a href="#cb1-190" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>&gt;0&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-191"><a href="#cb1-191" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-192"><a href="#cb1-192" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-else</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-193"><a href="#cb1-193" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-194"><a href="#cb1-194" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb1-195"><a href="#cb1-195" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            <span class="co">&lt;!-- When an answer has been submitted, once again the built-in outcome</span></span>
<span id="cb1-196"><a href="#cb1-196" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">                 variable completionStatus is set to completed and the solution button is removed.--&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-197"><a href="#cb1-197" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;completionStatus&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-198"><a href="#cb1-198" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;completed&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-199"><a href="#cb1-199" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-200"><a href="#cb1-200" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;ASKSOLUTION&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-201"><a href="#cb1-201" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;null&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-202"><a href="#cb1-202" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-203"><a href="#cb1-203" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-else</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-204"><a href="#cb1-204" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-205"><a href="#cb1-205" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-else</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-206"><a href="#cb1-206" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-207"><a href="#cb1-207" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb1-208"><a href="#cb1-208" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co">&lt;!-- When an answer has been submitted, if the solution has been displayed,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-209"><a href="#cb1-209" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">         the message about the score is added to the FEEDBACK, and SCORE is set to 0.0 --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-210"><a href="#cb1-210" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-211"><a href="#cb1-211" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-212"><a href="#cb1-212" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;seenSolution&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-213"><a href="#cb1-213" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-214"><a href="#cb1-214" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-multiple</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-215"><a href="#cb1-215" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-216"><a href="#cb1-216" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;SEEN-SOLUTION&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-217"><a href="#cb1-217" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-multiple</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-218"><a href="#cb1-218" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-219"><a href="#cb1-219" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-220"><a href="#cb1-220" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>&gt;0.0&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-221"><a href="#cb1-221" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-222"><a href="#cb1-222" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-223"><a href="#cb1-223" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-224"><a href="#cb1-224" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-225"><a href="#cb1-225" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

A randomized version of the item above is shown below. The randomization
does not affect the display of the solution in this example.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">xmlns:m=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0 </span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">  https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0_v1p0.xsd </span></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">  http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML </span></span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">  https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/mathml/v3p0/schema/xsd/mathml3.xsd&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;feedbackBlock-solution-random&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Using feedbackBlock to show a solution (random)&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">adaptive=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> <span class="ot">time-dependent=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en-US&quot;</span> &gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;boolean&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SOLREQUEST&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;boolean&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;EndAttempt&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;multiple&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;EMPTY&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">normal-maximum=</span><span class="st">&quot;10.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">normal-minimum=</span><span class="st">&quot;0.0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;0.0&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;boolean&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;seenSolution&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;false&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>

<span id="cb1-137"><a href="#cb1-137" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>&gt;0&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>

<span id="cb1-178"><a href="#cb1-178" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="co">&lt;!-- When an answer has been submitted, if the solution has been displayed,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-179"><a href="#cb1-179" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">           the message about the score is added to the FEEDBACK, and SCORE is set to 0.0 --&gt;</span></span>

<span id="cb1-183"><a href="#cb1-183" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span>&gt;</span>

<span id="cb1-190"><a href="#cb1-190" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>&gt;0.0&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-191"><a href="#cb1-191" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>

</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

Adaptive Example 4 - Using qti-template-block and qti-template-inline
inside qti-feedback-block to adjust content:

The qti-feedback-block element can contain subsidiary feedback elements,
"template" elements and interactions alongside any of the HTML elements.
In this question, the values of template variables are calculated within
the templateProcessing element, and the solution is different depending
on the value of the variable iA; if iA=90, the right angle in the
triangle makes the question easier.

The method for displaying the solution is as in the previous example;
here we concentrate on the template elements within the SOLUTION
feedbackBlock.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span> <span class="ot">standalone=</span><span class="st">&quot;yes&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns:xi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XInclude&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns:m=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0 </span></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd </span></span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML </span></span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/mathml/v3p0/schema/xsd/mathml3.xsd&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;Example04-feedbackBlock-templateBlock&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Find side, directly or sine rule - with solution&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">time-dependent=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">adaptive=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;HINTREQUEST&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;boolean&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SOLREQUEST&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;boolean&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="ot">normal-maximum=</span><span class="st">&quot;10.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">normal-minimum=</span><span class="st">&quot;0.0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;0.0&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;multiple&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;EMPTY&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;boolean&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;seenSolution&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;false&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span>&gt;</span>

<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;false&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span>&gt;</span>

<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>

<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;ASKSOLUTION&quot;</span>&gt;</span>

<span id="cb1-47"><a href="#cb1-47" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;1.0&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-48"><a href="#cb1-48" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-49"><a href="#cb1-49" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-50"><a href="#cb1-50" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;oPower&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-51"><a href="#cb1-51" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-52"><a href="#cb1-52" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!--The template variables for the calculation are declared, among them iA, an integer variable; it will be used in MathML, </span></span>
<span id="cb1-53"><a href="#cb1-53" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">        so the mathVariable attribute is true.--&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-54"><a href="#cb1-54" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;iA&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span> <span class="ot">param-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">math-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-55"><a href="#cb1-55" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-56"><a href="#cb1-56" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;90&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>

<span id="cb1-60"><a href="#cb1-60" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-61"><a href="#cb1-61" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;65&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-62"><a href="#cb1-62" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>

<span id="cb1-70"><a href="#cb1-70" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!--This template variable holds a string which describes the triangle.--&gt;</span></span>

<span id="cb1-78"><a href="#cb1-78" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!-- now do the randomisation and mathematical calculations --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-79"><a href="#cb1-79" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!-- The value of iA is selected randomly from a list of possible values of which several are 90 --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-80"><a href="#cb1-80" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;iA&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-81"><a href="#cb1-81" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-random</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-82"><a href="#cb1-82" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-multiple</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-83"><a href="#cb1-83" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;45&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-84"><a href="#cb1-84" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;60&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-85"><a href="#cb1-85" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;75&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-86"><a href="#cb1-86" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;90&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-87"><a href="#cb1-87" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;90&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-88"><a href="#cb1-88" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;90&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>

<span id="cb1-92"><a href="#cb1-92" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;iB&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-93"><a href="#cb1-93" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-random-integer</span> <span class="ot">min=</span><span class="st">&quot;50&quot;</span> <span class="ot">max=</span><span class="st">&quot;85&quot;</span> <span class="ot">step=</span><span class="st">&quot;5&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-94"><a href="#cb1-94" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-95"><a href="#cb1-95" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-constraint</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-96"><a href="#cb1-96" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-not</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-97"><a href="#cb1-97" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-equal</span> <span class="ot">tolerance-mode=</span><span class="st">&quot;exact&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-98"><a href="#cb1-98" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;iA&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-99"><a href="#cb1-99" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;iB&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>

<span id="cb1-103"><a href="#cb1-103" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;ia&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-104"><a href="#cb1-104" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-random-integer</span> <span class="ot">min=</span><span class="st">&quot;5&quot;</span> <span class="ot">max=</span><span class="st">&quot;50&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>

<span id="cb1-107"><a href="#cb1-107" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-divide</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-108"><a href="#cb1-108" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-math-constant</span> <span class="ot">name=</span><span class="st">&quot;pi&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-109"><a href="#cb1-109" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;180&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>

<span id="cb1-113"><a href="#cb1-113" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-math-operator</span> <span class="ot">name=</span><span class="st">&quot;sin&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-114"><a href="#cb1-114" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-product</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-115"><a href="#cb1-115" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;iA&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-116"><a href="#cb1-116" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;fPiOver180&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-117"><a href="#cb1-117" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-product</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-118"><a href="#cb1-118" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-math-operator</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-119"><a href="#cb1-119" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-120"><a href="#cb1-120" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;sinB&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-121"><a href="#cb1-121" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-math-operator</span> <span class="ot">name=</span><span class="st">&quot;sin&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-122"><a href="#cb1-122" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-product</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-123"><a href="#cb1-123" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;iB&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-124"><a href="#cb1-124" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;fPiOver180&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>

<span id="cb1-127"><a href="#cb1-127" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-128"><a href="#cb1-128" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;sinA&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-129"><a href="#cb1-129" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-round-to</span> <span class="ot">rounding-mode=</span><span class="st">&quot;significantFigures&quot;</span> <span class="ot">figures=</span><span class="st">&quot;5&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-130"><a href="#cb1-130" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;sinA&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-131"><a href="#cb1-131" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-round-to</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-132"><a href="#cb1-132" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-133"><a href="#cb1-133" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;sinB&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-134"><a href="#cb1-134" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-round-to</span> <span class="ot">rounding-mode=</span><span class="st">&quot;significantFigures&quot;</span> <span class="ot">figures=</span><span class="st">&quot;5&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-135"><a href="#cb1-135" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;sinB&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-136"><a href="#cb1-136" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-round-to</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-137"><a href="#cb1-137" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-138"><a href="#cb1-138" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;fAns&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-139"><a href="#cb1-139" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-divide</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-140"><a href="#cb1-140" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-product</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-141"><a href="#cb1-141" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;ia&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-142"><a href="#cb1-142" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;sinB&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-143"><a href="#cb1-143" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-product</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-144"><a href="#cb1-144" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;sinA&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-145"><a href="#cb1-145" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-divide</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-146"><a href="#cb1-146" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-147"><a href="#cb1-147" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;fAns&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-148"><a href="#cb1-148" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-round-to</span> <span class="ot">rounding-mode=</span><span class="st">&quot;significantFigures&quot;</span> <span class="ot">figures=</span><span class="st">&quot;3&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-149"><a href="#cb1-149" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;fAns&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-150"><a href="#cb1-150" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-round-to</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-151"><a href="#cb1-151" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-152"><a href="#cb1-152" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-153"><a href="#cb1-153" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!-- set up alternative content depending on the value of variable iA --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-154"><a href="#cb1-154" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-155"><a href="#cb1-155" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-156"><a href="#cb1-156" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-equal</span> <span class="ot">tolerance-mode=</span><span class="st">&quot;exact&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-157"><a href="#cb1-157" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-158"><a href="#cb1-158" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    <span class="co">&lt;!--If iA is 90, sType contains "right angled", tSol contains the identifier, SolRightAngle, of the </span></span>
<span id="cb1-159"><a href="#cb1-159" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">                        templateBlock for the right angle case, and tSoli contains the identifier, SolRightAnglei, of the </span></span>
<span id="cb1-160"><a href="#cb1-160" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">                        templateInline for the right angle case--&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-161"><a href="#cb1-161" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-162"><a href="#cb1-162" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;iA&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-163"><a href="#cb1-163" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;90&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-164"><a href="#cb1-164" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-equal</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-165"><a href="#cb1-165" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;sType&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-166"><a href="#cb1-166" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span>&gt;right angle&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-167"><a href="#cb1-167" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-168"><a href="#cb1-168" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;tSol&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-169"><a href="#cb1-169" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;SolRightAngle&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-170"><a href="#cb1-170" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-171"><a href="#cb1-171" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;tSoli&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-172"><a href="#cb1-172" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;SolRightAnglei&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-173"><a href="#cb1-173" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-174"><a href="#cb1-174" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-template-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-175"><a href="#cb1-175" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-else</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-176"><a href="#cb1-176" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-177"><a href="#cb1-177" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!--If iA is not 90, sType contains &quot;scalene&quot;, tSol contains the identifier, SolScalene, </span></span>
<span id="cb1-178"><a href="#cb1-178" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">of the templateBlock for the scalene case, and tSoli contains the identifier, SolScalenei, </span></span>
<span id="cb1-179"><a href="#cb1-179" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">of the templateInline for the scalene case--&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-180"><a href="#cb1-180" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-181"><a href="#cb1-181" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;sType&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-182"><a href="#cb1-182" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span>&gt;scalene&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-183"><a href="#cb1-183" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-184"><a href="#cb1-184" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;tSol&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-185"><a href="#cb1-185" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;SolScalene&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-186"><a href="#cb1-186" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-187"><a href="#cb1-187" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;tSoli&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-188"><a href="#cb1-188" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;SolScalenei&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-189"><a href="#cb1-189" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-190"><a href="#cb1-190" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-template-else</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-191"><a href="#cb1-191" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-template-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-192"><a href="#cb1-192" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-template-processing</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-193"><a href="#cb1-193" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    </span>
<span id="cb1-194"><a href="#cb1-194" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-195"><a href="#cb1-195" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;In triangle ABC, side a=&lt;<span class="kw">qti-printed-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;ia&quot;</span>/&gt;, </span>
<span id="cb1-196"><a href="#cb1-196" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    angle A=&lt;<span class="kw">qti-printed-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;iA&quot;</span>/&gt; ° and </span>
<span id="cb1-197"><a href="#cb1-197" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    angle B=&lt;<span class="kw">qti-printed-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;iB&quot;</span>/&gt; °. </span>
<span id="cb1-198"><a href="#cb1-198" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    Find the length of side b.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-199"><a href="#cb1-199" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">div</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-margin-b-3&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-200"><a href="#cb1-200" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Enter your answer to 3 significant figures.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-201"><a href="#cb1-201" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-text-entry-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">expected-length=</span><span class="st">&quot;20&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-202"><a href="#cb1-202" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-203"><a href="#cb1-203" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-204"><a href="#cb1-204" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span> <span class="ot">id=</span><span class="st">&quot;feedbackInline3&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-205"><a href="#cb1-205" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;Correct&quot;</span>&gt; OK &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-206"><a href="#cb1-206" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-207"><a href="#cb1-207" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-208"><a href="#cb1-208" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span> <span class="ot">id=</span><span class="st">&quot;feedbackInline2&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-209"><a href="#cb1-209" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;Partial&quot;</span>&gt; Not far off - check your rounding... &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-210"><a href="#cb1-210" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-211"><a href="#cb1-211" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-212"><a href="#cb1-212" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span> <span class="ot">id=</span><span class="st">&quot;feedbackInline1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-213"><a href="#cb1-213" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;Incorrect&quot;</span>&gt; Incorrect &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-214"><a href="#cb1-214" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-215"><a href="#cb1-215" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-216"><a href="#cb1-216" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-feedback-block</span> <span class="ot">id=</span><span class="st">&quot;feedbackBlock11&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;THREETRIES&quot;</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-217"><a href="#cb1-217" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-218"><a href="#cb1-218" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-219"><a href="#cb1-219" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt; You have had three attempts at answering this question, so here is the solution:&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-220"><a href="#cb1-220" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-221"><a href="#cb1-221" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-feedback-block</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-222"><a href="#cb1-222" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-223"><a href="#cb1-223" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!-- this feedbackBlock contains the solution, </span></span>
<span id="cb1-224"><a href="#cb1-224" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">  which is different depending on the value of iA --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-225"><a href="#cb1-225" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-feedback-block</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SOLUTION&quot;</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-226"><a href="#cb1-226" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-227"><a href="#cb1-227" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!--Parts of this sentence appear differently, depending on whether or not iA is 90. </span></span>
<span id="cb1-228"><a href="#cb1-228" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">The template variables sType, tSol and tSoli were set during template processing in the </span></span>
<span id="cb1-229"><a href="#cb1-229" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">templateCondition shown above--&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-230"><a href="#cb1-230" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;This is a &lt;<span class="kw">qti-printed-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;sType&quot;</span>/&gt; triangle, so</span>
<span id="cb1-231"><a href="#cb1-231" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-inline</span> <span class="ot">template-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;tSoli&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SolRightAnglei&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-232"><a href="#cb1-232" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">span</span>&gt; we can use sin(B) to find b directly&lt;/<span class="kw">span</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-233"><a href="#cb1-233" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-template-inline</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-234"><a href="#cb1-234" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-inline</span> <span class="ot">template-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;tSoli&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SolScalenei&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-235"><a href="#cb1-235" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">span</span>&gt; we apply the Sine Rule&lt;/<span class="kw">span</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-236"><a href="#cb1-236" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-template-inline</span>&gt;:</span>
<span id="cb1-237"><a href="#cb1-237" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-238"><a href="#cb1-238" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!--The templateBlock elements contain the MathML for the two different solutions: SolRightAngle for iA=90 and </span></span>
<span id="cb1-239"><a href="#cb1-239" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">SolScalene for other values of iA--&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-240"><a href="#cb1-240" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-block</span> <span class="ot">template-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;tSol&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SolRightAngle&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span>&gt;</span>

**Adaptive Example 5 - Using qti-feedback-block to change the appearance
of a question**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span> <span class="ot">standalone=</span><span class="st">&quot;yes&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot; http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0</span></span>

<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">xmlns:xi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XInclude&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">xmlns:m=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;Example05-feedbackBlock-adaptive&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Adaptive - choice of input type&quot;</span> <span class="ot">time-dependent=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">adaptive=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
