<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE25&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;cooks&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE26&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;spoil&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE27&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;broth&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-44"><a href="#cb1-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-45"><a href="#cb1-45" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-46"><a href="#cb1-46" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">normal-maximum=</span><span class="st">&quot;10.0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-47"><a href="#cb1-47" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="ot">normal-minimum=</span><span class="st">&quot;0.0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-48"><a href="#cb1-48" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-49"><a href="#cb1-49" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;0.0&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-50"><a href="#cb1-50" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-51"><a href="#cb1-51" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-52"><a href="#cb1-52" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-53"><a href="#cb1-53" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-54"><a href="#cb1-54" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co">&lt;!--Define a feedback variable; its cardinality is &quot;multiple&quot; so that it can contain the </span></span>
<span id="cb1-55"><a href="#cb1-55" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">  identifiers of several feedback elements, and in this case it is initialised to the identifier,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-56"><a href="#cb1-56" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">  part1, of the first part of this adaptive question--&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-57"><a href="#cb1-57" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;multiple&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;BODY&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-58"><a href="#cb1-58" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-59"><a href="#cb1-59" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;part1&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-60"><a href="#cb1-60" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-61"><a href="#cb1-61" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-62"><a href="#cb1-62" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-63"><a href="#cb1-63" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-64"><a href="#cb1-64" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">div</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-65"><a href="#cb1-65" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!--This feedbackBlock is the first part of this adaptive question to appear, since the BODY variable </span></span>
<span id="cb1-66"><a href="#cb1-66" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">  initially contains its identifier, part1; it contains the first multiple choice interaction in this question.</span></span>
<span id="cb1-67"><a href="#cb1-67" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">  When BODY is set to part2, this feedbackBlock is no longer visible.--&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-68"><a href="#cb1-68" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-feedback-block</span> <span class="ot">id=</span><span class="st">&quot;feedbackBlock0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;part1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;BODY&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-69"><a href="#cb1-69" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-70"><a href="#cb1-70" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;This is the first part of this question: Which of these input methods do you wish</span>
<span id="cb1-71"><a href="#cb1-71" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            to use?&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-72"><a href="#cb1-72" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-choice-interaction</span> <span class="ot">id=</span><span class="st">&quot;choiceInteraction0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">max-choices=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE1&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-73"><a href="#cb1-73" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            <span class="ot">shuffle=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-74"><a href="#cb1-74" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">id=</span><span class="st">&quot;simpleChoice0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;OPTION1&quot;</span>&gt;Multiple choice &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-75"><a href="#cb1-75" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">id=</span><span class="st">&quot;simpleChoice1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;OPTION2&quot;</span>&gt;Drop-down menu &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-76"><a href="#cb1-76" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">id=</span><span class="st">&quot;simpleChoice2&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;OPTION3&quot;</span>&gt;Typed input &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-77"><a href="#cb1-77" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-choice-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-78"><a href="#cb1-78" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-feedback-block</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-79"><a href="#cb1-79" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-80"><a href="#cb1-80" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!--This feedbackBlock is the second part of the question; it appears when the BODY variable contains </span></span>
<span id="cb1-81"><a href="#cb1-81" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">  its identifier,   part2. BODY is a multiple cardinality variable, so it can contain the identifiers of </span></span>
<span id="cb1-82"><a href="#cb1-82" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">  several feedbackBlocks   (and feedbackInlines) at the same time, each of which is visible if their show </span></span>
<span id="cb1-83"><a href="#cb1-83" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">  attribute is set to show, or hidden if their show attribute is set to hide.--&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-84"><a href="#cb1-84" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-feedback-block</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;part2&quot;</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;BODY&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-85"><a href="#cb1-85" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-86"><a href="#cb1-86" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;OK, this is the type of input you have chosen. Now please answer this, the second</span>
<span id="cb1-87"><a href="#cb1-87" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            part of the question.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-88"><a href="#cb1-88" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-89"><a href="#cb1-89" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-feedback-block</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-90"><a href="#cb1-90" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-91"><a href="#cb1-91" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!--This feedbackBlock appears if the user chose to use multiple choice in the first part of the question - </span></span>
<span id="cb1-92"><a href="#cb1-92" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">  it contains the selected type of interaction.--&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-93"><a href="#cb1-93" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-feedback-block</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;option1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;BODY&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-94"><a href="#cb1-94" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-95"><a href="#cb1-95" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Choose the correct saying:&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-96"><a href="#cb1-96" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-choice-interaction</span> <span class="ot">max-choices=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE21&quot;</span> <span class="ot">shuffle=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-97"><a href="#cb1-97" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;OPTION210&quot;</span>&gt;Too many cooks spoil the broth&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-98"><a href="#cb1-98" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;OPTION211&quot;</span>&gt;Too many cooks burn the dinner&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-99"><a href="#cb1-99" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;OPTION212&quot;</span>&gt;Too many children spill the broth&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-100"><a href="#cb1-100" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;OPTION213&quot;</span>&gt;Too many hands spill the beans&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-101"><a href="#cb1-101" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;OPTION214&quot;</span>&gt;Too many children spoil the broth&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-102"><a href="#cb1-102" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-choice-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-103"><a href="#cb1-103" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-104"><a href="#cb1-104" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-feedback-block</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-105"><a href="#cb1-105" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-106"><a href="#cb1-106" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!--This feedbackBlock appears if the user chose to use drop-down menus in the first part of the question - </span></span>
<span id="cb1-107"><a href="#cb1-107" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">  it contains the selected type of interaction.--&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-108"><a href="#cb1-108" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-feedback-block</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;option2&quot;</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;BODY&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-109"><a href="#cb1-109" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-110"><a href="#cb1-110" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">p</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;&quot;</span>&gt;Complete the saying below by selecting from the lists:&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-111"><a href="#cb1-111" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">p</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;&quot;</span>&gt;Too many </span>
<span id="cb1-112"><a href="#cb1-112" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE22&quot;</span> <span class="ot">shuffle=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-113"><a href="#cb1-113" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;OPTION221&quot;</span>&gt;cooks&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-114"><a href="#cb1-114" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;OPTION222&quot;</span>&gt;children&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-115"><a href="#cb1-115" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;OPTION223&quot;</span>&gt;hands&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-116"><a href="#cb1-116" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice-interaction</span>&gt; </span>
<span id="cb1-117"><a href="#cb1-117" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE23&quot;</span> <span class="ot">shuffle=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-118"><a href="#cb1-118" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;OPTION231&quot;</span>&gt;spoil&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-119"><a href="#cb1-119" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;OPTION232&quot;</span>&gt;spill&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-120"><a href="#cb1-120" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;OPTION233&quot;</span>&gt;burn&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-121"><a href="#cb1-121" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice-interaction</span>&gt; the </span>
<span id="cb1-122"><a href="#cb1-122" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE24&quot;</span> <span class="ot">shuffle=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-123"><a href="#cb1-123" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;OPTION241&quot;</span>&gt;broth&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-124"><a href="#cb1-124" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;OPTION242&quot;</span>&gt;dinner&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-125"><a href="#cb1-125" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;OPTION243&quot;</span>&gt;beans&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-126"><a href="#cb1-126" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-inline-choice-interaction</span>&gt;.</span>
<span id="cb1-127"><a href="#cb1-127" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-128"><a href="#cb1-128" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-129"><a href="#cb1-129" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-feedback-block</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-130"><a href="#cb1-130" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-131"><a href="#cb1-131" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!--This feedbackBlock appears if the user chose to type answers in text boxes in the first part </span></span>
<span id="cb1-132"><a href="#cb1-132" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">of the question - it contains the selected type of interaction.--&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-133"><a href="#cb1-133" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-feedback-block</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;option3&quot;</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;BODY&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-134"><a href="#cb1-134" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-135"><a href="#cb1-135" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">p</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;&quot;</span>&gt;Complete the saying below:&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-136"><a href="#cb1-136" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">p</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;&quot;</span>&gt;Too many </span>
<span id="cb1-137"><a href="#cb1-137" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-text-entry-interaction</span> <span class="ot">expected-length=</span><span class="st">&quot;20&quot;</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE25&quot;</span> /&gt; </span>
<span id="cb1-138"><a href="#cb1-138" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-text-entry-interaction</span> <span class="ot">expected-length=</span><span class="st">&quot;20&quot;</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE26&quot;</span> /&gt; the </span>
<span id="cb1-139"><a href="#cb1-139" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-text-entry-interaction</span> <span class="ot">expected-length=</span><span class="st">&quot;20&quot;</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE27&quot;</span> /&gt;.</span>
<span id="cb1-140"><a href="#cb1-140" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-141"><a href="#cb1-141" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-142"><a href="#cb1-142" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-feedback-block</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-143"><a href="#cb1-143" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-144"><a href="#cb1-144" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!--These feedbackInline elements provide feedback on the input given by the user in the </span></span>
<span id="cb1-145"><a href="#cb1-145" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">second part of the question.--&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-146"><a href="#cb1-146" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span> <span class="ot">id=</span><span class="st">&quot;feedbackInline1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;CORRECT&quot;</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-147"><a href="#cb1-147" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          That&#39;s the correct answer. &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-148"><a href="#cb1-148" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span> <span class="ot">id=</span><span class="st">&quot;feedbackInline2&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;PARTIAL&quot;</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-149"><a href="#cb1-149" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          Your answer is partially correct; the correct answer is &quot;Too many &lt;<span class="kw">b</span>&gt;cooks&lt;/<span class="kw">b</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-150"><a href="#cb1-150" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">b</span>&gt;spoil&lt;/<span class="kw">b</span>&gt; the &lt;<span class="kw">b</span>&gt;broth&lt;/<span class="kw">b</span>&gt;&quot;. &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-151"><a href="#cb1-151" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span> <span class="ot">id=</span><span class="st">&quot;feedbackInline3&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;INCORRECT&quot;</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-152"><a href="#cb1-152" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          Sorry, that&#39;s not correct; the correct answer is &quot;Too many &lt;<span class="kw">b</span>&gt;cooks&lt;/<span class="kw">b</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-153"><a href="#cb1-153" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">b</span>&gt;spoil&lt;/<span class="kw">b</span>&gt; the &lt;<span class="kw">b</span>&gt;broth&lt;/<span class="kw">b</span>&gt;&quot;. &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-154"><a href="#cb1-154" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-155"><a href="#cb1-155" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-156"><a href="#cb1-156" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-157"><a href="#cb1-157" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-158"><a href="#cb1-158" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-159"><a href="#cb1-159" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-160"><a href="#cb1-160" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-161"><a href="#cb1-161" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-member</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-162"><a href="#cb1-162" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!--Check whether &quot;part1&quot; is contained in the BODY variable, and if it is, </span></span>
<span id="cb1-163"><a href="#cb1-163" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">set up the second part of thequestion.--&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-164"><a href="#cb1-164" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;part1&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-165"><a href="#cb1-165" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;BODY&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-166"><a href="#cb1-166" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-member</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-167"><a href="#cb1-167" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;BODY&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-168"><a href="#cb1-168" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-multiple</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-169"><a href="#cb1-169" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!--Put &quot;part2&quot; into the BODY variable.--&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-170"><a href="#cb1-170" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;part2&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-171"><a href="#cb1-171" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-multiple</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-172"><a href="#cb1-172" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-173"><a href="#cb1-173" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-174"><a href="#cb1-174" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-175"><a href="#cb1-175" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-match</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-176"><a href="#cb1-176" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE1&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-177"><a href="#cb1-177" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!--If the user selected OPTION1 (MCQ) put the identifier, option1, </span></span>
<span id="cb1-178"><a href="#cb1-178" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">of the feedbackBlock containing the second MCQ into BODY .--&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-179"><a href="#cb1-179" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;OPTION1&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-180"><a href="#cb1-180" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-match</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-181"><a href="#cb1-181" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;BODY&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-182"><a href="#cb1-182" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-multiple</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-183"><a href="#cb1-183" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;BODY&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-184"><a href="#cb1-184" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;option1&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-185"><a href="#cb1-185" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-multiple</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-186"><a href="#cb1-186" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-187"><a href="#cb1-187" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-188"><a href="#cb1-188" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-else-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-189"><a href="#cb1-189" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-match</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-190"><a href="#cb1-190" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE1&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-191"><a href="#cb1-191" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!--If the user selected OPTION2 (drop-down menus) put the identifier, option2, </span></span>
<span id="cb1-192"><a href="#cb1-192" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">of the feedbackBlock containing the drop-down menus into BODY .--&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-193"><a href="#cb1-193" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;OPTION2&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-194"><a href="#cb1-194" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-match</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-195"><a href="#cb1-195" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;BODY&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-196"><a href="#cb1-196" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-multiple</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-197"><a href="#cb1-197" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;BODY&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-198"><a href="#cb1-198" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;option2&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-199"><a href="#cb1-199" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-multiple</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-200"><a href="#cb1-200" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-201"><a href="#cb1-201" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-else-if</span>&gt;</span>

<span id="cb1-203"><a href="#cb1-203" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-match</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-204"><a href="#cb1-204" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE1&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-205"><a href="#cb1-205" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!--If the user selected OPTION3 (text input) put the identifier, option3, </span></span>
<span id="cb1-206"><a href="#cb1-206" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">of the feedbackBlock containing the text boxes into BODY .--&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-207"><a href="#cb1-207" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;OPTION3&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-208"><a href="#cb1-208" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-match</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-209"><a href="#cb1-209" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;BODY&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-210"><a href="#cb1-210" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-multiple</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-211"><a href="#cb1-211" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;BODY&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-212"><a href="#cb1-212" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;option3&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-213"><a href="#cb1-213" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-multiple</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-214"><a href="#cb1-214" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-215"><a href="#cb1-215" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-else-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-216"><a href="#cb1-216" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-217"><a href="#cb1-217" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-218"><a href="#cb1-218" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-else-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-219"><a href="#cb1-219" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-member</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-220"><a href="#cb1-220" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!--If BODY contains part2, the second part of the question has been displayed, </span></span>
<span id="cb1-221"><a href="#cb1-221" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">so we process the user's input to the chosen interaction.--&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-222"><a href="#cb1-222" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;part2&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-223"><a href="#cb1-223" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;BODY&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-224"><a href="#cb1-224" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-member</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-225"><a href="#cb1-225" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-condition</span>&gt;</span>

<span id="cb1-228"><a href="#cb1-228" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;option1&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-229"><a href="#cb1-229" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;BODY&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-230"><a href="#cb1-230" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-member</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-231"><a href="#cb1-231" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-232"><a href="#cb1-232" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-233"><a href="#cb1-233" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-match</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-234"><a href="#cb1-234" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE21&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-235"><a href="#cb1-235" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE21&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-236"><a href="#cb1-236" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-match</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-237"><a href="#cb1-237" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-238"><a href="#cb1-238" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;CORRECT&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-239"><a href="#cb1-239" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-240"><a href="#cb1-240" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-241"><a href="#cb1-241" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>&gt;10.0&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-242"><a href="#cb1-242" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-243"><a href="#cb1-243" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-if</span>&gt;</span>
