<span id="cb1-363"><a href="#cb1-363" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-else-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-364"><a href="#cb1-364" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-else</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-365"><a href="#cb1-365" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-366"><a href="#cb1-366" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;INCORRECT&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-367"><a href="#cb1-367" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-368"><a href="#cb1-368" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-369"><a href="#cb1-369" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>&gt;0.0&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-370"><a href="#cb1-370" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-371"><a href="#cb1-371" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-else</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-372"><a href="#cb1-372" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-373"><a href="#cb1-373" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-else-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-374"><a href="#cb1-374" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-375"><a href="#cb1-375" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!-- completionStatus must be specifically set to completed in adaptive questions --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-376"><a href="#cb1-376" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;completionStatus&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-377"><a href="#cb1-377" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;completed&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-378"><a href="#cb1-378" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-379"><a href="#cb1-379" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-else-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-380"><a href="#cb1-380" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-381"><a href="#cb1-381" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-382"><a href="#cb1-382" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

In this example, the "feedback" forms part of the question. In adaptive
questions, feedbackBlock and feedbackInline elements can contain
interactions:

**Monty Hall (Take 1)**

[Section 3.8.3 - Annotated Item Examples - Monty Hall (Take
1)](#h.1s594xl1jzsk)

This example takes a famous mathematical problem and presents it to the
user as a game. The
[qti-feedback-block](http://www.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/info/index.html#AbstractAttribute_FeedandTempBlockStatic_qti-feedback-block)
 element, in association with a number of outcome variables is used to
control the flow of the story, from the opening gambit through to
whether or not you have won a prize. When the story concludes you are
asked about the strategy you adopted. Notice that the scoring for the
question is based on the actual strategy you took (one mark) and your
answer to the final question (two marks). If you choose a bad strategy
initially you are always punished by losing the game. If you feel that
this is cheating take a look at a more realistic version of the same
question which combines adaptivity with the powerful feature of item
templates: [Monty Hall (Take 2)](#MontyHallTake2).

Items with Hints

See the example in the [End Attempt Interaction section](#end-attempt),
where the item is extended to provide both feedback and the option of
requesting a hint. The qti-end-attempt-interaction controls the value of
the response variable HINTREQUEST - which is true if the attempt ended
with a request for a hint and false otherwise.

</div>

<div id="feedback" class="section">

#### 3.7.3 Feedback<a href="#h.of39hkegnqll" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.of39hkegnqll" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

Feedback consists of material presented to the candidate conditionally,
based on the values of outcome variables, allowing an item to be
reconfigured as a result of [Response
Processing](http://www.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/info/index.html#RootAttribute_qti-response-processing)
. In other words, feedback is controlled by the values of outcome
variables. There are several  types of feedback material:

- <span style="font-weight: bold;">Feedback blocks</span> (
  *qti-feedback-block*) are shown to the candidate based on the value of
  an outcome variable.  Each feedback block is associated with an
  outcome variable and an *identifier*. If the outcome variable has that
  identifier as its value, then the feedback block is shown or hidden,
  as determined by the value of the show-hide attribute.  Feedback
  blocks may contain almost any valid *qti-item-body* content, including
  interactions and other feedback blocks. Feedback blocks may be used
  inside many interaction components, such as choices, and within HTML5
  elements, such as *div*.   After each attempt, following a round of
  response and outcome processing, the delivery engine re-computes the
  visibility of feedback blocks based on possibly new values of the
  controlling outcome variables.   By default, the changed state of
  feedback content is only shown during subsequent attempts on, or
  review of, an item.
- <span style="font-weight: bold;">Inline feedback</span> (
  *qti-feedback-inline*) is similar to block feedback, but may only be
  used in "inline" contexts. Inline feedback elements may only contain
  inline HTML5 content, such as *span*, and inline QTI interactions,
  such as *qti-inline-choice-interaction*, or
  *qti-text-entry-interaction*.
- <span style="font-weight: bold;">Modal feedback</span> (
  *qti-modal-feedback*) is item content which is shown to (or hidden
  from) the candidate based on the value of outcome variables, and whose
  display can be changed by response processing. Those display changes
  become visible before any subsequent attempt or review of the item. As
  with feedback blocks, the value of a controlling outcome variable is
  used in conjunction with the *show-hide* and *identifier* attributes
  to determine whether or not the feedback is presented. Unlike feedback
  blocks and inline feedback, the modal feedback element cannot contain
  any interactions, and may not be used inside an item body. Because
  modal feedback is not part of the item body, it may be displayed
  "modally" -- for example, as a pop-up "dialog box" which appears after
  response and outcome processing and which must be dismissed by the
  candidate after it is read.  However, how modal feedback is displayed
  is left to the delivery platform, and an implementation may simply
  display modal feedback in-line in the item, similar to other forms of
  feedback.
- <span style="font-weight: bold;">Test feedback</span> (
  *qti-test-feedback*) is allowed within *qti-assessment-test* and
  *qti-test-part*, and is otherwise very similar to modal feedback. Test
  feedback may be configured to be shown during the test or test part (
  *access*="during"), or only when the candidate reaches the end of the
  test or test part ( *access="*atEnd").

Using qti-modal-feedback

In this example, a straightforward multi-choice question declares an
additional outcome variable called FEEDBACK which is used to control the
visibility of just qti-modal-feedback.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0 </span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;Example01-modalFeedback&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Example 1 - modal feedback&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">adaptive=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">time-dependent=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en&quot;</span> &gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co">&lt;!-- The response variable RESPONSE will hold the candidate&#39;s input--&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="co">&lt;!--The value of the right answer is declared--&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;true&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!-- Define a feedback variable; its base type is &quot;identifier&quot; so that it can contain </span></span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">        the identifier of the feedback message--&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="ot">normal-maximum=</span><span class="st">&quot;10.0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;0&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;MAXSCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;10.0&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-choice-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">shuffle=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">max-choices=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;Sigmund Freud and Carl Jung both belong to the psychoanalytic school of</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          psychology.&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> <span class="ot">fixed=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span>&gt;True &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">fixed=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span>&gt;False &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-choice-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-match</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            <span class="co">&lt;!-- The value of RESPONSE is compared with the correct value identified </span></span>
<span id="cb1-44"><a href="#cb1-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">                    in the RESPONSE declaration--&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-45"><a href="#cb1-45" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-46"><a href="#cb1-46" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-47"><a href="#cb1-47" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-match</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-48"><a href="#cb1-48" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-49"><a href="#cb1-49" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;MAXSCORE&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-50"><a href="#cb1-50" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-51"><a href="#cb1-51" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-52"><a href="#cb1-52" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;correct&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-53"><a href="#cb1-53" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-54"><a href="#cb1-54" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-55"><a href="#cb1-55" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-else</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-56"><a href="#cb1-56" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="co">&lt;!--Depending on whether the input matches the correct answer or not, FEEDBACK </span></span>
<span id="cb1-57"><a href="#cb1-57" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">                    is given the value of the identifier of the appropriate feedback message--&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-58"><a href="#cb1-58" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-59"><a href="#cb1-59" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;incorrect&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-60"><a href="#cb1-60" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-61"><a href="#cb1-61" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-else</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-62"><a href="#cb1-62" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-63"><a href="#cb1-63" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-64"><a href="#cb1-64" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb1-65"><a href="#cb1-65" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!-- Note how the identifiers in the following modalFeedback elements match those of the </span></span>
<span id="cb1-66"><a href="#cb1-66" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">        setOutcomeValue elements above --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-67"><a href="#cb1-67" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-68"><a href="#cb1-68" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-modal-feedback</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;correct&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-69"><a href="#cb1-69" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;correct&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-70"><a href="#cb1-70" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-modal-feedback</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-71"><a href="#cb1-71" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-modal-feedback</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;incorrect&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-72"><a href="#cb1-72" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;incorrect&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-73"><a href="#cb1-73" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-modal-feedback</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-74"><a href="#cb1-74" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-75"><a href="#cb1-75" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

Inline Feedback using qti-feedback-inline

In this example, the feedback appears within the question, right beside
the text of the selected option. The content of qti-feedback-inline is
restricted to material which can be displayed "inline", i.e. without
moving to a new block or paragraph, so it behaves like the HTML "span"
element.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot; http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0 </span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;Example02-feedbackInline&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Example 2 - inline feedback&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">adaptive=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">time-dependent=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en&quot;</span> &gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;true&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co">&lt;!-- Define a feedback variable; its base-type is &quot;identifier&quot; so that it can contain the identifier</span></span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">         of the feedback message--&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span> <span class="ot">normal-maximum=</span><span class="st">&quot;10.0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;0&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;MAXSCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;10.0&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co">&lt;!-- The response variable RESPONSE will hold the candidate&#39;s input--&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-choice-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">shuffle=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">max-choices=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;Sigmund Freud and Carl Jung both belong to the psychoanalytic school of</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            psychology.&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> <span class="ot">fixed=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span>&gt;True </span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co">&lt;!--The feedbackInline elements are each given the same identifier as the corresponding option.--&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            - &lt;<span class="kw">strong</span>&gt;That&#39;s correct&lt;/<span class="kw">strong</span>&gt;&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">fixed=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span>&gt;False </span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            - &lt;<span class="kw">strong</span>&gt;That&#39;s not correct&lt;/<span class="kw">strong</span>&gt;&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-choice-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-44"><a href="#cb1-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-45"><a href="#cb1-45" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-46"><a href="#cb1-46" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-47"><a href="#cb1-47" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!--This time, FEEDBACK is given the value of the identifier of the option which was selected.--&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-48"><a href="#cb1-48" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-49"><a href="#cb1-49" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-50"><a href="#cb1-50" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-51"><a href="#cb1-51" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-52"><a href="#cb1-52" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-53"><a href="#cb1-53" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-match</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-54"><a href="#cb1-54" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-55"><a href="#cb1-55" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-56"><a href="#cb1-56" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-match</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-57"><a href="#cb1-57" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-58"><a href="#cb1-58" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;MAXSCORE&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-59"><a href="#cb1-59" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-60"><a href="#cb1-60" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-61"><a href="#cb1-61" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-62"><a href="#cb1-62" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-63"><a href="#cb1-63" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

<div id="item-templates" class="section">

#### 3.7.4 Item Templates<a href="#h.hs6z9wmqtzq7" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.hs6z9wmqtzq7" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

Item Templates are items which function as templates that can be used
for generating large numbers of related items. The generated items are
often called "cloned items". Item templates can be used by
special-purpose software, a so-called "cloning engine" to produce many
clones of the template.

Where Delivery Engines support Template Processing, an Item Template can
also be included directly in an assessment. At delivery time, the
delivery engine will run the Template Processing in the item, giving the
item's template variables values, and possibly computing new correct
responses based upon the template variable values, effectively creating
a single clone of the item template dynamically. In combination with the
QTI *selection* element with the attribute *with-replacement="true"*, a
single Item Template in an assessment may be instantiated multiple
times, and appear to the candidate as a different item each time, as a
result of the Template Processing in the Item being run in each separate
instance.

Each item cloned from an Item Template is identical except for the
value, *qti-default-value,* and *qti-correct-response* value of the
template, response, and outcome variables of the item, as assigned by
the Template Processing.

An Assessment Item is therefore an Item Template if it contains a set of
Template Processing rules for assigning values to the item variables. An
Item Template will typically also have Template Declarations for
template variables, although this is not mandatory. The state of the
template, outcome, and response variables post-Template Processing is
what distinguishes one clone of an item from another.

A cloning engine that creates cloned items must assign a different
identifier to each clone and record the values of the template variables
used to create it. A report of an item session with such a clone can
then be transformed into an equivalent report for the original item
template by substituting the item template'sidentifier for the cloned
item's identifier and adding the values of the template variables to the
report.

Item templating features may be used in combination with QTI adaptive
and feedback features to provide items with varying paths through
multiple interactions.

The main QTI features which support Item Templates include:

- <span style="font-weight:bold; font-size:1.1em;">Template
  Variables</span>.  Similar to response, outcome, and context
  variables, template variables are defined by the
  *qti-template-declaration*element. The default values of template
  variables can be set in the declaration or by
  *qti-template-default*elements. The values may subsequently be changed
  via Template Processing.
- <span style="font-weight:bold; font-size:1.1em;">Template Variable
  Defaults</span> (*qti-template-default*).  While the default value of
  a template variable can be set using the *qti-default-value*element
  within the *qti-template-declaration*, in the same manner as with
  response and outcome declarations, the *qti-template-default* element
  may also be used to set the default value within an Assessment Item
  Reference at the Assessment Section level. This allows the default
  values of template variables, as specified within the item, to be
  overridden when an item is incorporated by reference into a particular
  assessment. The template default value can be given as an expression
  in the Template Processing domain-specific language.
- <span style="font-weight:bold; font-size:1.1em;">Template
  Content</span>(*qti-template-block* and *qti-template-inline*).
   Conceptually similar to feedback blocks and inline feedback, template
  blocks and inline templates represent content which is shown to, or
  hidden from, the candidate based on the *identifier* and *show-hide*
  attributes of the template blocks and inline templates. Many of the
  interaction types also have subcomponents, such as hotspots or
  choices, which can be conditionally displayed (or hidden), using the
  same show-hide mechanism as template blocks and inline templates. This
  makes it possible, for example, to turn the choices in a Choice
  Interaction on or off via template variables.

<!-- -->

- <span style="font-weight:bold; font-size:1.1em;">Template Variable
  Expansion.</span>  Printed variables (*qti-printed-variable*) may be
  used to display template variable values, just as they may be used
  with outcome and context variables. In addition, if a template
  variable has the *math-variable="true"* attribute, MathML *mi* and
  *mo* variables will be replaced with the value of the corresponding
  template variable. Similarly, if a template variable has the
  *param-variable="true"* attribute, *param* element values will be
  replaced with the corresponding template variables.
- <span style="font-weight:bold; font-size:1.1em;">Template
  Processing</span> (*qti-template-processing*).  Similar to response
  and outcome processing, template processing may be defined within an
  item to compute and set the values of template, response, and outcome
  variables. The delivery system will run the template processing rules
  immediately before the first attempt on an item, just prior to its
  initial presentation to the candidate. Following template processing
  and still before the initial presentation of the item, the delivery
  system will then determine the visibility of template blocks and
  inline templates, and do variable expansion on printed variables,
  MathML and *param* elements based on template variables.
- <span style="font-weight:bold; font-size:1.1em;">Template
  Constraints</span> (*qti-template-constraint*).  A template constraint
  is a processing rule available only in Template Processing. It
  terminates Template Processing and re-runs it from the beginning if
  the condition specified in the template constraint is not satisfied.
  This can be used, for example, to iterate the Template Processing with
  different randomly-generated values until a predetermined condition is
  satisfied.

The following examples demonstrate a variety of templating features.

Using Template Variables

This example contains a
simpleqti-text-entry-interaction(TextEntryInteraction.Type) but the
question (and the correct answer) varies for each [item
session](https://www.imsglobal.org/sites/default/files/spec/qti/v3/info/index.html#Lifecycle).
In addition to the usual RESPONSE and SCORE variables a number of
template variables are declared. Their values are set by a set of
[TemplateProcessing](https://www.imsglobal.org/sites/default/files/spec/qti/v3/info/index.html#IT_Processing%22)
rules. Template processing is very similar to response processing. The
same condition model and expression language are used. The difference is
that
[TemplateRules](https://www.imsglobal.org/sites/default/files/spec/qti/v3/info/index.html#Abstract_TemplateRuleGroup)
set the values of template variables and not outcome variables. Notice
that the declaration of RESPONSE does not declare a value for the
[CorrectResponse](https://www.imsglobal.org/sites/default/files/spec/qti/v3/info/index.html#Data_CorrectResponse)
because the answer varies depending on which values are chosen for A and
B. Instead, a special rule is used,
[qti-set-correct-response](https://www.imsglobal.org/sites/default/files/spec/qti/v3/info/index.html#AbstractAttribute_TemplateRuleGroup_qti-set-correct-response)
in the template processing section.

The display of aqti-text-entry-interaction response can be formatted
through the use of a format attribute using \# for optional digits. For
example, comma separators and a leading 0 for decimal entries can be
displayed if format="#,##0.#". A response 12345678 would display as
12,345,678, but would be captured as entered - "12345678". A response
.12345 would be captured as entered, but would display as 0.12345. A
response 1.2345 would display and be captured as entered, 1.2345. See
<https://code.google.com/p/javascript-number-formatter/> for the basis
of this feature.

The
[qti-random-integer](https://www.imsglobal.org/sites/default/files/spec/qti/v3/info/index.html#AbstractAttribute_ExpressionGroup_qti-random-integer)
element represents a simple expression that selects a random integer
from a specified range. The
[qti-random](https://www.imsglobal.org/sites/default/files/spec/qti/v3/info/index.html#AbstractAttribute_ExpressionGroup_qti-random)
element represents an operator that selects a random value from a
container.

The
[qti-item-body](https://www.imsglobal.org/sites/default/files/spec/qti/v3/info/index.html#RootAttribute_AssessmentItem_qti-item-body)
displays the values of the template variables using the
[qti-printed-variable](https://www.imsglobal.org/sites/default/files/spec/qti/v3/info/index.html#TabAbstractClassAttr_DataModel_FeedandTempBlockStatic_qti-printed-variable)
element.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot; http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0 </span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">  https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;template_digging&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Digging a Hole&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">adaptive=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">time-dependent=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en&quot;</span> &gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;PEOPLE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span> <span class="ot">math-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">param-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;A&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span> <span class="ot">math-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">param-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;B&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span> <span class="ot">math-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">param-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;MIN&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span> <span class="ot">math-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">param-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    </span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-processing</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;PEOPLE&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-random</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-multiple</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span>&gt;men&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span>&gt;women&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span>&gt;children&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-multiple</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-random</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;A&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-random-integer</span> <span class="ot">min=</span><span class="st">&quot;2&quot;</span> <span class="ot">max=</span><span class="st">&quot;4&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-match</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;A&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;2&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-match</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;B&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-random-integer</span> <span class="ot">min=</span><span class="st">&quot;4&quot;</span> <span class="ot">max=</span><span class="st">&quot;12&quot;</span> <span class="ot">step=</span><span class="st">&quot;2&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-template-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-else-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-match</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;A&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;3&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-match</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-44"><a href="#cb1-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;B&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-45"><a href="#cb1-45" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-random</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-46"><a href="#cb1-46" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-multiple</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-47"><a href="#cb1-47" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;6&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-48"><a href="#cb1-48" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;12&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-49"><a href="#cb1-49" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-multiple</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-50"><a href="#cb1-50" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-random</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-51"><a href="#cb1-51" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-52"><a href="#cb1-52" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-template-else-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-53"><a href="#cb1-53" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-else</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-54"><a href="#cb1-54" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;B&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-55"><a href="#cb1-55" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-random</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-56"><a href="#cb1-56" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-multiple</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-57"><a href="#cb1-57" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;8&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-58"><a href="#cb1-58" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;12&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-59"><a href="#cb1-59" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-multiple</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-60"><a href="#cb1-60" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-random</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-61"><a href="#cb1-61" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-62"><a href="#cb1-62" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-template-else</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-63"><a href="#cb1-63" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-template-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-64"><a href="#cb1-64" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;MIN&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-65"><a href="#cb1-65" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-integer-divide</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-66"><a href="#cb1-66" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;120&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-67"><a href="#cb1-67" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;A&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-68"><a href="#cb1-68" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-integer-divide</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-69"><a href="#cb1-69" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-70"><a href="#cb1-70" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-correct-response</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-71"><a href="#cb1-71" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-integer-to-float</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-72"><a href="#cb1-72" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-integer-divide</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-73"><a href="#cb1-73" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;120&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-74"><a href="#cb1-74" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;B&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-75"><a href="#cb1-75" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-integer-divide</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-76"><a href="#cb1-76" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-integer-to-float</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-77"><a href="#cb1-77" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-78"><a href="#cb1-78" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-template-processing</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-79"><a href="#cb1-79" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb1-80"><a href="#cb1-80" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-81"><a href="#cb1-81" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;If it takes &lt;<span class="kw">qti-printed-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;A&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-82"><a href="#cb1-82" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-printed-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;PEOPLE&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-83"><a href="#cb1-83" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-printed-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;MIN&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-84"><a href="#cb1-84" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      minutes to dig a hole, how long would it take</span>
<span id="cb1-85"><a href="#cb1-85" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-printed-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;B&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-86"><a href="#cb1-86" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-printed-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;PEOPLE&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-87"><a href="#cb1-87" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      to dig a similar hole?&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-88"><a href="#cb1-88" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Answer: &lt;<span class="kw">qti-text-entry-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">expected-length=</span><span class="st">&quot;8&quot;</span>/&gt; minutes.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-89"><a href="#cb1-89" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-90"><a href="#cb1-90" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb1-91"><a href="#cb1-91" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-92"><a href="#cb1-92" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="ot">template=</span><span class="st">&quot;https://www.imsglobal.org/question/qti_v3p0/rptemplates/match_correct.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-93"><a href="#cb1-93" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

Using a Template to Change an Image

Sometimes it is desirable to vary some aspect of an item that cannot be
represented directly by the value of a template variable. For example,
in "Mick's Travels", the
[qti-item-body](http://www.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/info/index.html#RootAttribute_AssessmentItem_qti-item-body)
contains an illustration that needs to be varied according to the value
chosen for a template variable. To achieve this, three
[qti-template-inline](http://www.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/info/index.html#TabCoreClass_DataModel_TemplateInline)
elements are used, each one enclosing a different
[img](http://www.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/info/index.html#Data_Img)
element. This element (along with the similar
[qti-template-block](http://www.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/info/index.html#AbstractAttribute_BlockGroup_qti-template-block)
) has attributes for controlling its visibility with template variables
in the same way as outcome variables are used to control the visibility
of feedback.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0 </span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">  https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;template_image&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Mick&#39;s Travels&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">adaptive=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">time-dependent=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en&quot;</span> &gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;TRANSPORT&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="ot">math-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">param-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SPEED&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="ot">math-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">param-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-processing</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;TRANSPORT&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-random</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-multiple</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;plane&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;train&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;bus&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-multiple</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-random</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-if</span>&gt;</span>

<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;TRANSPORT&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;plane&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-match</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SPEED&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;600&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-template-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-else-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-match</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;TRANSPORT&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;train&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-match</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SPEED&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;200&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-44"><a href="#cb1-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-45"><a href="#cb1-45" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-template-else-if</span>&gt;</span>
