<span id="cb1-47"><a href="#cb1-47" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SPEED&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-48"><a href="#cb1-48" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;50&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-49"><a href="#cb1-49" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-50"><a href="#cb1-50" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-template-else</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-51"><a href="#cb1-51" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-template-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-52"><a href="#cb1-52" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-correct-response</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-53"><a href="#cb1-53" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-product</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-54"><a href="#cb1-54" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;3&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-55"><a href="#cb1-55" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SPEED&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-56"><a href="#cb1-56" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-product</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-57"><a href="#cb1-57" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-58"><a href="#cb1-58" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-template-processing</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-59"><a href="#cb1-59" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-60"><a href="#cb1-60" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-61"><a href="#cb1-61" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co">&lt;!--Accessibility note: For QTI content, we assume the interface will have an h1, </span></span>
<span id="cb1-62"><a href="#cb1-62" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">    so we start with h2 heading level within the item body--&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-63"><a href="#cb1-63" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">h2</span>&gt;Mick&#39;s Travels&lt;/<span class="kw">h2</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-64"><a href="#cb1-64" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-65"><a href="#cb1-65" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-inline</span> <span class="ot">template-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;TRANSPORT&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;plane&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-66"><a href="#cb1-66" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/plane.png&quot;</span> <span class="ot">alt=</span><span class="st">&quot;Picture of a plane.&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-67"><a href="#cb1-67" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-template-inline</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-68"><a href="#cb1-68" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-inline</span> <span class="ot">template-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;TRANSPORT&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;train&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-69"><a href="#cb1-69" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/train.png&quot;</span> <span class="ot">alt=</span><span class="st">&quot;Picture of a train&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-70"><a href="#cb1-70" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-template-inline</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-71"><a href="#cb1-71" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-inline</span> <span class="ot">template-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;TRANSPORT&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;bus&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-72"><a href="#cb1-72" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/bus.png&quot;</span> <span class="ot">alt=</span><span class="st">&quot;Picture of a bus&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-73"><a href="#cb1-73" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-template-inline</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-74"><a href="#cb1-74" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-75"><a href="#cb1-75" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-76"><a href="#cb1-76" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Mick travels at an average speed of &lt;<span class="kw">qti-printed-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SPEED&quot;</span> /&gt; km/h.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-77"><a href="#cb1-77" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;How far does he travel in 3 hours? &lt;<span class="kw">qti-text-entry-interaction</span></span>
<span id="cb1-78"><a href="#cb1-78" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">expected-length=</span><span class="st">&quot;8&quot;</span> /&gt; km.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-79"><a href="#cb1-79" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-80"><a href="#cb1-80" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-81"><a href="#cb1-81" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span></span>
<span id="cb1-82"><a href="#cb1-82" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="ot">template=</span><span class="st">&quot;https://www.imsglobal.org/question/qti_v3p0/rptemplates/match_correct.xml&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-83"><a href="#cb1-83" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

Item Templates Combined with Adaptive Items

In [Monty Hall (Take 1)](#h.1s594xl1jzsk) we cheated by fixing the game
so that the wrong strategy always lost the candidate the prize (and the
first mark). In Monty Hall (Take 2) we present a more realistic version
of the game using an item template. The same outcome variables are
defined to control the story and the feedback given but this time a
[qti-template-declaration](http://www.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/info/index.html#RootAttribute_AssessmentItem_qti-template-declaration)
is used to declare the variable PRIZEDOOR. The
[qti-template-processing](http://www.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/info/index.html#RootAttribute_AssessmentItem_qti-template-processing)
rules are then used to preselect the winning door at random making the
game more realistic. The
[qti-response-processing](http://www.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/info/index.html#RootAttribute_AssessmentItem_qti-response-processing)
rules are a little more complicated as the value of PRIZEDOOR must be
checked (a) to ensure that Monty doesn't open the prize winning door
after the candidate's first choice and (b) to see if the candidate has
actually won the "fantastic prize".

In this example, using the correct strategy will still lose the
candidate the prize 1/3 of the time (though they always get the mark).
Do you think that the outcome of the game will affect the response to
the final strategy question?

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0 </span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">  https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;adaptiveTemplate&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Monty Hall (Take 2)&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">adaptive=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> <span class="ot">time-dependent=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en&quot;</span> &gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;DOOR&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;switchStrategy&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;STORY&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;openingGambit&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;CLOSED&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;multiple&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;DoorA&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;DoorB&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;DoorC&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span>&gt;</span>

<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;PRIZEDOOR&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="ot">math-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">param-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-processing</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;PRIZEDOOR&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-random</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-multiple</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;DoorA&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;DoorB&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;DoorC&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-44"><a href="#cb1-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-multiple</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-45"><a href="#cb1-45" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-random</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-46"><a href="#cb1-46" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-47"><a href="#cb1-47" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-template-processing</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-48"><a href="#cb1-48" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-49"><a href="#cb1-49" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-50"><a href="#cb1-50" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Monty Hall has hidden a prize behind one of these doors.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-51"><a href="#cb1-51" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-feedback-block</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;STORY&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;openingGambit&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-52"><a href="#cb1-52" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-53"><a href="#cb1-53" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Monty invites you to choose one of the doors but won&#39;t let you open it just yet.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-54"><a href="#cb1-54" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-55"><a href="#cb1-55" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-feedback-block</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-56"><a href="#cb1-56" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-feedback-block</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;STORY&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;tempter&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-57"><a href="#cb1-57" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-58"><a href="#cb1-58" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Monty opens one of the other doors to reveal - a goat!&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-59"><a href="#cb1-59" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;He then asks you if you would like to change your mind or to stick with the door</span>
<span id="cb1-60"><a href="#cb1-60" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          you</span>
<span id="cb1-61"><a href="#cb1-61" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          originally chose. It&#39;s time to make your mind up, which door are you going to</span>
<span id="cb1-62"><a href="#cb1-62" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          open?&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-63"><a href="#cb1-63" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-64"><a href="#cb1-64" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-feedback-block</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-65"><a href="#cb1-65" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-feedback-block</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;STORY&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;goat&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-66"><a href="#cb1-66" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-67"><a href="#cb1-67" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Bad luck! When you opened your chosen door it also revealed a goat.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-68"><a href="#cb1-68" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-69"><a href="#cb1-69" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-feedback-block</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-70"><a href="#cb1-70" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-feedback-block</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;STORY&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;prize&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-71"><a href="#cb1-71" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-72"><a href="#cb1-72" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Congratulations! When you opened your chosen door it revealed a fantastic prize</span>
<span id="cb1-73"><a href="#cb1-73" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          that</span>
<span id="cb1-74"><a href="#cb1-74" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          you are now free to take home.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-75"><a href="#cb1-75" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-76"><a href="#cb1-76" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-feedback-block</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-77"><a href="#cb1-77" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-choice-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;DOOR&quot;</span> <span class="ot">shuffle=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">max-choices=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-78"><a href="#cb1-78" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;DoorA&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-79"><a href="#cb1-79" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;CLOSED&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;DoorA&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-80"><a href="#cb1-80" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/red_door.png&quot;</span> <span class="ot">alt=</span><span class="st">&quot;The Red Door&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-81"><a href="#cb1-81" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-82"><a href="#cb1-82" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;GOATS&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;DoorA&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-83"><a href="#cb1-83" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/open_goat.png&quot;</span> <span class="ot">alt=</span><span class="st">&quot;An open door&quot;</span> /&gt; - this door is now open</span>
<span id="cb1-84"><a href="#cb1-84" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          revealing a goat!&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-85"><a href="#cb1-85" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;PRIZE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;DoorA&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-86"><a href="#cb1-86" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/open_car.png&quot;</span> <span class="ot">alt=</span><span class="st">&quot;An open door&quot;</span> /&gt; - this door is now open</span>
<span id="cb1-87"><a href="#cb1-87" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          revealing a fantastic prize!&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-88"><a href="#cb1-88" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-89"><a href="#cb1-89" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;DoorB&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-90"><a href="#cb1-90" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;CLOSED&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;DoorB&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-91"><a href="#cb1-91" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/green_door.png&quot;</span> <span class="ot">alt=</span><span class="st">&quot;The Green Door&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-92"><a href="#cb1-92" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-93"><a href="#cb1-93" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;GOATS&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;DoorB&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-94"><a href="#cb1-94" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/open_goat.png&quot;</span> <span class="ot">alt=</span><span class="st">&quot;An open door&quot;</span> /&gt; - this door is now open</span>
<span id="cb1-95"><a href="#cb1-95" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          revealing a goat!&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-96"><a href="#cb1-96" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;PRIZE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;DoorB&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-97"><a href="#cb1-97" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/open_car.png&quot;</span> <span class="ot">alt=</span><span class="st">&quot;An open door&quot;</span> /&gt; - this door is now open</span>
<span id="cb1-98"><a href="#cb1-98" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          revealing a fantastic prize!&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-99"><a href="#cb1-99" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-100"><a href="#cb1-100" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;DoorC&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-101"><a href="#cb1-101" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;CLOSED&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;DoorC&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-102"><a href="#cb1-102" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/blue_door.png&quot;</span> <span class="ot">alt=</span><span class="st">&quot;The Blue Door&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-103"><a href="#cb1-103" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-104"><a href="#cb1-104" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;GOATS&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;DoorC&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-105"><a href="#cb1-105" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/open_goat.png&quot;</span> <span class="ot">alt=</span><span class="st">&quot;An open door&quot;</span> /&gt; - this door is now open</span>
<span id="cb1-106"><a href="#cb1-106" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          revealing a goat!&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-107"><a href="#cb1-107" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;PRIZE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;DoorC&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-108"><a href="#cb1-108" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/open_car.png&quot;</span> <span class="ot">alt=</span><span class="st">&quot;An open door&quot;</span> /&gt; - this door is now open</span>
<span id="cb1-109"><a href="#cb1-109" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          revealing a fantastic prize!&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-feedback-inline</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-110"><a href="#cb1-110" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-111"><a href="#cb1-111" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-choice-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-112"><a href="#cb1-112" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-feedback-block</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;poser&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-113"><a href="#cb1-113" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-114"><a href="#cb1-114" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Well, whether or not you won the prize did you make your decision by guesswork or</span>
<span id="cb1-115"><a href="#cb1-115" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          logical reasoning? The question is, if we allowed you to play this game</span>
<span id="cb1-116"><a href="#cb1-116" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          repeatedly what strategy &lt;<span class="kw">em</span>&gt;should&lt;/<span class="kw">em</span>&gt; you adopt?&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-117"><a href="#cb1-117" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-choice-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">shuffle=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-118"><a href="#cb1-118" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          <span class="ot">max-choices=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-119"><a href="#cb1-119" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;stickStrategy&quot;</span>&gt;Always stick to the first door you</span>
<span id="cb1-120"><a href="#cb1-120" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            chose.&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-121"><a href="#cb1-121" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;switchStrategy&quot;</span>&gt;Always switch to the other closed</span>
<span id="cb1-122"><a href="#cb1-122" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            door</span>
<span id="cb1-123"><a href="#cb1-123" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            when Monty offers you the chance.&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-124"><a href="#cb1-124" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;noStrategy&quot;</span>&gt;It really doesn&#39;t matter whether you</span>
<span id="cb1-125"><a href="#cb1-125" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            stick or</span>
<span id="cb1-126"><a href="#cb1-126" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            switch - the outcome&#39;s the same.&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-127"><a href="#cb1-127" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-choice-interaction</span>&gt;</span>

<span id="cb1-130"><a href="#cb1-130" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-131"><a href="#cb1-131" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>

<span id="cb1-331"><a href="#cb1-331" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-is-null</span>&gt;</span>

<span id="cb1-348"><a href="#cb1-348" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-349"><a href="#cb1-349" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>

<span id="cb1-351"><a href="#cb1-351" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;completionStatus&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-352"><a href="#cb1-352" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;completed&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-353"><a href="#cb1-353" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-354"><a href="#cb1-354" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-else-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-355"><a href="#cb1-355" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-356"><a href="#cb1-356" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-357"><a href="#cb1-357" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-358"><a href="#cb1-358" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-modal-feedback</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;stickStrategy&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-359"><a href="#cb1-359" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;No. Initially, the probability of the prize being behind each door is 1/3.</span>
<span id="cb1-360"><a href="#cb1-360" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      Opening a losing door can&#39;t possibly make this go down for the remaining closed one! In</span>
<span id="cb1-361"><a href="#cb1-361" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      fact you should &lt;<span class="kw">em</span>&gt;never&lt;/<span class="kw">em</span>&gt; stick to your original decision. </span>
<span id="cb1-362"><a href="#cb1-362" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-363"><a href="#cb1-363" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-modal-feedback</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-364"><a href="#cb1-364" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-modal-feedback</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;switchStrategy&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-365"><a href="#cb1-365" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;Yes, you should &lt;<span class="kw">em</span>&gt;always&lt;/<span class="kw">em</span>&gt; switch doors when offered the chance.</span>
<span id="cb1-366"><a href="#cb1-366" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      Congratulations, perhaps you should think about a career as a TV game show contestant? </span>
<span id="cb1-367"><a href="#cb1-367" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-368"><a href="#cb1-368" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-modal-feedback</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-369"><a href="#cb1-369" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-modal-feedback</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;noStrategy&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-370"><a href="#cb1-370" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-371"><a href="#cb1-371" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;No, you should infact &lt;<span class="kw">em</span>&gt;always&lt;/<span class="kw">em</span>&gt; switch doors. This problem has fooled many</span>
<span id="cb1-372"><a href="#cb1-372" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        mathematicians since it was first posed in an American magazine article and</span>
<span id="cb1-373"><a href="#cb1-373" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        continues to present a seemingly paradoxical answer!&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-374"><a href="#cb1-374" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;The probability of your first choice door hiding the prize is 1/3 and this can&#39;t change.</span>
<span id="cb1-375"><a href="#cb1-375" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        But, 2/3 of the time you&#39;ll be wrong with your first choice and, by revealing a goat,</span>
<span id="cb1-376"><a href="#cb1-376" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        Monty is effectively telling you which door the prize is behind the remaining 2/3 of the</span>
<span id="cb1-377"><a href="#cb1-377" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        time! So by switching doors, your chances of getting the prize go up to 2/3!&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-378"><a href="#cb1-378" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-379"><a href="#cb1-379" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-modal-feedback</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-380"><a href="#cb1-380" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-381"><a href="#cb1-381" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

Modal Feedback with Math Markup Language

This example makes extensive use of templates to test knowledge of
calculus. It has modal feedback and includes some mathML.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> <span class="ot">xmlns:m=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML</span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">  xsi:schemaLocation=&quot;</span><span class="ot">http:</span><span class="er">/</span>/www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0 </span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/mathml/v3p0/schema/xsd/mathml3.xsd&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  adaptive=&quot;false&quot; time-dependent=&quot;false&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  identifier=&quot;mc_calc3&quot; title=&quot;The number divisors&quot; xml:lang=&quot;en&quot;&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE0&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-declaration</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;i&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="ot">math-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> <span class="ot">param-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-declaration</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;ordered&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;numbers&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="ot">math-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> <span class="ot">param-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-declaration</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;ordered&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;divisors&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="ot">math-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> <span class="ot">param-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-declaration</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;CALC0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="ot">math-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> <span class="ot">param-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-processing</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;i&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-random-integer</span> <span class="ot">max=</span><span class="st">&quot;7&quot;</span> <span class="ot">min=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;numbers&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-ordered</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;3&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;4&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;6&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;15&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;24&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;25&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;30&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-ordered</span>&gt;</span>

<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;divisors&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-ordered</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span>&gt;-&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span>&gt;2&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span>&gt;2,3&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span>&gt;3,5&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span>&gt;2,3,4,6,8,12&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-44"><a href="#cb1-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span>&gt;5&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-45"><a href="#cb1-45" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span>&gt;2,3,5,6,10,15&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-46"><a href="#cb1-46" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-ordered</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-47"><a href="#cb1-47" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-48"><a href="#cb1-48" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;CALC0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-49"><a href="#cb1-49" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-index</span> <span class="ot">n=</span><span class="st">&quot;i&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-50"><a href="#cb1-50" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;numbers&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-51"><a href="#cb1-51" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-index</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-52"><a href="#cb1-52" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-53"><a href="#cb1-53" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-condition</span>&gt;</span>

<span id="cb1-55"><a href="#cb1-55" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-equal</span> <span class="ot">tolerance-mode=</span><span class="st">&quot;exact&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-56"><a href="#cb1-56" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;i&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-57"><a href="#cb1-57" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;1&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-58"><a href="#cb1-58" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-equal</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-59"><a href="#cb1-59" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-correct-response</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-60"><a href="#cb1-60" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;SOLUTION0_0_0&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-61"><a href="#cb1-61" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-62"><a href="#cb1-62" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-template-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-63"><a href="#cb1-63" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-else-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-64"><a href="#cb1-64" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-equal</span> <span class="ot">tolerance-mode=</span><span class="st">&quot;exact&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-65"><a href="#cb1-65" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;i&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-66"><a href="#cb1-66" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;2&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-67"><a href="#cb1-67" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-equal</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-68"><a href="#cb1-68" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-correct-response</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-69"><a href="#cb1-69" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;SOLUTION0_0_1&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-70"><a href="#cb1-70" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-71"><a href="#cb1-71" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-template-else-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-72"><a href="#cb1-72" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-else-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-73"><a href="#cb1-73" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-equal</span> <span class="ot">tolerance-mode=</span><span class="st">&quot;exact&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-74"><a href="#cb1-74" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;i&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-75"><a href="#cb1-75" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;3&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-76"><a href="#cb1-76" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-equal</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-77"><a href="#cb1-77" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-correct-response</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-78"><a href="#cb1-78" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;SOLUTION0_0_2&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>

</table>

Numeric Operators in Response Processing

An example that uses templates extensively testing statistic funtions,
and uses many common numeric operators in the response processing. It
has modal feedback and includes some mathML.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> <span class="ot">xmlns:m=</span><span class="st">&quot; xmlns:m=&quot;</span><span class="ot">http:</span><span class="er">/</span>/www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML&quot; </span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   xsi:schemaLocation=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0 </span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd </span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML </span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/mathml/v3p0/schema/xsd/mathml3.xsd&quot; </span>
