<span id="cb1-200"><a href="#cb1-200" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-201"><a href="#cb1-201" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-modal-feedback</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-202"><a href="#cb1-202" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-203"><a href="#cb1-203" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        Bravo!</span>
<span id="cb1-204"><a href="#cb1-204" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-205"><a href="#cb1-205" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-modal-feedback</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-206"><a href="#cb1-206" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-modal-feedback</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-207"><a href="#cb1-207" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-208"><a href="#cb1-208" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        The mean was: &lt;<span class="kw">math</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-209"><a href="#cb1-209" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">mi</span>&gt;SOLUTION2_0&lt;/<span class="kw">mi</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-210"><a href="#cb1-210" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">math</span>&gt; and the standard deviation was: &lt;<span class="kw">math</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-211"><a href="#cb1-211" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">mi</span>&gt;SOLUTION3_0&lt;/<span class="kw">mi</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-212"><a href="#cb1-212" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">math</span>&gt;. </span>
<span id="cb1-213"><a href="#cb1-213" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-214"><a href="#cb1-214" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-modal-feedback</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-215"><a href="#cb1-215" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-modal-feedback</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK2&quot;</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-216"><a href="#cb1-216" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-217"><a href="#cb1-217" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      The greatest one was: &lt;<span class="kw">math</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-218"><a href="#cb1-218" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">mi</span>&gt;SOLUTION1_0&lt;/<span class="kw">mi</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-219"><a href="#cb1-219" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">math</span>&gt; and the standard deviation was: &lt;<span class="kw">math</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-220"><a href="#cb1-220" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">mi</span>&gt;SOLUTION3_0&lt;/<span class="kw">mi</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-221"><a href="#cb1-221" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">math</span>&gt;. </span>
<span id="cb1-222"><a href="#cb1-222" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-223"><a href="#cb1-223" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-modal-feedback</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-224"><a href="#cb1-224" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-modal-feedback</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK3&quot;</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-225"><a href="#cb1-225" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-226"><a href="#cb1-226" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      The smallest one was: &lt;<span class="kw">math</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-227"><a href="#cb1-227" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">mi</span>&gt;SOLUTION0_0&lt;/<span class="kw">mi</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-228"><a href="#cb1-228" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">math</span>&gt; and the standard deviation was: &lt;<span class="kw">math</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-229"><a href="#cb1-229" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">mi</span>&gt;SOLUTION3_0&lt;/<span class="kw">mi</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-230"><a href="#cb1-230" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">math</span>&gt;. </span>
<span id="cb1-231"><a href="#cb1-231" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-232"><a href="#cb1-232" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-modal-feedback</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-233"><a href="#cb1-233" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-modal-feedback</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;DEFAULT_FEEDBACK&quot;</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-234"><a href="#cb1-234" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-235"><a href="#cb1-235" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      At least two incorrect responses. The smallest one was: &lt;<span class="kw">math</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-236"><a href="#cb1-236" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">mi</span>&gt;SOLUTION0_0&lt;/<span class="kw">mi</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-237"><a href="#cb1-237" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">math</span>&gt;, the greatest one was: &lt;<span class="kw">math</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-238"><a href="#cb1-238" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">mi</span>&gt;SOLUTION1_0&lt;/<span class="kw">mi</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-239"><a href="#cb1-239" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">math</span>&gt;, the mean was: &lt;<span class="kw">math</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-240"><a href="#cb1-240" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">mi</span>&gt;SOLUTION2_0&lt;/<span class="kw">mi</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-241"><a href="#cb1-241" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">math</span>&gt; and the standard deviation was &lt;<span class="kw">math</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-242"><a href="#cb1-242" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">mi</span>&gt;SOLUTION3_0&lt;/<span class="kw">mi</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-243"><a href="#cb1-243" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">math</span>&gt;. </span>
<span id="cb1-244"><a href="#cb1-244" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-245"><a href="#cb1-245" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-modal-feedback</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-246"><a href="#cb1-246" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

Using Template Constraint to Determine Variables at Runtime

This is another numeric example that makes use of templates, but is
notable for its use of
[templateConstraint](http://www.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/info/index.html#RootAttribute_AssessmentItem_qti-response-processing)
to determine variables at runtime.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span> <span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> <span class="ot">xmlns:m=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathMLe&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0</span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">      https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd </span></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML </span></span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/mathml/v3p0/schema/xsd/mathml3.xsd&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;mc_calc5&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Product of a fraction by a number&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="ot">adaptive=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">time-dependent=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en&quot;</span> &gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;REPONSE0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;multiple&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;Item1&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK2&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK3&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     </span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;a&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="ot">math-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> <span class="ot">param-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;b&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="ot">math-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> <span class="ot">param-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;c&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="ot">math-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> <span class="ot">param-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;p&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="ot">math-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> <span class="ot">param-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;Choix0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="ot">math-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> <span class="ot">param-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;Choix1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="ot">math-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> <span class="ot">param-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;Choix2&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="ot">math-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> <span class="ot">param-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;Choix3&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="ot">math-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> <span class="ot">param-variable=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-template-processing</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;a&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-random-integer</span> <span class="ot">min=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">max=</span><span class="st">&quot;10&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-44"><a href="#cb1-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-45"><a href="#cb1-45" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;b&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-46"><a href="#cb1-46" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-random-integer</span> <span class="ot">min=</span><span class="st">&quot;2&quot;</span> <span class="ot">max=</span><span class="st">&quot;20&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-47"><a href="#cb1-47" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-48"><a href="#cb1-48" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;c&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-49"><a href="#cb1-49" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-random-integer</span> <span class="ot">min=</span><span class="st">&quot;-20&quot;</span> <span class="ot">max=</span><span class="st">&quot;-10&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-50"><a href="#cb1-50" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-51"><a href="#cb1-51" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;p&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-52"><a href="#cb1-52" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-product</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-53"><a href="#cb1-53" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;a&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-54"><a href="#cb1-54" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;c&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-55"><a href="#cb1-55" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-product</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-56"><a href="#cb1-56" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-57"><a href="#cb1-57" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;Choix0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-58"><a href="#cb1-58" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-subtract</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-59"><a href="#cb1-59" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;0&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-60"><a href="#cb1-60" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-product</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-61"><a href="#cb1-61" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;a&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-62"><a href="#cb1-62" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;c&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-63"><a href="#cb1-63" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-product</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-64"><a href="#cb1-64" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-subtract</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-65"><a href="#cb1-65" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-66"><a href="#cb1-66" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-template-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;Choix1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-67"><a href="#cb1-67" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-subtract</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-68"><a href="#cb1-68" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span>&gt;0&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-69"><a href="#cb1-69" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-product</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-70"><a href="#cb1-70" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;b&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-71"><a href="#cb1-71" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;c&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>

<span id="cb1-195"><a href="#cb1-195" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;REPONSE0&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-196"><a href="#cb1-196" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-match</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-197"><a href="#cb1-197" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK2&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-198"><a href="#cb1-198" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;FEEDBACK2&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-199"><a href="#cb1-199" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-200"><a href="#cb1-200" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-201"><a href="#cb1-201" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>&gt;0&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-202"><a href="#cb1-202" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-203"><a href="#cb1-203" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-else-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-204"><a href="#cb1-204" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-else</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-205"><a href="#cb1-205" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK3&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-206"><a href="#cb1-206" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;FEEDBACK3&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-207"><a href="#cb1-207" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-208"><a href="#cb1-208" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-209"><a href="#cb1-209" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>&gt;0&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-210"><a href="#cb1-210" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-211"><a href="#cb1-211" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-else</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-212"><a href="#cb1-212" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-213"><a href="#cb1-213" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-214"><a href="#cb1-214" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb1-215"><a href="#cb1-215" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-modal-feedback</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-216"><a href="#cb1-216" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;Good answer.&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-217"><a href="#cb1-217" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-modal-feedback</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-218"><a href="#cb1-218" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-modal-feedback</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-219"><a href="#cb1-219" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;We must multiply the numerator only.&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-220"><a href="#cb1-220" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-modal-feedback</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-221"><a href="#cb1-221" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-modal-feedback</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK2&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK2&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-222"><a href="#cb1-222" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;Pay attention to the sign! &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-223"><a href="#cb1-223" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-modal-feedback</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-224"><a href="#cb1-224" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-modal-feedback</span> <span class="ot">outcome-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK3&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;FEEDBACK3&quot;</span> <span class="ot">show-hide=</span><span class="st">&quot;show&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-225"><a href="#cb1-225" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;No comment.&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-226"><a href="#cb1-226" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-modal-feedback</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-227"><a href="#cb1-227" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb1-228"><a href="#cb1-228" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

<div id="rubric-blocks" class="section">

#### 3.7.5 Rubric Blocks<a href="#h.jr9dryq0pjvh" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.jr9dryq0pjvh" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

The qti-rubric-block element is the container for the rubric block
content, which can be placed anywhere within the qti-item-body node of
an AssessmentItem. A rubric block identifies part of the content that
represents instructions to one or more of the actors that view the item.

Although rubric blocks are defined as simple blocks they must not
contain interactions. The visibility of nested qti-rubric-blocks is
determined by the outermost element. In other words, if an element is
determined to be hidden then all of its content is hidden including
conditionally visible elements for which the conditions are satisfied
and that therefore would otherwise be visible.

If you use a stylesheet within a rubric block, the stylesheet is scoped
only to that specific rubric block, and should not be used for other
content within an AssessmentItem or any other rubric block. The
stylesheet within the rubric block would also apply to any catalog
content, if it were placed in that same rubric block. The assumption is
that the rubric block also inherits from the AssessmentItem, and the
rubric block stylesheet is intended to add styles or override
AssessmentItem styles.

The qti-rubric-block element has two attributes, "use" and "view".

**Rubric Block Attributes (element: qti-rubric-block)**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th><strong>Name</strong></th>
<th><strong>Usage</strong></th>
<th><strong>Value(s)</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>use</td>
<td>required</td>
<td><p>Vocabulary:</p>
<ul>
<li>instructions</li>
<li>scoring</li>
<li>navigation</li>
<li>ext: <em>custom</em></li>
</ul></td>
<td>No default</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>view</td>
<td>required</td>
<td><p>Vocabulary:</p>
<ul>
<li>author</li>
<li>candidate</li>
<li>proctor</li>
<li>scorer</li>
<li>testConstructor</li>
<li>tutor</li>
</ul></td>
<td>No default</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

The content within the qti-rubric-block should only be presented to the
specified actors when the role of the actor is known. For example, in a
testing session, a candidate would not have any content in the
qti-rubric-block where the view="scorer" as the content is intended for
the scorer, not the candidate.

In addition to the use and view attributes, QTI 3 introduces a limited
set of shared classes which are used to clarify the presentation
expectations for the rubric block. The classes include:

- **qti-rubric-discretionary-placement** : to indicate that the
  delivery/presentation system should provide the content to the
  intended view actors, but they are not necessarily placed inline with
  the content. The rubric block content can be displayed somewhere
  within the delivery platform's interface.
- **qti-rubric-inline** : to indicate that the delivery/presentation
  system should provide content to the intended view actors in the order
  they appear within the AssessmentItem file. For example, if a rubric
  block showing scoring information for scorer is placed after an
  interaction, the scoring information should be visually placed after
  the interaction is presented for any scorer.

The content of the rubric block is stored within the qti-content-body
node, and contain the QTI 3 limited HTML set. It cannot contain any QTI
interactions.

Rubric blocks can also optionally include a qti-catalog-info node to
store catalogs that support the rubric block content.

An example of using multiple rubric blocks for different views and uses
is shown below. Note that the use of the shared classes is optional, but
included in the example to demonstrate good practice.

Rubric Block in an AssessmentItem

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span> <span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0 </span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;rubric_block&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;A Variety of Rubric Blocks in an Item&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">adaptive=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">time-dependent=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en&quot;</span> &gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;optionD&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;0&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-rubric-block</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-rubric-discretionary-placement&quot;</span> <span class="ot">view=</span><span class="st">&quot;tutor&quot;</span> <span class="ot">use=</span><span class="st">&quot;instructions&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Help the candidate understand the information that is directly supplied in the text</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          (2 km distance, a single year), and the information that is &lt;<span class="kw">em</span>&gt;implied&lt;/<span class="kw">em</span>&gt; in the text</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          (walking TO and FROM the lessons, 52 weeks in a year).&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-rubric-block</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-rubric-block</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-rubric-discretionary-placement&quot;</span> <span class="ot">view=</span><span class="st">&quot;candidate&quot;</span> <span class="ot">use=</span><span class="st">&quot;instructions&quot;</span>  <span class="ot">data-catalog-idref=</span><span class="st">&quot;catchoicedirs&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="co">&lt;!-- Rubric Blocks can have their own style sheet references --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-stylesheet</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;styles/choice-instructions.css&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;text/css&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="co">&lt;!-- The Rubric content is put inside the qti-content-body node --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">p</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;directions&quot;</span>&gt;Select the option that best represents the correct answer.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="co">&lt;!-- Rubric Blocks can reference and contain Catalogs! --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-catalog-info</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span> <span class="ot">id=</span><span class="st">&quot;catchoicedirs&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-card</span> <span class="ot">support=</span><span class="st">&quot;sign-language&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-card-entry</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;ase&quot;</span> <span class="ot">default=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;<span class="kw">video</span> <span class="ot">width=</span><span class="st">&quot;320&quot;</span> <span class="ot">height=</span><span class="st">&quot;240&quot;</span> <span class="ot">controls=</span><span class="st">&quot;controls&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-44"><a href="#cb1-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">source</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;asl/ss_choice_directions.m4v&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;video/mp4&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-45"><a href="#cb1-45" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;/<span class="kw">video</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-46"><a href="#cb1-46" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-47"><a href="#cb1-47" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-card-entry</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-48"><a href="#cb1-48" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-card</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-49"><a href="#cb1-49" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-50"><a href="#cb1-50" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-catalog-info</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-51"><a href="#cb1-51" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-rubric-block</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-52"><a href="#cb1-52" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-53"><a href="#cb1-53" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Tom walks back and forth to his harmonica lessons once a week. His house on Ordinary Dr.</span>
<span id="cb1-54"><a href="#cb1-54" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      is a 2 kilometre walk to his teacher&#39;s house on Spectacular St.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-55"><a href="#cb1-55" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb1-56"><a href="#cb1-56" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-rubric-block</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-rubric-inline&quot;</span> <span class="ot">view=</span><span class="st">&quot;proctor&quot;</span> <span class="ot">use=</span><span class="st">&quot;instructions&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-57"><a href="#cb1-57" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;Some instructional text for the proctor here...&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-58"><a href="#cb1-58" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-rubric-block</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-59"><a href="#cb1-59" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-60"><a href="#cb1-60" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-choice-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">max-choices=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-61"><a href="#cb1-61" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-62"><a href="#cb1-62" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        How many kilometres will Tom walk in a year for his harmonica lessons?</span>
<span id="cb1-63"><a href="#cb1-63" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-64"><a href="#cb1-64" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;optionA&quot;</span> <span class="ot">fixed=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-65"><a href="#cb1-65" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;About 50&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-66"><a href="#cb1-66" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-67"><a href="#cb1-67" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;optionB&quot;</span> <span class="ot">fixed=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-68"><a href="#cb1-68" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;About 100&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-69"><a href="#cb1-69" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-70"><a href="#cb1-70" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;optionC&quot;</span> <span class="ot">fixed=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-71"><a href="#cb1-71" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;About 200&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-72"><a href="#cb1-72" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-73"><a href="#cb1-73" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;optionD&quot;</span> <span class="ot">fixed=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-74"><a href="#cb1-74" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;About 400&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-75"><a href="#cb1-75" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-76"><a href="#cb1-76" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-choice-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-77"><a href="#cb1-77" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-78"><a href="#cb1-78" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-rubric-block</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-rubric-inline&quot;</span> <span class="ot">view=</span><span class="st">&quot;scorer&quot;</span> <span class="ot">use=</span><span class="st">&quot;scoring&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-79"><a href="#cb1-79" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-stylesheet</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;styles/scoring-rubric.css&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;text/css&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-80"><a href="#cb1-80" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;An actual scoring rubric could go here.&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-81"><a href="#cb1-81" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-rubric-block</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-82"><a href="#cb1-82" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-83"><a href="#cb1-83" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-84"><a href="#cb1-84" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-85"><a href="#cb1-85" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="ot">template=</span><span class="st">&quot;https://www.imsglobal.org/question/qti_v3p0/rptemplates/match_correct.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-86"><a href="#cb1-86" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

<div id="printed-variable-mathml-variable-and-param-expansion"
class="section">

#### 3.7.6 Printed Variable, MathML Variable, and Param Expansion.<a href="#h.n2xwsfdeoqra" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.n2xwsfdeoqra" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

Printed variable (qti-printed-variable) elements may be used to insert
the values of template or outcome variables into test- and item-level
content, such as within feedback, template, and rubric blocks, within
most HTML5 elements, and within such  interaction components as prompts
and choices.  This is useful in generating item content from templates,
for customizing feedback and messages, and for similar use cases.

The *format*  attribute of the qti-printed-variable element can be used
to control the formatting of the printed variable. Appendix A of Section
2 of this document gives a list of possible formatting options.

A delivery system which supports printed variables updates them in all
content currently displayed to users immediately after response
processing and outcome processing are completed. Similar to printed
variables, the values of template variables with math-variable="true"
are substituted into \< *mi\>* and \< *ci*\>  elements within MathML
blocks, and template variables with param-variable="true" are
substituted into object *param* elements

</div>

<div id="shared-stimulus" class="section">

#### 3.7.7 Shared Stimulus<a href="#h.pb0clew9cko9" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.pb0clew9cko9" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

From within an AssessmentItem, you can optionally reference one or more
stimulus files that are necessary to respond to the item. The stimulus
may or may not be shared across multiple items.  A stimulus reference
might look like the example below:

<figure id="fig-todo-caption" class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-stimulus-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;Stimulus1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;passages/unbelievableNight.xml&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;An Unbelievable Night&quot;</span> /&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
<figcaption>Figure 106 <span class="fig-title"> @@@ TODO caption
</span></figcaption>
</figure>

Both the identifier and href attributes are required attributes.  The
href is a URI, and the title attribute is optional.  The stimuli must be
contained as separate resources in the QTI package.

Shared stimulus content can be used by any number of AssessmentItem's,
allowing a single copy of the content to be used by more than one QTI
item. Associated alternative accessibility definitions can be contained
implicitly with the stimulus content (i.e., reference to an external
file is NOT to be used) allowing round-tripping of the shared stimulus
information within a package. If a package is exported from system A,
imported into System B, exported by System B and finally imported by
System A, then System A must be able to recognize/identify/process the
original shared stimulus information.

An example of a reference to an AssessmentStimulus from an
AssessmentItem is shown below.  In this example it is left to the
delivery platform to determine the stimulus rendering location within
the qti-item-body.  This may reduce interoperability between delivery
platforms.

Assessment Stimulus Reference in an AssessmentItem

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="er">...</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt; ... &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span>&gt; ... &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-stimulus-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;Stimulus1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;passages/unbelievableNight.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;<span class="kw">qti-order-interaction</span>&gt; ... &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-order-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span>&gt; ... &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

To improve interoperability, it is possible to be more prescriptive
about the placement of the shared stimulus within an qti-item-body.  In
the following example, QTI 3 Shared CSS is used to create a two-column
layout in an item, where the stimulus is injected into the left-most
column of the layout, and the item's stem and interaction are placed
into the right-most column of the layout.  Placement of the stimulus is
specified through the use of a \<div\> (any QTI 3 HTML5 qti-item-body
element may be used) with a reference to the identifier of the shared
stimulus by means of a data-stimulus-idref attribute.  Though not
required, best practice is to add a class="qti-shared-stimulus" to the
element - in this example, a \<div\> - used to specify the insertion
location in the itemBody.

Assessment Stimulus Ref with Explicit Placement within an qti-item-body

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0 </span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;unbelievable-night-item2&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Where did the crocodile come from?&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">adaptive=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">time-dependent=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en&quot;</span> &gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;B&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;0&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-stimulus-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;Stimulus1&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;passages/unbelievableNight.xml&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;An Unbelievable Night&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">div</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-layout-row&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">div</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-layout-col6&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co">&lt;!-- Be explicit about the placement of the stimulus in the qti-item-body.  Here, we place the</span></span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">          stimulus in the left-most column of the two-column item layout by specifying a docking &lt;div&gt; with </span></span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">          data-stimulus-idref that refers to the identifier of the above qti-assessment-stimulus-ref.  --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">div</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-shared-stimulus&quot;</span> <span class="ot">data-stimulus-idref=</span><span class="st">&quot;Stimulus1&quot;</span>&gt;&lt;/<span class="kw">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">div</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-layout-col6&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Read the passage &quot;The Unbelievable Night&quot; before answering the following question&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-choice-interaction</span> <span class="ot">max-choices=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span> &gt;Where did the crocodile come from?&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;A&quot;</span> &gt;the bathroom&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;B&quot;</span> &gt;a magazine cover&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;C&quot;</span> &gt;under the bed&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;D&quot;</span> &gt;a nearby river&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-choice-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-44"><a href="#cb1-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-45"><a href="#cb1-45" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-46"><a href="#cb1-46" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">template=</span><span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/rptemplates/match_correct.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-47"><a href="#cb1-47" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

An example of an AssessmentStimulus is shown below. In addition to the
stimulus content provided in the qti-stimulus-body, this example also
contains a custom stylesheet and a catalog reference.

Example of Assessment Stimulus

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-stimulus</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/qti/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/qti/imsqtiasi_v3p0</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">  https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_stimulusv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;Stimulus1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;An Unbelievable Night&quot;</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-stylesheet</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;stylesheets/unbelievable_night.css&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;text/css&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-stimulus-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co">&lt;!-- Use this div  to constrain the styles in the injected stylesheet and</span></span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">         avoid style collisions in the delivery platform. --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">div</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-shared-stimulus-wrapper&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">height=</span><span class="st">&quot;210&quot;</span> <span class="ot">width=</span><span class="st">&quot;400&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="er"> </span>          alt=&quot;Picture of a door opening to a hallway. A person&#39;s shadow is cast on the</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             door and hallway.&quot; src=&quot;images/exemplarSection01_title.png&quot;/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">h2</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;passage-title&quot;</span>&gt;An Unbelievable Night&lt;/<span class="kw">h2</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">p</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;author-line&quot;</span>&gt;by Franz Hohler&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;&lt;<span class="kw">span</span> <span class="ot">data-catalog-idref=</span><span class="st">&quot;1234&quot;</span>&gt;Anina&lt;/<span class="kw">span</span>&gt; was ten years old,</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        so even half asleep she could find her way from her room to the bathroom.</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        The door to her room was usually open a crack, and the nightlight in the hallway</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        made it light enough to get to the bathroom past the telephone stand.</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">div</span>&gt; <span class="co">&lt;!-- /shared-stimulus-wrapper --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-stimulus-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-catalog-info</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span> <span class="ot">id=</span><span class="st">&quot;1234&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-card</span> <span class="ot">support=</span><span class="st">&quot;linguistic-guidance&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;Anina is the name of a girl.&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-card</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-catalog-info</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-stimulus</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

The associated content package manifest XML that includes the
AssessmentStimulus is shown below.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">manifest</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/qti/qtiv3p0/imscp_v1p1&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns:lom=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://ltsc.ieee.org/xsd/LOM&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/qti/qtiv3p0/imscp_v1p1</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqtiv3p0_imscpv1p2_v1p0.xsd</span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">http://ltsc.ieee.org/xsd/LOM   https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/md/v1p3/schema/xsd/imsmd_loose_v1p3p2.xsd&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">metadata</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">organizations</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">resources</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co">&lt;!-- This shared stimulus is referenced by Item1, Item2, and Item3 --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">resource</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;Stimulus1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;imsqti_stimulus_xmlv3p0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;passages/unbelievableNight.xml&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;passages/unbelievableNight.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;passages/images/exemplarSection01_title.png&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;passages/images/exemplarSection01_croc.png&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;passages/images/exemplarSection01_flamingos.png&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
