<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/survey.jpg&quot;</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-bordered&quot;</span> <span class="ot">alt=</span><span class="st">&quot;Survey map with Angles&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          <span class="ot">aria-describedby=</span><span class="st">&quot;imgdesc1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">width=</span><span class="st">&quot;400&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">p</span> <span class="ot">id=</span><span class="st">&quot;imgdesc1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-visually-hidden&quot;</span> <span class="ot">data-catalog-idref=</span><span class="st">&quot;cat02&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        Two surveyors, &lt;<span class="kw">span</span> <span class="ot">aria-label=</span><span class="st">&quot;A, &quot;</span>&gt;A&lt;/<span class="kw">span</span>&gt; and P, stand some distance apart on</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        the south bank of a river, looking at a tree, T, that is on the north bank of the river.</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        Points A, P, and &lt;<span class="kw">span</span> <span class="ot">aria-label=</span><span class="st">&quot;T, &quot;</span>&gt;T&lt;/<span class="kw">span</span>&gt; form a triangle. At points</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">span</span> <span class="ot">aria-label=</span><span class="st">&quot;A, &quot;</span>&gt;A&lt;/<span class="kw">span</span>&gt; and P, there are two parallel sight lines pointing</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        North and forming angles outside of the triangle. At point P, angle </span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">span</span> <span class="ot">aria-label=</span><span class="st">&quot;T, P, A, &quot;</span>&gt;TPA&lt;/<span class="kw">span</span>&gt; is 53 degrees. The adjacent angle between </span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">span</span> <span class="ot">aria-label=</span><span class="st">&quot;P, T, &quot;</span>&gt;PT&lt;/<span class="kw">span</span>&gt; and the northern sight line is 37 degrees. </span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        At point A, angle &lt;<span class="kw">span</span> <span class="ot">aria-label=</span><span class="st">&quot;T, A, P, &quot;</span>&gt;TAP&lt;/<span class="kw">span</span>&gt; is not labeled, </span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        and the adjacent angle formed between &lt;<span class="kw">span</span> <span class="ot">aria-label=</span><span class="st">&quot;A, T, &quot;</span>&gt;AT&lt;/<span class="kw">span</span>&gt; </span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        and that northern sight line is 32 degrees.</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">div</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-layout-col6&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">h2</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-visually-hidden&quot;</span>&gt;Question&lt;/<span class="kw">h2</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-choice-interaction</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-labels-none qti-choices-stacking-2&quot;</span> <span class="ot">max-choices=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-44"><a href="#cb1-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">div</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-well&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-45"><a href="#cb1-45" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              What is the value of </span>
<span id="cb1-46"><a href="#cb1-46" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">math</span> <span class="ot">alttext=</span><span class="st">&quot;Angle T, A, P, &quot;</span> <span class="ot">display=</span><span class="st">&quot;inline&quot;</span> <span class="ot">overflow=</span><span class="st">&quot;scroll&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-47"><a href="#cb1-47" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">mstyle</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-48"><a href="#cb1-48" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;<span class="kw">mrow</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-49"><a href="#cb1-49" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">mo</span>&gt;∠&lt;/<span class="kw">mo</span>&gt;&lt;<span class="kw">mi</span>&gt;T&lt;/<span class="kw">mi</span>&gt;&lt;<span class="kw">mi</span>&gt;A&lt;/<span class="kw">mi</span>&gt;&lt;<span class="kw">mi</span>&gt;P&lt;/<span class="kw">mi</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-50"><a href="#cb1-50" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;/<span class="kw">mrow</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-51"><a href="#cb1-51" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">mstyle</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-52"><a href="#cb1-52" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;/<span class="kw">math</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-53"><a href="#cb1-53" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              in degrees?</span>
<span id="cb1-54"><a href="#cb1-54" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-55"><a href="#cb1-55" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-56"><a href="#cb1-56" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;ChoiceA&quot;</span>&gt;90&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-57"><a href="#cb1-57" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;ChoiceB&quot;</span>&gt;37&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-58"><a href="#cb1-58" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;ChoiceC&quot;</span>&gt;58&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-59"><a href="#cb1-59" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;ChoiceD&quot;</span>&gt;45&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-60"><a href="#cb1-60" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-choice-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-61"><a href="#cb1-61" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-62"><a href="#cb1-62" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-63"><a href="#cb1-63" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-64"><a href="#cb1-64" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-65"><a href="#cb1-65" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-catalog-info</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-66"><a href="#cb1-66" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span> <span class="ot">id=</span><span class="st">&quot;cat01&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-67"><a href="#cb1-67" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-card</span> <span class="ot">support=</span><span class="st">&quot;glossary-on-screen&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-68"><a href="#cb1-68" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-69"><a href="#cb1-69" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;inspect (someone or something) in detail to determine their nature or condition&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-70"><a href="#cb1-70" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-71"><a href="#cb1-71" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-card</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-72"><a href="#cb1-72" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-card</span> <span class="ot">support=</span><span class="st">&quot;keyword-translation&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-73"><a href="#cb1-73" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-card-entry</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;es&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-74"><a href="#cb1-74" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-75"><a href="#cb1-75" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;inspeccionar, revisar, examinar&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-76"><a href="#cb1-76" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-77"><a href="#cb1-77" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-card-entry</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-78"><a href="#cb1-78" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-card</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-79"><a href="#cb1-79" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-80"><a href="#cb1-80" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span> <span class="ot">id=</span><span class="st">&quot;cat02&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-81"><a href="#cb1-81" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-card</span> <span class="ot">support=</span><span class="st">&quot;spoken&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-82"><a href="#cb1-82" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-card-entry</span> <span class="ot">data-reading-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;computer-read-aloud&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-83"><a href="#cb1-83" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-84"><a href="#cb1-84" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Two surveyors, designated Ah and Pea, stand some distance apart on</span>
<span id="cb1-85"><a href="#cb1-85" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            the south bank of a river, looking at a tree, designated Tea, that is on the </span>
<span id="cb1-86"><a href="#cb1-86" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            north bank of the river. Points Ah, Pea, and Tea form a triangle.</span>
<span id="cb1-87"><a href="#cb1-87" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            At points Ah and Pea, there are two parallel sight lines pointing</span>
<span id="cb1-88"><a href="#cb1-88" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            North and forming angles outside of the triangle. At point Pea, </span>
<span id="cb1-89"><a href="#cb1-89" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            angle Tea Pea A is fifty-three degrees. The adjacent angle between Pea Tea</span>
<span id="cb1-90"><a href="#cb1-90" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            and the northern sight line is thirty-seven degrees. At point A, angle Tea-Ah-Pea </span>
<span id="cb1-91"><a href="#cb1-91" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            is not labeled, and the adjacent angle formed between A Tea and that northern sight </span>
<span id="cb1-92"><a href="#cb1-92" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            line is thirty-two degrees. &lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-93"><a href="#cb1-93" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-94"><a href="#cb1-94" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-card-entry</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-95"><a href="#cb1-95" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-card</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-96"><a href="#cb1-96" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-97"><a href="#cb1-97" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-catalog-info</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-98"><a href="#cb1-98" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span></span>
<span id="cb1-99"><a href="#cb1-99" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   <span class="ot">template=</span><span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/rptemplates/match_correct&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-100"><a href="#cb1-100" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td colspan="2"><figure
id="fig-expected-rendering-two-column-item-with-shared-css-and-shared-interaction-vocabularies">
<img src="/sites/default/files/specs/images/qti/3p0/impl3image104.png"
style="width: 607.00px; height: 265.33px; margin-left: 0.00px; margin-top: 0.00px; transform: rotate(0.00rad) translateZ(0px); -webkit-transform: rotate(0.00rad) translateZ(0px);"
alt="On the left, taking up half the full width of the item area is a short sentence and a diagram. On the right is a prompt and 4 response options in two columns, two rows. Each response has a circular button next to it with no labels." />
<figcaption>Figure 111 <span class="fig-title"> Expected Rendering: Two
column item with shared CSS and shared Interaction vocabularies.
</span></figcaption>
</figure></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<div id="use-of-qti-3-shared-css" class="section">

##### 3.8.1.1 Use of QTI 3 Shared CSS<a href="#h.5jrexyjddzrq" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.5jrexyjddzrq" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

As can be seen in the expected rendering above, a stimulus/passage
consisting of instructions and a diagram are displayed on the left-hand
side of the item, while a stem/interaction is displayed on the
right-hand side of the item, resulting in what appears to be a
two-column item.

This kind of layout is achieved by the use of [QTI 3 shared CSS
layout](#h.zhf232yr6of1)  class names on lines 13 (div
class="qti-layout-row") and 14 (div class="qti-layout-col6") where the
stimulus/passage content is placed, and later on in line 35 (div
class="qti-layout-col6") where the stem/interaction content is placed.
 By specifying that both Stimulus and Stem consume an equal (6) number
of columns in the responsive grid, we create the visual impression that
each consumes 50% of the horizontal layout.

Further [QTI 3 shared CSS](#h.9slpfjc0u4tx)  is used on line 18 to
create a border around the diagram (img class="qti-bordered"), and on
line 40 to create a "well" around the prompt (div class="qti-well").

On line 21, the detailed written description of the contents of the
diagram are hidden from sighted users, but remain "visible" to assistive
technology by the use of the [qti-visually-hidden](#h.ta85r72yth46)
 class.

As a final accommodation for users of assistive technology, \<h2
class="qti-visually-hidden"\> elements are added prior to the stimulus
(line 15) and stem (line 36) so that AT users can quickly "jump" back
and forth between the stimulus and stem, much as the human eye scans the
two column item from left to right, and back again.  An H2 element (not
an H1) is the preferred, top-most header element in an item because the
H1 element is typically reserved for the test delivery system as the
item's "title" to be announced to the candidate by the AT.  For example,
a delivery system / AT will announce the item as "Item 4" or
"Surveyors".

</div>

<div id="use-of-qti-3-shared-interaction-vocabulary" class="section">

##### 3.8.1.2 Use of QTI 3 Shared Interaction Vocabulary<a href="#h.yv7kdwttfisr" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.yv7kdwttfisr" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

QTI 3 introduces a new [shared interaction vocabulary](#h.q0bgy0kk6j43)
 for how to specify many different interaction renderings and
interaction behaviors. In the example above, the item's author uses a
qti-choice-interaction, but wants the choices to be "stacked" in two
columns, and also wants each choice (A, B, C, D) to contain just a radio
button and a description, but no choice "labels"; i.e., no "A", "B",
"C", "D", on each choice.  This is achieved by using the class attribute
on the qti-choice-interaction itself (line 37) with the classes,
[qti-labels-none](#h.8hn63bc8u50y)  and
[qti-choices-stacking-2](#h.rw865050eypl) .

</div>

<div id="use-of-wai-aria" class="section">

##### 3.8.1.3 Use of WAI-ARIA<a href="#h.oqr8r1m62wq4" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.oqr8r1m62wq4" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

The item's author also endeavored to make this item a fairer geometry
measurement for both sighted candidates and for candidates with visual
impairments who use certain forms of assistive technology (AT) such as
screen readers.  This was accomplished by adorning various parts of the
item's content with aria.

On lines 18 and 19, the image uses an "alt" attribute to tell AT that
the image is indeed the "survey map" to be examined, but goes further by
linking the detailed description of the image with an "aria-describedby"
attribute.  By using so-called "down-arrow" navigation, a candidate can
easily manipulate the screen reader to scan the content linked by the id
of the element specified by the value of the describedby - in this case
"imgdesc1"on line 21.

Furthermore, as is common with mathematics, aria is used in several
places of the describedby element to get the AT to properly voice the
mathematical symbols (lines 22, 24-25, 28-31).

In order to properly voice the math on lines 42-44, the author also
specifies an "alttext" attribute on the MathML.  Delivery systems *MUST*
convert MathML alttext attributes to aria-label attributes.  Otherwise,
most AT will not properly voice the math.

</div>

<div id="use-of-catalogs-glossary-keyword-translation-and-computer-read-aloud"
class="section">

##### 3.8.1.4 Use of Catalogs (Glossary, Keyword Translation, and Computer-Read-Aloud)<a href="#h.19wmaj7fahj0" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.19wmaj7fahj0" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

In this item, the author uses catalogs for three different purposes:
Glossary, Keyword Translations, and Computer-Read-Aloud.On line 16, the
word "Examine" is wrapped in a span element with
data-catalog-idref="cat01", which links the contents of the span
("Examine") with the qti-catalog id="cat01" on line 58.

On lines 59-63, there is a qti-card element with
support="glossary-on-screen", and containing a glossary definition for
the word "Examine".On line 65, there is a qti-card element with
support="keyword-translation", which typically contains a list of
qti-card-entry's, each of which contains a valid [\[BCP
47\]](#bib-BCP-47) language tag. In this item's case, the author only
encodes a translation for Spanish ([\[BCP 47\]](#bib-BCP-47) "es") on
lines 65-69.

As mentioned previously, there exists a qti-visually-hidden detailed
description of the survey diagram on lines 21-33.  To *prevent* the
delivery system's computer-read-aloud technology (which is primarily
used as a literacy support) from voicing the description of the diagram
that is provided to AT users, a catalog (data-catalog-idref="cat02") is
linked on line 21.  Then, on lines 73-78, there is a catalog override
for what the delivery system's computer-read-aloud technology should
voice, which, in this case, should be nothing because we don't want to
create a literacy aid to content that we can't see!  Consequently, there
exists what amounts to empty white space for this qti-card-entry (lines
74-77).  This effectively "hides" the visually-hidden content from the
delivery system's computer-read-aloud technology while still retaining
content visibility for assistive technology.

</div>

</div>

<div id="example-2-implementing-a-pci" class="section">

#### 3.8.2 Example 2 - Implementing a PCI<a href="#h.z1bzfyi60fsm" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.z1bzfyi60fsm" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

In formative assessment, it can be useful to provide rapid feedback to
the student when they are testing their own comprehension of a topic. A
useful interaction type to support this is a Tap To Reveal/Click to
Reveal interaction, where a prompt is displayed with one or more images
displayed which are initially masked and revealed when the student
clicks on them. There is no built-in interaction in QTI for this. And
while this result could be achieved in QTI using an adaptive item with
custom response processing and feedback blocks, this approach is quite
cumbersome to author.

However, this is quite easy to implement as a portable custom
interaction.

<div id="interaction-authoring" class="section">

##### 3.8.2.1 Interaction Authoring<a href="#h.8jgpm6vn1ihj" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.8jgpm6vn1ihj" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

As the item author may want to use images as part of the prompt the PCI
module designer has decided to use a CSS class called "tap" to indicate
which images the student may interact with. The module designer has also
provided the item author with a few mechanisms to customize the PCI.

- Two CSS classes can be used with the interaction:

<!-- -->

-  "hmh-tap-border-rounded" can be applied to the interaction to add a
  rounded border to the entire interaction
- "hmh-tap-image" can be defined to style the tap and reveal images

<!-- -->

- Two data- attributes can be used

<!-- -->

- data-tap-message can be used to set the message which will be voiced
  by a screen user when a masked image is presented.
- data-toggle can be used to customize the behavior of the interaction,
  if set to true a click will toggle the masking of the image on and
  off.

This interaction is similar to a qti-media-interaction as it is not
typically scored, it reports the number of images which were revealed to
the student to the associated response variable.

Now let's see how an item author may use this interaction in a formative
assessment item which allows the student to test their knowledge of
measuring the pH of solution.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0</span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;measuringPh&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Exploring the measurement of pH using red cabbage extract&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">adaptive=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">time-dependent=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en-US&quot;</span> &gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;1.0&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">h2</span>&gt;Measuring pH&lt;/<span class="kw">h2</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Did you know that red cabbage juice can be used to determine if a liquid</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      is an acid or a base? &lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-portable-custom-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">module=</span><span class="st">&quot;tap&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="ot">custom-interaction-type-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;urn:fdc:hmhco.com:2019:pci:tapToReveal&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;hmh-tap-border-rounded&quot;</span> <span class="ot">data-toggle=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="ot">data-tap-message=</span><span class="st">&quot;Tap to reveal the color of the solution&quot;</span> &gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Add 30ml of red cabbage solution to 100ml of each of the </span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              solutions below.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Observe the color change.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Click to see if your solution became the expected color.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      </span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-interaction-markup</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">div</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;border&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            </span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">div</span> <span class="ot">role=</span><span class="st">&quot;grid&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">div</span> <span class="ot">role=</span><span class="st">&quot;row&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">figure</span> <span class="ot">role=</span><span class="st">&quot;gridcell&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;<span class="kw">figcaption</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">h3</span>&gt;Baking Soda&lt;/<span class="kw">h3</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;/<span class="kw">figcaption</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;tap&quot;</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;hmh/baking_soda.svg&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  <span class="ot">alt=</span><span class="st">&quot;Baking soda solution turns bright blue.&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">figure</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">figure</span> <span class="ot">role=</span><span class="st">&quot;gridcell&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-44"><a href="#cb1-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;<span class="kw">figcaption</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-45"><a href="#cb1-45" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">h3</span>&gt;Vinegar&lt;/<span class="kw">h3</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-46"><a href="#cb1-46" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;/<span class="kw">figcaption</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-47"><a href="#cb1-47" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;tap&quot;</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;hmh/vinegar.svg&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-48"><a href="#cb1-48" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  <span class="ot">alt=</span><span class="st">&quot;Vinegar turns pink.&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-49"><a href="#cb1-49" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">figure</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-50"><a href="#cb1-50" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">figure</span> <span class="ot">role=</span><span class="st">&quot;gridcell&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-51"><a href="#cb1-51" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;<span class="kw">figcaption</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-52"><a href="#cb1-52" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">h3</span>&gt;Ammonia&lt;/<span class="kw">h3</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-53"><a href="#cb1-53" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;/<span class="kw">figcaption</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-54"><a href="#cb1-54" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;tap&quot;</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;hmh/ammonia.svg&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-55"><a href="#cb1-55" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  <span class="ot">alt=</span><span class="st">&quot;Ammonia turns light green.&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-56"><a href="#cb1-56" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">figure</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-57"><a href="#cb1-57" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;/<span class="kw">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-58"><a href="#cb1-58" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-59"><a href="#cb1-59" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-60"><a href="#cb1-60" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-interaction-markup</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-61"><a href="#cb1-61" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-portable-custom-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-62"><a href="#cb1-62" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-63"><a href="#cb1-63" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-64"><a href="#cb1-64" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<figure id="fig-this-interaction-should-initially-render-as-follows">
<img src="/sites/default/files/specs/images/qti/3p0/impl3image43.png"
style="width: 624.00px; height: 394.67px; margin-left: 0.00px; margin-top: 0.00px; transform: rotate(0.00rad) translateZ(0px); -webkit-transform: rotate(0.00rad) translateZ(0px);"
alt="3 paragraphs are shown above a set of buttons displaying similar icons of a finger pressing a button. Above each of the buttons are words: Baking Soda, Vinegar, Ammonia." />
<figcaption>Figure 112 <span class="fig-title"> This interaction should
initially render as follows. </span></figcaption>
</figure>

The response variable RESPONSE will then be updated to the value "1".

The item author added the figure and figcaption elements to clearly
associate the image labels with the images, which should help screen
readers when voicing the interaction. Even though the item author added
alt attributes to the three img elements, when a screen reader voices
the interaction it should announce the contents of the
'data-tap-message' attribute instead of the author assigned alt text.

<figure
id="fig-if-the-user-clicks-on-the-image-labelled-vinegar-above-then-the-image-should-be-revealed-and-the-interaction-redrawn-as-follows">
<img src="/sites/default/files/specs/images/qti/3p0/impl3image78.png"
style="width: 624.00px; height: 391.00px; margin-left: 0.00px; margin-top: 0.00px; transform: rotate(0.00rad) translateZ(0px); -webkit-transform: rotate(0.00rad) translateZ(0px);"
alt="3 paragraphs are shown above a set of buttons. The first and third button display similar icons of a finger pressing a button. The second button labelled Vinegar shows a picture of a beaker filled halfway with pink liquid." />
<figcaption>Figure 113 <span class="fig-title"> If the user clicks on
the image labelled "Vinegar" above, then the image should be revealed
and the interaction redrawn as follows: </span></figcaption>
</figure>

Now, when a screen reader voices the Vinegar image in the interaction it
should announce the author assigned alt text.

In the item above the interaction doesn't include a
qti-interaction-modules element so the QTI package will need to provide
a PCI module resolution configuration file call module_resolution.js in
the QTI package in the directory "modules". The item author needs to
ensure that there is an entry in that module resolution config for the
PCI module identifier they provide as the value of the "module"
attribute (in line 20 above) and that the value they provide for the
custom-interaction-type-identifier attribute (in line 21 above) is the
value which the PCI module will return as it's type-identifier property.

This PCI module requires that any image which the item author wants
masked initially be tagged with a class of "tap" (see lines 40, 47 and
55).  A data-tap-message attribute is added (in line 23) to customize
the message to the item topic, and also a data-toggle attribute is added
to allow the candidate to toggle the image visibility.

The author wants the interaction outlined so they apply the CSS class
"html-tap-border-rounded".  And as this PCI will apply that border to
the elements tagged with the class "border", they add that class in line
27.  The HTML which should be displayed to the student is then added in
lines 27 through 60.

</div>

<div id="pci-module-development" class="section">

##### 3.8.2.2 PCI Module Development<a href="#h.7ja93kds0j3v" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.7ja93kds0j3v" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

To simplify deployment, the PCI developer would like to create a single
Javascript file to implement the functionality of the PCI. This must be
an AMD module and it must implement all the required methods of the API
defined in [Section 3.7.12.10](#h.o4nb5dpg6ica) .

The file tap.js below is developed which will be added to the "modules"
directory in QTI packages which use this interaction. An entry will be
added to the modules/module_resolution.js" file in the package in order
to resolve "tap" to "modules/tap".

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&quot;use strict&quot;;/** Tap To Reveal portable custom interaction * @param ctx -</span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  PCI communications bridge */define([ &quot;qtiCustomInteractionContext&quot; ], function (ctx)</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  {  var self = {    // The type identifier allows custom interactions types to be identified in an item</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      // Returned values are defined by the implementer.</span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      // Here, to minimise the risk of namespace collisions the implementation is</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      // using an ID which includes a domain which they control (hmhco.com)</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      typeIdentifier: &#39;urn:fdc:hmhco.com:pci:tapToReveal&#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      /** @access private</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       *  defaults for properties (data- attributes)</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       */  </span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      _propertyDefaults: {</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          toggle: &quot;false&quot;,</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          altText: &quot;Select to reveal the contents&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      },</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      /** @access private</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       * internal state of the interaction</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       */</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      _state: {</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          numReveals: 0</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      },</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      _baseElement: null,</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      _config: {},</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      _props: {</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          toggle: &quot;false&quot;,</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          altText: &quot;Select to reveal the contents&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      },</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      isValid: undefined,</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      customValidityMessage: &quot;&quot;,</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      _eventListener: undefined,</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     /** @access public</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      *  @method getInstance Create a new instance of this portable custom interaction</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      *  Will be called by the qtiCustomInteractionContext</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      *  @param {DOM Element} dom - the DOM Element this PCI is being added to</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      *  @param {Object} configuration - the configuration to apply to this PCI</span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      *  @param {String} state - a previous saved state to apply to this instance.</span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      *  This must have been obtained from a prior call to getState on an</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      *  instance of this type (same typeIdentifier)</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      */</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     getInstance: function (dom, configuration, state) {</span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         var newInstance = this._extend({}, this);</span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         newInstance._init = newInstance._init.bind(newInstance);</span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         newInstance._init(dom, configuration, state);</span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         return newInstance;</span>
<span id="cb1-44"><a href="#cb1-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     },</span>
<span id="cb1-45"><a href="#cb1-45" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-46"><a href="#cb1-46" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         _init: function(dom, configuration, state) {</span>
<span id="cb1-47"><a href="#cb1-47" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         this._baseElement = dom;</span>
<span id="cb1-48"><a href="#cb1-48" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         var uid = &quot;tap-&quot; + Math.floor(Math.random() * 100000);</span>
<span id="cb1-49"><a href="#cb1-49" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         dom.setAttribute(&quot;data-uid&quot;, uid);</span>
<span id="cb1-50"><a href="#cb1-50" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         this._addCSS(uid);</span>
<span id="cb1-51"><a href="#cb1-51" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-52"><a href="#cb1-52" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         this._config = configuration;</span>
<span id="cb1-53"><a href="#cb1-53" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         this._props = this._extend(this._propertyDefaults, this._config.properties);</span>
<span id="cb1-54"><a href="#cb1-54" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         if (state) {</span>
<span id="cb1-55"><a href="#cb1-55" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             this._state = JSON.parse(state);</span>
<span id="cb1-56"><a href="#cb1-56" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         }</span>
<span id="cb1-57"><a href="#cb1-57" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         var images = dom.querySelectorAll(&quot;img.tap&quot;);</span>
<span id="cb1-58"><a href="#cb1-58" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         var hasRevelationState = false;</span>
<span id="cb1-59"><a href="#cb1-59" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         if (this._state.revealed <span class="er">&amp;&amp;</span> this._state.revealed.length === images.length) {</span>
<span id="cb1-60"><a href="#cb1-60" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             hasRevelationState = true;</span>
<span id="cb1-61"><a href="#cb1-61" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         } else {</span>
<span id="cb1-62"><a href="#cb1-62" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             this._state.revealed = [];</span>
<span id="cb1-63"><a href="#cb1-63" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         }</span>
<span id="cb1-64"><a href="#cb1-64" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         for (var i = 0; i <span class="er">&lt;</span> images.length; i++) {</span>
<span id="cb1-65"><a href="#cb1-65" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             var image = images[i];</span>
<span id="cb1-66"><a href="#cb1-66" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             image.width = image.clientWidth;</span>
<span id="cb1-67"><a href="#cb1-67" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             image.height = image.clientHeight;</span>
<span id="cb1-68"><a href="#cb1-68" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             image.setAttribute(&quot;data-src&quot;, image.src);</span>
<span id="cb1-69"><a href="#cb1-69" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             image.src = this._coverImage;</span>
<span id="cb1-70"><a href="#cb1-70" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             image.setAttribute(&quot;data-alt&quot;, image.getAttribute(&quot;alt&quot;));</span>
<span id="cb1-71"><a href="#cb1-71" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             image.setAttribute(&quot;alt&quot;, this._props.altText);</span>
<span id="cb1-72"><a href="#cb1-72" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             image.dataset.index = i;</span>
<span id="cb1-73"><a href="#cb1-73" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             if (hasRevelationState) {</span>
<span id="cb1-74"><a href="#cb1-74" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                 if (this._state.revealed[i]) {</span>
<span id="cb1-75"><a href="#cb1-75" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                     this._swap(image);</span>
<span id="cb1-76"><a href="#cb1-76" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                 }</span>
<span id="cb1-77"><a href="#cb1-77" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             } else {</span>
<span id="cb1-78"><a href="#cb1-78" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                 this._state.revealed[i] = false;</span>
<span id="cb1-79"><a href="#cb1-79" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             }</span>
<span id="cb1-80"><a href="#cb1-80" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             var source = image.outerHTML;</span>
<span id="cb1-81"><a href="#cb1-81" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             image.outerHTML = &quot;&lt;<span class="kw">button</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&#39;hmh-tap-image&#39;</span> <span class="ot">aria-live=</span><span class="st">&#39;polite&#39;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-82"><a href="#cb1-82" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="er"> </span>aria-relevant=&#39;all&#39;&gt;&quot; + source + &quot;&lt;/<span class="kw">button</span>&gt;&quot;;</span>
<span id="cb1-83"><a href="#cb1-83" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         }</span>
<span id="cb1-84"><a href="#cb1-84" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         var buttons = dom.querySelectorAll(&quot;button.hmh-tap-image&quot;);</span>
<span id="cb1-85"><a href="#cb1-85" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         this._eventListener = this.onclick.bind(this);</span>
<span id="cb1-86"><a href="#cb1-86" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          for (var i = 0; i <span class="er">&lt;</span> buttons.length; i++) {</span>
<span id="cb1-87"><a href="#cb1-87" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              buttons[i].addEventListener(&quot;click&quot;, this._eventListener);</span>
<span id="cb1-88"><a href="#cb1-88" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          }</span>
<span id="cb1-89"><a href="#cb1-89" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          this.oncompleted = this.cleanup.bind(this);</span>
<span id="cb1-90"><a href="#cb1-90" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         if (this._config.onready !== undefined <span class="er">&amp;&amp;</span> this._config.onready !== null) {</span>
<span id="cb1-91"><a href="#cb1-91" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             this._config.onready(this, this.getState());</span>
<span id="cb1-92"><a href="#cb1-92" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         }</span>
<span id="cb1-93"><a href="#cb1-93" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         return this;</span>
<span id="cb1-94"><a href="#cb1-94" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     },</span>
<span id="cb1-95"><a href="#cb1-95" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     /** @access public</span>
<span id="cb1-96"><a href="#cb1-96" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      * @method getResponse</span>
<span id="cb1-97"><a href="#cb1-97" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      * @return {Object} - the value to assign to the bound QTI response variable</span>
<span id="cb1-98"><a href="#cb1-98" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      */</span>
<span id="cb1-99"><a href="#cb1-99" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     getResponse: function () {</span>
<span id="cb1-100"><a href="#cb1-100" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         return {</span>
<span id="cb1-101"><a href="#cb1-101" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             &quot;base&quot;: {</span>
<span id="cb1-102"><a href="#cb1-102" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                 &quot;integer&quot;: this._state.numReveals</span>
<span id="cb1-103"><a href="#cb1-103" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             }</span>
<span id="cb1-104"><a href="#cb1-104" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         };</span>
<span id="cb1-105"><a href="#cb1-105" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     },</span>
<span id="cb1-106"><a href="#cb1-106" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     /** @access public</span>
<span id="cb1-107"><a href="#cb1-107" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      * @method getState</span>
<span id="cb1-108"><a href="#cb1-108" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      * @return {String} The current state of this PCI. May be passed to</span>
<span id="cb1-109"><a href="#cb1-109" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      * getInstance to later restore this PCI instance.</span>
<span id="cb1-110"><a href="#cb1-110" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      */</span>
<span id="cb1-111"><a href="#cb1-111" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     getState: function () {</span>
<span id="cb1-112"><a href="#cb1-112" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         return JSON.stringify(this._state);</span>
<span id="cb1-113"><a href="#cb1-113" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     },</span>
<span id="cb1-114"><a href="#cb1-114" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-115"><a href="#cb1-115" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     /** @access public</span>
<span id="cb1-116"><a href="#cb1-116" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      * @method checkValidity</span>
<span id="cb1-117"><a href="#cb1-117" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       * @return {boolean} true if candidate input satisfies validation requirements</span>
<span id="cb1-118"><a href="#cb1-118" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       */</span>
<span id="cb1-119"><a href="#cb1-119" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      checkValidity: function () {</span>
<span id="cb1-120"><a href="#cb1-120" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           return this.isValid;</span>
<span id="cb1-121"><a href="#cb1-121" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      },</span>
<span id="cb1-122"><a href="#cb1-122" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-123"><a href="#cb1-123" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      /** @access public</span>
<span id="cb1-124"><a href="#cb1-124" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       * @method reportValidity</span>
<span id="cb1-125"><a href="#cb1-125" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       * @return {boolean} true if candidate input satisfies validation requirements</span>
<span id="cb1-126"><a href="#cb1-126" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       */</span>
<span id="cb1-127"><a href="#cb1-127" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      reportValidity: function () {</span>
<span id="cb1-128"><a href="#cb1-128" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           var isValid = this.checkValidity();</span>
<span id="cb1-129"><a href="#cb1-129" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           if (isValid) {</span>
<span id="cb1-130"><a href="#cb1-130" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              this.dom.classList.remove(&quot;invalid&quot;);</span>
<span id="cb1-131"><a href="#cb1-131" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           } else {</span>
<span id="cb1-132"><a href="#cb1-132" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              this.dom.classList.add(&quot;invalid&quot;);</span>
<span id="cb1-133"><a href="#cb1-133" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           }</span>
<span id="cb1-134"><a href="#cb1-134" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      },</span>
<span id="cb1-135"><a href="#cb1-135" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-136"><a href="#cb1-136" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      setCustomValidity: function (customValidityMessage) {</span>
<span id="cb1-137"><a href="#cb1-137" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          this.customValidityMessage = customValidityMessage;</span>
<span id="cb1-138"><a href="#cb1-138" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      },</span>
<span id="cb1-139"><a href="#cb1-139" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-140"><a href="#cb1-140" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      getCustomValidity: function () {</span>
<span id="cb1-141"><a href="#cb1-141" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          return(this.customValidityMessage);</span>
<span id="cb1-142"><a href="#cb1-142" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      },</span>
<span id="cb1-143"><a href="#cb1-143" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-144"><a href="#cb1-144" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      /** @access private</span>
<span id="cb1-145"><a href="#cb1-145" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       *  @method reportChanged</span>
<span id="cb1-146"><a href="#cb1-146" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       **/</span>
<span id="cb1-147"><a href="#cb1-147" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      reportChanged: function () {</span>
<span id="cb1-148"><a href="#cb1-148" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          var detail = {</span>
<span id="cb1-149"><a href="#cb1-149" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               interaction: this,</span>
<span id="cb1-150"><a href="#cb1-150" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              responseIdentifier: this._config.responseIdentifier,</span>
<span id="cb1-151"><a href="#cb1-151" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              valid: this.isValid,</span>
<span id="cb1-152"><a href="#cb1-152" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               value: this.getResponse()</span>
<span id="cb1-153"><a href="#cb1-153" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         };</span>
<span id="cb1-154"><a href="#cb1-154" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          var changedEvent = new CustomEvent(&quot;qti-interaction-changed&quot;,</span>
<span id="cb1-155"><a href="#cb1-155" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              { detail: detail, bubbles: true, cancelable: true }</span>
<span id="cb1-156"><a href="#cb1-156" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          );</span>
<span id="cb1-157"><a href="#cb1-157" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          this.dom.dispatchEvent(changedEvent);</span>
<span id="cb1-158"><a href="#cb1-158" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      }</span>
<span id="cb1-159"><a href="#cb1-159" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-160"><a href="#cb1-160" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      /** @access private</span>
<span id="cb1-161"><a href="#cb1-161" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        * @method onclick - user has clicked/pressed Enter on the button</span>
<span id="cb1-162"><a href="#cb1-162" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      * @param {MouseEvent} event - the click Event.</span>
<span id="cb1-163"><a href="#cb1-163" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      */</span>
<span id="cb1-164"><a href="#cb1-164" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     onclick: function (event) {</span>
<span id="cb1-165"><a href="#cb1-165" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         var img = event.currentTarget.querySelector(&quot;img&quot;);</span>
<span id="cb1-166"><a href="#cb1-166" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         var toggle = this._swap(img);</span>
<span id="cb1-167"><a href="#cb1-167" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         this._state.numReveals += 1;</span>
<span id="cb1-168"><a href="#cb1-168" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         this._state.revealed[ img.dataset.index ] = (toggle?</span>
<span id="cb1-169"><a href="#cb1-169" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  (!this._state.revealed[ img.dataset.index ]) : true);</span>
<span id="cb1-170"><a href="#cb1-170" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          this.reportChanged();</span>
<span id="cb1-171"><a href="#cb1-171" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     },</span>
<span id="cb1-172"><a href="#cb1-172" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-173"><a href="#cb1-173" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         _swap: function(img) {</span>
<span id="cb1-174"><a href="#cb1-174" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         var toggle = this._props.toggle <span class="er">&amp;&amp;</span> (&quot;true&quot;.localeCompare(this._props.toggle) === 0);</span>
<span id="cb1-175"><a href="#cb1-175" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         var alt = img.getAttribute(&quot;alt&quot;);</span>
<span id="cb1-176"><a href="#cb1-176" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         var src = img.src;</span>
<span id="cb1-177"><a href="#cb1-177" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         img.src = img.dataset.src;</span>
<span id="cb1-178"><a href="#cb1-178" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         img.setAttribute(&quot;alt&quot;, alt);</span>
<span id="cb1-179"><a href="#cb1-179" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         if (toggle) {</span>
<span id="cb1-180"><a href="#cb1-180" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             img.dataset.src = src;</span>
<span id="cb1-181"><a href="#cb1-181" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             img.dataset.alt = alt;</span>
<span id="cb1-182"><a href="#cb1-182" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         }</span>
<span id="cb1-183"><a href="#cb1-183" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         return toggle;</span>
<span id="cb1-184"><a href="#cb1-184" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     },</span>
<span id="cb1-185"><a href="#cb1-185" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-186"><a href="#cb1-186" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     /** @access private</span>
<span id="cb1-187"><a href="#cb1-187" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      * Add the CSS scoped to this PCI instance</span>
<span id="cb1-188"><a href="#cb1-188" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      * @param {type} uid</span>
<span id="cb1-189"><a href="#cb1-189" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      * @return {undefined}</span>
<span id="cb1-190"><a href="#cb1-190" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      */</span>
<span id="cb1-191"><a href="#cb1-191" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     _addCSS: function (uid) {</span>
<span id="cb1-192"><a href="#cb1-192" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         var stylesheet = document.createElement(&quot;style&quot;);</span>
<span id="cb1-193"><a href="#cb1-193" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         stylesheet.innerHTML = this._stylesheet.join(&quot;&quot;).replace(/${uid}/g, uid);</span>
<span id="cb1-194"><a href="#cb1-194" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         this._baseElement.appendChild(stylesheet);</span>
<span id="cb1-195"><a href="#cb1-195" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     },</span>
<span id="cb1-196"><a href="#cb1-196" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-197"><a href="#cb1-197" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     /**</span>
<span id="cb1-198"><a href="#cb1-198" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       * This will be provided as the oncompleted callback to cleanup</span>
<span id="cb1-199"><a href="#cb1-199" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       * before this PCI is unloaded.</span>
<span id="cb1-200"><a href="#cb1-200" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       * @return {none}</span>
<span id="cb1-201"><a href="#cb1-201" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       */</span>
<span id="cb1-202"><a href="#cb1-202" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      cleanup: function() {</span>
<span id="cb1-203"><a href="#cb1-203" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          var buttons = this._baseElement.querySelectorAll(&quot;button.hmh-tap-image&quot;);</span>
<span id="cb1-204"><a href="#cb1-204" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          for (var i = 0; i <span class="er">&lt;</span> buttons.length; i++) {</span>
<span id="cb1-205"><a href="#cb1-205" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              buttons[i].removeEventListener(&quot;click&quot;, this._eventListener);</span>
<span id="cb1-206"><a href="#cb1-206" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          }</span>
<span id="cb1-207"><a href="#cb1-207" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      },</span>
<span id="cb1-208"><a href="#cb1-208" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-209"><a href="#cb1-209" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          _stylesheet: [</span>
<span id="cb1-210"><a href="#cb1-210" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;[data-uid=&quot;${uid}&quot;] .qti-interaction-markup {              &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-211"><a href="#cb1-211" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;   display: table;                                         &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-212"><a href="#cb1-212" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;}                                                          &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-213"><a href="#cb1-213" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;[data-uid=&quot;${uid}&quot;] .border {                              &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-214"><a href="#cb1-214" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;   display: table;                                         &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-215"><a href="#cb1-215" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;   padding: 15px;                                          &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-216"><a href="#cb1-216" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;}                                                          &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-217"><a href="#cb1-217" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;[data-uid=&quot;${uid}&quot;] .hmh-tap-image {                       &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-218"><a href="#cb1-218" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;   border: 1px solid #00a3c0;                              &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-219"><a href="#cb1-219" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;   border-radius: 3px;                                     &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-220"><a href="#cb1-220" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;   padding: 10px;                                          &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-221"><a href="#cb1-221" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;   vertical-align: middle;                                 &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-222"><a href="#cb1-222" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;   background-color: #f1f1f1;                              &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-223"><a href="#cb1-223" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;   width: 100%;                                            &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-224"><a href="#cb1-224" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;}                                                          &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-225"><a href="#cb1-225" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;.hmh-tap-border-rounded [data-uid=&quot;${uid}&quot;] .border {      &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-226"><a href="#cb1-226" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;   border: 2px solid #DDDDDD;                              &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-227"><a href="#cb1-227" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;   border-radius: 4px;                                     &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-228"><a href="#cb1-228" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;}                                                          &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-229"><a href="#cb1-229" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;[data-uid=&quot;${uid}&quot;] [role=&quot;grid&quot;] {                        &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-230"><a href="#cb1-230" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;   padding: 15px;                                          &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-231"><a href="#cb1-231" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;}                                                          &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-232"><a href="#cb1-232" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;[data-uid=&quot;${uid}&quot;] [role=&quot;gridcell&quot;] {                    &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-233"><a href="#cb1-233" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;   display: inline-block;                                  &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-234"><a href="#cb1-234" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;   width: 100%;                                            &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-235"><a href="#cb1-235" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;   margin: 15px;                                           &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-236"><a href="#cb1-236" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;   padding: 10px;                                          &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-237"><a href="#cb1-237" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;}                                                          &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-238"><a href="#cb1-238" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;[data-uid=&quot;${uid}&quot;] figcaption {                           &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-239"><a href="#cb1-239" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;   text-align: center;                                     &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-240"><a href="#cb1-240" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;}                                                          &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-241"><a href="#cb1-241" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;[data-uid=&quot;${uid}&quot;] div[role=&quot;row&quot;] {                      &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-242"><a href="#cb1-242" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;   display: grid;                                          &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-243"><a href="#cb1-243" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;   grid-auto-flow: column;                                 &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-244"><a href="#cb1-244" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;   align-items: center;                                    &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-245"><a href="#cb1-245" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;   justify-items: center;                                  &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-246"><a href="#cb1-246" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;}                                                          &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-247"><a href="#cb1-247" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;[data-uid=&quot;${uid}&quot;] .tap {                                 &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-248"><a href="#cb1-248" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;   width: 100%;                                            &#39;,</span>
<span id="cb1-249"><a href="#cb1-249" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &#39;}&#39;</span>
<span id="cb1-250"><a href="#cb1-250" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     ],</span>
<span id="cb1-251"><a href="#cb1-251" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     _coverImage: &quot;data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxuc...+&quot;,</span>
<span id="cb1-252"><a href="#cb1-252" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     _extend: function(A, B) {</span>
<span id="cb1-253"><a href="#cb1-253" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         var r = {};</span>
<span id="cb1-254"><a href="#cb1-254" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         for (var prop in A) {</span>
<span id="cb1-255"><a href="#cb1-255" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             r[prop] = A[prop];</span>
<span id="cb1-256"><a href="#cb1-256" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         }</span>
<span id="cb1-257"><a href="#cb1-257" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         for (var prop in B) {</span>
<span id="cb1-258"><a href="#cb1-258" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             r[prop] = B[prop];</span>
<span id="cb1-259"><a href="#cb1-259" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         }</span>
<span id="cb1-260"><a href="#cb1-260" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         return r;</span>
<span id="cb1-261"><a href="#cb1-261" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     }</span>
<span id="cb1-262"><a href="#cb1-262" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    };</span>
<span id="cb1-263"><a href="#cb1-263" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   // Register this PCI instance with the communication bridge</span>
<span id="cb1-264"><a href="#cb1-264" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   if (ctx) {</span>
<span id="cb1-265"><a href="#cb1-265" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     ctx.register( self );</span>
<span id="cb1-266"><a href="#cb1-266" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   }</span>
<span id="cb1-267"><a href="#cb1-267" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   return self;</span>
<span id="cb1-268"><a href="#cb1-268" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>});</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

The PCI module must set strict mode (line 1) and must be an AMD module,
so define is called (line 6) with a declared dependency on the
communication bridge ("qtiCustomInteractionContext") and an object is
defined starting on line 7 which contains all the mandatory methods and
properties and which is returned as the value of the function (line
211), this will become the value returned as the value of a require call
for the PCI module.

The PCI registers itself with the communication bridge (line 230).

It defines some internal properties (lines 11 to 21) and then defines
the required typeIdentifier property which it will return. This value
needs to be communicated to item authors as they will need to use this
as the value of the custom-interaction-type-identifier attribute in the
qti-portable-custom-interaction element in their item.

It then defines the mandatory getInstance method (lines 39-91), which is
one of the most important methods in the PCI API as it creates the
Javascript object which will be used by the delivery
engine/communication bridge to communicate with this interaction
instance. It would typically also perform any dynamic HTML generation or
modification required to deliver the user experience of this PCI.

In this method it generates a unique id for this instance of the
interaction which it adds to the DOM element provided by the delivery
engine for this PCI and then calls another method (lines 40-43, the
method \_addCSS and the stylesheet property it uses in lines 137-169)
 to dynamically insert the CSS for this interaction, scoped to the
element with that unique id. While this should prevent any CSS styles
defined by this PCI module from affecting any HTML in the rest of the
page it does not prevent CSS styles defined outside the interaction,
e.g. by the item author and included via a stylesheet element, or more
commonly by the delivery engine (especially rules not scoped to a class,
like div { .. } or \* { .. } ).

PCI module authors should also consider during development that CSS
rules from the delivery engine the PCI module is being tested with may
be affecting how the HTML displayed by their PCI module appears, and
that when their PCI is used with another delivery engine it may not
render as they expect without those rules. It would be good practice for
a PCI developer to ensure that the PCI relies solely on user agent CSS
rules.

It would also be good practice for delivery engines to limit the effect
of CSS rules they define having an unwanted impact on 3rd party PCI
modules by scoping all CSS rules to vendor or qti prefixed CSS classes,
or use the style isolation provided by Shadow DOM, or render each PCI in
it's own iframe.

It stores the configuration passed and then takes the properties passed
in that configuration (which were set by the item author as data-
attributes), adds any default values desired for unset properties and
stores then in the object (line 45 and the method \_extend() in lines
173-182).

If the delivery engine/communication bridge has passed back a state
previously returned by this interaction this is then stored as an
object. The 'state of revelation' of each image and the number of times
images have been revealed is maintained.

Now it looks at the HTML provided by the item author and finds all
images which were tagged with the class "tap" (line 50). For each image
it finds the current dimensions of the image and sets them as width and
height attributes (before it replaces the image with the mask image
which may be a different size) and then stores the URL of the current
image and the author provided alt tag in data attributes and then
replaces them with the URL of the mask image and the 'tap to reveal' alt
message (lines 51 to 72). It also reflects the saved state of which
images have been revealed to the DOM.

To make the interaction keyboard navigable it then wraps the image with
a button element, and as it knows that the contents of this element may
change adds ARIA attributes to tell screen readers to watch for changes
to the element (lines 74-75). Event listeners are attached to these
button elements (lines 78-79). As a button element is focusable the user
can navigate to where the image is rendered (via tab or screen reader
commands) and activate the reveal action either by pressing return or by
clicking on the image.

To avoid needing to include a separate image file to be used as the mask
image, a data url is used (where the image contents are included in the
url), which is included in the source above (line 192, note the data url
is truncated for readability).

The interaction is now rendered as desired with all of the author
supplied images masked and is ready for the student to interact with, so
if an onready callback was set this is now called with the current PCI
object and it's state object (lines 87-89).

The next mandatory method, getResponse, is then implemented. This will
be called by the delivery engine/communication bridge when it needs to
discover what value should be set for the bound QTI response variable.
As this interaction reports the number of times an image was revealed,
the value of numReveals (which is held as part of the internal state of
the PCI) is returned in the format defined in Appendix D (lines 97-103).

The following mandatory method, getState (lines 110-112), returns the
state to the delivery engine (e.g. if the user navigates away from the
item the delivery engine should store the state returned by the PCI and
supply that state back to the PCI in a call to getInstance if the user
