<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> xmlns:xsi=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  xsi:schemaLocation=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0 </span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_testv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot; </span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> title=&quot;Simple Test with rubric block (THX)&quot;&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">defaultValue</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">value</span>&gt;0.0&lt;/<span class="kw">value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">defaultValue</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;MAXSCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;3.0&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-test-part</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;part1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">navigation-mode=</span><span class="st">&quot;nonlinear&quot;</span> <span class="ot">submission-mode=</span><span class="st">&quot;individual&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-section</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;section1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;QTI3_RubricBlock_Test&quot;</span> <span class="ot">visible=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-rubric-block</span> <span class="ot">use=</span><span class="st">&quot;instructions&quot;</span> <span class="ot">view=</span><span class="st">&quot;candidate&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-stylesheet</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;styles/section-instructions.css&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;text/css&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Instructions for this section in here. These instructions would NOT be </span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>displayed in different sections if this test had multiple sections.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-rubric-block</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;THX_1138&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;THX_1138.xml&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;THX_1139&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;THX_1139.xml&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;THX_1140&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;THX_1140.xml&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-section</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-test-part</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-processing</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-sum</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-test-variables</span> <span class="ot">variable-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-sum</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-processing</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-44"><a href="#cb1-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-test</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

The best practice in QTI 3 is that the stylesheet referenced within a
qti-rubric-block applies to the qti-rubric-block instance itself, and
not assumed to apply to associated content, such as sections, parts, or
items (which can have their own associated stylesheets) listed in the
AssessmentTest or AssessmentSection file. The stylesheet is assumed to
apply to content within qti-content-body node, as well as any content
generated from the use of templates, within the qti-catalog-info, or
printed variable. Any included content using XInclude that is placed
within the qti-content-body content is also assumed to be covered by the
stylesheet reference made within the qti-rubric-block structure.

Enforcement on the limitation of the scope of included stylesheets is
difficult, and there is in fact no conformance requirement in QTI to use
any referenced stylesheets during delivery. However, stylesheets can be
an effective tool for ensuring consistency in presentation formatting
for assessment programs, and their use is common among QTI implementers.

**Multiple Rubric Blocks and multiple Sections**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-test</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> xmlns:xsi=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  xsi:schemaLocation=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_testv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot; </span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  title=&quot;Two Sections with multiple rubric blocks (THQ)&quot;&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE_TOTAL&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;0.0&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;MAXSCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;100.0&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-test-part</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;part1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">navigation-mode=</span><span class="st">&quot;nonlinear&quot;</span> <span class="ot">submission-mode=</span><span class="st">&quot;individual&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-section</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;section1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Section 1, Multiple Choice&quot;</span> <span class="ot">visible=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &lt;<span class="kw">qti-rubric-block</span> <span class="ot">use=</span><span class="st">&quot;instructions&quot;</span> <span class="ot">view=</span><span class="st">&quot;candidate&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-stylesheet</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;styles/choice-instructions.css&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;text/css&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Instructions for this first section in here. &lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-rubric-block</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-rubric-block</span> <span class="ot">use=</span><span class="st">&quot;instructions&quot;</span> <span class="ot">view=</span><span class="st">&quot;proctor&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-stylesheet</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;styles/proctor-instructions.css&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;text/css&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Instructions for this section for the proctor in here.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-rubric-block</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;THX_1138&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;THX_1138.xml&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;THX_1139&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;THX_1139.xml&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;THX_1140&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;THX_1140.xml&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-section</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-section</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;section2&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Section 2, Extended Response&quot;</span> <span class="ot">visible=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-rubric-block</span> <span class="ot">use=</span><span class="st">&quot;instructions&quot;</span> <span class="ot">view=</span><span class="st">&quot;candidate&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-stylesheet</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;styles/et-instructions.css&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;text/css&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-44"><a href="#cb1-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-stylesheet</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;styles/glossary.css&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;text/css&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-45"><a href="#cb1-45" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-46"><a href="#cb1-46" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Included here could be instructions for this </span>
<span id="cb1-47"><a href="#cb1-47" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">span</span> <span class="ot">data-catalog-idref=</span><span class="st">&quot;cat1&quot;</span>&gt;extended text&lt;/<span class="kw">span</span>&gt; section for the candidate.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-48"><a href="#cb1-48" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-49"><a href="#cb1-49" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-50"><a href="#cb1-50" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-catalog-info</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-51"><a href="#cb1-51" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span> <span class="ot">id=</span><span class="st">&quot;cat1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-52"><a href="#cb1-52" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                     &lt;<span class="kw">qti-card</span> <span class="ot">support=</span><span class="st">&quot;glossary-on-screen&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-53"><a href="#cb1-53" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;A written response that generally longer than a few words.&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-54"><a href="#cb1-54" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                     &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-card</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-55"><a href="#cb1-55" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-56"><a href="#cb1-56" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-catalog-info</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-57"><a href="#cb1-57" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-rubric-block</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-58"><a href="#cb1-58" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-59"><a href="#cb1-59" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-rubric-block</span> <span class="ot">use=</span><span class="st">&quot;ext:construction&quot;</span> <span class="ot">view=</span><span class="st">&quot;test-constructor&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-60"><a href="#cb1-60" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-stylesheet</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;styles/construction-instructions.css&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;text/css&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-61"><a href="#cb1-61" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-62"><a href="#cb1-62" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Place the extended response section after the multiple choice items.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-63"><a href="#cb1-63" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-content-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-64"><a href="#cb1-64" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-rubric-block</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-65"><a href="#cb1-65" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-66"><a href="#cb1-66" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;THQ_1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;THQ_1.xml&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-67"><a href="#cb1-67" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-68"><a href="#cb1-68" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-section</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-69"><a href="#cb1-69" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-70"><a href="#cb1-70" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-test-part</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-71"><a href="#cb1-71" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-72"><a href="#cb1-72" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-processing</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-73"><a href="#cb1-73" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE_TOTAL&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-74"><a href="#cb1-74" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-sum</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-75"><a href="#cb1-75" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-test-variables</span> <span class="ot">variable-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-76"><a href="#cb1-76" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-sum</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-77"><a href="#cb1-77" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-78"><a href="#cb1-78" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-processing</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-79"><a href="#cb1-79" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-test</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

<div id="test-feedback" class="section">

#### 4.6.2 Test Feedback<a href="#h.9qmhdu4psvf8" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.9qmhdu4psvf8" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

Test feedback may be defined at either the *qti-assessment-test* or
*qti-test-part* level of an assessment. Like modal feedback at the item
level, the presentation of a *qti-test-feedback* block is controlled by
an outcome variable, except that in the case of *qti-test-feedback* the
outcome variable would normally be defined at test level. When the
outcome variable assumes a defined identifier as its value, the delivery
system either shows or hides the *qti-test-feedback* block, according to
whether the value of the block's *show-hide* attribute is "*show"* or
"*hide".  *

A *qti-test-feedback* element also has an *access* attribute, which is
required. The value may be either " *during"* or " *atEnd"* . If
*access* is " *during",* the *qti-test-feedback*  block is shown or
hidden, as defined by the *show-hide*  attribute, after each iteration
of outcome processing. If access is "*atEnd"*, the
*qti-test-feedback* block is shown or hidden after the final outcome
processing of the associated test or test part - when the test or test
part is complete.

Test Feedback *MUST NOT* contain interactions.

</div>

</div>

<div id="outcome-processing" class="section">

### 4.7 Outcome Processing<a href="#h.nmgxlc8ar4fw" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.nmgxlc8ar4fw" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

Outcome processing only occurs in the context of a Test; i.e., a
qti-assessment-test. It is a common misconception that outcome
processing occurs in the context of an Item; i.e., a
qti-assessment-item. It is invalid QTI to have outcome processing in an
item.

Outcome processing takes place each time the candidate submits the
responses for an item (when in individual submission mode) or a group of
items (when in simultaneous submission mode). It happens after any
item-level response processing is triggered by an item submission. The
values of a test's outcome variables are always reset to their defaults
prior to carrying out the instructions described by the outcome rules
defined in outcome processing.

Because outcome processing occurs each time (when in individual
submission mode) the candidate submits responses and outcome variables -
such as the SCORE outcome variable - the outcome rules may perform
evaluation of test-level outcomes for various purposes such as:

1.  Compute a running aggregated total score of all item-level
    sub-scores.
2.  Compute pre-condition or branch rules to determine the next item to
    deliver to the candidate.
3.  Resulting values of test-level outcomes may be used to activate
    test-level feedback during the test.

In the following example, Outcome Processing is executed after each item
is submitted because the qti-test-part has submission-mode="individual".
The execution flow is as follows:

1.  All outcome variables are reset to their default values. In the
    example snippet, SCORE_TOTAL is reinitialized to a float value of 0
    every time an item is submitted, according to the SCORE_TOTAL
    outcome variable definition:
    <table>
    <colgroup>
    <col style="width: 100%" />
    </colgroup>
    <tbody>
    <tr>
    <td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
    <div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
    class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span></span>
    <span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> base-type=&quot;float&quot;</span>
    <span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  cardinality=&quot;single&quot;</span>
    <span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  identifier=&quot;SCORE_TOTAL&quot;&gt;</span>
    <span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
    <span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;0&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
    <span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
    <span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
    </div></td>
    </tr>
    </tbody>
    </table>
2.  Outcome Processing expression
    `<`<span class="hljs-name">`qti-test-variables`</span>` `<span class="hljs-attr">`variable-identifier`</span>`="`<span class="hljs-string">`SCORE`</span>`">`
    is used to extract the built-in SCORE variable value from every item
    submitted by the candidate thus far. A qti-test-variables expression
    is used to extract any single cardinality, non-NULL, variable value
    in an item. qti-test-variables produces a multiple cardinality
    result. In the example below, after two items are submitted - when
    the first item has a SCORE of 1, and when the second item has a
    SCORE of 0 -
    `<`<span class="hljs-name">`qti-test-variables`</span>` `<span class="hljs-attr">`variable-identifier`</span>`="`<span class="hljs-string">`SCORE`</span>`">`
    produces an array (because it is a multiple cardinality expression)
    of values \[1, 0\]
3.  The Outcome Processing expression `qti-sum` can consume arguments
    with multiple cardinality, and will add together all of the elements
    of each multiple cardinality argument. In this example where the
    first item has a SCORE of 1, and a second item SCORE of 0, this
    produces of sum of 1 (sum(\[1, 0\]) =\> 1) for the first argument.
    This sum is then added to the value of the second argument which is
    the value of SCORE_TOTAL (initialized to its default value of 0 in
    Step 1 above.
4.  The computed value of SCORE_TOTAL is saved by the
    `<`<span class="hljs-name">`qti-set-outcome-value`</span>` `<span class="hljs-attr">`identifier`</span>`="`<span class="hljs-string">`SCORE_TOTAL`</span>`">`
    Outcome Processing rule. This execution flow repeats each time an
    item is submitted until the Test Part is complete.

The full example:

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-test</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span>xmlns:xsi=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> xsi:schemaLocation=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> identifier=&quot;t1-outcome-declaration-t9-outcome-processing&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> title=&quot;T1 - Outcome Declaration and T9 Outcomes Processing for Tests&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> xml:lang=&quot;en-us&quot;&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> <span class="co">&lt;!-- Define an outcome variable to retain the aggregated SCORE of the submitted items --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE_TOTAL&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;0&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-test-part</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;testPart-1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">navigation-mode=</span><span class="st">&quot;linear&quot;</span> <span class="ot">submission-mode=</span><span class="st">&quot;individual&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-section</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;assessmentSection-1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Section 1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">visible=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> <span class="ot">keep-together=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;t1-outcome-declaration-item-1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;items/item-1.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;t1-outcome-declaration-item-2&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;items/item-2.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;t1-outcome-declaration-item-3&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;items/item-3.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-section</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-test-part</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-processing</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!-- Extract the SCORE variable from each item. Add the item SCORE to the overall test score in SCORE_TOTAL --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE_TOTAL&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-sum</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-test-variables</span> <span class="ot">variable-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE_TOTAL&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-sum</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-processing</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-test</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

The next example computes pre-condition or branch rules to determine the
next item to deliver to the candidate. For example, a test might have
the first item in a section always delivered to the candidate, but the
second item provided to the candidate might be selected (basic or
advanced) based upon a score or ability estimate computed by outcome
processing.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-test</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span>xmlns:xsi=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  xsi:schemaLocation=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0</span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  identifier=&quot;t1-outcome-processing-branching&quot; title=&quot;T1 Outcome Processing Branching&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> xml:lang=&quot;us-en&quot;&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    </span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!-- the default second item is &quot;basic&quot; --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SECOND_ITEM_SELECTION&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;basic&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  </span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;<span class="kw">qti-test-part</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;testPart-1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">navigation-mode=</span><span class="st">&quot;linear&quot;</span> <span class="ot">submission-mode=</span><span class="st">&quot;individual&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-section</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;sectionA&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Section A&quot;</span> <span class="ot">visible=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!-- EVERY CANDIDATE gets this item (item034). SCORE is computed as 0 or 1 --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;item034&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;item034.xml&quot;</span> <span class="ot">category=</span><span class="st">&quot;firstitem&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!-- Only &quot;basic&quot; gets this item - see the pre-condition --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;item160&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;item160.xml&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!-- This item only if SECOND_ITEM_SELECTION is &quot;basic&quot; --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-pre-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-match</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SECOND_ITEM_SELECTION&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span>&gt;basic&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-match</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-pre-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            </span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!-- Only &quot;advanced&quot; gets this item - see the pre-condition --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;item161&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;item161.xml&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!-- This item only if SECOND_ITEM_SELECTION is &quot;advanced&quot; --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-pre-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-match</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SECOND_ITEM&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span>&gt;advanced&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-match</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-pre-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-44"><a href="#cb1-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-section</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-45"><a href="#cb1-45" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-test-part</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-46"><a href="#cb1-46" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-47"><a href="#cb1-47" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-processing</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-48"><a href="#cb1-48" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-49"><a href="#cb1-49" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-50"><a href="#cb1-50" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!-- if the first item&#39;s score &gt; 0 then select the &quot;advanced&quot; second item --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-51"><a href="#cb1-51" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-52"><a href="#cb1-52" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-gt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-53"><a href="#cb1-53" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-test-variables</span> <span class="ot">variable-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">include-category=</span><span class="st">&quot;firstitem&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-54"><a href="#cb1-54" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>&gt;0&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-55"><a href="#cb1-55" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-gt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-56"><a href="#cb1-56" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SECOND_ITEM_SELECTION&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-57"><a href="#cb1-57" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span>&gt;advanced&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-base-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-58"><a href="#cb1-58" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-59"><a href="#cb1-59" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-if</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-60"><a href="#cb1-60" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-61"><a href="#cb1-61" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-condition</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-62"><a href="#cb1-62" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-processing</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-63"><a href="#cb1-63" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-test</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<div id="context-declarations-0" class="section">

#### 4.7.1 Context Declarations<a href="#h.14mdp0o0kng9" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.14mdp0o0kng9" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

Context declarations are permitted in Assessment tests  allowing context
variables to be declared at test level in the same way as in Assessment
Items. Test-level context variables are a means for delivery systems to
make delivery system-dependent built-in context variables, including the
predefined QTI_CONTEXT context variable, available to outcome
processing, branch rules, preconditions, and template default blocks.
Please refer to Section 3.7.11 for discussion of context declarations
and variables.

In the following example, QTI_CONTEXT is used in an AssessmentTest's
OutcomeProcessing instructions to implement different partial scoring
ratios for an item that produces an initial raw score for an essay. An
qti-environment-identifier is passed into a test using the QTI_CONTEXT ->
qti-environment-identifier field. This value (either "1" or "2" in this
example) is then used with a \<qti-match-table\> to find the partial
scaling factor for a program and applied to the item's raw score, thus
producing a final scaled score.

Though not mandatory, it is considered a best practice to explicitly
declare the built-in QTI_CONTEXT variable if it is referenced by
elements of an AssessmentTest.

**Accessing QTI_CONTEXT Environment Information in a Test**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-test</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/qti/imsqti_asiv3p0_v1p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> xmlns:xsi=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  xsi:schemaLocation=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/qti/imsqti_asiv3p0_v1p0 </span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_testv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> identifier=&quot;program-scaled-essay-test&quot; title=&quot;Essay Score Scaled by Program&quot;&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!-- QTI_CONTEXT declared here, even though it is built into the information model --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-context-declaration</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;record&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;QTI_CONTEXT&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RAW_UNSCALED_SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co">&lt;!-- Lookup table to map an environment to a scaling factor --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;PROGRAM_SCALING_FACTOR&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-match-table</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-match-table-entry</span> <span class="ot">source-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">target-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;0.5&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-match-table-entry</span> <span class="ot">source-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;2&quot;</span> <span class="ot">target-value=</span><span class="st">&quot;0.6&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-match-table</span>&gt;  </span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-test-part</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;Part 1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">navigation-mode=</span><span class="st">&quot;linear&quot;</span> <span class="ot">submission-mode=</span><span class="st">&quot;individual&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-section</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;sectionA&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Section A&quot;</span> <span class="ot">visible=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="co">&lt;!-- This item contains qti-response-processing instructions which produce a </span></span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">           raw, unscaled score in its SCORE outcome variable. --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;essay-prompt-1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;essay-prompt1.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-section</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-test-part</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-processing</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="er">&lt;</span>!-grab the item's SCORE and assign the value to the test's RAW_UNSCALED_SCORE --&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RAW_UNSCALED_SCORE&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-test-variables</span> <span class="ot">variable-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co">&lt;!-- Scale the score using the environmental information passed into the</span></span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">         test via QTI_CONTEXT --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-product</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-custom-operator</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;example.customOps.stringToNumber&quot;</span> <span class="ot">definition=</span><span class="st">&quot;string-to-number&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">qti-lookup-outcome-value</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;PROGRAM_SCALING_FACTOR&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!-- Extract value of environmentIdentifier from QTI_CONTEXT --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-field-value</span> <span class="ot">fieldIdentifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;environmentIdentifier&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;QTI_CONTEXT&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-field-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-lookup-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-44"><a href="#cb1-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-custom-operator</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-45"><a href="#cb1-45" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-variable</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RAW_UNSCALED_SCORE&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-46"><a href="#cb1-46" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-product</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-47"><a href="#cb1-47" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-set-outcome-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-48"><a href="#cb1-48" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-processing</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-49"><a href="#cb1-49" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-test</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

</div>

<div id="annotated-test-examples" class="section">

### 4.8 Annotated Test Examples<a href="#h.94k2jdhhhego" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.94k2jdhhhego" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

<div id="example-1-minimal-test" class="section">

#### 4.8.1 Example 1: minimal test<a href="#h.2rwe0ikqhcpe" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.2rwe0ikqhcpe" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

This example is a minimal QTI 3 Assessment Test. It is composed of a
single linear Test Part, containing a single Assessment Section with 3
items referenced.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-test</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> xmlns:xsi=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  xsi:schemaLocation=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0 </span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_testv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  identifier=&quot;qti3-minimal-test&quot; title=&quot;QTI 3 Minimal Test&quot;&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="co">&lt;!-- Linear Test Part, with individual submission mode. --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-test-part</span> <span class="ot">navigation-mode=</span><span class="st">&quot;linear&quot;</span> <span class="ot">submission-mode=</span><span class="st">&quot;individual&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;test-part-1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-section</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;section-1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Section 1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">visible=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span> <span class="ot">required=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="co">&lt;!-- This Assessment Section references 3 items. --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;item-1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;item-1.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;item-2&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;item-2.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;item-3&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;item-3.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-section</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-test-part</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-test</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

<div id="example-2-multiple-parts-selection" class="section">

#### 4.8.2 Example 2: multiple parts, selection<a href="#h.2rwe0ikqhcpe-1" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.2rwe0ikqhcpe-1" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

This QTI 3 Assessment Test example describes a test with 2 Test Parts.
The first one is linear, and the second one is non linear.

The Assessment Section contained in the first Test Part describes a
selection of 5 items within the set of 10 items referenced in the
section. As the *with-replacement* attribute of the
*qti-selection* element is set to false, the items contained in the
Assessment Section can be selected only once. In addition, as the
shuffle attribute of the *qti-ordering* element is set to *true*,
selected items will be shuffled.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-test</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> xmlns:xsi=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  xsi:schemaLocation=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0 </span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_testv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>identifier=&quot;qti3-mparts-selection-test&quot; title=&quot;QTI 3 Multiple Test Parts and Selection&quot;&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-test-part</span> <span class="ot">navigation-mode=</span><span class="st">&quot;linear&quot;</span> <span class="ot">submission-mode=</span><span class="st">&quot;individual&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;test-part-1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-section</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;section-1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Section 1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">visible=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-selection</span> <span class="ot">select=</span><span class="st">&quot;5&quot;</span> <span class="ot">with-replacement=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-ordering</span> <span class="ot">shuffle=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;item-1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-1.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;item-2&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-2.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;item-3&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-3.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;item-4&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-4.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;item-5&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-5.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;item-6&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-6.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;item-7&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-7.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;item-8&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-8.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;item-9&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-9.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;item-10&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-10.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-section</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-test-part</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-test-part</span> <span class="ot">navigation-mode=</span><span class="st">&quot;nonlinear&quot;</span> <span class="ot">submission-mode=</span><span class="st">&quot;individual&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;test-part-2&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-section</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;section-2&quot;</span> <span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Section 2&quot;</span> <span class="ot">visible=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-session-control</span> <span class="ot">max-attempts=</span><span class="st">&quot;0&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;item-11&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-1.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;item-12&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-12.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;item-13&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-13.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-section</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-test-part</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-test</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

<div id="example-3-section-references" class="section">

#### 4.8.3 Example 3: section references<a href="#h.2rwe0ikqhcpe-2" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.2rwe0ikqhcpe-2" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

This example describes how to make a reference to an external Assessment
Section definition, in file *section-ref-1.xml*, using the
*qti-assessment-section-ref* element.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-test</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> xmlns:xsi=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  xsi:schemaLocation=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0 </span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_testv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  identifier=&quot;qti3-assessment-section-refs-test&quot; title=&quot;QTI 3 Assessment Section References Test&quot;&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-test-part</span> <span class="ot">navigation-mode=</span><span class="st">&quot;linear&quot;</span> <span class="ot">submission-mode=</span><span class="st">&quot;individual&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;test-part-1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-section-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;section-ref-1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;section-ref-1.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-test-part</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-test</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!-- section-ref-1.xml --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-section</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> xmlns:xsi=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  xsi:schemaLocation=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0 </span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_testv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot; </span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>identifier=&quot;section-1&quot; title=&quot;Section Reference 1&quot; visible=&quot;true&quot; required=&quot;true&quot;&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;item-1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-1.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;item-2&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-2.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item-ref</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;item-3&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-3.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-section</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

<div id="example-4-outcomes-processing-rubric-block-printed-variable"
class="section">

#### 4.8.4 Example 4: outcomes processing, rubric block, printed variable<a href="#h.oegw4vk6rcrz" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.oegw4vk6rcrz" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

The example below aims at showing to the candidate its current score
while taking the Assessment Test. The *qti-rubric-block* element
contains a *qti-printed-variable* element that prints the current value
of the *SCORE_TOTAL* Outcome Variable.  The *%d* value of the
*format* attribute from the *qti-printed-variable*element will make the
value of the *SCORE_TOTAL* variable to be displayed as an integer.

Since submission mode is set to "individual", each attempt to an item
will trigger the Outcome Processing rules described within the
*qti-outcome-processing* element. As a result, the
*SCORE_TOTAL* variable will be set an updated value each time the
