available, but a qti-card-entry node is still used because additional
language versions could be added later, and a presentation system will
be coded to look for the lang attribute to clarify the specific language
of the content. Using the lang attribute also removes any ambiguity that
could occur in the future about who the video files are intended to
support. The qti-card-entry contains a reference to a video, with
multiple file formats supplied.

**Sign Language Item Example**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0   </span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;QTI3_CPexample&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">title=</span><span class="st">&quot;Class Vote on Colors&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">adaptive=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">time-dependent=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;multiple&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;ChoiceA&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span> <span class="ot">data-catalog-idref=</span><span class="st">&quot;cat17249&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">div</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;stem&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Grace walks 2 kilometres from her house on Maple Dr. to harmonica </span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      lessons on Chestnut St.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt; &lt;/<span class="kw">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-choice-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">max-choices=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;If Grace has lessons once a week, how many kilometres will she </span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        walk in a year for her harmonica lessons?&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;ChoiceA&quot;</span>&gt;About 200&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simpleChoice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;ChoiceB&quot;</span>&gt;About 100&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;ChoiceC&quot;</span>&gt;About 50&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-choice-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-catalog-info</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span> <span class="ot">id=</span><span class="st">&quot;cat17249&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-card</span> <span class="ot">support=</span><span class="st">&quot;sign-language&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-card-entry</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;ase&quot;</span> <span class="ot">default=</span><span class="st">&quot;default&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">video</span> <span class="ot">width=</span><span class="st">&quot;320&quot;</span> <span class="ot">height=</span><span class="st">&quot;240&quot;</span> <span class="ot">controls=</span><span class="st">&quot;controls&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">source</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;asl_example.m4v&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;video/mp4&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">source</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;asl_example.ogg&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;video/ogg&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">video</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-card-entry</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-card</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-44"><a href="#cb1-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-45"><a href="#cb1-45" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-46"><a href="#cb1-46" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-catalog-info</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-47"><a href="#cb1-47" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

In the next example, instead of having the whole item connected with a
single video, portions of the content are connected to video content.
There are two catalogs for the two parts of this item content, where
each part points to a catalog to support each div. The URIs for the
video file references in the first two catalogs use the Media Fragments
URI 1.0 notation as recommended by the W3C as of 25 September, 2012.
Alternatively, two separate videos could have been used for this
example. The sequence of play is determined by the order of reference
from the qti-item-body content, where references from the top of the
document are played before references further down in the document. The
ASL qti-card-entry is also designated as the default (default="true"),
so in the event that the PNP did not supply the required language, the
ASL video would be delivered to the candidate (lines 29 and 41).

Each of the ASL qti-card-entry's in this example contain an optional
"data-video-label" attribute  which may be used by authoring systems and
delivery platforms to indicate to the candidate which portion of the
item is relevant - similar to a video chapter track - to the video being
played.  Displaying a list of possible videos - and their associated
video labels - can help candidates better understand the context or
scope of each ASL video in an item containing multiple ASL videos or
video segments.

**Sign Language Example for Portions of the Default Content**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>...</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">div</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;stem&quot;</span> <span class="ot">data-catalog-idref=</span><span class="st">&quot;cat123_1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Grace walks 2 kilometres from her house on Maple Dr. to harmonica </span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     lessons on Chestnut St.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;If Grace has lessons once a week, how many kilometres will </span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     she walk in a year for her harmonica lessons?&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">div</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-choice-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">max-choices=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">data-catalog-idref=</span><span class="st">&quot;cat123_2&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;ChoiceA&quot;</span>&gt;About 200&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simpleChoice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;ChoiceB&quot;</span>&gt;About 100&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;ChoiceC&quot;</span>&gt;About 50&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-choice-interaction</span>&gt; </span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-catalog-info</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span> <span class="ot">id=</span><span class="st">&quot;cat123_1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-card</span> <span class="ot">support=</span><span class="st">&quot;sign-language&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-card-entry</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;ase&quot;</span> <span class="ot">default=</span><span class="st">&quot;default&quot;</span> <span class="ot">data-video-label=</span><span class="st">&quot;Video for the Stem&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">video</span> <span class="ot">width=</span><span class="st">&quot;320&quot;</span> <span class="ot">height=</span><span class="st">&quot;240&quot;</span> <span class="ot">controls=</span><span class="st">&quot;controls&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">source</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;asl/item123_1.m4v#t=00:00:00,00:00:20.3&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;video/mp4&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">video</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-card-entry</span>&gt; </span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-card</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span> <span class="ot">id=</span><span class="st">&quot;cat123_2&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-card</span> <span class="ot">support=</span><span class="st">&quot;sign-language&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-card-entry</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;ase&quot;</span> <span class="ot">default=</span><span class="st">&quot;default&quot;</span> <span class="ot">data-video-label=</span><span class="st">&quot;Video for the Choices&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">video</span> <span class="ot">width=</span><span class="st">&quot;320&quot;</span> <span class="ot">height=</span><span class="st">&quot;240&quot;</span> <span class="ot">controls=</span><span class="st">&quot;controls&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">source</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;asl/item123_1.m4v#t=00:00:20.4&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;video/mp4&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">video</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-card-entry</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-card</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-catalog-info</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-44"><a href="#cb1-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

During an assessment session, the candidate should be able to control
the playback of the video, where they can initiate, pause, play, and
restart the video, with the ability to view the video as many times as
desired by the candidate. It is recommended that the video be able to be
presented in at least 2 different display sizes, and that if the video
display window covers the default rendered content in any way, that the
display window can be moved by the candidate to different areas of the
display.

</div>

</div>

<div id="supplemental-content-supports" class="section">

#### 5.2.7 Supplemental Content Supports<a href="#h.d04ra1epkaa3" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.d04ra1epkaa3" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

This section contains supports that provide additional content that is
intended only for candidates that have specifically requested the
content via their PNP. There is some variation how the content is
presented to the candidate, which may be different according to the
support. But across all of these supports, the intent is not to replace
any particular content, but be provided in addition to the default
content.

<div id="additional-directions" class="section">

##### 5.2.7.1 Additional Directions<a href="#h.qp2xnflznw5d" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.qp2xnflznw5d" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

Some candidates may benefit from having additional directions for
certain activities. These additional directions can include reminders
for candidates, suggestions for ways to think through the problem, or
any other information that might be helpful for candidates who benefit
from the additions. If all candidates could benefit from some specific
additional directions, those directions should be included in the
default content, and not provided in a catalog resource, which is
restricted to those candidates who have been specifically assigned to
the additional-directions support.

The example below shows how to assign a candidate to the
additional-directions support.

**Additional Directions PNP**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">access-for-all-pnp</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/qtiv3p0/imsafa3p0pnp_v1p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span>   xmlns:xsi=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    xsi:schemaLocation=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/qtiv3p0/imsafa3p0pnp_v1p0 </span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqtiv3p0_afa3p0pnp_v1p0.xsd&quot;&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;<span class="kw">additional-directions</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">access-for-all-pnp</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

**Additional Directions Supplemental Content**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="er">...</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>...</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Grace walks to and from her house on Maple Drive each week. Her house on Maple Drive is a 2 </span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>kilometre walk to her teacher&#39;s house on Chestnut Street.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-choice-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">shuffle=</span><span class="st">&quot;false&quot;</span> <span class="ot">max-choices=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-labels-upper-roman qti-labels-suffix-parenthesis&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span> <span class="ot">data-catalog-idref=</span><span class="st">&quot;cat775&quot;</span>&gt;How many kilometres will he walk in a year for his </span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>harmonica lessons?&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;optionA&quot;</span> <span class="ot">fixed=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;About 200&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;optionB&quot;</span> <span class="ot">fixed=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;About 100&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;optionC&quot;</span> <span class="ot">fixed=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;About 50&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-choice-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-catalog-info</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span> <span class="ot">id=</span><span class="st">&quot;cat775&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-card</span> <span class="ot">support=</span><span class="st">&quot;additional-directions&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;This question will be asking you to estimate the distance walked by </span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       a person over the year, but only for the walking associated with their lessons. The </span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       exact amount is not important for answering the question. The question assumes things </span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       happen in people&#39;s lives that mean that they sometimes have to miss their </span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       appointments.&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-card</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-catalog-info</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

<div id="braille-supplemental-content" class="section">

##### 5.2.7.2 Braille Supplemental Content<a href="#h.j1knq389vbb8" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.j1knq389vbb8" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

First the PNP assignment must be there to receive any of the
supplemental content.

**Braille PNP**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">access-for-all-pnp</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/qtiv3p0/imsafa3p0pnp_v1p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span>   xmlns:xsi=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    xsi:schemaLocation=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/qtiv3p0/imsafa3p0pnp_v1p0 </span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqtiv3p0_afa3p0pnp_v1p0.xsd&quot;&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">braille</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">braille-type</span>&gt;ubae&lt;/<span class="kw">braille-type</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">grade</span>&gt;2&lt;/<span class="kw">grade</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">math-type</span>&gt;nemeth&lt;/<span class="kw">math-type</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;/<span class="kw">braille</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">access-for-all-pnp</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

**Braille Supplemental Content**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="er">...</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>...</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">div</span> <span class="ot">data-catalog-idref=</span><span class="st">&quot;cat626&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Some content...&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-catalog-info</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span> <span class="ot">id=</span><span class="st">&quot;cat626&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-card</span> <span class="ot">support=</span><span class="st">&quot;braille&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;To answer this spelling question, you will </span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            need to use uncontracted braille.&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-card</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-catalog-info</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

<div id="glossary" class="section">

##### 5.2.7.3 Glossary<a href="#h.qebi1e192pw2" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.qebi1e192pw2" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

Glossary terms can be included in assessment content by including the
definitions within a catalog, or referencing the definitions from the
catalog.

**Glossary-on-screen Content**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>...</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>...</span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;How many kilometres will he walk in a year for his </span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">span</span> <span class="ot">data-catalog-idref=</span><span class="st">&quot;cat227&quot;</span>&gt;harmonica&lt;/<span class="kw">span</span>&gt; lessons?&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>...</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-catalog-info</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span> <span class="ot">id=</span><span class="st">&quot;cat227&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-card</span> <span class="ot">support=</span><span class="st">&quot;glossary-on-screen&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">p</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;glossary-term&quot;</span>&gt;Harmonica:&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">p</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;glossary-definition&quot;</span>&gt;A small, hand-held wind instrument with a row of metal </span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            reeds along its length, held against the mouth and moved from side to side to produce </span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            different notes by blowing or sucking through the different holes.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-card</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-catalog-info</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

**Glossary-on-screen Reference**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>...</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>...</span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;How many kilometres will he walk in a year for his </span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">span</span> <span class="ot">data-catalog-idref=</span><span class="st">&quot;cat228&quot;</span>&gt;harmonica&lt;/<span class="kw">span</span>&gt; lessons?&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>...</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-catalog-info</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span> <span class="ot">id=</span><span class="st">&quot;cat228&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-card</span> <span class="ot">strong</span><span class="er">&gt;</span>support=&quot;glossary-on-screen&quot;&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-file-href</span> <span class="ot">mime-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;text/html&quot;</span>&gt;glossary/grades5_9/harmonica.html&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-file-href</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-card</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-catalog-info</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

Assessment programs make different decisions as to which candidates
should receive these glossary supports. Some programs allow all
candidates to access the glossary terms, while others choose to restrict
access to the definitions. If restricting access to the glossary terms
to specific candidates, the support can be assigned to the candidate in
a PNP, as shown below.

**Glossary-on-screen PNP Assignment**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">access-for-all-pnp</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/qtiv3p0/imsafa3p0pnp_v1p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span>   xmlns:xsi=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    xsi:schemaLocation=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/qtiv3p0/imsafa3p0pnp_v1p0 </span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqtiv3p0_afa3p0pnp_v1p0.xsd&quot;&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">glossary-on-screen</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">access-for-all-pnp</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

<div id="keyboard-directions" class="section">

##### 5.2.7.4 Keyboard Directions<a href="#h.kjakgs42japi" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.kjakgs42japi" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

Some candidates can (or prefer) to navigate computer interfaces via a
keyboard. While there are many conventions for keyboard usage for
computer interfaces, there are some instances where new and novel
keyboard sequences are used in an assessment. In these instances, it is
a best practice to make candidates aware of the novel keyboard usage.

Some assessment programs decide to expose the extra keyboard directions
to all candidates, and some programs decide to expose the extra
directions only to candidates with a "keyboard-directions" assignment in
their PNP. In the later case, keyboard direction content can be stored
in a catalog card for the "keyboard-directions" support. Examples of a
PNP and catalog support are provided below.

**Keyboard Directions PNP**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">access-for-all-pnp</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/qtiv3p0/imsafa3p0pnp_v1p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span>   xmlns:xsi=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    xsi:schemaLocation=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/qtiv3p0/imsafa3p0pnp_v1p0 </span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqtiv3p0_afa3p0pnp_v1p0.xsd&quot;&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">keyboard-directions</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">access-for-all-pnp</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

**Keyboard Directions Supplemental Content**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="er">...</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>...</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Grace walks to and from her house on Maple Drive each week. Her house on Maple Drive is a 2 </span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>kilometre walk to her teacher&#39;s house on Chestnut Street.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-choice-interaction</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">max-choices=</span><span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-labels-upper-roman qti-labels-suffix-parenthesis&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span> <span class="ot">data-catalog-idref=</span><span class="st">&quot;cat775&quot;</span>&gt;How many kilometres will he walk in a year for his </span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>harmonica lessons?&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;optionA&quot;</span> <span class="ot">fixed=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;About 200&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;optionB&quot;</span> <span class="ot">fixed=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;About 100&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;optionC&quot;</span> <span class="ot">fixed=</span><span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;About 50&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-simple-choice</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-choice-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-catalog-info</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span> <span class="ot">id=</span><span class="st">&quot;cat775&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-card</span> <span class="ot">support=</span><span class="st">&quot;keyboard-directions&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;Use your keyboard to select your choice by typing &quot;a&quot; for Choice A, </span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &quot;b&quot; for Choice B, and &quot;c&quot; for Choice C.&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-card</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-catalog-info</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

<div id="linguistic-guidance" class="section">

##### 5.2.7.5 Linguistic Guidance<a href="#h.ajdevnvf5w5d" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.ajdevnvf5w5d" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

There are a number of different ways to support candidates that are
language learners. To provide specific supplemental content intended
solely for candidates who need guidance as to the use of the language,
QTI has a "linguistic-guidance" support. An assignment to the
"linguistic-guidance" support could be made to candidates who are
acquiring the language used in an assessment, and for candidates who
have other cognitive support needs.

To assign a candidate to receive the specific supplemental content which
may be provided in assessment content, use the "linguistic-guidance"
support, as shown below.

**Linguistic Guidance PNP Assignment**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">access-for-all-pnp</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/qtiv3p0/imsafa3p0pnp_v1p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span>   xmlns:xsi=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    xsi:schemaLocation=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/qtiv3p0/imsafa3p0pnp_v1p0 </span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqtiv3p0_afa3p0pnp_v1p0.xsd&quot;&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">linguistic-guidance</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">access-for-all-pnp</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

Content provided for linguistic-guidance is intended to be in the
language of the assessment content, not a translation. Use either the
item-translation or keyword-translation supports for translated content.

**Linguistic Guidance Supplemental Content**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>...</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>...</span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span> <span class="ot">id=</span><span class="st">&quot;prompt1&quot;</span>&gt;&lt;<span class="kw">span</span> <span class="ot">data-catalog-idref=</span><span class="st">&quot;grace-person-name&quot;</span>&gt;Grace&lt;/<span class="kw">span</span>&gt; walks to </span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>and from her house on Maple Drive each week. Her house on Maple Drive is a 2 kilometre walk to </span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>her teacher&#39;s house on Chestnut Street.&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>...</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-catalog-info</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span> <span class="ot">id=</span><span class="st">&quot;grace-person-name&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-card</span> <span class="ot">support=</span><span class="st">&quot;linguistic-guidance&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;Grace is the name of a person.&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-card</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-catalog-info</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

<div id="spoken-supplemental-content" class="section">

##### 5.2.7.6 Spoken Supplemental Content<a href="#h.3uz7kvntu2ao" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.3uz7kvntu2ao" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

There may be some programs that find that additional content is useful
for candidates who are assigned the spoken support. While the spoken
support is generally a support that provides an alternative
representation of text content, candidates that need this support may
have additional accessibility requirements, and providing additional
information can benefit candidates who are provided the spoken support.

See Section 5.2.1.6 for examples of assigning the spoken support in a
candidate PNP.

Supplemental content for Spoken

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0   </span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span>   identifier=&quot;ac896785&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    title=&quot;In which, there is supplemental content for candidates with the spoken support&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    qti-time-dependent=&quot;false&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    xml:lang=&quot;en&quot;&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>...</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Canada and the United States share 4 out of the 5 Great Lakes in central North </span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>America.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Which lake is entirely within the boundaries of the United States?&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">p</span> <span class="ot">data-catalog-idref=</span><span class="st">&quot;c_1&quot;</span>&gt;Type your answer here: &lt;<span class="kw">qti-text-entry-interaction</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">expected-length=</span><span class="st">&quot;15&quot;</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span>/&gt;&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-catalog-info</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span> <span class="ot">id=</span><span class="st">&quot;c_1&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;<span class="kw">qti-card</span> <span class="ot">support=</span><span class="st">&quot;spoken&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;You will be able to have any text you write read back to </span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>you.&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-card</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-catalog-info</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

To provide supplemental content for a specific reading-type, use a
"data-reading-type" attribute in the qti-card-entry element to
differentiate the content between the two reading types.

**Supplemental Content for a Specific Spoken "reading-type"**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0   </span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span>   identifier=&quot;ac896786&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    title=&quot;In which, there is supplemental content for candidates with the spoken </span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>support with different reading-types&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    qti-time-dependent=&quot;false&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    xml:lang=&quot;en&quot;&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>...</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Canada and the United States share 4 out of the 5 Great Lakes in central North </span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>America.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Which lake is entirely within the boundaries of the United States?&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">p</span> <span class="ot">data-catalog-idref=</span><span class="st">&quot;c_2&quot;</span>&gt;Type your answer here: &lt;<span class="kw">qti-text-entry-interaction</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">expected-length=</span><span class="st">&quot;15&quot;</span> <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span>/&gt;&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-catalog-info</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">id=</span><span class="st">&quot;c_2&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;<span class="kw">qti-card</span> <span class="ot">support=</span><span class="st">&quot;spoken&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-card-entry</span> <span class="ot">data-reading-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;computer-read-aloud&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;You will be able to have any text you write read back to you. Select </span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>the text and press the play button in the reading control panel.&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-card-entry</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-card-entry</span> <span class="ot">data-reading-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;screen-reader&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;Use your screen reader keyboard commands to have the content you </span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>write read back to you.&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-card-entry</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-card</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-catalog-info</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

<div id="tactile-tour" class="section">

##### 5.2.7.7 Tactile Tour<a href="#h.4uec6u8g3bwn" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.4uec6u8g3bwn" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

If assigned to the "tactile" support, a candidate should be presented
with the tactile content (often referred to as a tactile tour) when
available in a catalog. This content generally helps the candidate
locate the specific tactile needed for the specific question, then
orients and describes the tactile resource.

Tactile files (like a prn or svg file) can also be included using the
qti-file-href. Because this is a newer assessment practice, how and when
to "print" out these files is at the discretion of the assessment
program. Some programs pre-print all the resources before the candidate
takes the assessment, and some programs print the resources "live" - at
the time the candidate encounters the assessment item.

**Supplemental Content for the Tactile Support (Tactile Tour)**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0   </span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span>   identifier=&quot;ac896786&quot; title=&quot;In which, there is supplemental </span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    content for candidates with the spoken support with different reading-types&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    time-dependent=&quot;false&quot; xml:lang=&quot;en&quot;&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>...</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;The water cycle ...&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">img</span> <span class="ot">src=</span><span class="st">&quot;graphics/water_cycle.svg&quot;</span> <span class="ot">height=</span><span class="st">&quot;300&quot;</span> <span class="ot">width=</span><span class="st">&quot;400&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="ot">alt=</span><span class="st">&quot;Picture of the water cycle.&quot;</span> <span class="ot">data-catalog-idref=</span><span class="st">&quot;thx938&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;Which part of the water cycle is exothermic?&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-prompt</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Type your answer here: &lt;<span class="kw">qti-text-entry-interaction</span> <span class="ot">expected-length=</span><span class="st">&quot;15&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="ot">response-identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span>/&gt;&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-catalog-info</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span> <span class="ot">id=</span><span class="st">&quot;thx938&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-card</span> <span class="ot">support=</span><span class="st">&quot;tactile&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Look for tactile sheet THX-938 to answer this question.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">ul</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">li</span>&gt;The sun and sky are in the upper portion of the tactile.&lt;/<span class="kw">li</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">li</span>&gt;The mountains are on the left-hand side of the tactile.&lt;/<span class="kw">li</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">li</span>&gt;The earth (soil) are on the lower left-hand side of the tactile.&lt;/<span class="kw">li</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">li</span>&gt;The body of water is on the lower right-hand side of the tactile.&lt;/<span class="kw">li</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;/<span class="kw">ul</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-card</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-card</span> <span class="ot">support=</span><span class="st">&quot;long-description&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;The water cycle is a loop, which really has no starting point. The sun,</span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    which drives the water cycle, heats water in the oceans, lakes, rivers, and</span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    the surface of the earth. Some of the water evaporates as vapor into the air.</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    In addition, ice and snow can sublimate into water vapor. Rising air currents</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    take the vapor up into the atmosphere, along with water evaporated water from</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    plants and soil. As the vapor rises into the air, cooler temperatures cause</span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    it to condense into clouds.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Air currents move clouds around the earth, cloud particles collide, grow,</span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    and fall out of the sky as precipitation.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Most precipitation falls back into the oceans or onto land. Gravity moves</span>
<span id="cb1-44"><a href="#cb1-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    a portion of water into rivers, moving water towards the oceans. Runoff, and</span>
<span id="cb1-45"><a href="#cb1-45" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    groundwater seepage, accumulate and are stored as freshwater in lakes or</span>
<span id="cb1-46"><a href="#cb1-46" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    replenishing deep aquifers.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-47"><a href="#cb1-47" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;The accumulated water is then available for use by plants and animals, and</span>
<span id="cb1-48"><a href="#cb1-48" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    when it is in an exposed body of water or at the surface of the earth, is</span>
<span id="cb1-49"><a href="#cb1-49" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    available as a source of potential water vapor, starting the water cycle over</span>
<span id="cb1-50"><a href="#cb1-50" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    agai n.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-51"><a href="#cb1-51" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-html-content</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-52"><a href="#cb1-52" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-card</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-53"><a href="#cb1-53" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-catalog</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-54"><a href="#cb1-54" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-catalog-info</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-55"><a href="#cb1-55" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-56"><a href="#cb1-56" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

</div>

<div id="alternative-content-supports" class="section">
