<span id="cb1-88"><a href="#cb1-88" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                        &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:format</span>&gt;text/x-imsqti-item-xml&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:format</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-89"><a href="#cb1-89" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                        &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:format</span>&gt;image/png&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:format</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-90"><a href="#cb1-90" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:technical</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-91"><a href="#cb1-91" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:rights</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-92"><a href="#cb1-92" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                        &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:description</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-93"><a href="#cb1-93" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                            &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span>&gt;This example has been adapted from the PET</span>
<span id="cb1-94"><a href="#cb1-94" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>Handbook, copyright University of Cambridge ESOL Examinations.&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-95"><a href="#cb1-95" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                        &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:description</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-96"><a href="#cb1-96" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:rights</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-97"><a href="#cb1-97" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:lom</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-98"><a href="#cb1-98" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-99"><a href="#cb1-99" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;choice.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-100"><a href="#cb1-100" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;images/sign.png&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-101"><a href="#cb1-101" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-102"><a href="#cb1-102" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">resources</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-103"><a href="#cb1-103" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">manifest</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

The manifest element defines all of the required XML namespaces and
defines the identifier of the QTI content package.

The manifest level metadata (lines 14-54) defines the metadata which
applies to the entire content package. It would have been allowed to
have used a value of "QTI Item" as the value of the schema element, but
as previously mentioned the usual practice is to use a value of "QTI
Package".

The organizations element is always empty (line 55).

The resources element is a container for all of the resource elements.

This package defines a single resource, which is an AssessmentItem
(lines 57-102).

The resource is of type imsqti_item_xmlv3p0, which identifies an
AssessmentItem and has a href attribute which provides a URL relative to
the root of the content package to the file containing the XML markup of
the AssessmentItem.

The resource provides two types of metadata on the item.

Firstly there is QTI metadata, which provides QTI specific metadata
(lines 60-65) and then IMS LOM Metadata (lines 66-98).

Finally there are a set of file elements referencing all of the files
related to this item, firstly the item itself and secondly an image file
referenced by the item.

</div>

<div id="shared-image-example" class="section">

#### 6.2.2 Shared Image Example<a href="#h.o9bkk83zozjs" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.o9bkk83zozjs" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

[packaging/sharedMedia/sharedMedia.zip](https://github.com/IMSGlobal/qti-examples/blob/master/qtiv3-examples/packaging/sharedMedia/sharedMedia.zip)

This example demonstrates how multiple items are packaged. Note that
where two items share a media object (such as an image) a dependency can
be used to enable the object to be represented by its own resource
element within the manifest.

See below for the resources section of the imsmanifest.xml file for this
package.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!-- Metadata omitted for brevity --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">resources</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;<span class="kw">resource</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RES-BCA84FC0-53F9-ABBD-C3FE-BDB5B825CA9E&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;imsqti_item_xmlv3p0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/graphic_order.xml&quot;</span>&gt;            </span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;...&lt;/<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/graphic_order.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">dependency</span> <span class="ot">identifierref=</span><span class="st">&quot;images01&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;<span class="kw">resource</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RES-1CDACE46-DD7B-719F-0D4D-BDA579A862AB&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;imsqti_item_xmlv3p0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/hotspot.xml&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;...&lt;/<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/hotspot.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">dependency</span> <span class="ot">identifierref=</span><span class="st">&quot;images01&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;<span class="kw">resource</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;images01&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;webcontent&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;...&lt;/<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/ukair.png&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">resources</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

<div id="cc-qti-package" class="section">

#### 6.2.3 CC QTI package<a href="#h.9wxhfkbv60p0" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.9wxhfkbv60p0" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

[packaging/ccPackage/ccPackage.zip](https://github.com/IMSGlobal/qti-examples/blob/master/qtiv3-examples/packaging/ccPackage/ccPackage.zip)

This fully zipped up package contains a linear test and a collection of
the most widely used interaction types: multiple choice (single and
multiple), fill-in-the-blank and essay submission. The package is a
transcoding from a Common Cartridge QTI 1.2 example. It therefore
demonstrates IMS_CC 1.1 metadata usage in the manifest file, including
the use of curriculum standards.

The original QTI 1.2 profile for IMS_CC that provided the basis for this
CC QTI package was determined by defining an intersection of the
assessment capabilities of the most widely used LMSs at the time. This
CC QTI package was successfully imported by a number of QTI 2.x
implementations in interoperability tests. As such, it probably
represents the most widely supported minimal subset of the QTI 2.x
specification. Use of the Common Cartridge profile of QTI 1.2 is still
very widespread and support of the equivalent QTI 3 features by a
delivery engine can ease migration of Common Cartridge assessment to a
QTI 3 delivery engine via a process of content conversion.

The package includes examples of the Choice (Single and Multiple), Text
Entry, and Extended Text Interaction, and both Modal and Inline
Feedback.

The **CC2_match.xml** response template provides inline feedback and is
the preferred response template. It processes outcomes by doing two
things. One is to set the FEEDBACK variable with the RESPONSE variable,
so that the qti-feedback-inline element with an identifier that matches
the FEEDBACK value can be shown to the candidate. When the CC2_match.xml
template is used, the FEEDBACKBASIC variable that is declared in all
choice items is not used and won't be set, which means the 'correct' and
'incorrect' modal feedback elements won't ever be shown to the learner.

The ** CC2_match_basic.xml**template is designed for those systems that
do not support inline feedback but which do support modal feedback.
Instead of inlinefeedback elements, the match basic template triggers
the 'correct' and 'incorrect' qti-modal-feedback elements via the
FEEDBACKBASIC variable. It does this by comparing the candidate's
RESPONSE value with the correct RESPONSE value from the item. If they
match, the SCORE variable is set to the MAXSCORE value from the item and
the FEEDBACKBASIC variable is set to 'correct'. If the candidate's
RESPONSE value and the correct RESPONSE value from the item do not
match, the match basic template will set the FEEDBACKBASIC variable to
'incorrect'. When the CC2_match_basic.xml template is used, the FEEDBACK
variable will never be set to the 'true' or 'false' value, which means
that the inline feedback won't ever be shown to the learner.

The *match_basic* template should only be used by systems that cannot
support inline feedback instead of the CC2_match.xml template that is
referenced in the items.

</div>

<div id="package-with-response-processing-templates" class="section">

#### 6.2.4 Package with Response Processing Templates<a href="#h.rc7s61weot47" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.rc7s61weot47" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

[packaging/maxfiles/maxfiles.zip](https://github.com/IMSGlobal/qti-examples/blob/master/qtiv3-examples/packaging/maxfiles/maxfiles.zip)

The response processing templates feature of QTI allows common sets of
response processing rules to be documented in separate XML documents and
simply referred to by the items that make use of them. The mechanism for
identifying the template to use is the
[template](http://www.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/info/index.html#Data_TemplateBlock)
 attribute on the
[qti-response-processing](http://www.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/info/index.html#RootAttribute_qti-response-processing)
 element. This attribute is a URI, but it is not required to be a URL
that resolves directly to the appropriate XML document. To help systems
that support general response processing find the rule definitions
required to support new templates an additional
[template-location](http://www.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/info/index.html#RootCharacteristic_ResponseProcessing.Attr_template-location)
 attribute is provided which may be used to provide a URL that resolves
to the template's XML document. If this URL is given relative to the
location of the item then the template should be included in the same
content package and listed as a dependency for each of the items that
refer to it.

This example package demonstrates the use of a relative URL to refer to
response processing templates listed as separate resources within the
package as described above. Note that the technique used is similar to
that for locating XML schemas from the URIs used to refer to their
namespaces, however, XML schemas included in content packages to assist
with validation should not be described as separate resources (or file
dependencies) in the manifest file.

See below for the resources section of the imsmanifest.xml file for this
package.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!-- Item Metadata omitted for brevity --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">resources</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;<span class="kw">resource</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RES-BCA84FC0-53F9-ABBD-C3FE-BDB5B825CA9E&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;imsqti_item_xmlv3p0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/adaptive.xml&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;...&lt;/<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/adaptive.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/green_door.png&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/open_car.png&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/red_door.png&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/blue_door.png&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/open_goat.png&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;<span class="kw">resource</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RES-B38DF83F-A291-86DA-4EC3-B2CEBD1515A4&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;imsqti_item_xmlv3p0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/choice.xml&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;...&lt;/<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/choice.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/sign.png&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">dependency</span> <span class="ot">identifierref=</span><span class="st">&quot;rp02&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;<span class="kw">resource</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RES-3E07BB74-648D-1705-AB43-FC02920B1EAD&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;imsqti_item_xmlv3p0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/choice_multiple.xml&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;...&lt;/<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/choice_multiple.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">dependency</span> <span class="ot">identifierref=</span><span class="st">&quot;rp01&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;<span class="kw">resource</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RES-1CDACE46-DD7B-719F-0D4D-BDA579A862AB&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;imsqti_item_xmlv3p0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/hotspot.xml&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;...&lt;/<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/hotspot.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/ukair.png&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">dependency</span> <span class="ot">identifierref=</span><span class="st">&quot;rp02&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;<span class="kw">resource</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;rp01&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;imsqti_rptemplate_xmlv3p0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;rptemplates/map_response.xml&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:lom</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                   &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:general</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:identifier</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:entry</span>&gt;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/rptemplates/map_response.xml&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:entry</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:identifier</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:title</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                           &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span> <span class="ot">language=</span><span class="st">&quot;en&quot;</span>&gt;Map Response Template&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:title</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:description</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                           &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span> <span class="ot">language=</span><span class="st">&quot;en&quot;</span>&gt;The map response processing template</span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                          uses the mapResponse operator to map the value of a response</span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                          variable RESPONSE onto a value for the outcome SCORE. Note that when</span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                          using the mapResponse, the SCORE needs to be of type float. Both</span>
<span id="cb1-44"><a href="#cb1-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                          variables must have been declared and RESPONSE must have an</span>
<span id="cb1-45"><a href="#cb1-45" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                          associated mapping. The template applies to responses of any</span>
<span id="cb1-46"><a href="#cb1-46" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                          base-type and cardinality. See the notes about mapResponse for</span>
<span id="cb1-47"><a href="#cb1-47" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                          details of its behaviour when applied to</span>
<span id="cb1-48"><a href="#cb1-48" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                          containers.&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-49"><a href="#cb1-49" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:description</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-50"><a href="#cb1-50" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                   &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:general</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-51"><a href="#cb1-51" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                   &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:lifeCycle</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-52"><a href="#cb1-52" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:version</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-53"><a href="#cb1-53" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                           &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span> <span class="ot">language=</span><span class="st">&quot;en&quot;</span>&gt;1.0&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-54"><a href="#cb1-54" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:version</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-55"><a href="#cb1-55" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:status</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-56"><a href="#cb1-56" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                           &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:source</span>&gt;LOMv1.0&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:source</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-57"><a href="#cb1-57" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                           &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:value</span>&gt;Final&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-58"><a href="#cb1-58" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:status</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-59"><a href="#cb1-59" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                   &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:lifeCycle</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-60"><a href="#cb1-60" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                   &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:technical</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-61"><a href="#cb1-61" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:format</span>&gt;application/xml&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:format</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-62"><a href="#cb1-62" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                   &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:technical</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-63"><a href="#cb1-63" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                   &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:rights</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-64"><a href="#cb1-64" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:cost</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-65"><a href="#cb1-65" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                           &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:source</span>&gt;LOMv1.0&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:source</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-66"><a href="#cb1-66" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                           &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:value</span>&gt;no&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-67"><a href="#cb1-67" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:cost</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-68"><a href="#cb1-68" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:copyrightAndOtherRestrictions</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-69"><a href="#cb1-69" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                           &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:source</span>&gt;LOMv1.0&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:source</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-70"><a href="#cb1-70" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                           &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:value</span>&gt;yes&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-71"><a href="#cb1-71" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:copyrightAndOtherRestrictions</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-72"><a href="#cb1-72" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:description</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-73"><a href="#cb1-73" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                           &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span>&gt;Copyright (c) 2006 IMS Global Learning Consortium,</span>
<span id="cb1-74"><a href="#cb1-74" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                               Inc. All Rights Reserved.&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-75"><a href="#cb1-75" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:description</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-76"><a href="#cb1-76" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                   &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:rights</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-77"><a href="#cb1-77" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:lom</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-78"><a href="#cb1-78" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;/<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-79"><a href="#cb1-79" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;rptemplates/map_response.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-80"><a href="#cb1-80" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-81"><a href="#cb1-81" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;<span class="kw">resource</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;rp02&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;imsqti_rptemplate_xmlv3p0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;rptemplates/match_correct.xml&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-82"><a href="#cb1-82" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-83"><a href="#cb1-83" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:lom</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-84"><a href="#cb1-84" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                   &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:general</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-85"><a href="#cb1-85" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:identifier</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-86"><a href="#cb1-86" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:entry</span>&gt;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/rptemplates/match_correct.xml&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:entry</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-87"><a href="#cb1-87" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:identifier</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-88"><a href="#cb1-88" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:title</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-89"><a href="#cb1-89" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                           &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span> <span class="ot">language=</span><span class="st">&quot;en&quot;</span>&gt;Match Correct&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-90"><a href="#cb1-90" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:title</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-91"><a href="#cb1-91" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:description</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-92"><a href="#cb1-92" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                           &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span> <span class="ot">language=</span><span class="st">&quot;en&quot;</span>&gt;The match correct response processing</span>
<span id="cb1-93"><a href="#cb1-93" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                          template uses the match operator to match the value of a response</span>
<span id="cb1-94"><a href="#cb1-94" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                          variable RESPONSE with its correct value. It sets the outcome</span>
<span id="cb1-95"><a href="#cb1-95" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                          variable SCORE to either 0 or 1 depending on the outcome of the</span>
<span id="cb1-96"><a href="#cb1-96" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                          test. A response variable with called RESPONSE must have been</span>
<span id="cb1-97"><a href="#cb1-97" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                          declared and have an associated correct value. Similarly, the</span>
<span id="cb1-98"><a href="#cb1-98" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                          outcome variable SCORE must also have been declared. The template</span>
<span id="cb1-99"><a href="#cb1-99" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                          applies to responses of any base-type and cardinality though bear</span>
<span id="cb1-100"><a href="#cb1-100" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                           in mind the limitations of matching more complex data types. This</span>
<span id="cb1-101"><a href="#cb1-101" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                          template shouldn&#39;t be used for testing the numerical equality of</span>
<span id="cb1-102"><a href="#cb1-102" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                          responses with base-type float.&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-103"><a href="#cb1-103" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:description</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-104"><a href="#cb1-104" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                   &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:general</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-105"><a href="#cb1-105" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                   &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:lifeCycle</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-106"><a href="#cb1-106" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:version</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-107"><a href="#cb1-107" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                           &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span> <span class="ot">language=</span><span class="st">&quot;en&quot;</span>&gt;1.0&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-108"><a href="#cb1-108" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:version</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-109"><a href="#cb1-109" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:status</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-110"><a href="#cb1-110" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                           &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:source</span>&gt;LOMv1.0&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:source</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-111"><a href="#cb1-111" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                           &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:value</span>&gt;Final&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-112"><a href="#cb1-112" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:status</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-113"><a href="#cb1-113" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                   &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:lifeCycle</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-114"><a href="#cb1-114" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                   &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:technical</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-115"><a href="#cb1-115" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:format</span>&gt;application/xml&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:format</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-116"><a href="#cb1-116" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                   &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:technical</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-117"><a href="#cb1-117" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                   &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:rights</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-118"><a href="#cb1-118" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:cost</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-119"><a href="#cb1-119" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                           &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:source</span>&gt;LOMv1.0&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:source</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-120"><a href="#cb1-120" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                           &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:value</span>&gt;no&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-121"><a href="#cb1-121" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:cost</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-122"><a href="#cb1-122" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:copyrightAndOtherRestrictions</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-123"><a href="#cb1-123" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                           &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:source</span>&gt;LOMv1.0&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:source</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-124"><a href="#cb1-124" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                           &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:value</span>&gt;yes&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-125"><a href="#cb1-125" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:copyrightAndOtherRestrictions</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-126"><a href="#cb1-126" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:description</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-127"><a href="#cb1-127" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                           &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span>&gt;Copyright (c) 2006 IMS Global Learning Consortium,</span>
<span id="cb1-128"><a href="#cb1-128" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                               Inc. All Rights Reserved.&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-129"><a href="#cb1-129" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                       &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:description</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-130"><a href="#cb1-130" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                   &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:rights</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-131"><a href="#cb1-131" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:lom</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-132"><a href="#cb1-132" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;/<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-133"><a href="#cb1-133" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;rptemplates/match_correct.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-134"><a href="#cb1-134" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-135"><a href="#cb1-135" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;/<span class="kw">resources</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

In line 20 you can see that there is a resource which is an item (type =
"imsqti_item_xmlv3p0") which is in the file example/choice.xml and which
uses the shared dependency with an identifier of "rp02".

If you look at line 87 you can see that resource is of type
"imsqti_rptemplate_xmlv3p0" which indicates that it is a response
processing template and you can see from the href attribute that it can
be found in the file "rptemplates/match_correct.xml"

In the item this will be referenced in the qti-response-processing
element:

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<pre class="hljs abnf" aria-busy="false"><code>&lt;qti-response-processing
template=&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/rptemplates/match_correct.xml&quot;
template-location=&quot;../rptemplates/match_correct.xml&quot;/&gt;</code></pre>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

Note, implementers should take care in handling relative paths to ensure
that a malicious content package can not execute a Path Traversal
attack. See Section 6.7 for details.

</div>

<div id="package-with-externally-defined-response-processing-templates"
class="section">

#### 6.2.5 Package with Externally Defined Response Processing Templates<a href="#h.iyj33tbp2pce" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.iyj33tbp2pce" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

[packaging/test_package_minfiles/test_package_minfiles.zip](https://github.com/IMSGlobal/qti-examples/blob/master/qtiv3-examples/packaging/test_package_minfiles/test_package_minfiles.zip)

This example is the same as the one above (Package with Response
Processing Templates) except that response processing templates are not
included. The
[template-location](http://www.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/info/index.html#RootCharacteristic_ResponseProcessing.Attr_template-location)
 attribute is used with absolute URLs of the templates. While this is a
supported capability, the best practice recommendation is to always
include custom response processing templates in the content package.

</div>

<div id="package-with-test-and-items" class="section">

#### 6.2.6 Package with Test and Items<a href="#h.l7w9p5og02r4" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.l7w9p5og02r4" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

[packaging/test_package_minfiles//test_package_minfiles.zip](https://github.com/IMSGlobal/qti-examples/blob/master/qtiv3-examples/packaging/test_package_minfiles/test_package_minfiles.zip)

This example demonstrates how to package a
[qti-assessment-test](http://www.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/info/index.html#TabRootAttribute_qti-assessment-test)
together with the
[qti-assessment-item](http://www.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/info/index.html#TabRootAttribute_qti-assessment-item)
s referenced by the test. Both the qti-assesment-test and
qti-assessment-items are represented by resource elements within the
manifest. A dependency is used to represent the relationship between the
qti-assessment-test and the individual qti-assessment-items.

See below for the the section of the manifest which defines the
qti-assessment-test:

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!-- Item Metadata omitted for brevity --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">resource</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RES-BCA84FC0-53F9-ABBD-C3FE-BDB5B825CA9E&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;imsqti_test_xmlv3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/rtest.xml&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;...&lt;/<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/rtest.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">dependency</span> <span class="ot">identifierref=</span><span class="st">&quot;RES-BCA84FC0-53F9-ABBD-C3FE-BDB5B825CA9E&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">dependency</span> <span class="ot">identifierref=</span><span class="st">&quot;RES-B38DF83F-A291-86DA-4EC3-B2CEBD1515A4&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">dependency</span> <span class="ot">identifierref=</span><span class="st">&quot;RES-3E07BB74-648D-1705-AB43-FC02920B1EAD&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">dependency</span> <span class="ot">identifierref=</span><span class="st">&quot;RES-1CDACE46-DD7B-719F-0D4D-BDA579A862AB&quot;</span>/&gt;&lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">resource</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RES-BCA84FC0-53F9-ABBD-C3FE-BDB5B825CA9F&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;imsqti_item_xmlv3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/adaptive.xml&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;...&lt;/<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/adaptive.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/green_door.png&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/open_car.png&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/red_door.png&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/blue_door.png&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/open_goat.png&quot;</span>/&gt;&lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt;&lt;<span class="kw">resource</span></span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RES-B38DF83F-A291-86DA-4EC3-B2CEBD1515A4&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;imsqti_item_xmlv3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/choice.xml&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;...&lt;/<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/choice.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/sign.png&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">resource</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RES-3E07BB74-648D-1705-AB43-FC02920B1EAD&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;imsqti_item_xmlv3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/choice_multiple.xml&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;...&lt;/<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/choice_multiple.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt;&lt;<span class="kw">resource</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RES-1CDACE46-DD7B-719F-0D4D-BDA579A862AB&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;imsqti_item_xmlv3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/hotspot.xml&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;...&lt;/<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/hotspot.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;example/ukair.png&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

Here, the resource for the qti-assessment-test is of type
"imsqti_test_xmlv3p0" and the 4 items it references are included as
dependencies.

</div>

<div id="package-with-test-stimuli-and-items" class="section">

#### 6.2.7 Package with Test, Stimuli and Items<a href="#h.5tv1o0k4v344" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.5tv1o0k4v344" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

[packaging/sharedStimulus/sharedStimulus.zip](https://github.com/IMSGlobal/qti-examples/blob/master/qtiv3-examples/packaging/sharedStimulus/sharedStimulus.zip)

This example demonstrates how to package an
[qti-assessment-test](http://www.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/info/index.html#TabRootAttribute_qti-assessment-test)
 together with the  qti-assessment-stimulus and
[qti-assessment-item](http://www.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/info/index.html#TabRootAttribute_qti-assessment-item)
s referenced by the test. The qti-assesment-test,
[qti-assessment-stimulus](http://www.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/info/index.html#TabRootAttribute_qti-assessment-stimulus)
and qti-assessment-items are represented by resource elements within the
manifest. A dependency is used to represent the relationship between the
qti-assessment-test and the individual qt-assessment-items, dependencies
are also used to represent the relationship between an item and any
stimulus it references.

See below for the the section of the manifest which defines the
qti-assessment-stimulus:

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">resources</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   <span class="co">&lt;!-- This shared stimulus is referenced by Item1, Item2, and Item3 --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">resource</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;Stimulus1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;imsqti_stimulus_xmlv3p0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;passages/unbelievableNight.xml&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;passages/unbelievableNight.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;passages/images/exemplarSection01_title.png&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;passages/images/exemplarSection01_croc.png&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;passages/images/exemplarSection01_flamingos.png&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;passages/stylesheets/unbelievable_night.css&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">resource</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;Item1&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;exemplar06.xml&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;imsqti_item_xmlv3p0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;exemplar06.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;<span class="kw">dependency</span> <span class="ot">identifierref=</span><span class="st">&quot;Stimulus1&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">resource</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;Item2&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;imsqti_item_xmlv3p0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;exemplar04.xml&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;exemplar04.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;<span class="kw">dependency</span> <span class="ot">identifierref=</span><span class="st">&quot;Stimulus1&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">resource</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;Item3&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;imsqti_item_xmlv3p0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;exemplar05.xml&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;exemplar05.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;<span class="kw">dependency</span> <span class="ot">identifierref=</span><span class="st">&quot;Stimulus1&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">resources</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

Here the resource for the stimulus has a type of
"imsqti_stimulus_xmlv3p0" and each of the items which references the
stimulus includes the stimulus resource as a dependency.

</div>

<div id="package-with-test-sections-and-items" class="section">

#### 6.2.8 Package with Test, Sections and Items<a href="#h.4okky7b3qrca" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.4okky7b3qrca" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

[packaging/BBQsTest/BBQsTest.zip](https://github.com/IMSGlobal/qti-examples/blob/master/qtiv3-examples/packaging/BBQsTest/BBQsTest.zip)

This examples demonstrates how to package a qti-assessment-test which
uses multiple qti-assessment-sections together with the
qti-assessment-items referenced by the test. Both the qti-assesment-test
and qti-assessment-items are represented by resource elements within the
manifest. A dependency is used to represent the relationship between the
qti-assessment-test and the individual qti-assessment-items.

</div>

<div id="package-with-a-test-and-items-with-lti-resources"
class="section">

#### 6.2.9 Package with a Test and Items with LTI resources<a href="#h.8ozq525c71fg" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.8ozq525c71fg" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

[packaging/testWithLti/testWithLti.zip](https://github.com/IMSGlobal/qti-examples/blob/master/qtiv3-examples/packaging/testWithLti/testWithLti.zip)

<div id="ims-learning-tool-interoperability-lti" class="section">

##### 6.2.9.1 IMS Learning Tool Interoperability (LTI)<a href="#h.30bccur4k5zg" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.30bccur4k5zg" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

A Basic LTI link is a simplified and self-contained LTI link.  The
approach for defining an LTI link in QTI, using a resource type, is
identical to that recommended for Common Cartridge (see Section 4.10 in
\[CC-13\]). The LTI specification \[LTI-13\] is used to allow remote
tools and content to be integrated into the launching system e.g. an
LMS, Assessment Delivery System, etc. In the case of QTI, LTI can be
used to:

- Launch digital companion materials e.g. a rule, protractor, etc.
- Launch a custom interaction - this is the recommended way to start a
  qti-custom-interaction thereby realizing some form of
  interoperability;
- Access content that is available as a form of 'app' or which requires
  a proprietary player.The advantage of using this approach lies in the
  fact that any tool supporting LTI can be launched by any system
  supporting LTI. Furthermore, LTIv1.1 and higher versions allows the
  tool to report a score back to the system that launched the tool.

This example demonstrates how to package a qti-assessment-test together
with LTI resources for the items referenced by the test. Both the
qti-assesment-test and LTI launched items are represented by resource
elements in the manifest.

As in IMS Common Cartridge these resources may be dynamically launched
via LTI rather than directly loaded from the QTI Content package, and a
grade can be returned to the delivery engine using LTI Basic Outcomes or
the LTI Advantage Assignment and Grade Services. A dependency is used to
represent the relationship between the qti-assessment-test and the
individual items.

</div>

<div id="identifying-lti-resources-in-a-manifest" class="section">

##### 6.2.9.2 Identifying LTI resources in a manifest<a href="#h.5gvbp5q7bz6v" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.5gvbp5q7bz6v" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

See below for the imsmanifest.xml file for this package.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span> <span class="ot">standalone=</span><span class="st">&quot;yes&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>

<span id="cb1-90"><a href="#cb1-90" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;links/periodicTable.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-91"><a href="#cb1-91" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;links/table.svg&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-92"><a href="#cb1-92" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt;</span>

<span id="cb1-94"><a href="#cb1-94" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">manifest</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

This package defines an AssessmentTest which includes three Assessment
Items, however rather than directly including all of the items in the
package, the item author has included two LTI resources which the
delivery engine can use to LTI Launch the items. It also includes an
item which includes companion materials which uses an LTI resource.

The item author has chosen to add manifest level metadata to indicate
that the content package requires the use of LTI. This is not a
requirement, but it can help the delivery engine know that LTI is
required and what version of LTI is expected. This is done in the LOM
technical metadata under otherPlatformRequirements.

The Assessment Test is unremarkable, it simply refers to three items by
identifier.The difference is that when these identifiers are resolved
through the manifest instead of all of these resources having a type of
`imsqti_item_xmlv3p0` two have a type of `imsbasiclti_xmlv1p3`, which
identifies that they are LTI resource links.

The href of the resource here provides a relative path to an XML file
which describes the LTI resource, and provides the resource specific
information required to launch it.

The item author has also chosen to provide QTI metadata to describe to
the delivery engine what type of interaction the LTI resource
represents. This is again not a requirement, but it can be very helpful
information to the delivery engine.

The LTI resources are described in the same way that they would be for
an LTI resource in an IMS Common Cartridge
\[<a href="#bib-cc-13" class="bibref" data-link-type="biblio"
title="IMS Global Common Cartridge v1.3">CC-13</a>\].

See below for one of the LTI resources in this package.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">cartridge_basiclti_link</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> xmlns=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imslticc_v1p0&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  xmlns:blti=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsbasiclti_v1p0&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  xmlns:lticm=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imslticm_v1p0&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  xmlns:lticp=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imslticp_v1p0&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  xmlns:xsi=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>xsi:schemaLocation=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imslticc_v1p0</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/lti/ltiv1p0/imslticc_v1p0p1.xsd</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsbasiclti_v1p0</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/lti/ltiv1p0/imsbasiclti_v1p0p1.xsd</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imslticm_v1p0</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/lti/ltiv1p0/imslticm_v1p0.xsd</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imslticp_v1p0</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/lti/ltiv1p0/imslticp_v1p0.xsd&quot;&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">blti:title</span>&gt;Unattended Luggage&lt;/<span class="kw">blti:title</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">blti:description</span>&gt;Luggage sample choice interaction&lt;/<span class="kw">blti:description</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">blti:custom</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">lticm:property</span> <span class="ot">name=</span><span class="st">&quot;item_id&quot;</span>&gt;item1&lt;/<span class="kw">lticm:property</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">blti:custom</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;<span class="kw">blti:extensions</span> <span class="ot">platform=</span><span class="st">&quot;QuizcoQUIZZES&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;<span class="kw">lticm:property</span> <span class="ot">name=</span><span class="st">&quot;ext_outcome_data_values_accepted&quot;</span>&gt;text,url&lt;/<span class="kw">lticm:property</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;/<span class="kw">blti:extensions</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">blti:launch_url</span>&gt;https://items.example.com/provider&lt;/<span class="kw">blti:launch_url</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">blti:secure_launch_url</span>&gt;https://items.example.com/provider&lt;/<span class="kw">blti:secure_launch_url</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">blti:vendor</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">lticp:code</span>&gt;IMSRefImpl&lt;/<span class="kw">lticp:code</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">lticp:name</span>&gt;IMS&lt;/<span class="kw">lticp:name</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">blti:vendor</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">cartridge_basiclti_link</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

The first 14 lines are concerned with providing the expected namespace
definitions. These namespaces and associated schemas are defined by
other IMS specifications such as IMS Learning Tool Interoperability and
IMS Common Cartridge and are more fully described in those
specifications.

The `secure_launch_url` and `launch_url` elements provide the URL of the
endpoint of the Tool Provider which will be responsible for delivering
the LTI resource. Note, the presence of two urls is due to backwards
compatibility requirements and the best practice is for both elements to
contain https urls for security reasons, and the normal practice is for
both to contain the same value.

An LTI launch has a series of standard parameters (which are defined in
the LTI specification) but may also include a series of custom
parameters which may be unique to the resource (in this case an item)
being launched. These are provided as name/value pairs in property
elements which are children of the element custom. In this way the item
author can provide any parameters the LTI Tool Provider needs to know
about the item (or other content) being launched. In this case only an
item identifier (item_id) is required.

An LTI resource also allows for vendor specific extensions to be used,
and any parameters required to support those extensions can be provided
via the vendor element. It is generally recommended that such parameters
be regarded as optional by the Tool as otherwise the presence of vendor
specific extensions is likely to limit the interoperability of the QTI
content package. In this example the delivery engine is using the
extensions element to record along with the rest of the LTI
configuration that the DataValue extension to Outcomes has been enabled
for this item.

</div>

<div id="lti-launching-an-item" class="section">

##### 6.2.9.3 LTI Launching an item<a href="#h.956xrrf05xu8" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.956xrrf05xu8" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

At runtime a delivery engine would know from the manifest that as these
items are resources of type `imsbasiclti_xmlv1p3` that it should LTI
launch the item via an LTI launch of the LTI Tool Provider identified in
the launch_url, which will cause the Tool Provider to render the item,
instead of the delivery engine attempting to render the item itself.
Note that while a Tool Provider should honour reasonable expectations of
the contents of what they render (e.g. if the LTI resource is referenced
by an qti-assessment-item-ref then it should act as an Assessment Item)
it is not required to import QTI markup to define that item.

Following the LTI specification, the delivery engine would take the
information provided on the LTI resource in the cartridge_basiclti_link
markup provided by the item author and combine it with dynamic generated
information at run time (e.g. it may provide an identifier for the
candidate, details on the delivery engine, on the expected presentation,
a result id, details on the security contract between the delivery
engine and the Tool Provider), and provides a cryptographically signed
collection of these details to the Tool Provider. The Tool Provider
validates the LTI launch parameters and if valid would render the
resource requested, in this particular example it's an item.

LTI includes some launch parameters which can inform the tool of it's
expectations for the presentation of the launched resource. An option
which may work well in an assessment context is for the delivery engine
to request that the resource be rendered in an iframe so that the item
can be presented in the context of the delivery engine UI.

The above is a brief introduction to LTI in the context of an assessment
delivery engine. It is not normative, and when implementing LTI
implementers *MUST* follow the LTI and related specifications when
implementing LTI support for an assessment delivery engine.

Assuming that the LTI resource link above is being launched in the
context of a candidate with the following details:

- local id of 320171 and a SIS identifier of
  e6a3441a-ee74-4bbc-81f9-f6825a147bd6
- class with a local id of 7291790 & a SIS id of
  febdfccc-31ac-40a6-bfc8-d3de79557e02
- SIS course id of 8c4a0faf-5f41-4ce9-9ff3-0bfcc0f22099
- taking a formative assessment with a test session of
  TestSession108181909
- in delivery engine tenant Riverrun School District
- in a cloud hosted delivery engine from a company called 'Quizco'

<div id="sample-lti-1-3-launch-body" class="section">

###### 6.2.9.3.1 Sample LTI 1.3 Launch Body<a href="#h.956xrrf05xu8_1" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.956xrrf05xu8_1" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

The LTI 1.3 launch body could be:

<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs json"><code class="sourceCode json"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
