<span id="cb1-61"><a href="#cb1-61" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="dt">&quot;scope&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span> <span class="ot">[</span></span>
<span id="cb1-62"><a href="#cb1-62" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/lti-ags/scope/result.readonly&quot;</span><span class="ot">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-63"><a href="#cb1-63" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/lti-ags/scope/score&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-64"><a href="#cb1-64" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="ot">]</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-65"><a href="#cb1-65" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="dt">&quot;lineitem&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;http://riverrun.assessment.quizzco.com/lti/return/test/session/TestSession108181909/item1/results&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-66"><a href="#cb1-66" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">},</span></span>
<span id="cb1-67"><a href="#cb1-67" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="dt">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/lti/claim/custom&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span> <span class="fu">{</span></span>
<span id="cb1-68"><a href="#cb1-68" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="dt">&quot;xstart&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;2021-04-21T01:00:00Z&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-69"><a href="#cb1-69" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="dt">&quot;test_bank_id&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;8a8104af-69b0-455d-bca8-e62af916defe&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-70"><a href="#cb1-70" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="dt">&quot;case_item_uri&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;https://riverrun.edu/ims/case/v1p0/CFItemTypes/e657aa91-c8ad-5f0b-8eb2-2f8e9f66ff20&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-71"><a href="#cb1-71" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">},</span></span>
<span id="cb1-72"><a href="#cb1-72" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="dt">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/lti/claim/lis&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span> <span class="fu">{</span></span>
<span id="cb1-73"><a href="#cb1-73" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="dt">&quot;person_sourcedid&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;e6a3441a-ee74-4bbc-81f9-f6825a147bd6&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-74"><a href="#cb1-74" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="dt">&quot;course_offering_sourcedid&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;8c4a0faf-5f41-4ce9-9ff3-0bfcc0f22099&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-75"><a href="#cb1-75" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="dt">&quot;course_section_sourcedid&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;febdfccc-31ac-40a6-bfc8-d3de79557e02&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-76"><a href="#cb1-76" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">},</span></span>
<span id="cb1-77"><a href="#cb1-77" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="dt">&quot;http://www.quizzco.com&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span> <span class="fu">{</span></span>
<span id="cb1-78"><a href="#cb1-78" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="dt">&quot;session&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;89023sj890dju080&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-79"><a href="#cb1-79" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   <span class="fu">}</span></span>
<span id="cb1-80"><a href="#cb1-80" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">}</span></span>
<span id="cb1-81"><a href="#cb1-81" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                                </span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

<div id="sample-lti-1-1-launch-parameters" class="section">

###### 6.2.9.3.2 Sample LTI 1.1 Launch Parameters<a href="#h.956xrrf05xu8_2" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.956xrrf05xu8_2" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

The following set of LTI 1.1 launch parameters could be sent:

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs javascript"><code class="sourceCode javascript"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>context_id<span class="op">=</span>TestSession108181909</span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>context_label<span class="op">=</span>ELA102</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>context_type<span class="op">=</span>Groupext_outcome_data_values_accepted<span class="op">=</span>url<span class="op">,</span>text</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>launch_presentation_document_target<span class="op">=</span>iframe</span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>launch_presentation_locale<span class="op">=</span>en<span class="op">-</span>GB</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>launch_presentation_return_url<span class="op">=</span>http<span class="op">:</span><span class="co">//items.example.com/return/test/session/TestSession108181909/item1</span></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>lis_course_offering_sourcedid<span class="op">=</span><span class="dv">8</span><span class="er">c4a0faf</span><span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">5</span><span class="er">f41</span><span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">4</span><span class="er">ce9</span><span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">9</span><span class="er">ff3</span><span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">0</span><span class="er">bfcc0f22099</span></span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>lis_course_section_sourcedid<span class="op">=</span>febdfccc<span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">31</span><span class="er">ac</span><span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">40</span><span class="er">a6</span><span class="op">-</span>bfc8<span class="op">-</span>d3de79557e02</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>lis_outcome_service_url<span class="op">=</span>http<span class="op">:</span><span class="co">//items.example.com/test/scores.php</span></span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>lis_result_sourcedid<span class="op">=</span><span class="dv">37472</span><span class="er">bad</span><span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">7</span><span class="er">de7</span><span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">426</span><span class="er">f</span><span class="op">-</span>a6d5<span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">3469</span><span class="er">dce3b107</span></span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>lis_person_sourcedid<span class="op">=</span>e6a3441a<span class="op">-</span>ee74<span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">4</span><span class="er">bbc</span><span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">81</span><span class="er">f9</span><span class="op">-</span>f6825a147bd6</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>lti_message_type<span class="op">=</span>basic<span class="op">-</span>lti<span class="op">-</span>launch<span class="op">-</span>request</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>lti_version<span class="op">=</span>LTI<span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">1</span><span class="er">p0</span></span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>oauth_callback<span class="op">=</span>about<span class="op">:</span>blank</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>oauth_consumer_key<span class="op">=</span>integrationForExampleTool</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>oauth_nonce<span class="op">=</span>e28ffd06b4a3bd5adb5904c834d214e4</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>oauth_signature<span class="op">=</span><span class="dv">710</span><span class="er">sdMwOXSNGFQ</span><span class="op">/</span>UIC8gYIBUr4U<span class="op">=</span></span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>oauth_signature_method<span class="op">=</span>HMAC<span class="op">-</span>SHA256</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>oauth_timestamp<span class="op">=</span><span class="dv">1551181798</span></span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>oauth_version<span class="op">=</span><span class="fl">1.0</span></span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>resource_link_description<span class="op">=</span>Luggage sample choice interaction</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>resource_link_id<span class="op">=</span>item1</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>resource_link_title<span class="op">=</span>Unattended Luggage</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>roles<span class="op">=</span>Learner</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>tool_consumer_info_product_family_code<span class="op">=</span>QuizcoQUIZZES</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>tool_consumer_info_version<span class="op">=</span><span class="fl">9.7.1</span></span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>tool_consumer_instance_contact_email<span class="op">=</span>tool_support@quizzco<span class="op">.</span><span class="at">com</span></span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>tool_consumer_instance_description<span class="op">=</span>Riverrun School District</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>tool_consumer_instance_guid<span class="op">=</span>a9e34b71<span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">2</span><span class="er">d35</span><span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">41</span><span class="er">b9</span><span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">9</span><span class="er">f99</span><span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">4</span><span class="er">aa34fdbc9fa</span></span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>tool_consumer_instance_url<span class="op">=</span>riverrun<span class="op">.</span><span class="at">assessment</span><span class="op">.</span><span class="at">quizco</span><span class="op">.</span><span class="at">com</span></span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>user_id<span class="op">=</span><span class="dv">320171</span></span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

</div>

<div id="returning-a-score" class="section">

##### 6.2.9.4 Returning a Score<a href="#h.7hd52dx4t47g" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.7hd52dx4t47g" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

For LTI 1.3 the Assignment and Grades service (AGS) can be used to
return a score to the launch platform (via a pair of fields `scoreGiven`
and `scoreMaximum`).

If the response has a QTI response variable named "SCORE" then its value
*MUST* be used as the value of `scoreGiven` in the AGS score payload.

If the response has a QTI response variable named "MAXSCORE" then its
value *MUST* be used as the value of `scoreMaximum` in the AGS score
payload.

QTI would typically return more information as the outcome of an item
than that where this fuller exchange of the QTI outcomes is desired see
the enhanced process defined in the next sub section.

In the launch the platform will provide a lineitem endpoint which is
associated with the item in the launching assessment delivery engine.
When the Tool has an outcome available for that item it will post a
score to the scores endpoint for the provided lineitem endpoint (which
is constructed by appending "/scores" to the lineitem endpoint).

An example of the lineitem endpointExample of the lineitem endpoint:

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs javascript"><code class="sourceCode javascript"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/lti-ags/claim/endpoint&quot;</span><span class="op">:</span> {</span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   <span class="st">&quot;scope&quot;</span><span class="op">:</span> [</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     <span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/lti-ags/scope/result.readonly&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     <span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/lti-ags/scope/score&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   ]<span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   <span class="st">&quot;lineitem&quot;</span><span class="op">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;http://riverrun.assessment.quizzco.com/lti/return/test/session/TestSession108181909/item1/results&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> }</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

An example of POSTing item results with score information:

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs css"><code class="sourceCode css"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>POST http<span class="in">:</span><span class="er">//riverrun.assessment.quizzco.com/lti/return/test/session/TestSession108181909/item1/results/scores</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> Content-Type<span class="in">:</span> application/vnd<span class="fu">.ims.lis.v1.score</span><span class="op">+</span>json</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> Authorization<span class="in">:</span> Bearer {OAuth bearer token}</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> {</span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &quot;timestamp&quot;<span class="ch">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;2022-01-08T35:27:12.910+00:00&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   <span class="st">&quot;scoreGiven&quot;</span> : <span class="dv">3</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   <span class="st">&quot;scoreMaximum&quot;</span> : <span class="dv">5</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   <span class="st">&quot;comment&quot;</span> : <span class="st">&quot;This is exceptional work.&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   <span class="st">&quot;activityProgress&quot;</span> : <span class="st">&quot;Completed&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   <span class="st">&quot;gradingProgress&quot;</span>: <span class="st">&quot;FullyGraded&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   <span class="st">&quot;userId&quot;</span> : <span class="st">&quot;320171&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> }</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

If it wishes the Tool *MAY* return interim results using an
`activityProgress` other than "Completed" and/or `gradingProgress` other
than FullyGraded.

LTI 1.1 supports a Basic Outcome service which can be used by a Tool to
return a score earned by a candidate by interacting with a launched
item. Later versions of LTI support more capable outcomes/grade
services, but all versions of LTI for which IMS provide conformance
testing support the return of a single numeric outcome value.

LTI models outcomes in the context of a line item in a gradebook, where
a result is added for every user who takes the assignment or assessment.
These lineitems may represent different levels of granularity, in an
assessment context they may represent item level outcomes or test level
outcomes. While later versions of LTI outcomes or grades services allow
a lot of control in terms of being able to create new lineitems, the
Basic Outcomes service defined by LTI 1.1 allows only for a single
numeric outcome to be returned by the Tool Provider in response to an
LTI launch.

To enable this capability in the Tool the delivery engine creates a new
Result for the candidate in the lineitem representing this item and
passes the identifier of that result in the standard
`lis_result_sourcedid`parameter. The Tool may then use this result id to
return a numeric result to the delivery engine by using the Basic
Outcomes service (which is a server to server call). Implementers should
again follow that specification when implementing outcomes support for
an assessment delivery engine.

It is not required that the delivery engine record that score directly
in a gradebook, it may record that score in the results of a test, i.e.
the value of the lis_result_sourceid is treated as an opaque value by
the Tool Provider and only used to pass back to the delivery engine when
recording a score for the item, so the delivery engine may choose to use
a value which uniquely identifies to it an individual item session with
which it will later associate the returned score.

In the example LTI launch parameters above we can see that the delivery
engine has passed an Outcomes service endpoint of
` http://items.example.com/test/scores.php`  via the
`lis_outcome_service_url`parameter and created a result with an id of
37472bad-7de7-426f-a6d5-3469dce3b107 which it passed in the
`lis_result_sourcedid`parameter.

Assuming that the Tool has immediately auto-scored the item and the
candidate earned a score of 1 then it would POST a Basic Outcomes
request to update the result to the endpoint.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>POST /test/scores.php HTTP/1.1</span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>Host: items.example.com</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>Accept: */*</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>Authorization: OAuth</span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>oauth_version=&quot;1.0&quot;,oauth_nonce=&quot;6163523d512cd9cfced27974d014e1af&quot;,oauth_timestamp=&quot;1551187820&quot;,</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>oauth_consumer_key=&quot;integrationForExampleTool&quot;,oauth_body_hash=&quot;C%2BGR6heCjtK%2BzN75hQU1Ef0x%2BJw%3D&quot;,</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>oauth_signature_method=&quot;HMAC-SHA256&quot;,oauth_signature=&quot;gvR22%2FEZotvzRjq0wgWCXgU2FJQ%3D&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>Content-Type: application/xml</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>Content-Length: 815</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version</span> <span class="ot">=</span> <span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding</span> <span class="ot">=</span> <span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">imsx_POXEnvelopeRequest</span> <span class="ot">xmlns</span> <span class="ot">=</span> <span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/services/ltiv1p1/xsd/imsoms_v1p0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;<span class="kw">imsx_POXHeader</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">imsx_POXRequestHeaderInfo</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;<span class="kw">imsx_version</span>&gt;V1.0&lt;/<span class="kw">imsx_version</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;<span class="kw">imsx_messageIdentifier</span>&gt;5c753f6ca2866&lt;/<span class="kw">imsx_messageIdentifier</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;/<span class="kw">imsx_POXRequestHeaderInfo</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;/<span class="kw">imsx_POXHeader</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;<span class="kw">imsx_POXBody</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">replaceResultRequest</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;<span class="kw">resultRecord</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;<span class="kw">sourcedGUID</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &lt;<span class="kw">sourcedId</span>&gt;37472bad-7de7-426f-a6d5-3469dce3b107&lt;/<span class="kw">sourcedId</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;/<span class="kw">sourcedGUID</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;<span class="kw">result</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &lt;<span class="kw">resultScore</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">language</span>&gt;en-US&lt;/<span class="kw">language</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">textString</span>&gt;1&lt;/<span class="kw">textString</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &lt;/<span class="kw">resultScore</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;/<span class="kw">result</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;/<span class="kw">resultRecord</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;/<span class="kw">replaceResultRequest</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;/<span class="kw">imsx_POXBody</span>&gt;&lt;/<span class="kw">imsx_POXEnvelopeRequest</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

The delivery engine can then use the value returned for that result for
the candidate to derive a value for the SCORE outcome variable. Basic
Outcomes returns a float value which aligns well with the base-type
required for the built in SCORE outcome variable.

Tools should be cognizant of the needs of delivery engines to receive
the score in a timely manner. For example a test part may be configured
with a submission mode of 'individual' where item outcomes must be
submitted on an item by item basis.

</div>

<div id="results-reporting" class="section">

##### 6.2.9.5 Results Reporting<a href="#h.fvchfiv2t1qq" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.fvchfiv2t1qq" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

For LTI 1.3 the Assignment and Grades service (AGS) can be used to
return a score to the launch platform (via a pair of fields `scoreGiven`
and `scoreMaximum`). QTI would typically return more information as the
outcome of an item than that, however the Assignment and Grades services
payloads are extensible. Additional properties can be added to the
assignment and grades responses which can be used to return this
additional information using a JSON binding of the QTI Results Reporting
information model.

If the response has a QTI response variable named "SCORE" then its value
*MUST* be used as the value of 'scoreGiven' in the AGS score payload.

If the response has a QTI response variable named "MAXSCORE" then its
value *MUST* be used as the value of 'scoreMaximum' in the AGS score
payload.

If the results reporting data includes a `candidateComment` property
that is a comment provided by the test candidate, not the scorer and so
would not typically be sent as the `comment` property of the AGS
payload.

In the launch the platform will provide a lineitem endpoint which is
associated with the item in the launching assessment delivery engine.
When the Tool has an outcome available for that item it will post a
score to the scores endpoint for the provided lineitem endpoint ( which
is constructed by appending "/scores" to the lineitem endpoint).

An example of the lineitem endpoint:

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs javascript"><code class="sourceCode javascript"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/lti-ags/claim/endpoint&quot;</span><span class="op">:</span> {</span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   <span class="st">&quot;scope&quot;</span><span class="op">:</span> [</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     <span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/lti-ags/scope/result.readonly&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     <span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/lti-ags/scope/score&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   ]<span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   <span class="st">&quot;lineitem&quot;</span><span class="op">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;http://riverrun.assessment.quizzco.com/lti/return/test/session/TestSession108181909/item1/results&quot;</span></span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

An example of POSTing item results with additional QTI results reporting
data:

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs css"><code class="sourceCode css"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>POST http<span class="in">:</span><span class="er">//riverrun.assessment.quizzco.com/lti/return/test/session/TestSession108181909/item1/results/scores</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> Content-Type<span class="in">:</span> application/vnd<span class="fu">.ims.lis.v1.score</span><span class="op">+</span>json</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> Authorization<span class="in">:</span> Bearer {OAuth bearer token}</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> {</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &quot;timestamp&quot;<span class="ch">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;2022-01-08T35:27:12.910+00:00&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   <span class="st">&quot;scoreGiven&quot;</span> : <span class="dv">3</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   <span class="st">&quot;scoreMaximum&quot;</span> : <span class="dv">5</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   <span class="st">&quot;comment&quot;</span> : <span class="st">&quot;This is exceptional work.&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   <span class="st">&quot;activityProgress&quot;</span> : <span class="st">&quot;Completed&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   <span class="st">&quot;gradingProgress&quot;</span>: <span class="st">&quot;FullyGraded&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   <span class="st">&quot;userId&quot;</span> : <span class="st">&quot;320171&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   <span class="st">&quot;https://purl.1edtech.org/spec/qti/results&quot;</span>: {</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      {</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          <span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>:<span class="st">&quot;item1&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          <span class="st">&quot;sequenceIndex&quot;</span>:<span class="dv">0</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          <span class="st">&quot;datestamp&quot;</span>:<span class="st">&quot;2022-01-08T35:27:12.910+00:00&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          <span class="st">&quot;sessionStatus&quot;</span>:<span class="st">&quot;interacting&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          <span class="st">&quot;responseVariables&quot;</span>:[ {</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="st">&quot;itemVariableType&quot;</span>:<span class="st">&quot;responseVariable&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>:<span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="st">&quot;cardinality&quot;</span>:<span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="st">&quot;base-type&quot;</span>:<span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="st">&quot;correctResponse&quot;</span>:<span class="dv">5</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>               <span class="st">&quot;candidateResponse&quot;</span>:[ {</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                   <span class="st">&quot;fieldIdentifier&quot;</span>:<span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                   <span class="st">&quot;base-type&quot;</span>:<span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                   <span class="st">&quot;valueString&quot;</span>:<span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                } ]<span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           } ]<span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &quot;outcomeVariables&quot;<span class="in">:</span><span class="ex">[</span></span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ss">           </span>{</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             &quot;itemVariableType&quot;<span class="ch">:</span><span class="st">&quot;templateVariable&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>:<span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="st">&quot;cardinality&quot;</span>:<span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="st">&quot;base-type&quot;</span>:<span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="st">&quot;views&quot;</span>:[</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                <span class="st">&quot;author&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             ]<span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="st">&quot;interpretation&quot;</span>:<span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="st">&quot;longInterpretation&quot;</span>:<span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="st">&quot;normalMaximum&quot;</span>:<span class="dv">1.0</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="st">&quot;normalMinimum&quot;</span>:<span class="dv">0</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-44"><a href="#cb1-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="st">&quot;masteryValue&quot;</span>:<span class="dv">0</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-45"><a href="#cb1-45" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             <span class="st">&quot;values&quot;</span>:[</span>
<span id="cb1-46"><a href="#cb1-46" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                {</span>
<span id="cb1-47"><a href="#cb1-47" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                   <span class="st">&quot;fieldIdentifier&quot;</span>:<span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-48"><a href="#cb1-48" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                   <span class="st">&quot;base-type&quot;</span>:<span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-49"><a href="#cb1-49" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                   <span class="st">&quot;valueString&quot;</span>:<span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-50"><a href="#cb1-50" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                }</span>
<span id="cb1-51"><a href="#cb1-51" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             ]</span>
<span id="cb1-52"><a href="#cb1-52" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          }</span>
<span id="cb1-53"><a href="#cb1-53" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       ]<span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-54"><a href="#cb1-54" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &quot;candidateComment&quot;<span class="in">:</span>&quot;Too Easy!&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-55"><a href="#cb1-55" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   }</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

If it wishes the Tool *MAY* return interim results using an
`activityProgress` other than "Completed" and/or `gradingProgress` other
than FullyGraded.

There are widely supported extensions to the Basic Outcomes service
which Tools and delivery engines may find useful in an assessment
context. Delivery engines should not expect these extensions to be
present in order to maximize interoperability, but may use them to
provide additional capabilities. For example there is a defined
extension which allows for a text and/or a URL to be returned with the
outcome, which may be used if desired where supported by both delivery
engine and Tool to return additional information along with the numeric
outcome to the delivery engine. An extension element in the
cartridge_basiclti_link with a platform attribute matching the delivery
engine can be used to indicate that this extension should be enabled for
this item.

In turn, the delivery engine would indicate support for this extension
to the Assessment Tool Provider by adding the following LTI launch
parameter: `ext_outcome_data_values_accepted=url,text`

An Assessment Tool Provider which supports that extension can then
return an extra node (a `resultData`element) which can contain free text
(in a `text`element), it is *RECOMMENDED* that this text be a
serialization of a response variable in the JSON format used by the CAT
API for item variables.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>POST /test/scores.php HTTP/1.1</span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>Host: items.example.com</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>Accept: */*</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>Authorization: OAuth</span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>oauth_version=&quot;1.0&quot;,oauth_nonce=&quot;6163523d512cd9cfced27974d014e1af&quot;,oauth_timestamp=&quot;1551187820&quot;,</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>oauth_consumer_key=&quot;integrationForExampleTool&quot;,oauth_body_hash=&quot;C%2BGR6heCjtK%2BzN75hQU1Ef0x%2BJw%3D&quot;,</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>oauth_signature_method=&quot;HMAC-SHA256&quot;,oauth_signature=&quot;gvR22%2FEZotvzRjq0wgWCXgU2FJQ%3D&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>Content-Type: application/xml</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>Content-Length: 3215</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version</span> <span class="ot">=</span> <span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding</span> <span class="ot">=</span> <span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">imsx_POXEnvelopeRequest</span> <span class="ot">xmlns</span> <span class="ot">=</span> <span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/services/ltiv1p1/xsd/imsoms_v1p0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;<span class="kw">imsx_POXHeader</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">imsx_POXRequestHeaderInfo</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;<span class="kw">imsx_version</span>&gt;V1.0&lt;/<span class="kw">imsx_version</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;<span class="kw">imsx_messageIdentifier</span>&gt;9c261e2cf3098&lt;/<span class="kw">imsx_messageIdentifier</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;/<span class="kw">imsx_POXRequestHeaderInfo</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;/<span class="kw">imsx_POXHeader</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;<span class="kw">imsx_POXBody</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">replaceResultRequest</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;<span class="kw">resultRecord</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;<span class="kw">sourcedGUID</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &lt;<span class="kw">sourcedId</span>&gt;37472bad-7de7-426f-a6d5-3469dce3b107&lt;/<span class="kw">sourcedId</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;/<span class="kw">sourcedGUID</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;<span class="kw">result</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &lt;<span class="kw">resultScore</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">language</span>&gt;en-US&lt;/<span class="kw">language</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">textString</span>&gt;1&lt;/<span class="kw">textString</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &lt;/<span class="kw">resultScore</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">resultData</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">text</span>&gt;{&quot;itemVariableType&quot;:&quot;responseVariable&quot;,&quot;identifier&quot;:&quot;RESPONSE&quot;,&quot;cardinality&quot;:</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&quot;single&quot;,&quot;base-type&quot;:&quot;integer&quot;,&quot;correctResponse&quot;:5,&quot;candidateResponse&quot;:[{&quot;fieldIdentifier&quot;:</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&quot;string&quot;,&quot;base-type&quot;:&quot;integer&quot;,&quot;valueString&quot;:&quot;5&quot;}]}</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             &lt;/<span class="kw">text</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">resultData</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;/<span class="kw">result</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;/<span class="kw">resultRecord</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;/<span class="kw">replaceResultRequest</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;/<span class="kw">imsx_POXBody</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">imsx_POXEnvelopeRequest</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

Alternatively it can instead return a url (in a `url`element) and it is
recommended that the url be a resolvable URL which can be used to get a
QTI results reporting report for this item using the same JSON
representation as used by the CAT standard. If the delivery engine
wishes to use this URL it should do so immediately the URL is made
available as the Learning Tool may only make it available for a short
time (e.g. potentially for the lifetime of a test session). The URL
*MUST* be a https url and may need to be self-authenticating as the
delivery engine won't have an access token to provide for that endpoint
unless this is established by an out of band mechanism.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>POST /test/scores.php HTTP/1.1</span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>Host: items.example.com</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>Accept: */*</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>Authorization: OAuth</span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>oauth_version=&quot;1.0&quot;,oauth_nonce=&quot;6163523d512cd9cfced27974d014e1af&quot;,oauth_timestamp=&quot;1551187820&quot;,</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>oauth_consumer_key=&quot;integrationForExampleTool&quot;,oauth_body_hash=&quot;C%2BGR6heCjtK%2BzN75hQU1Ef0x%2BJw%3D&quot;,</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>oauth_signature_method=&quot;HMAC-SHA256&quot;,oauth_signature=&quot;gvR22%2FEZotvzRjq0wgWCXgU2FJQ%3D&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>Content-Type: application/xml</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>Content-Length: 3215</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version</span> <span class="ot">=</span> <span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding</span> <span class="ot">=</span> <span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">imsx_POXEnvelopeRequest</span> <span class="ot">xmlns</span> <span class="ot">=</span> <span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/services/ltiv1p1/xsd/imsoms_v1p0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;<span class="kw">imsx_POXHeader</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">imsx_POXRequestHeaderInfo</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;<span class="kw">imsx_version</span>&gt;V1.0&lt;/<span class="kw">imsx_version</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;<span class="kw">imsx_messageIdentifier</span>&gt;5c753f6ca2866&lt;/<span class="kw">imsx_messageIdentifier</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;/<span class="kw">imsx_POXRequestHeaderInfo</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;/<span class="kw">imsx_POXHeader</span>&gt;  &lt;<span class="kw">imsx_POXBody</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">replaceResultRequest</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;<span class="kw">resultRecord</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;<span class="kw">sourcedGUID</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &lt;<span class="kw">sourcedId</span>&gt;37472bad-7de7-426f-a6d5-3469dce3b107&lt;/<span class="kw">sourcedId</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;/<span class="kw">sourcedGUID</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;<span class="kw">result</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &lt;<span class="kw">resultScore</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">language</span>&gt;en-US&lt;/<span class="kw">language</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">textString</span>&gt;1&lt;/<span class="kw">textString</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &lt;/<span class="kw">resultScore</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &lt;<span class="kw">resultData</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">url</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>https://tool.example.com/lti/item/results?access=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3M</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>iOiJodHRwczovL3Rvb2wuZXhhbXBsZS5jb20iLCJzdWIiOiIzMjAxNzEiLCJuYW1lIjoiSm9obiBEb2UiLCJhdWQiOiJU</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>ZXN0U2Vzc2lvbjEwODE4MTkwOSIsImlhdCI6MTUxNjIzOTAyMn0.ctDqw9fO39WaTvFv2-W-kOiwikylMi0wZ6ri4CK4oz8</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             &lt;/<span class="kw">url</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">resultData</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;/<span class="kw">result</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;/<span class="kw">resultRecord</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;/<span class="kw">replaceResultRequest</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;/<span class="kw">imsx_POXBody</span>&gt;&lt;/<span class="kw">imsx_POXEnvelopeRequest</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

The URL would then return a response similar to the following:

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs json"><code class="sourceCode json"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">{</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span><span class="dt">&quot;identifier&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span><span class="st">&quot;item1&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span><span class="dt">&quot;sequenceIndex&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span><span class="dv">0</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span><span class="dt">&quot;datestamp&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span><span class="st">&quot;2019-04-09T11:39:57.157Z&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span><span class="dt">&quot;sessionStatus&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span><span class="st">&quot;interacting&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span><span class="dt">&quot;responseVariables&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span><span class="ot">[</span></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="st">&quot;itemVariableType&quot;</span><span class="er">:</span><span class="st">&quot;responseVariable&quot;</span><span class="ot">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span><span class="er">:</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span><span class="ot">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="st">&quot;cardinality&quot;</span><span class="er">:</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span><span class="ot">,</span></span>

<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="st">&quot;correctResponse&quot;</span><span class="er">:</span><span class="dv">5</span><span class="ot">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="st">&quot;candidateResponse&quot;</span><span class="er">:</span><span class="ot">[</span></span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span><span class="fu">{</span></span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="dt">&quot;fieldIdentifier&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span><span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="dt">&quot;base-type&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span><span class="st">&quot;integer&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>

<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="ot">],</span></span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="st">&quot;outcomeVariables&quot;</span><span class="er">:</span><span class="ot">[</span></span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span><span class="fu">{</span></span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="dt">&quot;itemVariableType&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span><span class="st">&quot;templateVariable&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="dt">&quot;identifier&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span><span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="dt">&quot;cardinality&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="dt">&quot;base-type&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="dt">&quot;views&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span><span class="ot">[</span></span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span><span class="st">&quot;author&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="ot">]</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="dt">&quot;interpretation&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span><span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="dt">&quot;longInterpretation&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span><span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="dt">&quot;normalMaximum&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span><span class="fl">1.0</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>

<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span><span class="fu">{</span></span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="dt">&quot;fieldIdentifier&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span><span class="st">&quot;string&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
