<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="dt">&quot;valueString&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span><span class="fu">}</span></span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="ot">]</span></span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span><span class="fu">}</span></span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="ot">],</span></span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="er"> </span> <span class="st">&quot;candidateComment&quot;</span><span class="er">:</span><span class="st">&quot;Too Easy!&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> }</span></span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

So if the Assessment Tool supports only returning a single variable it
returns that in a text field, but if it supports returning a full QTI
Results Reporting records it does so via a URL which can include the
state of multiple outcome and response variables.

For more information see
<https://www.imsglobal.org/sites/default/files/spec/qti/v3/rr-bind/index.html>

</div>

<div id="discovery-by-the-tool-of-the-candidates-to-which-the-item-has-been-administered"
class="section">

##### 6.2.9.6 Discovery by the Tool of the Candidates to which the item has been Administered<a href="#h.fvchfiv2t1qt" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.fvchfiv2t1qt" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

To support this the Assessment Delivery Engine Platform *MAY* implement
the [IMS LTI Names and Roles Provisioning Resource Link Membership
Service](http://www.imsglobal.org/spec/lti-nrps/v2p0#resource-link-membership-service)
(NRPS) which allows the Tool to discover the users who may access the
resourceLink, which is a superset of the users who have had the item
assigned to them. This service supports an optional 'role' query
parameter which can be used to limit the results to the test candidates
only by filtering by the role 'Learner'. If the Platform supports the
NRPS specification then it would add a `namesroleservice` claim to the
LTI launch.

An example `namesroleservice` claim:

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs javascript"><code class="sourceCode javascript"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> <span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/lti-nrps/claim/namesroleservice&quot;</span><span class="op">:</span> {</span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="st">&quot;context_memberships_url&quot;</span><span class="op">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;http://riverrun.assessment.quizzco.com/lti/return/test/session/TestSession108181909/item1/membership&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="st">&quot;service_versions&quot;</span><span class="op">:</span> [<span class="st">&quot;2.0&quot;</span>]</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  }</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

The Tool after launch can then follow the NRPS specification to make a
NRPS Resource Link Membership request by appending a `rlid` query string
parameter to the `context_memberships_url` and optionally a `role` query
parameter. The `rlid` query parameter would be given the value of the
`id` property of the `resource_link` claim.

An example `resource_link` claim:

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs javascript"><code class="sourceCode javascript"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> <span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/lti/claim/resource_link&quot;</span><span class="op">:</span> {</span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="st">&quot;id&quot;</span><span class="op">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;item1&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="st">&quot;description&quot;</span><span class="op">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;Luggage sample choice interaction&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="st">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="op">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;Unattended Luggage&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  }</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

An example NRPS Resource Link Memberships Request:

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs css"><code class="sourceCode css"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> GET  http<span class="in">:</span><span class="er">//riverrun.assessment.quizzco.com/lti/return/test/session/TestSession108181909/item1/membership?rlid=item1∓role=Learner</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> Accept<span class="in">:</span> application/vnd<span class="fu">.ims.lti-nrps.v2.membershipcontainer</span><span class="op">+</span>json</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> Authorization<span class="in">:</span> Bearer {OAuth2 bearer token}</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

An example response:

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs json"><code class="sourceCode json"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> <span class="fu">{</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> <span class="dt">&quot;id&quot;</span> <span class="fu">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;https://lms.example.com/sections/2923/memberships?rlid=49566-rkk96&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> <span class="dt">&quot;context&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span> <span class="fu">{</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="dt">&quot;id&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;2923-abc&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="dt">&quot;label&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;CPS 435&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="dt">&quot;title&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;CPS 435 Learning Analytics&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">},</span></span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="dt">&quot;members&quot;</span> <span class="fu">:</span> <span class="ot">[</span></span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">{</span></span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="dt">&quot;status&quot;</span> <span class="fu">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;Active&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="dt">&quot;name&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;Ms Jane Marie Doe&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="dt">&quot;picture&quot;</span> <span class="fu">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;https://riverrun.edu/jane.jpg&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="dt">&quot;given_name&quot;</span> <span class="fu">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;Jane&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="dt">&quot;family_name&quot;</span> <span class="fu">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;Doe&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="dt">&quot;middle_name&quot;</span> <span class="fu">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;Marie&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="dt">&quot;email&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;jane@riverrun.edu&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="dt">&quot;user_id&quot;</span> <span class="fu">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;320171&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="dt">&quot;lis_person_sourcedid&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;e6a3441a-ee74-4bbc-81f9-f6825a147bd6&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="dt">&quot;roles&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span> <span class="ot">[</span></span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="st">&quot;Learner&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="ot">]</span></span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">}</span><span class="ot">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="fu">{</span></span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="dt">&quot;status&quot;</span> <span class="fu">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;Active&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="dt">&quot;name&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;Bob Dolan&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="dt">&quot;picture&quot;</span> <span class="fu">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;https://riverrun.edu/bobd.jpg&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="dt">&quot;given_name&quot;</span> <span class="fu">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;Bob&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="dt">&quot;family_name&quot;</span> <span class="fu">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;Dolan&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="dt">&quot;email&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;bobd@riverrun.edu&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="dt">&quot;user_id&quot;</span> <span class="fu">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;29571&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="dt">&quot;lis_person_sourcedid&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;1b402312-cc00-475a-b4f4-0a6a404a11e2&quot;</span><span class="fu">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="dt">&quot;roles&quot;</span><span class="fu">:</span> <span class="ot">[</span></span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="st">&quot;Learner&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="ot">]</span></span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   <span class="fu">}</span></span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> <span class="ot">]</span></span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">}</span></span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

<div id="returning-to-the-delivery-engine" class="section">

##### 6.2.9.7 Returning to the Delivery Engine<a href="#h.azf5alopq4qo" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.azf5alopq4qo" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

If the candidate has indicated to the LTI launched item that they have
finished interacting with the item the Tool Provider *MAY* return the
candidate to the delivery engine by redirecting the user's browser to
the URL provided in the `return_url`launch parameter. As defined in the
LTI specification, two standard query string parameters are supported
for this url in a non-error flow, these are:

|         |                                                               |
|---------|---------------------------------------------------------------|
| Param   | Purpose                                                       |
| lti_msg | A human readable message to display to the end user           |
| lti_log | The audience for this parameter is the delivery engine itself |

The format of the `return_url` is determined by the delivery engine. The
Tool should allow for each launch of an item to provide a different
value for the `return_url.`

The delivery engine *MUST* allow for the Tool adding query string
parameters to the URL. The presence of an lti_log or an lti_msg query
string parameter should signal to the delivery engine that the candidate
has finished interacting with the item and it may e.g. navigate to the
next item in a test with linear navigation.

For LTI 1.3 the `return_url` is the value of the "return_url" property
of the "https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/lti/claim/launch_presentation"
claim, e.g.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs javascript"><code class="sourceCode javascript"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/lti/claim/launch_presentation&quot;</span><span class="op">:</span> {</span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="st">&quot;document_target&quot;</span><span class="op">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;iframe&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="st">&quot;height&quot;</span><span class="op">:</span> <span class="dv">720</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="st">&quot;width&quot;</span><span class="op">:</span> <span class="dv">940</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="st">&quot;return_url&quot;</span><span class="op">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;http://riverrun.assessment.quizzco.com/lti/return/test/session/TestSession108181909/item1&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="st">&quot;locale&quot;</span><span class="op">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;en-GB&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  }         </span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                                </span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

For LTI 1.1 the `return_url` is the value of the
`launch_presentation_return_url` launch parameter

</div>

<div id="use-of-custom-parameters" class="section">

##### 6.2.9.8 Use of Custom Parameters<a href="#h.qmvmcffl5fnr" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.qmvmcffl5fnr" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

In QTI while most of the information related to an item is provided in
the qti-assessment-item element some information about the item can be
provided by a test which incorporates this item in a
qti-item-session-control element for example. The item may wish to be
aware of this information and so it would be good practice for the
delivery engine to pass this information to the Tool as custom
parameters. Where a delivery engine does this it is recommended that the
following custom parameters be used.

|                           |                    |                          |
|---------------------------|--------------------|--------------------------|
| QTI Concept               | Attribute/name     | Custom param             |
| Item Session Control      | max-attempts       | max_attempts             |
|                           | show-feedback      | show_feedback            |
|                           | allow-review       | allow_review             |
|                           | show-solution      | show_solution            |
|                           | allow-comment      | allow_comment            |
|                           | allow-skipping     | allow_skipping           |
|                           | validate-responses | validate_responses       |
| Item State                |                    | item_state               |
| Context Variable          | variable1          | context_variable1        |
| Context Variable (record) | variable1/field1   | context_variable1_field1 |

When these custom params are used in an LTI 1.3 launch they would be
properties of the "https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/lti/claim/custom"
claim, e.g.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs javascript"><code class="sourceCode javascript"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/lti/claim/custom&quot;</span><span class="op">:</span> {</span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="st">&quot;xstart&quot;</span><span class="op">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;2017-04-21T01:00:00Z&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="st">&quot;max_attempts&quot;</span><span class="op">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;1&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="st">&quot;show_feedback&quot;</span><span class="op">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;true&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="st">&quot;context_QTI_CONTEXT_environmentIdentifier&quot;</span><span class="op">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;2&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="st">&quot;context_QTI_CONTEXT_testIdentifier&quot;</span><span class="op">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;essay-test&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="st">&quot;item_state&quot;</span><span class="op">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;interacting&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="st">&quot;pci_state&quot;</span><span class="op">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIzMjAxNzEiLCJuYW1lIjoiTXMgSmFuZSBNYXJpZSBEb2UiLCJodHRwczovL3F1aXp6Y28uY29tL3Jlc3BvbnNlcyI6eyJSRVNQT05TRSI6IlRoZSBRdWljIn0sImlhdCI6MTUxNjIzOTAyMn0.V6IV2PM6L63f5MDV-vgYKQlztl5OGIq2kvhLTX-QpRs&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  }<span class="op">,</span>            </span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                                </span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

When these custom params are used in an LTI 1.1 launch they would be
prefixed with `custom_`

The values for Item State which would be expected to be passed would be
the same as for PCI, namely:

- interacting
- suspended
- closed
- solution
- review

When sending the values of context variables they should be serialized
to the JSON format used for QTI variables in the CAT standard and then
serialized to a string in the format used by JSON.stringify().

</div>

<div id="launching-companion-materials" class="section">

##### 6.2.9.9 Launching Companion Materials<a href="#h.anpvby3tj443" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.anpvby3tj443" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

Launching Companion Materials is handled in the same way, i.e. an LTI
resource (i.e. a resource of type `imsbasiclti_xmlv1p3`) is defined in
the manifest with a href attribute. When that URL is used in a
qti-file-href in a qti-digital-material element that indicates that as
the type resource is `imsbasiclti_xmlv1p3` the companion digital
materials should be LTI launched.

The delivery engine may use the same process as used to launch an item,
however as companion materials are not scored and don't need to know the
values set in item session control etc. it has the option to simplify
the launch and omit launch parameters supporting those capabilities.

Example manifest:

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">resource</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;elements&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;imsqti_item_xmlv3p0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;elements.xml&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">imsqti:qtiMetadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">imsqti:timeDependent</span>&gt;false&lt;/<span class="kw">imsqti:timeDependent</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">imsqti:interactionType</span>&gt;choiceInteraction&lt;/<span class="kw">imsqti:interactionType</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">imsqti:feedbackType</span>&gt;none&lt;/<span class="kw">imsqti:feedbackType</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">imsqti:solutionAvailable</span>&gt;true&lt;/<span class="kw">imsqti:solutionAvailable</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">imsqti:qtiMetadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;elements.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">dependency</span> <span class="ot">identifierref=</span><span class="st">&quot;periodicTable&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">resource</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;links/periodicTable.xml&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;imsbasiclti_xmlv1p3&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span>                 identifier=&quot;periodicTable&quot;&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;links/periodicTable.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;links/table.svg&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

Above you can see an item being packaged with a dependant LTI resource
for the LTI launched companion digital materials.

In the item the companion materials are defined as normal:

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">qti-companion-materials-info</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-digital-material</span> <span class="ot">label=</span><span class="st">&quot;The Periodic Table&quot;</span> <span class="ot">mime-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;text/html&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-file-href</span>&gt;links/periodicTable.xml&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-file-href</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-resource-icon</span>&gt;links/table.svg&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-resource-icon</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-digital-material</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-companion-materials-info</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

The only difference is that the href points to
`links/periodicTable.xml` which resolves in the manifest to an LTI
resource rather than a Web Content resource.

The delivery engine may then provide a smaller set of launch parameters
when launching this display only content.

<div id="sample-lti-1-3-jwt-body" class="section">

</div></td>

<div id="sample-lti-1-1-launch-parameters-0" class="section">

###### 6.2.9.9.2 Sample LTI 1.1 Launch Parameters<a href="#h.anpvby3tj443_2" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.anpvby3tj443_2" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs javascript"><code class="sourceCode javascript"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>context_id<span class="op">=</span>TestSession108181909</span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>context_label<span class="op">=</span>ELA102</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>context_type<span class="op">=</span>Grouplaunch_presentation_document_target<span class="op">=</span>iframe</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>launch_presentation_locale<span class="op">=</span>en<span class="op">-</span>GB</span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>launch_presentation_return_url<span class="op">=</span>http<span class="op">:</span><span class="co">//items.example.com/return/test/session/TestSession108181909/elements</span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>lis_course_offering_sourcedid<span class="op">=</span><span class="dv">8</span><span class="er">c4a0faf</span><span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">5</span><span class="er">f41</span><span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">4</span><span class="er">ce9</span><span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">9</span><span class="er">ff3</span><span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">0</span><span class="er">bfcc0f22099</span></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>lis_course_section_sourcedid<span class="op">=</span>febdfccc<span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">31</span><span class="er">ac</span><span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">40</span><span class="er">a6</span><span class="op">-</span>bfc8<span class="op">-</span>d3de79557e02</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>lis_person_sourcedid<span class="op">=</span>e6a3441a<span class="op">-</span>ee74<span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">4</span><span class="er">bbc</span><span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">81</span><span class="er">f9</span><span class="op">-</span>f6825a147bd6</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>lti_message_type<span class="op">=</span>basic<span class="op">-</span>lti<span class="op">-</span>launch<span class="op">-</span>request</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>lti_version<span class="op">=</span>LTI<span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">1</span><span class="er">p0</span></span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>oauth_callback<span class="op">=</span>about<span class="op">:</span>blank</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>oauth_consumer_key<span class="op">=</span>integrationForExampleTool</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>oauth_nonce<span class="op">=</span><span class="dv">1</span><span class="er">ca47e2a94c2b721894b9175462ff2310</span></span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>oauth_signature<span class="op">=</span>js110ghskleAzYT<span class="op">/</span>AQ23IEML1hqia12Z<span class="op">=</span></span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>oauth_signature_method<span class="op">=</span>HMAC<span class="op">-</span>SHA256</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>oauth_timestamp<span class="op">=</span><span class="dv">1551181832</span></span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>oauth_version<span class="op">=</span><span class="fl">1.0</span></span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>resource_link_id<span class="op">=</span>elements</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>resource_link_title<span class="op">=</span>The Periodic Table</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>roles<span class="op">=</span>Learner</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>tool_consumer_info_product_family_code<span class="op">=</span>QuizcoQUIZZES</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>tool_consumer_info_version<span class="op">=</span><span class="fl">9.7.1</span></span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>tool_consumer_instance_contact_email<span class="op">=</span>tool_support@quizzco<span class="op">.</span><span class="at">com</span></span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>tool_consumer_instance_description<span class="op">=</span>Riverrun School District</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>tool_consumer_instance_guid<span class="op">=</span>a9e34b71<span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">2</span><span class="er">d35</span><span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">41</span><span class="er">b9</span><span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">9</span><span class="er">f99</span><span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">4</span><span class="er">aa34fdbc9fa</span></span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>tool_consumer_instance_url<span class="op">=</span>riverrun<span class="op">.</span><span class="at">assessment</span><span class="op">.</span><span class="at">quizco</span><span class="op">.</span><span class="at">com</span></span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>user_id<span class="op">=</span><span class="dv">320171</span></span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

</div>

<div id="launching-custom-interactions" class="section">

##### 6.2.9.10 Launching Custom Interactions<a href="#h.37bnfow3haq6" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.37bnfow3haq6" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

Launching a custom interaction is similar in many respects to launching
an item from a test in that a response is expected. The major difference
is that the response is to the item rather than to a test and consists
of the value of a response variable.

For LTI Advantage the Assignment and Grades Service (AGS) can be used to
return the required data from the custom interaction to the delivery
platform. Where the response variable is not a numeric type then an
extension to the Assignment And Grades Service needs to be added to pass
these values back to the delivery platform. The delivery engine *MAY*
pass an AGS claim (
"https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/lti-ags/claim/endpoint" ) with a
lineitem endpoint which is prepared to accept the outcome of the custom
interaction, e.g.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs javascript"><code class="sourceCode javascript"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/lti-ags/claim/endpoint&quot;</span><span class="op">:</span> {</span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      <span class="st">&quot;scope&quot;</span><span class="op">:</span> [</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          <span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/lti-ags/scope/result.readonly&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          <span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/lti-ags/scope/score&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       ]<span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       <span class="st">&quot;lineitem&quot;</span><span class="op">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;http://riverrun.assessment.quizzco.com/lti/return/test/session/TestSession108181909/item1/results/RESPONSE&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  }</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                                </span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

When the Tool updates the assessment delivery platform with the current
state of the interaction it posts a Score to that lineitem endpoint
following the AGS specification, using an AGS extension to provide
additional details for the response, e.g.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs css"><code class="sourceCode css"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>POST http<span class="in">:</span><span class="er">//riverrun.assessment.quizzco.com/lti/return/test/session/TestSession108181909/item1/results/RESPONSE</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>{</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &quot;timestamp&quot;<span class="ch">:</span> <span class="st">&quot;2021-09-11T23:32:34.917+00:00&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="st">&quot;activityProgress&quot;</span> : <span class="st">&quot;InProgress&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="st">&quot;gradingProgress&quot;</span> : <span class="st">&quot;Pending&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="st">&quot;userId&quot;</span> : <span class="st">&quot;320171&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="st">&quot;scoreMaximum&quot;</span> : <span class="dv">100</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="st">&quot;comment&quot;</span>: <span class="st">&quot;Great work&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/ags/response&quot;</span>: {</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>: <span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="st">&quot;cardinality&quot;</span>: <span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="st">&quot;base-type&quot;</span>: <span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="st">&quot;candidateResponse&quot;</span>: [{<span class="st">&quot;base-type&quot;</span>:<span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span><span class="op">,</span><span class="st">&quot;valueString&quot;</span>:<span class="st">&quot;Isolated&quot;</span>}]<span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &quot;submissionUrl&quot;<span class="in">:</span> &quot;https<span class="in">:</span><span class="er">//www.toolexample.com/lti/score/54/5893/essay.pdf&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  }</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>}                               </span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                                </span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

When Using LTI 1.1 this fits the standard Basic Outcome service contract
only if the response variable is an integer or a float. For any other
base-type an extension such as the ResultData extension discussed above
in the section on launching items would be required.

When launching a custom interaction the delivery engine can provide a
value for `lis_result_sourcedid` which uniquely identifies an item
session and response variable for a candidate so that when the Tool
later makes a Basic Outcomes call the result can be assigned to the
correct response variable in the candidate's correct item session.

As mapping all response values to a numeric value between 0 and 1 would
be very limiting is it recommended that the ResultData extension is
always used with a \<text\> element. The one exception to this is where
the base type is file where a \<url\> element with a self-authenticating
url value may be appropriate.

Example manifest:

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span> <span class="ot">standalone=</span><span class="st">&quot;yes&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!-- Namespace definitions and some manifest metadata omitted for brevity --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">manifest</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;ltiTest&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">schema</span>&gt;QTI Package&lt;/<span class="kw">schema</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">schemaversion</span>&gt;3.0.0&lt;/<span class="kw">schemaversion</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:lom</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:general</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:identifier</span>&gt;&lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:entry</span>&gt;LTITest-01&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:entry</span>&gt;&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:identifier</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:title</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span> <span class="ot">language=</span><span class="st">&quot;en&quot;</span>&gt;Test with LTI custom interactions&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:title</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:language</span>&gt;en&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:language</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:description</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span> <span class="ot">language=</span><span class="st">&quot;en&quot;</span>&gt;Test using LTI launched items&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:description</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:keyword</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span> <span class="ot">language=</span><span class="st">&quot;en&quot;</span>&gt;test&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:keyword</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:keyword</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span> <span class="ot">language=</span><span class="st">&quot;en&quot;</span>&gt;lti&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:keyword</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:general</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:technical</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:format</span>&gt;text/x-imsqti-test-xml&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:format</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:location</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:otherPlatformRequirements</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span> <span class="ot">language=</span><span class="st">&quot;en&quot;</span>&gt;QTIv3.0&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span> <span class="ot">language=</span><span class="st">&quot;en&quot;</span>&gt;LTIv1.1&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:otherPlatformRequirements</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:technical</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:lom</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">organizations</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">resources</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">resource</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;assessment.xml&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;imsqti_test_xmlv3p0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;TEST&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;assessment.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">dependency</span> <span class="ot">identifierref=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti3LTICustomInteraction&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">resource</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti3LTICustomInteraction&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;imsbasiclti_xmlv1p3&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;items/cloudcover.xml&quot;</span> &gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">imsqti:qtiMetadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">imsqti:timeDependent</span>&gt;false&lt;/<span class="kw">imsqti:timeDependent</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-44"><a href="#cb1-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">imsqti:interactionType</span>&gt;customInteraction&lt;/<span class="kw">imsqti:interactionType</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-45"><a href="#cb1-45" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">imsqti:feedbackType</span>&gt;nonadaptive&lt;/<span class="kw">imsqti:feedbackType</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-46"><a href="#cb1-46" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">imsqti:solutionAvailable</span>&gt;false&lt;/<span class="kw">imsqti:solutionAvailable</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-47"><a href="#cb1-47" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">imsqti:qtiMetadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-48"><a href="#cb1-48" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:lom</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-49"><a href="#cb1-49" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:general</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-50"><a href="#cb1-50" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                        &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:description</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-51"><a href="#cb1-51" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                            &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span> <span class="ot">language=</span><span class="st">&quot;en&quot;</span>&gt;This item includes an interaction</span>
<span id="cb1-52"><a href="#cb1-52" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>accessed via an LTI resource link.&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-53"><a href="#cb1-53" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                        &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:description</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-54"><a href="#cb1-54" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:general</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-55"><a href="#cb1-55" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:lom</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-56"><a href="#cb1-56" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-57"><a href="#cb1-57" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;items/cloudcover.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-58"><a href="#cb1-58" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">dependency</span> <span class="ot">identifierref=</span><span class="st">&quot;cloud_cover_981234&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-59"><a href="#cb1-59" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-60"><a href="#cb1-60" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">resource</span> <span class="er"> </span>identifier=&quot;cloud_cover_981234&quot; type=&quot;imsbasiclti_xmlv1p3&quot; href=&quot;items/interactions/cloud_cover_981234.xml&quot;&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-61"><a href="#cb1-61" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;items/interactions/cloud_cover_981234.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-62"><a href="#cb1-62" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt; </span>
<span id="cb1-63"><a href="#cb1-63" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;/<span class="kw">resources</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-64"><a href="#cb1-64" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">manifest</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

Here the LTI resource is added as a dependency of the item (line 59) and
QTI metadata has been added to identify that the item uses a custom
interaction (lines 43-48).

The LTI resource is defined in lines 61-64.

Example LTI resource

<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">cartridge_basiclti_link</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span> xmlns=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imslticc_v1p0&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  xmlns:blti=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsbasiclti_v1p0&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  xmlns:lticm=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imslticm_v1p0&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  xmlns:lticp=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imslticp_v1p0&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  xmlns:xsi=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>xsi:schemaLocation=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imslticc_v1p0</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/lti/ltiv1p0/imslticc_v1p0p1.xsd</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsbasiclti_v1p0</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/lti/ltiv1p0/imsbasiclti_v1p0p1.xsd</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imslticm_v1p0</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/lti/ltiv1p0/imslticm_v1p0.xsd</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imslticp_v1p0</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/lti/ltiv1p0/imslticp_v1p0.xsd&quot;&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">blti:title</span>&gt;Estimating Cloud Cover&lt;/<span class="kw">blti:title</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">blti:description</span>&gt;Custom weather interaction&lt;/<span class="kw">blti:description</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">blti:custom</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">lticm:property</span> <span class="ot">name=</span><span class="st">&quot;interaction_type&quot;</span>&gt;WeatherMapper&lt;/<span class="kw">lticm:property</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">lticm:property</span> <span class="ot">name=</span><span class="st">&quot;data_source&quot;</span>&gt;NOAACloudmap&lt;/<span class="kw">lticm:property</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">lticm:property</span> <span class="ot">name=</span><span class="st">&quot;latitude&quot;</span>&gt;48.119936&lt;/<span class="kw">lticm:property</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">lticm:property</span> <span class="ot">name=</span><span class="st">&quot;longitude&quot;</span>&gt;-124.6419558&lt;/<span class="kw">lticm:property</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">lticm:property</span> <span class="ot">name=</span><span class="st">&quot;diameter&quot;</span>&gt;10000&lt;/<span class="kw">lticm:property</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">blti:custom</span>&gt;  &lt;<span class="kw">blti:extensions</span> <span class="ot">platform=</span><span class="st">&quot;QuizcoQUIZZES&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;<span class="kw">lticm:property</span> <span class="ot">name=</span><span class="st">&quot;ext_outcome_data_values_accepted&quot;</span>&gt;text&lt;/<span class="kw">lticm:property</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;/<span class="kw">blti:extensions</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">blti:launch_url</span>&gt;https://interactions.example.com/provider&lt;/<span class="kw">blti:launch_url</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">blti:secure_launch_url</span>&gt;https://interactions.example.com/provider&lt;/<span class="kw">blti:secure_launch_url</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">blti:vendor</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">lticp:code</span>&gt;IMSRefImpl&lt;/<span class="kw">lticp:code</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">lticp:name</span>&gt;IMS&lt;/<span class="kw">lticp:name</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">blti:vendor</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">cartridge_basiclti_link</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

The LTI resource defines a series of custom parameters to be sent on
launch (lines 18-23).

It identifies that an extension can be used to report additional
resultData in a BasicOutcome response (line 26).

Example QTI item

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0</span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd&quot;</span> <span class="er"> </span>  </span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     identifier=&quot;qti3LTICustomInteraction&quot; title=&quot;Estimation of cloud cover&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     adaptive=&quot;false&quot; time-dependent=&quot;false&quot;&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;RESPONSE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;identifier&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;Isolated&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-correct-response</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-response-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;SCORE&quot;</span> <span class="ot">cardinality=</span><span class="st">&quot;single&quot;</span> <span class="ot">base-type=</span><span class="st">&quot;float&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;0&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-default-value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-outcome-declaration</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;Estimate the cloud coverage by looking at the meteorological satellite</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>photo of the area, estimate each quadrant independently and then average to get an</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>estimate for the whole sky. Finally categorize the level of cloud cover.&lt;/<span class="kw">p</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-rubric-block</span> <span class="ot">use=</span><span class="st">&quot;instructions&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>Use the following table to find the correct category to report.</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">table</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;<span class="kw">tr</span>&gt;&lt;<span class="kw">th</span>&gt;Category&lt;/<span class="kw">th</span>&gt;&lt;<span class="kw">th</span>&gt;Coverage Range&lt;/<span class="kw">th</span>&gt;&lt;/<span class="kw">tr</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">tr</span>&gt;&lt;<span class="kw">td</span>&gt;No Clouds&lt;/<span class="kw">td</span>&gt;&lt;<span class="kw">td</span>&gt;0%&lt;/<span class="kw">td</span>&gt;&lt;/<span class="kw">tr</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">tr</span>&gt;&lt;<span class="kw">td</span>&gt;Few Clouds&lt;/<span class="kw">td</span>&gt;&lt;<span class="kw">td</span>&gt;1-10%&lt;/<span class="kw">td</span>&gt;&lt;/<span class="kw">tr</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">tr</span>&gt;&lt;<span class="kw">td</span>&gt;Isolated Clouds&lt;/<span class="kw">td</span>&gt;&lt;<span class="kw">td</span>&gt;10%-25%&lt;/<span class="kw">td</span>&gt;&lt;/<span class="kw">tr</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">tr</span>&gt;&lt;<span class="kw">td</span>&gt;Scattered Clouds&lt;/<span class="kw">td</span>&gt;&lt;<span class="kw">td</span>&gt;25%-50%&lt;/<span class="kw">td</span>&gt;&lt;/<span class="kw">tr</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">tr</span>&gt;&lt;<span class="kw">td</span>&gt;Broken Clouds&lt;/<span class="kw">td</span>&gt;&lt;<span class="kw">td</span>&gt;50%-90%&lt;/<span class="kw">td</span>&gt;&lt;/<span class="kw">tr</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">tr</span>&gt;&lt;<span class="kw">td</span>&gt;Overcast&lt;/<span class="kw">td</span>&gt;&lt;<span class="kw">td</span>&gt;90%-100%&lt;/<span class="kw">td</span>&gt;&lt;/<span class="kw">tr</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">table</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-rubric-block</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">qti-custom-interaction</span> <span class="ot">class=</span><span class="st">&quot;qti-lti-custom-interaction&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span>                   data-lti-resource=&quot;cloud_cover_981234&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    data-type-identifier=&quot;noaa-weather-map&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                   data-title=&quot;Cloud coverage 4/16/2019&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    data-datetime=&quot;1555416898378&quot; response-identifier=&quot;RESPONSE&quot;&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">label</span>&gt;Cloud Cover Ozette, WA, USA&lt;/<span class="kw">label</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-custom-interaction</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">qti-item-body</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">qti-response-processing</span></span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">template=</span><span class="st">&quot;https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/rptemplates/match_correct.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-44"><a href="#cb1-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">qti-assessment-item</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

A custom interaction is used with a class attribute using the
recommended value of `qti-lti-custom-interaction` to indicate that it is
an LTI Custom Interaction. A recommended data- parameter of
`data-lti-resource` is used to identify the LTI resource to be launched.

This particular custom interaction chooses to add additional data-
attributes and also chooses to have element content.

The delivery engine having seen that the item has a dependency which is
an LTI resource and also seen that there is a qti-custom-interaction
element in the item which has a class with the value
`qti-lti-custom-interaction` (which indicates an LTI launched
interaction) when rendering the custom interaction will LTI launch the
interaction (typically in an iframe) using the details in the LTI
resource XML file referenced in the manifest resource with an identifier
of `cloud_cover_981234`.

It is recommended that when launching the interaction that the delivery
engine also add custom parameters for each of the data- attributes of
the qti-custom-interaction element and if the qti-custom-interaction has
any contained content add a custom parameter called
`qti_interaction_body` containing the Base64 encoded value of a
serialization of the XML DOM of the body of the qti-custom-interaction
element.When adding custom parameters for data- attributes any - in the
data attribute name should be replaced by a \_ and the parameter should
be prefixed with qti_data_attribute.

The response variable that the custom interaction is bound to should be
passed in a custom variable called `qti_response_identifier`.

Remember that at runtime all custom parameters will be prefixed by the
value `custom_` on launch.

Example LTI 1.3 launch parameters:

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<pre class="hljs" aria-busy="false"><code>{
  &quot;iss&quot;: &quot;https://assessment.quizzco.com&quot;,
  &quot;sub&quot;: &quot;918190&quot;,
  &quot;aud&quot;: [&quot;962fa4d8-bcbf-49a0-94b2-2de05ad274af&quot;],

class="sourceCode hljs javascript"><code class="sourceCode javascript"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>context_id<span class="op">=</span>TestSession108181909</span>

<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>lis_course_offering_sourcedid<span class="op">=</span><span class="dv">8</span><span class="er">c4a0faf</span><span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">5</span><span class="er">f41</span><span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">4</span><span class="er">ce9</span><span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">9</span><span class="er">ff3</span><span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">0</span><span class="er">bfcc0f22099</span></span>
