Example Outcomes call

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>POST /test/scores.php HTTP/1.1</span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>Host: items.example.com</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>Accept: */*</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>Authorization: OAuth</span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>oauth_version=&quot;1.0&quot;,oauth_nonce=&quot;6163523d512cd9cfced27974d014e1af&quot;,oauth_timestamp=&quot;1551187820&quot;,</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>oauth_consumer_key=&quot;integrationForExampleTool&quot;,oauth_body_hash=&quot;C%2BGR6heCjtK%2BzN75hQU1Ef0x%2BJw%3D&quot;,</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>oauth_signature_method=&quot;HMAC-SHA256&quot;,oauth_signature=&quot;gvR22%2FEZotvzRjq0wgWCXgU2FJQ%3D&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>Content-Type: application/xml</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>Content-Length: 3215</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version</span> <span class="ot">=</span> <span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding</span> <span class="ot">=</span> <span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">imsx_POXEnvelopeRequest</span> <span class="ot">xmlns</span> <span class="ot">=</span> <span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/services/ltiv1p1/xsd/imsoms_v1p0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;<span class="kw">imsx_POXHeader</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">imsx_POXRequestHeaderInfo</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;<span class="kw">imsx_version</span>&gt;V1.0&lt;/<span class="kw">imsx_version</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;<span class="kw">imsx_messageIdentifier</span>&gt;baga614516&lt;/<span class="kw">imsx_messageIdentifier</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;/<span class="kw">imsx_POXRequestHeaderInfo</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;/<span class="kw">imsx_POXHeader</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;<span class="kw">imsx_POXBody</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;<span class="kw">replaceResultRequest</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;<span class="kw">resultRecord</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;<span class="kw">sourcedGUID</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &lt;<span class="kw">sourcedId</span>&gt;704cc657-c0db-431f-8865-4a569d4d7976&lt;/<span class="kw">sourcedId</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;/<span class="kw">sourcedGUID</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>       &lt;<span class="kw">result</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &lt;<span class="kw">resultScore</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">language</span>&gt;en-US&lt;/<span class="kw">language</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>           &lt;<span class="kw">textString</span>&gt;1&lt;/<span class="kw">textString</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &lt;/<span class="kw">resultScore</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>         &lt;<span class="kw">resultData</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">text</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>{&quot;itemVariableType&quot;:&quot;responseVariable&quot;,&quot;identifier&quot;:&quot;RESPONSE&quot;,&quot;cardinality&quot;:&quot;single&quot;,&quot;base-type&quot;:</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&quot;identifier&quot;,&quot;candidateResponse&quot;:[{&quot;base-type&quot;:&quot;identifier&quot;,&quot;valueString&quot;:&quot;Isolated&quot;}]}</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>             &lt;/<span class="kw">text</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">resultData</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">result</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     &lt;/<span class="kw">resultRecord</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>   &lt;/<span class="kw">replaceResultRequest</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;/<span class="kw">imsx_POXBody</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">imsx_POXEnvelopeRequest</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

The LTI launched custom interaction can indicate to the delivery engine
that the candidate has finished interacting with the item by redirecting
to the URL passed as the `launch_presentation_return_url` launch
parameter with either or both of the query params `lti_msg` or
`lti_log` appended.

</div>

</div>

<div id="package-with-a-portable-custom-interaction-in-an-item"
class="section">

#### 6.2.10 Package with a Portable Custom Interaction in an item<a href="#h.liqeu7e1uj9j" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.liqeu7e1uj9j" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

**[packaging/pci_simple_example.zip](https://github.com/IMSGlobal/qti-examples/blob/master/qtiv3-examples/packaging/pci-simple/pci_simple_example.zip)**

This example takes the portable custom interaction (PCI) example from
section 3.8.3 and shows how it can be packaged.

The main difference from a typical QTI content package is the addition
of the Javascript AMD modules which implement the functionality of the
PCI and any module resolution configuration files.

By default an assessment engine will look for module resolution
configuration files in a directory called modules, and this is also
where the AMD modules implementing the PCI would be placed. 3rd party
modules required by these PCI modules might be placed in the modules
directory or in a sub-directory e.g. modules/lib.

For this particular example there is a single small Javascript AMD
module which doesn't depend on any other AMD modules. As a result, this
module is included solely in the package and is not also CDN hosted. So
only a primary configuration is required, which will be provided in
modules/module_resolution.js.

The PCI module is provided in modules/tap.js

One item is included (measuring_ph.xml) which uses three images
(ammonia.svg, baking_soda.svg, vinegar.svg).

See below for the imsmanifest.xml file for this package.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre

For a more complex example which includes multiple items, multiple PCIs,
module resolution configuration files etc. see
[packaging/pci_item_examples.zip](https://github.com/IMSGlobal/qti-examples/blob/master/qtiv3-examples/packaging/pci/pci_item_examples.zip)

</div>

<div id="bbqs-test-package" class="section">

#### 6.2.11 BBQs test package<a href="#h.m8llqbraltm4" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.m8llqbraltm4" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

[packaging/BBQsTest/BBQsTest.zip](https://github.com/IMSGlobal/qti-examples/blob/master/qtiv3-examples/packaging/BBQsTest/BBQsTest.zip)

A package with a wide, but representative, set of items from UK Higher
Education. The set exemplifies the union of most commonly used
interaction types in that sector, regardless of tool or format. There
are some items that make use of math extensions.

</div>

<div id="english-exercises" class="section">

#### 6.2.12 English exercises<a href="#h.j5n2teitk8ou" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.j5n2teitk8ou" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

[packaging/englishBasicLevelV2/englishBasicLevelV2.zip](https://github.com/IMSGlobal/qti-examples/blob/master/qtiv3-examples/packaging/englishBasicLevelV2/englishBasicLevelV2.zip)

A representative set of commonly used question types, geared for
language learning. Partially in German.

</div>

<div id="english-exercises-ii" class="section">

#### 6.2.13 English exercises II<a href="#h.pkkel7k03wel" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.pkkel7k03wel" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

[packaging/englishHighLevelV2/englishHighLevelV2.zip](https://github.com/IMSGlobal/qti-examples/blob/master/qtiv3-examples/packaging/englishHighLevelV2/englishHighLevelV2.zip)

A more advanced language learning test that demonstrates the use of
[qti-rubric-block](http://www.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/info/index.html#RootAttribute_AssessmentSection_qti-rubric-block)
 to provide a stimulus and
[qti-extended-text-interaction](http://www.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/info/index.html#AbstractAttribute_BlockGroup_qti-extended-text-interaction)
 for reading comprehension.  Note that as of QTI 2.2,
qti-assessment-stimulus is the preferred method to provide stimulus
material especially when the stimulus is to be shared by multiple items.

</div>

<div id="example-packaging-for-a-cat-engine" class="section">

#### 6.2.14 Example packaging for a CAT engine<a href="#h.e1cernu2jvwg" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.e1cernu2jvwg" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

[samples/CAT_Test01_Adaptive_EchoAdapt/CAT_Test01_Adaptive_EchoAdapt.zip](https://github.com/IMSGlobal/QTI-SPEC-ComputerAdaptiveTesting/blob/master/samples/CAT_Test01_Adaptive_EchoAdapt/CAT_Test01_Adaptive_EchoAdapt.zip)

Computer Adaptive Testing (CAT) allows for an assessment delivery engine
to interoperate with an Adaptive Test Engine to allow for Adaptive Item
Selection, where an external adaptive algorithm is used to select items
from the section. This extension is detailed in the IMS CAT Standard
\[<a href="#bib-cat-10" class="bibref" data-link-type="biblio"
title="IMS Global Computer Adaptive Testing v1">CAT-10</a>\].

</div>

</div>

<div id="external-qti-metadata" class="section">

### 6.3 External QTI Metadata<a href="#h.jth8sv72c02q" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.jth8sv72c02q" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

[packaging/externalMetadata/externalMetadata.zip](https://github.com/IMSGlobal/qti-examples/blob/master/qtiv3-examples/packaging/externalMetadata/externalMetadata.zip)

In QTI v2.2 and prior, resource metadata was only embedded within the
package manifest itself, i.e. part of the manifest XML. APIP and QTI
v3.0 allows for resource-specific metadata to also be contained within
its own XML instance file as an alternative to the current manifest
embedded approach. Both methods are now allowed; however, it is
recommended that only one of the approaches be used for any one
resource. In the example below, a dependency on the new Item metadata
instance has been added to the Item resource (line 0006);

For example in this content package each item has associated IMS LOM,
QTI Metadata and Curriculum Standards Metadata/CASE metadata. In total
that is about 3Kb of metadata per item, but the metadata only differs by
the learning standards the items are aligned to. Multiple items align to
the same learning standard and externalizing the metadata makes it
possible to share that metadata rather than repeating it for each item.

Some implementers also find that generating pairs of files (e.g. XML of
item, XML of item metadata) which are transported together is an easier
way to manage item content than having the metadata for several items in
the same manifest.

This is achieved by packaging the metadata in a separate file and
creating a resource of type `resourcemetadata/xml`which is added as a
dependency on the items that metadata is being associated with.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">manifest</span> <span class="er">...</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">resources</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">resource</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;res_-TX_G06SAMP_000&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;testitems/-TX_G06SAMP_000.xml&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;imsqti_test_xmlv3p0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;testitems/-TX_G06SAMP_000.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">dependency</span> <span class="ot">identifierref=</span><span class="st">&quot;res_-TX_G06SAMP_001&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">dependency</span> <span class="ot">identifierref=</span><span class="st">&quot;res_-TX_G06SAMP_004&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">dependency</span> <span class="ot">identifierref=</span><span class="st">&quot;res_-TX_G06SAMP_005&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">resource</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;res_-TX_G06SAMP_001&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;testitems/-TX_G06SAMP_001.xml&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;imsqti_item_xmlv3p0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;testitems/-TX_G06SAMP_001.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">dependency</span> <span class="ot">identifierref=</span><span class="st">&quot;metadata_6abfaa45-644b-52e8-891e-4fa4045a6c69&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">resource</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;res_-TX_G06SAMP_004&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;testitems/-TX_G06SAMP_004.xml&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;imsqti_item_xmlv3p0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;testitems/-TX_G06SAMP_004.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">dependency</span> <span class="ot">identifierref=</span><span class="st">&quot;metadata_6abfaa45-644b-52e8-891e-4fa4045a6c69&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">resource</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;res_-TX_G06SAMP_005&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;testitems/-TX_G06SAMP_005.xml&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;imsqti_item_xmlv3p0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;testitems/-TX_G06SAMP_005.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">dependency</span> <span class="ot">identifierref=</span><span class="st">&quot;metadata_747eee11-848c-597a-8c9c-a71c5399798d&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">resource</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;metadata_747eee11-848c-597a-8c9c-a71c5399798d&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;testitems/metadata_747eee11-848c-597a-8c9c-a71c5399798d.xml&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;resourcemetadata/xml&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;testitems/metadata_747eee11-848c-597a-8c9c-a71c5399798d.xml&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">resource</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;metadata_6abfaa45-644b-52e8-891e-4fa4045a6c69&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;testitems/metadata_6abfaa45-644b-52e8-891e-4fa4045a6c69.xml&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;resourcemetadata/xml&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;testitems/metadata_6abfaa45-644b-52e8-891e-4fa4045a6c69.xml&quot;</span> /&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">resources</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">manifest</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

The external metadata file consists on the LOM metadata. One difference
from how the metadata would normally be packaged is that the QTI and
CASE/Curriculum Standards Metadata is added to an extension point in the
LOM lom element.

E.g.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">lom</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://ltsc.ieee.org/xsd/LOM&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span>    xmlns:csm=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/qti/qtiv3p0/imscsmd_v1p1&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     xmlns:imsqti=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqti_metadata_v3p0&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     xmlns:xsi=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     xsi:schemaLocation=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqtiasi_v3p0</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_asiv3p0p1_v1p0.xsd</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>http://ltsc.ieee.org/xsd/LOM</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/md/v1p3/schema/xsd/imsmd_loose_v1p3p2.xsd</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/qti/qtiv3p0/imscp_v1p1</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqtiv3p0_imscpv1p2_v1p0.xsd</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/qti/qtiv3p0/imscsmd_v1p1</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqtiv3p0_csmv1p1_v1p0.xsd</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqti_metadata_v3p0</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_metadatav3p0_v1p0.xsd&quot;&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">educational</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">intendedEndUserRole</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">source</span>&gt;IMSGLC_CC_Rolesv1p3&lt;/<span class="kw">source</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">value</span>&gt;Learner&lt;/<span class="kw">value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">intendedEndUserRole</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">typicalAgeRange</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">string</span>&gt;10,11&lt;/<span class="kw">string</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">typicalAgeRange</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">educational</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">lifeCycle</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">version</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">string</span> <span class="ot">language=</span><span class="st">&quot;en&quot;</span>&gt;Published&lt;/<span class="kw">string</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">version</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">lifeCycle</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">classification</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">purpose</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">source</span>&gt;LOMv1.0&lt;/<span class="kw">source</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">value</span>&gt;Discipline&lt;/<span class="kw">value</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">purpose</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">taxonPath</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-36"><a href="#cb1-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">source</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">string</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en&quot;</span>&gt;jacs&lt;/<span class="kw">string</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">source</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">taxon</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">id</span>&gt;G1&lt;/<span class="kw">id</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">entry</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">string</span> <span class="ot">xml:lang=</span><span class="st">&quot;en&quot;</span>&gt;Mathematics&lt;/<span class="kw">string</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-43"><a href="#cb1-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">entry</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-44"><a href="#cb1-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">taxon</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-45"><a href="#cb1-45" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">taxonPath</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-46"><a href="#cb1-46" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">classification</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-47"><a href="#cb1-47" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">imsqti:qtiMetadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-48"><a href="#cb1-48" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">imsqti:itemTemplate</span>&gt;false&lt;/<span class="kw">imsqti:itemTemplate</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-49"><a href="#cb1-49" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">imsqti:composite</span>&gt;false&lt;/<span class="kw">imsqti:composite</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-50"><a href="#cb1-50" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">imsqti:interactionType</span>&gt;choiceInteraction&lt;/<span class="kw">imsqti:interactionType</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-51"><a href="#cb1-51" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">imsqti:feedbackType</span>&gt;nonadaptive&lt;/<span class="kw">imsqti:feedbackType</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-52"><a href="#cb1-52" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">imsqti:qtiMetadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-53"><a href="#cb1-53" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">csm:curriculumStandardsMetadataSet</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-54"><a href="#cb1-54" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">csm:curriculumStandardsMetadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-55"><a href="#cb1-55" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">csm:setOfGUIDs</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-56"><a href="#cb1-56" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">csm:labelledGUID</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-57"><a href="#cb1-57" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">csm:label</span>&gt;identify a number, its opposite, and its</span>
<span id="cb1-58"><a href="#cb1-58" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>absolute value;&lt;/<span class="kw">csm:label</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-59"><a href="#cb1-59" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">csm:caseItemURI</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-60"><a href="#cb1-60" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>https://teks-api.texasgateway.org/ims/case/v1p0/CFItems/</span>
<span id="cb1-61"><a href="#cb1-61" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>747eee11-848c-597a-8c9c-a71c5399798d&lt;/<span class="kw">csm:caseItemURI</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-62"><a href="#cb1-62" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">csm:GUID</span>&gt;747eee11-848c-597a-8c9c-a71c5399798d&lt;/<span class="kw">csm:GUID</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-63"><a href="#cb1-63" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">csm:labelledGUID</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-64"><a href="#cb1-64" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">csm:setOfGUIDs</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-65"><a href="#cb1-65" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">csm:curriculumStandardsMetadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-66"><a href="#cb1-66" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">csm:curriculumStandardsMetadataSet</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-67"><a href="#cb1-67" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">lom</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

As well as packaging IMS LOM metadata a similar process is allowed where
non-IMS metadata can be provided in external files as above, with the
one difference that the resource type used should be
`resourceextmetadata/xml`.

</div>

<div id="case-metadata" class="section">

### 6.4 CASE Metadata<a href="#h.efymfq62blg8" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.efymfq62blg8" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

**Example of packaging assessment resources with CASE identifiers**

**[packaging/CASEWithOutcome/CASEWithOutcome.zip](https://github.com/IMSGlobal/qti-examples/blob/master/qtiv3-examples/packaging/CASEWithOutcome/CASEWithOutcome.zip)**

IMS CASE (Competencies and Academic Standards Exchange)
\[<a href="#bib-case-10" class="bibref" data-link-type="biblio"
title="IMS Competencies and Academic Standards Exchange (CASE) Service Version 1.0">CASE-10</a>\]
is used to exchange information about learning standards and education
competencies. CASE identifiers can be applied to resources in an IMS
Content Package to provide an interoperable way to exchange information
on an education competency associated with an outcome variable such as a
score.

It does this by extending the IMS Curriculum Standards Metadata as used
by QTI since version 2.2, and by IMS Common Cartridge.

See below for an example of packaging an outcome declaration as a
separate resource so that it can have curriculum standards metadata,
which include CASE identifiers, attached.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">imscp:manifest</span> <span class="ot">xmlns:imscp=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/qti/qtiv3p0/imscp_v1p1&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="er"> </span>               xmlns:imsmd=&quot;http://ltsc.ieee.org/xsd/LOM&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                xmlns:csmd=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/qti/qtiv3p0/imscsmd_v1p1&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                xmlns:xsi=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>xmlns=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/qti/qtiv3p0/imscp_v1p1&quot;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                xsi:schemaLocation=&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqti_metadata_v3p0</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqti_metadatav3p0_v1p0.xsd</span>

<span id="cb1-31"><a href="#cb1-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                            &lt;<span class="kw">csmd:label</span>&gt;GUID for a top-level Learning Standard Item definition</span>
<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>addressed by this Outcome variable.&lt;/<span class="kw">csmd:label</span>&gt;</span>

<span id="cb1-35"><a href="#cb1-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                        &lt;/<span class="kw">csmd:labelledGUID</span>&gt;</span>

<span id="cb1-38"><a href="#cb1-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                        <span class="co">&lt;!-- UUID v4.0 used in the Florida examples --&gt;</span></span>

<span id="cb1-54"><a href="#cb1-54" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:lom</span>&gt;</span>

<span id="cb1-56"><a href="#cb1-56" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:title</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-57"><a href="#cb1-57" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                        &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span>&gt;Mapping between an Outcome variable for a test and the CSM&lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-58"><a href="#cb1-58" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:title</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-59"><a href="#cb1-59" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:general</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-60"><a href="#cb1-60" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">imsmd:lom</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-61"><a href="#cb1-61" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">imscp:metadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-62"><a href="#cb1-62" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">imscp:file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;testoutcome01.xml&quot;</span>&gt;&lt;/<span class="kw">imscp:file</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-63"><a href="#cb1-63" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">imscp:resource</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

Here an outcome declaration (indicated by the resource having a type of
imsqti_outcomes_xmlv3p0) with an identifier of Outcome_01 has curriculum
standards metadata added (as defined by the namespace
`http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/qti/qtiv3p0/imscsmd_v1p1` , here bound to
the prefix csmd).

That curriculumStandardsMetadataSet has a single
curriculumStandardsMetadata child as it provides entries from a single
CASE Registry which has a CASE Registry ProviderId of IMS_CASE_REGISTER.

This registry provides mappings for two regions, Texas and Florida and
so provides two setOfGUIDs elements, one for each. The outcome variable
happens to align to two learning standards, and so each setOfGUIDs
element has two labelledGUID children.

CASE items typically have both a resolvable URI and a UUID as
identifiers, these are provided via the caseItemURI and GUID elements,
and a human readable label, provided by the label element.

This example package also demonstrates how to associate CASE identifiers
to an item used in a test, see below for one such resource in the
manifest.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">imscp:resource</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;A_403910368&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;imsqti_item_xmlv3p0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;A_403910368.xml&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co">&lt;!-- 2019-03-12 : Item aligned to CSM added. --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">imscp:metadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">csmd:curriculumStandardsMetadataSet</span> <span class="ot">resourceLabel=</span><span class="st">&quot;Item (QTI 3.0)&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">resourcePartId=</span><span class="st">&quot;A_403910368&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">csmd:curriculumStandardsMetadata</span> <span class="ot">providerId=</span><span class="st">&quot;IMS_CASE_REGISTER&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">csmd:setOfGUIDs</span> <span class="ot">region=</span><span class="st">&quot;Texas&quot;</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    <span class="co">&lt;!-- UUID v1.0 used in the Texas examples --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">csmd:labelledGUID</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                        &lt;<span class="kw">csmd:label</span>&gt;GUID for a Learning Standard Item definition addressed by</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>this item.&lt;/<span class="kw">csmd:label</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">csmd:caseItemURI</span>&gt;http://www.imsglobal.org/caseregistry/a3d6bbda-44b0-11e9-b210-d663bd873d93</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">csmd:caseItemURI</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                        &lt;<span class="kw">csmd:GUID</span>&gt;a3d6bbda-44b0-11e9-b210-d663bd873d93&lt;/<span class="kw">csmd:GUID</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;/<span class="kw">csmd:labelledGUID</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">csmd:labelledGUID</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                        &lt;<span class="kw">csmd:label</span>&gt;GUID for a Learning Standard Item definition addressed by</span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>this item.&lt;/<span class="kw">csmd:label</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">csmd:caseItemURI</span>&gt;http://www.imsglobal.org/caseregistry/b1ffaba4-44b0-11e9-b210-d663bd873d93</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">csmd:caseItemURI</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                        &lt;<span class="kw">csmd:GUID</span>&gt;b1ffaba4-44b0-11e9-b210-d663bd873d93&lt;/<span class="kw">csmd:GUID</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;/<span class="kw">csmd:labelledGUID</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">csmd:setOfGUIDs</span>&gt;</span>

<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    <span class="co">&lt;!-- UUID v4.0 used in the Florida examples --&gt;</span></span>

<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>this item.&lt;/<span class="kw">csmd:label</span>&gt;</span>

<span id="cb1-32"><a href="#cb1-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;/<span class="kw">csmd:labelledGUID</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-33"><a href="#cb1-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">csmd:labelledGUID</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-34"><a href="#cb1-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                        &lt;<span class="kw">csmd:label</span>&gt;GUID for a Learning Standard Item definition addressed by</span>

<span id="cb1-37"><a href="#cb1-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">csmd:caseItemURI</span>&gt;</span>

<span id="cb1-39"><a href="#cb1-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;/<span class="kw">csmd:labelledGUID</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-40"><a href="#cb1-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">csmd:setOfGUIDs</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-41"><a href="#cb1-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">csmd:curriculumStandardsMetadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-42"><a href="#cb1-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">csmd:curriculumStandardsMetadataSet</span>&gt;</span>

<span id="cb1-45"><a href="#cb1-45" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:title</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-46"><a href="#cb1-46" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                    &lt;<span class="kw">imsmd:string</span>&gt;Item Using Curriculum Metadata Standards</span>

<span id="cb1-52"><a href="#cb1-52" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            <span class="co">&lt;!-- *************************************** --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-53"><a href="#cb1-53" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">imscp:file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;A_403910368.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-54"><a href="#cb1-54" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">imscp:resource</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

This follows the same pattern as in the outcome declaration, except that
the resourcePartId attribute on the curriculumStandardsMetadataSet
element is given the same value as the identifier attribute on the
resource element.

</div>

<div id="usage-data-item-statistics" class="section">

### 6.5 Usage Data (Item Statistics)<a href="#h.a9ffsrc99sm7" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.a9ffsrc99sm7" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

QTI has a standardized format for exchanging the item statistics
generated from collecting results from an assessment (or assessments),
with a specific reference to the context of the data.

**Example Item Statistics**

The following example demonstrates the construction of a usage-data
file. When distributing usage data within a content package the
usage-data should be stored in a separate file within the package and
referred to in the manifest file by an appropriate cp:resource element.
Note that references to the assessment items and other objects within
the usage-data file itself are not considered to be dependencies of the
resource. The resource type for usage-data files is
imsqti_usagedata_xmlv3p0.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="fu">&lt;?xml</span> <span class="ot">version=</span><span class="st">&quot;1.0&quot;</span> <span class="ot">encoding=</span><span class="st">&quot;UTF-8&quot;</span><span class="fu">?&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">usageData</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/imsqti_usagedata_v3p0&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span> </span>

For more information on QTI Usage Data, see the [QTI Usage Data & Item
Statistics Specification Version
3.0](https://www.imsglobal.org/sites/default/files/spec/qti/v3/ud-bind/index.html)

</div>

<div id="packaging-variants" class="section">

### 6.6 Packaging Variants<a href="#h.v1jpsaesk9e6" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.v1jpsaesk9e6" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

There are occasions when tests or item banks need to include variants of
the assessment content in a content package. In QTI, a variant is a
different version of what is essentially equivalent content (the same
item) but in a different representation. The most common use of a
variant is a language variant, where there are one or more language
variants of the original item. The advantage to using a variant is that
the content can have its own complete set of accessibility,
accommodation supports, images (with labels), and media in the language
of the variant.

For alternate language variants, there are two major implementations of
delivery when using the variants. In the first use case, delivery
systems determine the preferred language (variant) of the candidate,
then present only the requested variant content during the assessment
session. In the second use case, the delivery system presents the
variant requested, as well as the original language variant of the item,
and allows the candidate to switch back and forth between the two
language variants during the assessment session. In the second use case,
there is considerably more difficulty in maintaining the response data
between the variants, as well as additional difficulty scoring the
responses.

In the QTI 3 package, specify the variants by declaring the
relationships in the manifest XML file. In the 'resource' element for a
given item, add a 'variant' element with an 'identifierref' attribute
value set to the identifier of a variant item resource. For example, if
an item resource with an identifier of 'item-es' is the Spanish-language
variant of item resource 'item-en', the manifest resources XML should
contain the following:

**Example of manifest fragment demonstrating variants.**

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">manifest</span> <span class="ot">xmlns=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/qti/qtiv3p0/imscp_v1p1&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns:cpx=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/qti/qtiv3p0/imscp_extensionv1p2&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns:drd=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/qti/qtiv3p0/imsafa3p0drd_v1p0&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns:imsmd=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://ltsc.ieee.org/xsd/LOM&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xmlns:xsi=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance&quot;</span> </span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ot">xsi:schemaLocation=</span><span class="st">&quot;http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/qti/qtiv3p0/imscp_v1p1</span></span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">  https://purl.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/schema/xsd/imsqtiv3p0_imscpv1p2_v1p0.xsd</span></span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="st">  http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/qti/qtiv3p0/imscp_extensionv1p2</span></span>

</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

The variant item will have a different identifier, so if that item is
referenced by a test then that test can in turn define a Spanish
language variant which references the Spanish version of the item.

In the above example for candidates who's PNP indicates that they should
be presented the Spanish version of the test and item.The item's results
will be reported using the identifier "item-es".

In the event that the content has two simultaneous written languages of
the same content (sometimes referred to as "stacked" translations), both
languages should be listed as the languageOfAdaption. This is the
recommended approach for the exchange of this type of content.

<span id="cb1-76"><a href="#cb1-76" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;<span class="kw">taxonPath</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-77"><a href="#cb1-77" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">source</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-78"><a href="#cb1-78" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">string</span>&gt;maxScore&lt;/<span class="kw">string</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-79"><a href="#cb1-79" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;/<span class="kw">source</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-80"><a href="#cb1-80" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">taxon</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-81"><a href="#cb1-81" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;<span class="kw">entry</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-82"><a href="#cb1-82" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  &lt;<span class="kw">string</span>&gt;1&lt;/<span class="kw">string</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-83"><a href="#cb1-83" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                &lt;/<span class="kw">entry</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-84"><a href="#cb1-84" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;/<span class="kw">taxon</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-85"><a href="#cb1-85" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>            &lt;/<span class="kw">taxonPath</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-86"><a href="#cb1-86" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">classification</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-87"><a href="#cb1-87" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">lom</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-88"><a href="#cb1-88" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">metadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-89"><a href="#cb1-89" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;Items/item-JL519280/v1/JL519280.E2.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-90"><a href="#cb1-90" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-91"><a href="#cb1-91" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  &lt;/<span class="kw">resources</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-92"><a href="#cb1-92" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;/<span class="kw">manifest</span>&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

There is also a use case for the state of California in the United
States for "stacked Spanish" content. The exchanged content lists the
content as using Spanish (es) as the languageOfAdaption and they use
prefixes in the identifier and corresponding identifier ref where the
prefix "os" identifies the Spanish only variant, and the prefix "es"
represents the "Stacked Spanish" variant. Note this approach should only
be used in the specific context of exchanging content for the state of
California or SmarterBalanced QTI 3 Profiled content. All other stacked
content should use the above "recommended" approach.

The California Stacked Spanish approach (partial manifest shown below)

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 100%" />
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="qti_code_example"><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb1" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">manifest</span> <span class="er">...</span>  identifier=&quot;stackedSpanish&quot;&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!-- This is a partial example. Missing information for a complete package</span></span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">    is indicated using elipses . . . --&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>. . .</span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;<span class="kw">resources</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;<span class="kw">resource</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;item-1402&quot;</span> <span class="ot">type=</span><span class="st">&quot;imsqti_item_xmlv3p0&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">file</span> <span class="ot">href=</span><span class="st">&quot;sbac/item_1402.xml&quot;</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!--The stacked Spanish variant--&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">cpx:variant</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;itemVariantRelationship-es-sbac-200-1402&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifierref=</span><span class="st">&quot;es-sbac-200-1402&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">cpx:metadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-12"><a href="#cb1-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">drd:accessForAllResource</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-13"><a href="#cb1-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">languageOfAdaptation</span>&gt;es&lt;/<span class="kw">languageOfAdaptation</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-14"><a href="#cb1-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">drd:accessForAllResource</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-15"><a href="#cb1-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">cpx:metadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-16"><a href="#cb1-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">cpx:variant</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-17"><a href="#cb1-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">&lt;!--The Spanish Only Variant--&gt;</span></span>
<span id="cb1-18"><a href="#cb1-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;<span class="kw">cpx:variant</span> <span class="ot">identifier=</span><span class="st">&quot;itemVariantRelationship-os-sbac-200-1402&quot;</span> <span class="ot">identifierref=</span><span class="st">&quot;os-sbac-200-1402&quot;</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-19"><a href="#cb1-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;<span class="kw">cpx:metadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-20"><a href="#cb1-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;<span class="kw">drd:accessForAllResource</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-21"><a href="#cb1-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>              &lt;<span class="kw">languageOfAdaptation</span>&gt;es&lt;/<span class="kw">languageOfAdaptation</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-22"><a href="#cb1-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          &lt;/<span class="kw">drd:accessForAllResource</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-23"><a href="#cb1-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        &lt;/<span class="kw">cpx:metadata</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-24"><a href="#cb1-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>      &lt;/<span class="kw">cpx:variant</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-25"><a href="#cb1-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    &lt;/<span class="kw">resource</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-26"><a href="#cb1-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     </span>
<span id="cb1-27"><a href="#cb1-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     ...</span>
<span id="cb1-28"><a href="#cb1-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> &lt;/<span class="kw">resources</span>&gt;</span>
<span id="cb1-29"><a href="#cb1-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb1-30"><a href="#cb1-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>. . .</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>

<div id="security-considerations" class="section">

### 6.7 Security Considerations<a href="#h.nc0z5afcuh5p" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.nc0z5afcuh5p" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

The processes described in this section generally describe the exchange
of XML files between parties. There are some security considerations in
doing so that implementers should consider:

- **XML External Entity (XXE) Attacks.**A specially constructed XML file
  containing an XML External Entity may result in injection of XML,
  resulting in disclosure of confidential data, denial of service,
  Server Side Request Forgery, port scanning from the perspective of the
  XML-parsing system, and other system impacts.   Systems which import
  QTI and related XML documents should validate XML document instances
  against the QTI and other applicable XML schemas to ensure the
  validity of those document instances. However care should be taken to
  follow the guidance given in
  <https://www.owasp.org/index.php/XML_External_Entity_(XXE)_Processing>
   to ensure that the system is protected from attacks in specially
  crafted XML document instances against XML parsers.
- **Server Side Request Forgery (SSRF) Attacks.**QTI allows for content
  to be included via an external location, which might be used to
  trigger a Server Side Request Forgery attack if the location of the
  include is not validated.There is an introduction to security
  considerations in processing XML documents available from OWASP at
  <https://www.owasp.org/index.php/XML_Security_Cheat_Sheet>

There are more detailed discussions of many of these issues at
<https://www.mitre.org/sites/default/files/pdf/13_2445.pdf>

- **Path Traversal**Content packages may contain many files which
  include relative paths to other resources in the package, including
  but not limited to the manifest file, AssessmentTest,
  AssessmentStimulus, AssessmentItem files. Implementers should take
  care in handling relative paths to ensure that a malicious content
  package can not execute a Path Traversal attack and manage to
  reference files outside of the package content. See [OWASP Path
  Traversal](https://www.owasp.org/index.php/Path_Traversal)  for more
  details.

</div>

</div>

<div id="the-qti-3-profile-of-afa-3-0-features"
class="section appendix">

## A. The QTI 3 Profile of Personal Needs and Preferences 3.0 Features<a href="#h.ta6wjs30wqir" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.ta6wjs30wqir" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

The table below details all the supports/features used in the QTI 3
profile of Personal Needs and Preferences 3.0, and any of the listed
supports can be included in a candidate PNP. The list of predefined
supports that are permitted in AssessmentItem content follows the table
below.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 50%" />
<col style="width: 50%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th><strong>Support/Feature</strong></th>
<th><strong>Modifier Statements</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>activate-as-option-set</strong></td>
<td>[0..*] #name-of-support#*</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>activate-at-initiation-set</strong></td>
<td>[0..*] #name-of-support#*</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>additional-directions</strong></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>additional-testing-time</strong></td>
<td><div class="example">
<pre aria-busy="false"><code>time-multiplier:
fixed-minutes:
unlimited
Must pick only one. If time-multiplier or fixed-minutes, must give data.</code></pre>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>alternative-text</strong></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>answer-masking</strong></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>audio-description</strong></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>braille</strong></td>
<td><div class="example">
<pre aria-busy="false"><code>delivery-mode
[0..2]
:
refreshable,
embossed
grade:
[0..1] 1,
2
, 3
braille-type:
[0..1]ebae, ueb, ext:#any-text#
math-type:
[0..1] nemeth, ueb, ext:#any-text#
lang attribute*
[0..1]BCP 47</code></pre>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>calculator-on-screen</strong></td>
<td><code>Optional attribute of</code> <code>calculator-type</code>
<code> (basic, standard, scientific, graphing)</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>captions</strong></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>dictionary-on-screen</strong></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>

<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>

<pre class="hljs" aria-busy="false"><code>description:
#human readable text#
medical:
#human readable text#
software:
 #human readable text#
hardware:
 #human readable text#
breaks:

</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>glossary-on-screen</strong></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>hazard-avoidance</strong></td>
<td><div class="example">
<pre class="hljs" aria-busy="false"><code>flashing
motion-simulation</code></pre>
</div></td>
</tr>

<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>

<td></td>

full-mouse-control</code></pre>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>

</tr>

<tr>

</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>keyword-translation</strong></td>
<td><code>lang attribute*</code> <code>BCP 47</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>language-of-interface</strong></td>
<td></td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td><strong>magnification</strong></td>
<td><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb6" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs css"><code class="sourceCode css"><span id="cb6-1"><a href="#cb6-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>text</span>
<span id="cb6-2"><a href="#cb6-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>Optional attribute</span>
<span id="cb6-3"><a href="#cb6-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> zoom-amount</span>
<span id="cb6-4"><a href="#cb6-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> <span class="in">(</span>value is a number as multiplier<span class="op">,</span> i<span class="fu">.e</span>. 1<span class="fu">.5</span><span class="in">)</span></span>
<span id="cb6-5"><a href="#cb6-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>non-text</span>
<span id="cb6-6"><a href="#cb6-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>Optional attribute</span>
<span id="cb6-7"><a href="#cb6-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> zoom-amount</span>
<span id="cb6-8"><a href="#cb6-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> <span class="in">(</span>value is a number as multiplier<span class="op">,</span> i<span class="fu">.e</span>. 1<span class="fu">.5</span><span class="in">)</span></span>
<span id="cb6-9"><a href="#cb6-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>all-content</span>
<span id="cb6-10"><a href="#cb6-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>Optional attribute</span>
<span id="cb6-11"><a href="#cb6-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> zoom-amount</span>
<span id="cb6-12"><a href="#cb6-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> <span class="in">(</span>value is a number as multiplier<span class="op">,</span> i<span class="fu">.e</span>. 1<span class="fu">.5</span><span class="in">)</span></span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>note-taking-on-screen</strong></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>outliner-on-screen</strong></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>

<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>prohibit-set</strong></td>
<td>[0..*] #name-of-support#*</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>sign-language</strong></td>
<td><code>lang attribute*</code> <code>:BCP 47</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>simplified-language-portions</strong></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>simplified-graphics</strong></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>spell-checker</strong></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>spoken</strong></td>
<td><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb7" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs css"><code class="sourceCode css"><span id="cb7-1"><a href="#cb7-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>reading-type<span class="op">*</span></span>
<span id="cb7-2"><a href="#cb7-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="in">:</span> <span class="ex">[</span><span class="ss">1</span><span class="ex">]</span> </span>
<span id="cb7-3"><a href="#cb7-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>screen-reader</span>
<span id="cb7-4"><a href="#cb7-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="op">,</span> computer-read-aloud</span>
<span id="cb7-5"><a href="#cb7-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>restriction-type </span>
<span id="cb7-6"><a href="#cb7-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ex">[</span><span class="ss">0</span>..<span class="op">*</span>]<span class="in">:</span></span>
<span id="cb7-7"><a href="#cb7-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>unrestricted<span class="op">,</span> </span>
<span id="cb7-8"><a href="#cb7-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>word-by-word<span class="op">,</span> directions-only<span class="op">,</span></span>
<span id="cb7-9"><a href="#cb7-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>skip-math-equations<span class="op">,</span>skip-chemistry-equations<span class="op">,</span>ext<span class="in">:</span></span>
<span id="cb7-10"><a href="#cb7-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>#</span>
<span id="cb7-11"><a href="#cb7-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>any-name</span>
<span id="cb7-12"><a href="#cb7-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>#</span>
<span id="cb7-13"><a href="#cb7-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>typing-echo<span class="in">:</span></span>
<span id="cb7-14"><a href="#cb7-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a> <span class="ex">[</span><span class="ss">0</span>.<span class="fu">.1</span>] characters<span class="op">,</span> words<span class="op">,</span> characters-and-words<span class="op">,</span> none</span>
<span id="cb7-15"><a href="#cb7-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>speech-rate<span class="in">:</span> </span>
<span id="cb7-16"><a href="#cb7-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ex">[</span><span class="ss">0</span>.<span class="fu">.1</span>]PT<span class="in">:Integer</span> default value= &quot;180&quot; <span class="in">(</span>to indicate words-per-minute<span class="in">)</span></span>
<span id="cb7-17"><a href="#cb7-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>pitch<span class="in">:</span> </span>
<span id="cb7-18"><a href="#cb7-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ex">[</span><span class="ss">0</span>.<span class="fu">.1</span>] PT<span class="in">:Decimal</span> Default value = &quot;0<span class="fu">.5</span>&quot;</span>
<span id="cb7-19"><a href="#cb7-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>volume<span class="in">:</span> </span>
<span id="cb7-20"><a href="#cb7-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ex">[</span><span class="ss">0</span>.<span class="fu">.1</span>] PT<span class="in">:Decimal</span> Default value = &quot;0<span class="fu">.5</span>&quot; <span class="in">(</span>where 0 is no sound and 1 is full volume<span class="in">)</span></span>
<span id="cb7-21"><a href="#cb7-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>link-indication<span class="in">:</span> </span>
<span id="cb7-22"><a href="#cb7-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="ex">[</span><span class="ss">0</span>.<span class="fu">.1</span>] speak-link<span class="op">,</span> different-voice<span class="op">,</span> sound-effect<span class="op">,</span> none</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>tactile</strong></td>
<td>assume braille preferences from the braille support</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb8" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs css"><code class="sourceCode css"><span id="cb8-1"><a href="#cb8-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>text-appearance</span>
<span id="cb8-2"><a href="#cb8-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>Listing either/both of</span>
<span id="cb8-3"><a href="#cb8-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>font-color or background-color</span>
<span id="cb8-4"><a href="#cb8-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>should indicate the user can</span>
<span id="cb8-5"><a href="#cb8-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>change the font and background</span>
<span id="cb8-6"><a href="#cb8-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>colors.</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
<td><div class="example">
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb9" aria-busy="false"><pre
class="sourceCode hljs xml"><code class="sourceCode xml"><span id="cb9-1"><a href="#cb9-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">color-theme</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb9-2"><a href="#cb9-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          [0..1] yellow-blue, blue-yellow, black-rose, rose-black, black-cyan, black-cream, cream-black, </span>
<span id="cb9-3"><a href="#cb9-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          medgray-darkgray, darkgray-medgray, default, default-reverse, high-contrast, high-contrast-reverse,</span>
<span id="cb9-4"><a href="#cb9-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>          ext: (string, 256 character limit)</span>
<span id="cb9-5"><a href="#cb9-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">font-color</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb9-6"><a href="#cb9-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     (optional attribute of color where value is hex)</span>
<span id="cb9-7"><a href="#cb9-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">background-color</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb9-8"><a href="#cb9-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>     (optional attribute of color where value is hex)</span>
<span id="cb9-9"><a href="#cb9-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">font-size</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb9-10"><a href="#cb9-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">font-face</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb9-11"><a href="#cb9-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">line-spacing</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb9-12"><a href="#cb9-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">line-height</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb9-13"><a href="#cb9-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">letter-spacing</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb9-14"><a href="#cb9-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">uniform-font-sizing</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb9-15"><a href="#cb9-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">word-spacing</span>/&gt;</span>
<span id="cb9-16"><a href="#cb9-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>&lt;<span class="kw">word-wrapping</span>/&gt;</span></code></pre></div>
</div></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>thesaurus-on-screen</strong></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>transcript</strong></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>visual-organizer-on-screen</strong></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

The list of predefined supports for use in the QTI 3 AssessmentItem
\<card\> "support" attribute:

1.  additional-directions
2.  audio-description
3.  braille
4.  glossary-on-screen
5.  high-contrast
6.  keyboard-directions
7.  keyword-translation
8.  linguistic-guidance
9.  long-description
10. sign-language
11. simplified-language-portions
12. simplified-graphics
13. spoken
14. tactile
15. transcript

</div>

<div id="shared-vocabularies" class="section appendix">

## B. Shared Interaction Vocabularies<a href="#h.xkhq94h6ry89" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.xkhq94h6ry89" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

Below are lists of shared interaction vocabularies used within QTI 3 to
increase interoperability. The tables and lists are intended to
summarize all the shared interaction vocabularies of QTI 3. Section 3.2
has specific details about the use of the shared interaction
vocabularies, and Section 5 has details for some classes used for
accessibility. See the [1EdTech QTI3 Standardized Shared Vocabulary and
CSS Classes](https://www.imsglobal.org/spec/qti/v3p0/vocab) document for
the complete documentation including examples.

<div id="classes-and-attributes-in-interactions" class="section">

### B.1 Classes and Attributes in Interactions<a href="#h.2mpkdsj012oj" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a><a href="#h.2mpkdsj012oj" class="self-link" aria-label="§"></a>

Classes or attributes in *italics* are used in more than a single
interaction type.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 33%" />
<col style="width: 33%" />
<col style="width: 33%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th><strong>Interaction</strong></th>
<th><strong>Classes</strong></th>
<th><strong>Custom Attributes</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>qti-choice-interaction</td>
<td><p><em>qti-labels-none<br />
qti-labels-decimal</em> <em>qti-labels-lower-alpha</em><br />
<em>qti-labels-upper-alpha</em></p>
<p>qti-labels-suffix-none<br />
qti-labels-suffix-period<br />
qti-labels-suffix-parenthesis</p>
<p><em>qti-orientation-horizontal<br />
qti-orientation-vertical</em></p>
<p><em>qti-input-control-hidden</em></p>
<p>qti-choices-stacking-1<br />
qti-choices-stacking-2<br />
qti-choices-stacking-3<br />
qti-choices-stacking-4<br />
qti-choices-stacking-5</p></td>
<td><p><em>data-max-selections-message</em>   ="any text"</p>
<p><em>data-min-selections-message</em>   ="any text"</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>qti-text-entry-interaction</td>
<td><em>qti-input-width-1<br />
qti-input-width-2<br />
qti-input-width-3<br />
qti-input-width-4<br />
qti-input-width-6<br />
qti-input-width-10<br />
qti-input-width-15<br />
qti-input-width-20<br />

qti-input-width-30<br />
qti-input-width-35<br />
qti-input-width-40<br />
qti-input-width-45<br />
qti-input-width-50<br />
qti-input-width-72</em></td>
<td><em>data-patternmask-message</em>   ="any text"</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>qti-extended-text-interaction</td>
<td><p>qti-height-lines-3</p>
<p>qti-height-lines-6</p>
<p>qti-height-lines-15</p>
<p>qti-counter-up</p>
<p>qti-counter-down</p></td>
<td><em>data-patternmask-message</em>   ="any text"</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>qti-inline-choice-interaction</td>
<td><em>qti-input-width-1<br />
qti-input-width-2<br />
qti-input-width-3<br />
qti-input-width-4<br />
qti-input-width-6<br />
qti-input-width-10<br />
qti-input-width-15<br />
qti-input-width-20<br />
qti-input-width-25<br />
qti-input-width-30<br />
qti-input-width-35<br />
qti-input-width-40<br />
qti-input-width-45<br />
qti-input-width-50<br />
qti-input-width-72</em></td>
<td>data-prompt    ="any text"</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>qti-match-interaction</td>
<td><p>qti-match-tabular</p>
<p>qti-header-hidden (only relevant when qti-match-tabular)</p>
<p><em>qti-choices-top<br />
qti-choices-bottom<br />
qti-choices-left</em><br />
<em>qti-choices-right</em></p></td>
<td><p><em>data-first-column-header</em>  = "any text"</p>
<p><em>data-max-selections-message</em>   ="any text"</p>
<p><em>data-min-selections-message</em>   ="any text"</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>qti-gap-match-interaction</td>
<td><p>qti-gap-placement</p>
<p><em>qti-choices-top<br />
qti-choices-bottom<br />
qti-choices-left</em><br />
<em>qti-choices-right</em></p>
<p><em>qti-input-width-1<br />
qti-input-width-2<br />
qti-input-width-3<br />
qti-input-width-4<br />
qti-input-width-6<br />
qti-input-width-10<br />
qti-input-width-15<br />
qti-input-width-20<br />
qti-input-width-25<br />
qti-input-width-30<br />
qti-input-width-35<br />
qti-input-width-40<br />
qti-input-width-45<br />
qti-input-width-50<br />
qti-input-width-72</em></p></td>
<td><p><em>data-choices-container-width</em>   = " <em>x</em>"
(pixels)</p>
<p><em>data-max-selections-message</em>   ="any text"</p>
<p><em>data-min-selections-message</em>   ="any text"</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>qti-graphic-gap-match-interaction</td>

<p><em>qti-selections-dark</em></p>

<p><em>qti-choices-top<br />
qti-choices-bottom<br />
qti-choices-left</em><br />
<em>qti-choices-right</em></p></td>

<p><em>data-max-selections-message</em>   ="any text"</p>
<p><em>data-min-selections-message</em>   ="any text"</p></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>qti-hottext-interaction</td>

<p><em>data-min-selections-message</em>   ="any text"</p></td>
</tr>
